googleReviews.text:
We chanced upon 450 Gradi as we were exploring Lidingö! We ordered the margarita and the April pizzas, which were both really good!!!! The April pizza especially was so unique with the honey, pine nuts and goat cheese. They mentioned they have the best ranked pizza in Sweden and the 25th best in the world, which is super impressive!!

To top it all off the owner and restaurant staff were extremely warm and friendly and even let us take a look at the kitchen AND let us make our own Nutella pizza!!! Will definitely be back one day again if I come back to Sweden, it was a lovely and once in a lifetime experience ❤️❤️ Thank you so much for your kindness and for making our experience so memorable!!!!

Finally, we visited 450 gradi during one windy day in autumn/October 2024.
And we have to say - this is really Top3 pizzeria in Stockholm 100%.

We were there on Sunday lunch time, not crowdy at all, however can imagine evening on Friday or Saturday, it would be different vibe, or any summer evening.
And you can reach it from Nacka Strand, really nice concept and could be pleasant journey during summertime.

Really good location, the old house, children playground outside, a lot nice interior elements, a big area to sit, different tables etc.

Pizzas were really good! No complains at all, stable 5 from 5.
Toppings, juicy content, prepared by the book.

Fast/professional service.
It feels like the owner likes this place and what he does, this places is fairly ranked TOP50 in Europe.

That was nr.1 for us in 2024, looking forward to visit during summer!

The pizza here is amazingly soft and tastes very delicious. Pasta is also good in terms of ragu sauce (this is the only one we tried). The texture of pasta is a bit too soft for me, but nothing to complain really.

The atmosphere is very scenic and quiet near the waterfront and port. Service is very good.

One of the best restaurants in Stockholm. The food is tasty, of good quality and really italian. The location could not be better, the sea view is amazing and there is a playground in front of the restaurant so kids can play. The service is fantastic and the staff very friendly. Its also spacious.

Best pizza in Stockholm, I recommend to everyone.

beautiful view and friendly service.

would definitely come back again.
Found this place by accident walking around the neighbourhood.  Really friendly staff, great local vibe and beer was damn good. Food of good quality too.
We were here for after work, nice atmosphere and very friendly staff. Good selection of beers. I tried the schnitzel which was really tasty. Would visit again!

This place wreaks of cheap beer and locals spending every night here. There are cheaper beers around but for some reason this place has it's usual crowd.
If you want to meet a real local this could really be the place.
Pretty good place to have a lunch and spend some time. Very friendly staff, dishes are of high quality, atmosphere is quite nice to have enjoy the meal. Can surely recommend.
Cevapcici not near close to the real Balkan one. Wiener Schnitzel was good, but they served it with Soy sauce... and we waited for more the 40 min.
We found the all you can eat buffet lunch (self service) to be honestly priced and salads on offer very fresh. Food is very good and very reasonably priced (c.150 SEK per person).

Like many lunch restaurants in and around MoS, the lunch is overpriced (currently 120(!) SEK).
The food is always excellent though. Varied, tasty and with a great selection of sides.

They've made writing unnecessarily verbose menus their art form (and perfected it! :)), but honestly, the food can do with some flamboyant presentations, given it's impressive quality.

The venue is medium large, and well spaced out. It's rarely crowded herre, even with a full hall of lunch guests. Game days might be different though.
Nice bar with nice people. Good prices and wide choice of alcohols available here. Good place to see when visiting Friend's Arena or Mall of Scandinavia.

Best lunch buffee in the area. Always a wide selection of above average quality dishes, always a choice of meat, fish or vegetarian.
And on some special days, even some fine desserts.
Bad draft beer. Tasted old, bad quality. Probably kept too long in the pipes.

Cute small restaurant with a nice atmosphere. The menu is short but has a good variety of drinks, cocktails, small and main dishes. The snacks were ok, but did not all arrive before the main dishes. The pulpo, eggplant and waffle looked nice and tasted good, but nothing exceptional. All in all a nice but quite pricey place.
Really lovely spot to eat and socialize. Friendly and welcoming service and great food. Quite snug so be prepared to wait for seats but it is worth it.

Nice restaurant with very good bowls. The bowls are not the traditional kind but more of a middle eastern version. Great taste and nicely presented.
The restaurant has a nice atmosphere and friendly staff.

I came for lunch and it was really busy - all tables outside were taken.
Food was tasty. There was no menu in english but the staff translated it to me. Very pleasant atmosphere. Nice music

First enjoy the sunset and then a nice dinner in this small but amazing restaurant. Their tapas are really good and with the right balance between price and quantity. Not the best place if you would like privacy as the tables are really close to each other.

I think the semla is a bit expensive and small. My friend didn't like the taste much, but I found it okay, quite unique when combined with matcha. The other dishes look delicious. I'll come back and try them when I have the chance.

Fully plant-based restaurant with loads of options. The croissant was delicious, as was the brunchtallriken. But I completely forgot to take a pic of that because clearly I was too focused on eating. It can get really crowded so be prepared for that. I also got the matcha latte which left a little to be desired but the food more than made up for it.

cold service and absolutely crawling with wannabe influencers who clearly are not enjoying their meals but r doing it for the vibe. decent drinks and Amazing croissant though, one of the best i’ve ever had. hearty semolina porridge, pretty good but nothing special. looks nice. cute interiors. just do not! come during rush hour.

Wonderful vegan menu. Everything looked so good. I got the avocado toast, which was filling and savoury, and washed it down with the beetroot latte.

The croissant is highly recommended.

Make sure you get here early to get a spot otherwise you’ll need to wait for a while.

Great. Not sure why I haven't gone here earlier. There could be a few more savoury breakfast options, but if you're a fan of sweet  breakfasts, you've got a large choice here. For lunch, there are more savoury options, of course.
It was super busy when we got there, so it's probably worth coming early. Service was lovely and unfussy.

We went into the café and sat down, but no one greeted us or even acknowledged us. We waited for about 5–10 minutes and nobody came, so we decided to sit outside instead. Unfortunately, the table outside was dirty and even had fresh bird droppings on it, and no one seemed to notice or clean it. It was quite disappointing, especially when you expect basic hospitality.

It's  a cozy cafe. I got a good banana cake and black tea. Not so big space inside but packed with small table and chairs. It can be loud if there's plenty of people. There are some seats outside when the weather is good. It has more sandwiches, sallad etc in the menu rather than bakery. They also sell some alcohol. It's a good place to chill.

A cozy place to have breakfast, Fika, or lunch. This place has a great atmosphere with very friendly staff! The foods are amazing. It can get very crowded during the weekend or lunch hours. Make sure to drop by for a coffee. It's also a dog-friendly place. I absolutely recommend it.

Spent three mornings in this cafe during my time in Stockholm, a very decent cafe in the neighbourhood with nice food and coffee, delicious juice and yogurt, highly recommend if you want to chill & relax in the morning

I just moved to the area and I'm so happy to have such a high quality café in the hood. The food is very very good. Pastries are made in the house and very tasty. Great brew coffee and a very solid cappuccino but single shot is the standard which is not my preference.
The food was amazing, portion sizes are big and the most lovely staff ever!! They were so welcoming and kind!! Will come back soon for sure!!

RODE 16 STOPS JUST FOR THIS PLACE. Visiting from California and this breakfast spot was delicious!! All the ingredients tasted so fresh. We got the Poke, pancakes, pastasalat, hot chocolate. This was the best meal I’ve had my entire trip. Spoke to the owner and he lived in California 20yrs ago too! He was so kind and even gave us scoops of gelato to try🥹. Def recommend 5/5⭐️

We don’t have many coffee places in the area so I am at least expecting to get some freshed backed goods (I got a croissant and a pain au chocolat). This was not the case, even though the service and atmosphere are good.

Very good quality and fresh products.
I really like the sandwiches and the kardemummabulle but even the bread is very tasty.  Polite and fast service!

The new owners has improved this cafe a lot and they even have some options for a warm lunch now. The staff is nice and friendly and the prices are quite decent for Stockholm. The outdoor seatings are OK, but better than nothing.

I had high expectations but was a bit disappointed. The food was okay, but nothing special or memorable. You can definitely find better options in Stockholm for this price range. It also felt a bit overpriced—especially the wine.

Service was great, all the 5 plates we shared, and the desert were tasty and delicious. It’s a really great place to try something different and be happily surprised and delighted.

Only reason for 4 stars out of 5 for atmosphere is that is can be a bit noisy since the tables are not very far apart so we had to talk a bit louder, but it was actually not that bad.

Definitely worth going with friends if you like flavourful food.
Really Amazing food. Had the small plates and they were all incredible and finished with the amazing Agnes dessert. So good we went back twice to the restaurant in our 4 day trip

The food is very good, well composed. Strange, unusual white wines, but it was cool to try something new even though they weren't my favorites.. Service was fine but a little stressed (we were late but it wasn't like the place was fully booked). I recommend to try this place.

Amazing food and drinks, very attentive staff. Booked a table on very short notice and we were blown away by the quality of the food. All staff members were super friendly and made great recommendations.
It tends to be a bit loud but overall the vibe is welcoming.
Definitely a bit of a hidden gem.

Small servings, food was very differently spiced then any other Indian restaurants I've been to. Lunch prices didn't match serving size.
The locale was nice and the staff was friendly.
Not a place I would visit again nor recommend to anyone.

Good Indian place with good taste. More authentic compared to other places. I usually order vindaloo a dish I love and these guys actually deliver well on it. It has a restaurant taste to it, yet authentic with vegetable stew. Most just do sauce and meat, but here it was placed as a proper dish. Don't expect much of the side salad, because that is not part of the dish! I call it water and texture to clean ones palette.

You pay a little more but 1000 sek for 3 brunches, an ala cart, coffee and ice cream for one, is a decent price for non-lunch restaurant!
Top service and really good authentic indian food. 5/5!
I ordered the thali. Instead of curry, the meat was served with salad. Indeed, the entire meal was mostly salad. Cannot recommend this place.
I'm not Indian but I can understand a good taste and also I have tried many Indian restaurants , here you can find most of the common Indian foods with good price and I recommend to try here.

Best Ramen I had in a long time. Really cozy and always full. The menu is small but has a very good selection. Also they always have nice natural wines to pair with the food. Definitely coming back again and would definitely recommend it to friends. Takeaways work too if you live in Sodermalm! Thank you 🙏🏼

Every dish we tried was absolutely scrumptious and cooked to perfection. The staff was incredibly helpful and accommodating, making the dining experience even better.

Although the food took a while to prepare, it was definitely worth the wait, as the flavors were spot on. The prices were also very affordable, making it a fantastic value for such quality food. Highly recommend this spot for anyone looking for a delicious and satisfying meal!

Recently, I had the pleasure of trying the best dish I've had in a long time. It was full of flavor, perfectly balanced, and meticulously prepared – you could truly taste the passion in every detail. The atmosphere of the place is cozy and very pleasant, making it feel like home. Definitely one of my favorite spots since I moved to Nytorget. I'll definitely be coming back!

Cute ramen joint with a laid-back vibe and tasty fare for vegetarians and vegans. Veg items on the menu included ramen, mapo tofu and donburi with spicy tofu plus a couple sides.

I enjoyed warm Bebikon miso broth ramen over a soundtrack of jazzy 90s hip hop and it hit the spot on a dreary, rainy evening. The broth was flavorful with a delicate umami, noodles were firm and chewy, and jammy eggs cooked just right. Best ramen I’ve had since years of traveling through Japan!

I’ve ordered delivery from this restaurant twice.

The first time, I tried the ramen (STHLM Shoyu). Since I lived in Japan for a long time, my standards might be high, but unfortunately, I wouldn’t order this again. The broth completely lacked umami, which was disappointing. The noodles had a nice chew, and the chashu was thick and flavorful, but the weak broth brought everything down.

The second time, I had the Spicy Pulled Pork Bowl, and this one was amazing! The portion was generous, with plenty of pulled pork, kimchi, and fresh veggies. The soft-boiled egg and spicy sauce mixed beautifully, making every bite delicious.

Would definitely recommend the Spicy Pulled Pork Bowl!

Great expectations, huge disappointment – way too salty!

I was really looking forward to eating at AI Ramen Klara because I was hungry and craving good ramen, but unfortunately, it was a total letdown.

Almost everything we ordered was overly salty to the point where all the dishes tasted the same. We tried the baoban, two different types of ramen, and chicken, and the only flavor that stood out was salt. It seems like the kitchen might be overdoing it with the soy sauce or seasoning in general.

The only thing that was fine was the edamame, but that’s pretty hard to mess up since it requires no real cooking.

Given the prices, the value for money is really poor. This felt more like a robbery than a fair dining experience.

What's even more frustrating is that after reading other reviews, I realized we’re not the first to point this out. People have been complaining about the food being overly salty for years, but apparently, they just don’t care. It’s disappointing to see that nothing has changed despite all the feedback.

I hope they eventually adjust their recipes, because the concept has potential, but the execution needs serious work.

Advice for others: If you’re sensitive to salt, you might want to think twice before ordering here

This place has sooo much potential, but the food was INEDIBLE. Each dish was saltier than the previous. We started with edemame, you can’t mess that up, that was fine. Next the portobello bao bun, YOU COULDN’T TELL that it has any mushroom in it - from the sauce that it was soaked in, the sauce was somehow both too sweet and too salty, you couldn’t feel any other ingredients. Chicken as well, unfortunately overwhelmed with salt. Tried the mapo tofu ramen - nice start, you can feel the coriander, the noodles have good texture, almost no spice, but THE SALT, everything is deathly salty, and that comes from a savory lover, like I eat everything salty, this was NOT IT. The bebicon ramen was pure salt water, like drinking the sea, and it also had an artificial aftertaste. The service lady was kind, but when the guests tell you they’re unsatisfied with the food and you see they’ve left most of it - you don’t charge them the full amount. Overall disappointing. 75€ thrown in the trash. The worst part is that once I checked the reviews I’ve seen that the people have been complaining about the food being too salty and obviously no one cares.
Lovely spot for tasty ramen, though I had a pulled pork on rice dish, also very good. Decent sake too. Great value for Stockholm prices, good music and friendly service.

It’s sad to see a place that used to be good dropped to this level, I was here years ago and the quality this time didn’t match my memories at all.
The ramen, I don’t know what kind of fusion they were trying to create here, but the taste was definitely not worth the effort of trying something new. The broth was basically kimchi liquid mixed together with some fond and grease, and it was overwhelmingly salty that I could not drink it. The 63 degree egg was at good texture, but no marination flavors reached inside the egg. The charsiu was “Lagom” (not good not bad), and the noodles seemed to be homemade. The whole dish had no balance at all, salt took over all the tastes. The fried chicken was also extremely salty, the coating sauce definitely lacked of sweetness and acidity, and the meat was neither juicy nor tender.

Totally delicious ramen - such rich gorgeous broth and fresh beautiful vegetables!!! Plus the barman making the cocktails is a genius. If you have the chicken donbury, don't get the fried chicken starter as it's the same thing. You can't book, we only had to wait for a minute and were seated at the bar.

name: Akkurat

googleReviews.text:
Stunning meal at Akkurat in Stockholm.

The chanterelles on toast were heavenly - so good that it would have been very easy to have them for appetizers, the main, and dessert!

The beef with potatoes was excellent, and the onions played a starring role rather than just a side note!

The passionfruit sorbet was a wonderful palate cleanser.

Definitely would return - and probably for the very same meal!

It was so nice to sit and have some drinks and food. I love the atmosphere and the vibe. The sound rack is not that loud and it’s perfect. Love the way the service was provided special thanks to SELMA who helped us to select the food and she was so good at what she doing. Good food for better quality. Quantity also good. They have our side seating also. Mainly the kitchen is open until 11:00p.m. We impressed and will come again.

We had booked a table for two in advance and had a great dinner. Food and beer was delicious. I will especially emphasise the waiter recommending whiskey and saying: “I’ll go and check with my colleague, she knows more than me”, great attitude.
I would recommend and come back.

Really nice restaurant with a great variety of craft beers. Fair prices, the food was great and service really helpful and nice. They know the menu well, were able to recommend a beer and overall we had a great time in Akkurat.

For a sunny Sunday afternoon the atmosphere was disappointing. A few people, but pretty dull. No buzz.

The beer we tried was very good. However, it was outrageously over priced.

I get it. It's a specialty craft beer and they cost more than your average mass produced offering. I've been drinking craft beers all over the world for over 30 years.

On a quality to value scale, Sweden comes in at the very bottom. Some reasonable beers at totally unreasonable prices.

In all fairness, this venue is not alone with their price gouging policy. It's a Sweden wide malaise.

In conclusion if you just want to try one or two beers the quality is acceptable. Make sure to bring your own group of friends for entertainment.

If you're in for an extended session of craft beer indulgence, take a flight to any one of many European cities for a weekend.

You'll find a far better selection, better quality, and it will cost you a whole lot less. Even after you pay for fares and accommodation.

googleEditorialSummary: Huge choice of ales & malt whiskies in a lively tavern, plus hearty pub fare & live bands.

name: Al Forno

googleReviews.text:
For those who say eating and drinking in Sweden is expensive! I say naaaaaaa!
The owners were warm and welcoming. The atmosphere was so relaxed.
I popped in for a drink and spent 3 hours watching the world go by.
My next time returning to Stockholm I will be back

If you like Italian food, this place is definitely worth a visit! 🍝 The portions are generous, the ingredients are fresh and high quality, and everything tastes homemade. The prices are fair considering the amount and quality you get, which makes it a great value in Stockholm. Highly recommended!

This place is actually really nice and well priced, it’s fairly basic seating and the food is simple Italian but that is nice when most Italian restaurants in stockholm are Swedish fusion (cream and truffle etc.)! The fresh tortellini and the ragu were very nice and perhaps best of all the half bottle of Montepulciano was a first! Friendly service. Will return.
A nice small place in the city center. The prices are moderate, the dish sizes are large and quite tasty. The staff is very friendly.
Nice Italian place to enjoy your lunch. I tried tortellini with spinach and it was awesome 🍝🇮🇹 12 euros lunch menu: 1 pasta or pizza + coffee and some salads with bread and olives

googleEditorialSummary: Modest pizza joint with a classic menu of Italian dishes, plus some tables on a sidewalk terrace.

googleReviews.text: Super tasty tapas. Small plates were full of flavours. Pretty big seating area. Servers were very friendly. Menu was pretty extensive to be able to select all kinds. Mushroom in oil, shrimps, tacos everything was nice.

This was by far was one of the best restaurants I ate at in Sweden! Everything we ate was delicious! I highly recommend the tuna (not pictured) & the beef tartare, but honestly everything was so good & the service was very quick. You won’t be disappointed going here. Great for a group or a date night. Hope we can eat here again on our next visit.

Arrived at 8 pm and left at 8.30 pm. Totally ignored by staff, got menus but that’s it. Cannot say anything the food - since we didn’t have the possibility to order. Luckily found a nice place nearby. Cannot recommend.
Good food & atmosphere in the heart of Vasastan. Tip: Go on the earlier side if visiting on a weekend and/or sunny day, as the terrace is lovely but will get crowded!

Great place for a drink. Great selection of beers, wine, spirit and a bar tender who can make cocktails 😁
Staff were friendly and helpful and the bartender was happy to discuss drink options.
The beer was good as we're the cocktails.
Clean and tidy bar. Only a single toilet for everyone, so you may have to queue.
Plenty of tables and seating.
The pizzas and burgers are awesome, totally worth trying. Also the asian girl and the other waitress were super polite and nice. If I come to Sweden, I'm definitely looking forward to coming back.

I always enjoy visiting Allé Kök och Bar. The ambience is warm and cozy, making it the perfect place to relax and unwind. The food and drinks are consistently excellent, everything is well prepared and full of flavor.
The service is genuinely welcoming and attentive, which makes a real difference. A special thank you to Ismail, who never fails to make my visits even more pleasant. His friendliness and professionalism truly stand out.
Highly recommended!
This neighbourhood bar was such a treat, great food and drinks, very good service, and nice atmosphere, we had a culinary feast, they should be 5/5 stars😉 Thank you!!
Delicious food, cosy and warm atmosphere. We liked both food and atmosphere. The owner of the restaurant is really friendly
Super handsome guy owns the place. amazing. Love it. I wanna go everyday. Best kök och bar. Even have its name in my student hat.

This is a cute, yet, outstanding restaurant. We had an awesome lunch and came back within a month and ordered platters for catering. The portions were generous and tasted really good. We come here often now. The business is family owned. The husband and wife run the restaurant. They recently acquired this restaurant and are hard workers. We can see the care they have for the restaurant as it was immaculately clean. They were very sincere in the preparation of our food. The service, quality and presentation of the food really makes this restaurant a great stop if you are on the go or want to take a few minutes to enjoy a meal.

Wow! You must try it. We were exhusted and hungry in the afternoon, so I looked up good food nearby. This restaurant had great reviews, and now I know why.
It’s small, cozy, very clean, and welcoming. The chicken poke bowl was amazing. Portion was big with lots of Fresh veggies, avocado, mango, and rice that smelled wonderful. It felt like eating a homemade meal from mom.

Forget about other poke bowls in Stockholmzthis will definitely be our new regular spot!

The sushi taste was amazing as it was prepared fresh and also they customised for me as I don’t like nigiri tofu they made Avacado one for me .
Super happy 😃  best cozy winter sushi place in stockholm . Authentic Japanese sushi 🍣

Tucked away gem in a residential neighborhood, away from the tourists, which is all the better cuz I don't want this secret out. It's not much for atmosphere, but on a nice spring day sitting outside it was delightful.

They say a lot of sushi depends on the rice and here they nailed it. Slightly sticky, just the right softness. Had the absolutely delicious lunch sushi mix. It looked so pretty, A+ for the presentation as well. It comes with free miso soup, self-service style.

Needless to say, highly recommend this little spot. I can't wait to come back!

The roll and fish was so fresh! You also get miso soup yourself :) the couple working here is just adorable. And the plates are so cute as well. Will definitely come back for some good quality sushi !!!

Not a great experience. We ordered muhammara, hummus and Baba ghanoush for starter all were neither fresh nor authentic. For main course we ordered Kafta, Tawok and vegetarian dishe.
Kafta was salty and the chicken breast of Tawok was tasteless  the vegetarian dish was OK
The staff are polite and helpful but the service was extremely slow. It took more than an hour until we got the first thing on our table.
Only had a couple beers. Nice place!

Always been very happy with this place but it seems like there has been a change in management and new staff. The size of the portions are smaller and not as generous as before, still tasty though.Staff not very attentive when guests are coming in for a meal. Hoping it is better next time.

Primarily been here for a beer and a bite towards evening with people from the neighbourhood. It’s excellent for a sit-down. During sunny days they have a nice serving area outside that gets your vitamin-D going. If you’re laid-back then you will enjoy this place for sure. The food I’ve eaten is solid and nice staffers to.
Nice and economical place for afterwork. Best lamb leg in Stockholm!

Well, this was a surprise and it's one of the most authentic Vietnamese restaurants we've eaten at in Stockholm. Very flavourful dishes and the Pho bo kha was a surprise. The only thing really missing was the paté on the Banh mi, but as the pork was really juicy and saucy, it was barely missed. Not the nicest seating though, as you sit in the lobby of the building next to the restaurant, so it's not a spot for a romantic dinner.
Nice Banh mi at this vietnamese restaurant. Good food quality but no drinks available, only water. The service was nice.

Restaurang An in Kungsholmen always delivers the best food and service. Their Banh Mi is hands down the best in Stockholm. Even during busy lunchtimes, service is quick, and the food is fresh and tasty. A must-visit place for Vietnamese food—easily 5 stars from me!

Best Ban-Mi ever!
even including Ban-Mi I've tried in Hochimin / Hanoi, this is so great..!

I came too late for the baguette :D Bánh mì.
1st I did not recognized a place where to make order nor to pay. One person, merging with the environment, is taking orders, handling payments and handing owner number of orders to each customer.
There is seating place in front of a counter in the restaurant and another seating place in the entrance hall of the  neighbouring office building.
It can get really drafty on winter next to main entrance.
Nevertheless I enjoy my second option Bún trôn rice noodles with pork. I will be back for the Bánh mì

Anki's cafe is like stepping into a quaint museum to eat lunch, while dining on food that is clearly made with love and care you can leisurely gaze at old posters, nicknacks and objects hanging on the walls or on shelves, the only downside is that there is not enough parking space during the lunch rush!

The food was mostly cold and i felt more Than happy to leave 😳
Sorry
The staff is nice but the food isn't special in any way. Remove 20 SEK from the price tag, then I might eat here again.
This cafe was really interesting to me, give me old traditional vibes.

One of the best gluash soups I've ever had. Cozy and popular place to eat lunch, really good food with many options (buffet) and nice staff.
Highly recommended.

Poor quality, noodles were pathetic, oily.
Only satay was okej and gaeng pheng was okej but not value for money. Thumbs down 👎 never going to order. Learned a lesson.
Really tasteful and good Thai! Really good service!
Tasty food and friendly staff. I recommend to visit it
Very good vegetarian options! I ate Pad Thai special with tofu and it was very tasty!
Always really friendly and accommodating, special requests are catered for without hesitation. Great place for lunch!

We had a group of four. The food was great! We also ran into the issue of certain items not being available, but the previous reviews warned us of that happening.

I will say the table could have been a bit cleaner, and there were some fruit flies around. However, I would come back!

Firstly, tremendously rude staff. They consistently don't have items on the menu - when wanting to order pasta they say they are out of pasta noodles and are unwilling to go across the street to buy a pack. Maybe have a spare box of pasta if youre a restaurant with pastas on the menu? And the quality of what they do have is mediocre at best.
Great food and Fast service. The Lamb Souvlaki is amazing! Nice to sit outside in the summer. Big portions
Not a lot of people eating here, mostly beer drinkers, but the food was really good. Might come back, I'm not in Årsta that often.
We had a Birthday celebration last Saturday evening & the atmosphere & food was great.

Exceed my expectation!

During the weekend, you will see some the line already. I was attracted by that line too.

The sausage was amazing and blend well together with sauce, topping and crispy bread. The price is standard but the portion is huge.

There are a few tables you can sit and enjoy your snacks.
Excellent Korv 🌭 and Hot Chocolate.  We had the currywurst with baguette and sauerkraut.
Best hotdogs in Stockholm! Also, the woman serving them is very nice 🥰
Great ice cream, just next to the last swing bridge in Stockholm

Best hotdogs of Stockholm
In the heart of Djurgården

name: Artilleriet

googleReviews.text: The drinks are fun snd ambitious but the food is not great - large portions that would have benefited from a bit more attention to taste instead of volume. Halfway through our sitting the music was turned up with way much too uptempo for a dinner restaurant.

This was our first stop in Stockholm! Food and service was lovely however we were really saddened to read the cocktail that berated our home city of Miami. It felt really extreme and pained us deeply… Please reconsider these harsh words, such hate really dampened our time in your establishment and we feel you can do better! But with that said our waitress was truly lovely and we enjoyed our food ❣️

Fine dining, quality foods, great service, amazing ambient..
This is where you want to have an elegant moment with high quality dishes.
Could enjoy delicacy of Swedish cuisine with selective drinks.
Located in the museum, definitely with an artistic touch of interior.

Probably one of the best places I've had drinks at in Stockholm bar scene. Very professional staff who knows their drinks and what to recommend. Go for the the Glögg drink, really amazing taste with akvavit.

Excellent place with good and loving food, nice staff and a nice locale.
My only complaint is that the sound level was high, must be tiring for the staff. I would recommend hanging some big and heavy fabrics in the ceiling to dampen thing down.
The drinks were good and fun, so I recommend you try them as well.

googleEditorialSummary: Hip haunt serving creative bar bites & mains alongside cocktails, wine & craft beer.

name: Asian Post Office

googleReviews.text: Went here for lunch after hearing a lot of good about it! The expectations were met with a lovely experience. The atmosphere was buzzing, decor very simple and aesthetic and the main highlight being the food and the service. Will definitely be back here for both lunch and dinner! 🍽️

We went here for drinks. Got the Thai Basil (seems the most popular drink as we saw at least 20-30 of these drinks being made in about 1 hour) and also the Spicy Pineapple. The Thai Basil drink was amazing, fresh, balanced sweet tones and the star of the show was the coconut foam on top, absolutely delicious! The Spicy Pineapple was more towards the lemony-sour end and honestly not spicy at all, so it’s easy to enjoy! Both really good. We’d have to go back to try the food :)

Absolutely loved the experience here! The fusion food is spot on – creative yet comforting. The ambience is super chill, making it a great place to hang out . They have plenty of vegetarian options, which is a big plus. The mushroom croquettes and steamed dumplings are to die for – highly recommend trying them!

Dinner from 18-21 and I had a wonderful evening at APO in STHLM.

A dear friend to me just set up the whole evening for a total of five persons. He told the Waiter/Waitress to do a little bit of everything for the starters, mains and the desserts.

This was fantastic, just sharing the food and getting a little bit of "not" everything for a new resturant that I've never visited was an amazing idéa.

Food: Amazing food, from starters, mains into the desserts. Loved every taste sensation.

Drinks:
Coca Cola Zero and then
Thai Basil - Virgin non-alcoholic drink

The Thai Basil - Virgin was just AMAZING. So the APO know what they are doing both for food, drinks and service.

Service:  One of the best services I have gotten in a resturant in Stockholm.

Ambiance: Tuesday from 18-21 for me it was perfect, since I have some issues with hearing. I could hear everyone clearly from 18 to 20:30 ish, after that the sound increased. Which I know is common and will always happen ;)

Can I recommend it?: Yes, 100% I will visit APO again for sure, and bring my family.

Asian Post Office in Stockholm is an absolute standout and a must-visit dining experience.

The food is exceptional — beautifully presented, packed with flavour, and clearly crafted with care and confidence. Every dish feels thoughtfully balanced, combining bold Asian influences with refined execution. From the first bite to the last, it’s obvious this is a kitchen that knows exactly what it’s doing.

The atmosphere is just as impressive. The restaurant strikes a perfect balance between stylish and welcoming, with a vibrant energy that makes it ideal for both a relaxed dinner and a special night out. The setting feels modern and buzzing without being overwhelming.

Service deserves special mention as well. The staff are attentive, knowledgeable, and genuinely enthusiastic about the food and drinks, offering great recommendations and making the whole experience feel smooth and enjoyable.

Asian Post Office isn’t just another good restaurant — it’s memorable. Whether you’re visiting Stockholm or lucky enough to live there, this is a place you’ll want to return to. Highly recommended.

googleEditorialSummary: Innovative Asian dishes, small plates & various cocktails featured in a chic, modern dining room.

googleReviews.text:
Yes, please! It's a lovely restaurant.
The food was delicious! Also my starter was delicious! I ate deer meat for my main course, whoops! Tender and succulent.

Overall, a pretty great evening with a good atmosphere, good service, and great food.

This restaurant delivered an exceptional experience with quick, attentive service and a well-curated menu. The Löjromstoast was fresh and flavorful, the Ankbröst Café de Paris perfectly seared, and the Mörk Chokladmousse rich and indulgent. Each dish was expertly paired with wines, enhancing the flavors beautifully.

A standout was the house-made elderflower drink, a refreshing and elegant touch. With great food, seamless service, and a warm atmosphere, this was a truly memorable evening. Highly recommended!

The food was on the salty side both main course and appetizers. But delicious anyhow. The only disappointment on the food side was the dessert. Tiramisu was heavy on the cream and the ladyfingers were dry and not soaked properly in coffee.
Little bit loud but cozy. They could’ve put the tables a little bit further from each other.
Very nice, attentive and friendly staff!
Really good food and service, and decent atmosphere. Unfortunately the portions are pretty tiny, so better have pre-dinner before coming.

Great place and friendly staff. They also allow dogs which is good. However, you have to sit in the lounge, close to bar. but it’s comfortable and good. They have good food option. May be little less for vegetarians but they can adapt and can change dishes to vegetarian if you ask them. Paradise for non - vegetarians. Very nice music and ambience.

Some.of the best food in Stockholm.

A great friendly little place. Easy to find. Friendly staff.

And the food is mind blowingly good.

Can't recommend it highly enough.
One of the best value-for-the-money places you can find in central Stockholm. Quality food, a variety of choices and great service.
Good food. Line is always a bit too long though. very popular place. Great meze and the different salsas/ sauce are good as well. You have to try the babaganoush and mhamara
Quite avarage food. Definitely not authentic. Portion is small, the food was cold and falafels were tastless as well as very dry
Good amazing exquisite ravishing food.

Long time, no see. Still tasty food and a couple of cold beer, all at good prices for central Stockholm. Love the music and that it wasn't loud when we visited on a Saturday afternoon on a cold day in January. The staff was service-minded so a shout out to Bagpiper's Inn. Too bad you can book a table next to the bar, but Cheers!!

The vibes of the restaurant is nice. It feels cozy. The cheeseburger tasted okay, next time will probably try something else on the menu. The sticky toffee pudding was really really good. I would highly recommend it.
Cracking pub, made me feel like I’m back at my local in England. Murphy’s on tap can’t beat it; as well as stein glasses Budvar. Proper pub.

I had known about this place for some time.  I really like their selection of beer.   However I was surprised when a friend said they had really good ribs.   I tried them the first time - Now this is my go to place for Ribs.   The meat just falls off the bone.  Highly recommended!

It is just any generic irish pub of the world. I feel almost nothing about the place, but of course it delivers what is expected - beers in a dark wood environment. They have a nice outdoor seating for a couple of sun hours in the summer evenings though.

Lovely tasting pastries in the cosy cafe with a great view and location.  They offer a breakfast deal with coffee and a sandwich bun for 45 kr from 7-11,  and lunch from 11-14. Easily accessible by bus options from Slussen, a great suburb to have a walk around.
A cosy place, clean with nice cakes with good coffee and friendly prices (doesn’t happen often in Stockholm nowadays).

Charged 60 for a poorly baked croissant with almonds!!
What a rip off!!
Not bad

Horrible experience. Found mold on one of the pastries we bought. Took it back and asked for the money back. The staff responded horribly (they were angry at us for some reason) and refused to give us any money, or even say sorry. We finally got the money back (in cash) for one of the pastries but not the rest, which I think is crazy when you find a big piece of mold. I would not recommend the cafe, I would rather recommend the staff to get some manners and learn how to be nice to customers, and to not serve moldy food.

name: BallBreaker

googleReviews.text: One of places to fun and food together. You can do activities together and eat when you are tired

+
Friendly staff, fun, lots of activitites.
-
Little space between biljard tables, many tables are flooded with alcohol, very stuffy inside.

The venue is nice but i was weirded out when i asked if they have white wine on the meny, and the waiter responded by saying "yes, we have that in case there are kids".
Making fun of your customers maybe not so nice? It makes me wonder how professional this place is.
Large restaurant in the heart of Kungsholmen. The julbord was good, really like that you can add an activity to your booking (like bowling) the whole family enjoyed the experience

Ballbreaker is a fantastic place for a group outing! We had a blast bowling with 16 people, and the location is super convenient - right next to a metro and bus station. The ambience is awesome, with cool lighting and music, and they have a variety of games to choose from besides bowling. Highly recommend for a fun group activity! There's a restaurant located upstairs that might be a good option for post-bowling meals, but I haven't been there myself.

googleEditorialSummary: Entertainment & leisure complex with bowling alley & slot car racing, plus spa with steam room.

googleReviews.text: Nice cozy bar, and they play more mainstream 90s American pop later in the night which is nice. Price point is really good.

The chief has recently changed. As a result they changed the menu compared to January 2018 and years before that. Now the portions are quite small (they were huge!) and my favorite specialitet has gone, but food is really tasty. They have several small tables outside. Goulash is on the photo
We were basically expelled from the bar. Rude staff
Really great vibe and cheap beer !

When we were standing outside, the security guard lured us in and suggested some real good food. We had such a cool waiter, and as soon as he heard the German accent, he also switched to German. Super friendly but still professional. The food was also pretty good.
Ok
Ok
Good live performance, good atmosphere and nice clientele

A regular pub, where you can encounter both funny characters and a bit rowdy gap-necks like all pubs, however, the staff is present and even if something gets a bit crazy or too loud. A bit expensive, big strong but I assume it's "market price" standard glass and good, clear where the toilet is. Nice that you can sit everywhere, that is: there are several different types of tables and seats such as sofa, chairs, bar stools, 4 and 4 by the window, alone, 2 and 2, long tables, further into the room, etc.
One of the better ones in the area, a real party until the evening.

My summer story: be careful if you want to buy some snacks!
On the short side of the main building there is a long ramp, wide stairs, double doors. There is no sign saying "no entrance"! If you enter here, they will assume the wrong thing about you.
The rental window is 40x40cm on the long side!
This park is amazing, if we thougt that in Stockholm center we have good parks, outside they are amazing! It has animals, lote pool, wood park circuit, and a castle park. Its worth going.
Very clean and baby friendly place,,,my baby just learnt swimming to see other child,, i really like this place, also good spot for picnics.
A great playground. Many different things to play with. Petting zoo nearby.

Great playground for, both small and big kids. Farm animals can be looked at right next to the playground, and a huge grassy area surrounds it. Grill place with tables and benches are really close too.

I booked a table at this place for my birthday because my aunt recommended it. It’s such a random name??? Haha but honestly… amazing!!!! Yum food, classics on the menu, lovely atmosphere inside and epic service. Such good vibes. It was obvious that the crew were a bit understaffed as we waited a fair bit on our meals but it wasn’t an issue. I got a free birthday tiramisu on the house and we ended the night with shots. My family loved the vibe and the guy serving us was so fun. Love it! Also.. gorgeous location by the water. I had the plank steak… yum!!! Would recommend!
Service was great and felt very welcomed. The food was great, it’s like a hug to my stomach and very fulfilling. The vibe was just on point. Definitely coming back when I visit Stockholm 🫶

Most of our food was below standard. Only one had a good dish. We were 8. The service came with constant nasty remarks. Don't know why, but it left a bitter taste in the mouth. The seaside view wasn't available where we were sitting inside. They build a terrace and that blocks the vieuw. There was almost nobody eating in the restaurant. That was a clue that it was not the best. Specifically because it was a holiday. I personally wouldn't go back or recommend this restaurant.

I really enjoyed the food and the nice atmosphere. But the feeling of fine dining went out the window when the sauces came served in plastic cups. You know, those you get at the local kebab place?

The wait for a waiter was longer than expected as well, considering it wasn't especially crowded this evening.

It was such a mismatch and sustainable error I got surprised.

But, the food was great. I will probably come back again. Hopefully without the plastic cups.

Went there with a colleague without any expectations – and ended up having the best lamb I’ve ever tasted. The service was also fantastic throughout the entire evening. Will definitely be coming back!

Absolutely loved this place! The vibe is fantastic, relaxed yet lively with great music and a really welcoming atmosphere. The food was outstanding. The beef tartare was hands down the best I’ve had, the burrata was super creamy and fresh, and the salmon carpaccio was perfectly seasoned. Service was friendly and attentive without being overbearing. Definitely a spot I’ll be coming back to. Highly recommend!

Great atmosphere in the bar with dim lighting and cozy vibes. The staff is incredibly friendly and always happy to help. Perfect spot for a quick snack or a pre-party drink. We had the Reuben sandwich, and it was absolutely delicious. Definitely coming back to try more!

Best beef tartar I ever had!!! And the sashimi was amazing. I can also recommend their house white, it was an excellent surprise.
Atmosphere is cozy and intimate, feels like the perfect place for a date.
Their bathroom is also very funny and cool
Cozy Bar in Kungsholmen. The service team is really great and the food tastes super good 🤩 Enjoyed my time and will come back soon.
Exteremely delicious dishes combined with curated list of wines also available by the glass. Pure joy!
Perfect for small and chill concerts, easy to have a beer while enjoying live music
The gig by John Smith was great, but it was very disturbed by sounds from behind the wall. I think bar Brooklyn should improve the sound isolation if they invite great artists.
A bit shady place. Just a dance floor. We booked a table online. But there were no tables at arrival.

Avoid
Went for a couple Of drinks on a saturday evening alone as i am a frequent solo traveller, on the 20th april and on the entrance I paid 160sek to enter, then i sat with the bar and had a beer (84sek),the bar was still empty with few ppl. After i ordered a whisky with cola and still sat with the bar minding my own business and enjoying my night. Time passed, and ordered 2 more whisky and coke, that each costed 144sek and drank relaxed and ppl. Began to increase and music was good and i was having a good time. Then i walked to the bathroom, and after going out, a security guy came. Up on me telling me. To walk out with him and i asked what was d. Reason and he  did not answer but only asking how much drinks I had and when we were out of the place, he said that i was not. Desired there and that i was not going to be served or granted entrance again. I asked again what was his problem, and he did not specify . It was a big disrespect and bullying to a tourist that was only minding his own busines, being a good client and bothered no one. It. Is the first place it happened to me in no other country.
Not recommended,. Especially for solo travellers. Be aware
Cozy seating outside with a good selection of beers. Stop by on a band night and listen to some laid back rocky tunes.

Ordered a burger with only cheese and sauce - still got onions and cucumber (although they removed the lettuce as requested). Also found a hairstrand halfway through the burger but didn't have time to complain as we were in a rush..

The burger was good but expensive. Wouldn't come back again.
Portions are very small and it's too expensive. Burger, fries & coke cost 209 kr. Was good tho. Salad was 235 kr. But wouldn't go again.
No idea how to get a beer here or anything else. There's a QR code on the table, which leads to a web site where one can choose but not actually order.
the best hamburger I've eaten, the customer service was also pleasant :)
Tasty burger but the coleslaw was lame. Need more mayonnaise not naise;)

name: Bar Kaja
openingHours: Mo off; Tu-Th 16:00-23:00; Fr-Sa 16:00-21:45; Su closed

googleReviews.text: Excellent vibe. Good selection and proper price for the beer. Nice service. One of the best washrooms in Stockholm they even got a poem on the wall…DOPE.

Nice little bar, one of the back streets of Stockholm
Beer is cheap, compared to some places. Friendly server, out door seating, nice decor inside.

Although a little on the small side. its a hidden little gem 🍺🍺

Bar Kaja was described as a gem of a bar in another review, and I’ll have to second that.

The draft beer list is relatively short, but definitely quality over quantity — all very reasonably priced. There’s also a great selection of cans, plus options for non-beer drinkers, including non-alcoholic.

We stumbled in during their pub quiz night and were quickly encouraged to join in. It turned out to be one of the funniest quizzes I’ve done (we still didn’t win).

Their website mentions they’re known for craft beer and empanadas. I didn’t get to try the empanadas this time, but that just means I’ll be back.

It’s the kind of place you could easily miss — tucked away on a side street off the main drag — but well worth seeking out.

The friendly neighborhood bar you have been looking for! Fun selection of beers that’s always changing.  Cosy atmosphere. 100% unpretentious. Nice small menu with mostly vegetarian/vegan food.
Friendliest staff in Stockholm - when they aren’t cheating in Rummikub…

My friends and I were bar-hopping on a Friday evening in Stockholm when we stumbled upon this cozy little bar in Södermalm. We immediately loved the warm, laid-back atmosphere and the friendly, professional staff.

We started with Pilsners, but after a while we felt like trying something different. The staff were super helpful—they even offered us a small taste of their draft beer recommendations before we ordered, which was a really nice touch. It made the whole experience feel thoughtful and welcoming.

There were snack options too - we went with chips, which hit the spot.

If we’re ever back in Stockholm, we’ll definitely be coming back to this place. Thank you for the great service!

They sell rotten beer. Even after exchanging one, they still gave another rotten beer. So disgusting. When you order fish and chips, they serve three pieces of frozen pre-made cods that you can buy from coop at 20 sek. I wasted 340 sek for this trashes.

The drinks are reasonably priced which is more than can be said for most bars in Stockholm. The atmosphere and staff weren't very pleasant though. The bouncers hovered over the tables a lot and we felt pressured to keep ordering drinks. Anyone with an empty glass in front of them for more than 5 mins was asked to leave.

Very bad experience. The staff was extremely rude, we were forced to order new drinks all the time and were soon kicked out for no reason apart from making space for new costumers, even though we haven't finished our drinks yet. Cheap but definitely NOT WORTH IT.

Absolutely incompetent waitress who did not know her way around at all and could not offer us a menu and prices. After we ordered at the bar and had our beers we were asked by the bouncer directly to go because the restaurant is supposedly fully booked from 9 pm. We had 09:10 p.m. and no one was waiting outside the door. Two Swedish guys from the next table came into conversation with us and said that this wasn’t true at all and the owners were kind of racist and money-grubbing. Therefore, an absolute recommendation never to go there!
Typical Indian ‘singara’ in Sweden. Loved it

Lovely atmosphere and very good cocktails — honestly the highlight of the place.

The food, while tasty, is priced like it’s trying to fund the bar’s retirement. Three bites for ~€18 and €5 per meatball is… ambitious. I wasn’t full, but my wallet was, so that solved the problem.

My friends and i Ordered for some cocktails 🍹 and it felt like we ordered for mocktails. It tasted like juice with a lot of ice. Told the bartender but he cared less and didn’t do a thing about it. I won’t recommend this place.
Atmosphere was cosy, great place to go with friends. The food was really good, the drinks however were supposed to be 5cl but they were way smaller. Either way a great experience.

We were 3 friends having a good time at a good table, further from the speakers so we could talk. Suddenly we were forced to be moved to be seated with strangers right next to the speakers, so we couldn't talk anymore. The waitress claimed she couldn't let us sit at a table for 8, so we were moved to a table for 6 with 2 randoms. It was clear they didn't care about customer experience, they just wanted the place full to the brim with paying customers. We left shortly thereafter.
One of Stockholms cheapest bars with a pretty cozy atmosphere. Be aware that it can get pretty loud and hard to find seats during Friday/weekend nights

name: Baras Imperium
openingHours: Mo closed; Tu-Th 15:00-01:00; Fr-Sa 15:00-03:00; Su closed

googleReviews.text: It’s a good atmosphere for drinks. Burger wasn’t that good though. Big portions, good fries, some sauces on the side. Burger was under cooked though which could’ve been ok should the meat had been higher quality. Bacon topping was too thick.

Beer tasted and smelled like sweaty feet. Asked and got a new beer which also tasted like sweaty feet.
Nice music though!🙏

Currently waiting for ma food :)

The place seems nice, was very busy at posting but managed to get a lonesome spot at the bar for one watching the burgers  cook.

I'm not a drinker but the drinks are flowing nicely, I ordered myself a coke and its  it proper cola, it's some weird hippy trash cola which is bleh. Fritz Kola
Great Aperol Spritz and pizza. The toilets are however very badly maintained which kind of destroys the whole experience.

This is the worst bar I have been as an African. I  received a racist action which was very surprising.  I bought a glass of beer in less than 30 minutes a staff called the security guard and told him I am drunk and should leave the bar. I found it very wired and racist. The act is because I was the only colored person in the bar. I guess it is a right wing bar. Anyways lesson learned because there are several bars in Stockholm so it is not worth visiting. May you continue your act to many colored people because you have every right to act according to your will.

When you entered the restaurant , you have to wait to be seated, but they came and show table directly (fast service), and we thought steak is gonna take some time, but food came so fast and taste was  perfect 🫶🏻, only sad about drinks they serve only Swedish beers 🍺 which is not suits me I feel sick the next day if I drink more than 1 or 2. Anyway and the house wine was just little weird. 🍷 btw service was fantastic

Very disappointing – terrible value for money

Very disappointing experience at Barbeque steakhouse & bar in Stockholm.

We ordered one sharing platter, a large board with different types of meat, which also included fish (lobster), for €80. The quality was clearly not there. On top of that, the quantity of meat served did not match the weight indicated on the menu — there was noticeably less than advertised.

The lobster, included in the platter, had a very strong and unpleasant smell and was difficult to eat. When we mentioned this to the server, we were told that it was “normal”. No commercial gesture, no discount, nothing.

Another serious issue was with the drinks. The menu stated 500 ml, but the glasses served were 400 ml (this was even written on the glasses). When we pointed this out, the response was very unprofessional:

“Are you really going to argue over 1 euro?”

Yes — especially when 500 ml is clearly written on the menu and the customer is right. Once again, they refused to acknowledge their mistake.

On top of that:
•	Cold and unwelcoming reception
•	The restaurant itself was cold
•	Unfriendly servers
•	The owner was also unpleasant

Overall, a very bad experience from start to finish. We are extremely disappointed, especially considering how much money we spent.
I absolutely do not recommend this place.

The pizza was surprisingly delicious—definitely better than I expected. However, the crab dish was a bit of a miss for me and not my favorite. Still, the quality of the pizza made it a satisfying experience overall!

The restaurant is very nice.  There were only two working when we arrived so they did the best they could with the short staff.  The food was tasty but the steak was plated too early and arrived at the table Luke warm at best while the veggies etc were piping hot.

This place looks fantastic. The decor is wonderful and the lighting impeccable.

Unfortunately things started to go downhill when we were seated. The waitress was pushing us to order within 2 minutes of getting menus.

The one thing we asked was whether there was a chilli sauce with the burger and were assured there wZ not. So we ordered ribs and a burger.

The food was the next disappointment. Despite assurances, there was chilli sauce on the burger. Reporting this to the waitress resulted in an apology, but no offer to correct the issue.

Next, the ribs appeared to be relying on size alone for their sales. The meat itself was tasteless. I could almost believe the sous-vide bag split. The BBQ sauce served with them was flavourful, but limited in quantity. Overall a disappointment

The final disappointment was with the serving staff. After failing to catch the attention of our waitress a few times, I asked a colleague for the bill. 5 minutes later it had not arrived, but the original waitress buzzed past. On being asked about the bill, she started dressing me down and accusing me of not requesting one. Anyhow, on getting the bill, we paid and left, resolving to never return.

A beautiful restaurant let down by staff and especially food.

Nice atmosphere, friendly service and amazing tasting food. Though a bit expensive for the serving sizes. I ordered chicken bao, pork bao and a steak. Sizes were very small, tasted OK but too expensive. After that we went to buy more food at a shop.
We were a group of 6 and had dinner. Everyone was happy with their choices. I had 2 delicious bao (pork belly and mushrooms) and it was amazing! Service was friendly and lovely

Used to go there quite a lot when I lived closer, few years ago. Not really the same quality, too slim menu, and generally maybe not the best value for money. You can have much better (and larger) ramens in almost the same price range in Södermalm and Stockholm
I gave 4 and I have been generous. Ingredients are good as well as the preparation, but the dishes lack flavour in order to get a better score.

Delicious food but also some issues. We got the pork belly bao, chicken bao, salmon ceviche and the vegetarian ramen soup. We were negatively surprised when we saw the portions, they are very small, one has to order many dishes and because of that it gets expensive. The taste was really good, fresh ingredients and good combinations. The service was friendly. However, they prepared the two beers for my friends immediately but my wine came later, the guy on the counter poured the beers, started taking orders from others and poured my wine after 10 minutes. Really weird. The atmosphere is ok, the chairs are a bit small and uncomfortable. I think i will only visit again if someone else suggests it but won't actively choose it.

name: Barrels Burgers & Beer

googleReviews.text:
Came here to eat dinner. It did take us a slight bit to be seated. Once we were seated it took over 10 minutes for someone to acknowledge us and take our order. Service was not the best during our visit on the helpfulness. The food did come out at an ok ish pace, and it did taste food, but it did also feel a bit soggy.
Good food, but maybe skip out on it if you are not a local.

​Barrels Burgers & Beer in Stockholm's Old Town is an absolute gem that lives up to its hype. I ordered the BBQ and bacon burger, and I can confidently say it was one of the best burgers I have ever had. The patty was perfectly cooked and the combination of savory bacon and smoky BBQ sauce was simply phenomenal. It’s the kind of burger that leaves a lasting impression and makes you want to come back for more.
​The location in Gamla Stan (Old Town) adds to the whole experience. The historic, cobblestone streets and charming architecture create a perfect backdrop for enjoying a fantastic meal. The atmosphere is both cozy and vibrant, making it an ideal spot to grab a bite while exploring one of Stockholm’s most beautiful neighborhoods.
​If you're a burger lover visiting Stockholm, do yourself a favor and make a stop at Barrels. You won't be disappointed.

Really great burgers. Can recommend stopping by. The smash burger is only to be made 12 of a day? But it seems like a marketing stunt and most people got it while we stayed. The prices are also super fair compared to other restaurants in Stockholm.

Small and cozy place with tables also outside. Very good food, I tried their house special burger which was excellent.
Nice local brewery beers on tap, some of them only available on this chain.
Friendly staff who also knows their products and can offer some insights if you wish to know something about their products.
Definately recommend this place.

The burgers here are excellent, as evidenced by the long line in front of the restaurant. Be prepared to wait a bit for a table. The atmosphere is relaxed, and the food is great. However, there were a few things I didn’t like: the restaurant lacks space, with tables too close together, and the waitstaff seemed overwhelmed, which meant that dirty plates were left on the table  until we decided to leave the place. Lastly, the restroom was not clean.

googleEditorialSummary: Rustic-industrial outpost offering hearty burgers with varied toppings alongside fries & pints.

googleReviews.text:
These burgers are one of the best in Stockholm. I love their original sauce with fries and the general urban atmosphere of the place.
The only issue: I have been to other Bastard Burger locations around the city, and this one has by far the slowest service of them all. And at times it’s hard to understand why: once time it was just me and another guy in the whole restaurant and it still took them a long time to come out with the food.

Yay, a new burger place in the neighbourhood! Stopped by tonight, which I think was the first night in this location. As usual, tasty burgers, friendly service. Food could have come out a bit faster, but first day, so fair enough. Should be good in the summer when the outside area is open.

Friendly staff but way overpriced burger.

I took the daily special (London) - “todays special” said 109 kr,  but i payed 129 kr..?

I think the original price for this burger is about 160kr - wich it is not worth.
Really good burgers. The kids also loved the Orea Shake. So all in all exactly what the place promised to be - great food, cool atmosphere and also very friendly service.
Amazing! Gluten free burger and vegan cheese! GF & DF people this place is a dream. Not sure about the fries tho needed a light bite so I didn’t ask if you’re celiac definitely ask.
Perfect place for a burguer! If i come back to Sweden i would definitivelly come here again. 5/5 would recommend.

The cheeseburgers, fries, and mozzarella sticks were average, but it was the chicken nuggets and honey mustard that were truly atrocious. The nuggets had a really weird spongy texture and absolutely no flavor, even though they were supposed to be spicy and the honey mustard was literally an aioli. It was super thick and just tasted like mayo with a dab of mustard in it. Maybe the more involved burgers would have been better, but overall what my group got was just not worth the money.

Bastard Burgers is my new happy place, which is strange because it’s basically meat, and graffiti. And yet… I walk in and feel strangely calm, like my inner chaos knows it’s about to be sedated by melted cheese and friendly service.

It’s not haute cuisine. No one’s shaving truffle over your fries. But it is good - like, “I’ll-eat-this-too-fast-and-regret-nothing” good. The burgers are unapologetically stacked, the fries are criminally addictive, and the vegan options are so convincing I briefly questioned my own existence.

The staff? Delightful. They look like they all play in different bands but would help you move house if you asked nicely. Somehow they manage to be chill, efficient, and genuinely nice - a rare trifecta in the burger world.

Bottom line: if you’re looking for inner peace via comfort food and a place that feels like your cool friend’s living room (if your friend could grill), Bastard Burgers is your spiritual burger dojo.

Would I go again? Yes. Am I already there writing this? Also yes.

Mind blown. That’s all I can describe this place. I am a visitor from Canada so I can say I’ve got a lot of experience trying outside burgers in multiple famous locations in USA and Canada.

Came here for the “chopped up” cheese burger fries - one I think the idea is brilliant, two I love the blend of flavour! The patty is quite peppery and blends well with the melted cheese. They also put sriracha and house sauce (I think some sort of mayo) and I really appreciate how much heat it packs.

Restaurants in Stockholm tend to really pull back the heat in the dishes to tailor to local flavours but this dish really packs a punch without it being inedible in my opinion. Also the fries were so incredibly crispy. The only tiny feedback is probably it would be nice to have a bit of sauce / garnish, as there are quite a bit of sad fries at the bottom that doesn’t get any sauce by the end of the meal :)

Visited for a weekday dinner and the place is pretty quiet. I’m definitely coming back for more.
Great Burgers for everyone! Problem is they are completely understaffed and so ends up taking away from the experience.

I really should have read the reviews first, genuinely I’ve never ever eaten such an awful sauce on these fries!! I ordered 2 crispy Chicken Whoville meal, 2 buffalo chicken topped fries and paid 420sek. I have no idea what they did it just tasted Bad. The food straight up swam in oil or something cause it tasted like bad Oil I couldn’t even taste the meat in my burger. Never again! I wouldn’t recommend the buffalo Chicken topped fries AT ALL!! I could have brought so much better food with this money, what a waste.

Tried the Bastard Smash Burger and it was absolutely amazing one of the best smash burgers I’ve had! The flavor and texture were spot on. It’s a bit pricey for fast food by Slovak standards, but definitely worth it. Highly recommended! 🍔😁

Bastard Burgers delivers a fantastic experience for food lovers with its great sandwiches and bold flavors. The team is decent and efficient, ensuring a smooth and friendly dining experience.

The menu offers a variety of gourmet burgers, each crafted with high-quality ingredients and delicious combinations. Whether you’re a burger enthusiast or just looking for a satisfying meal, this place does not disappoint. It’s also an excellent spot for families, making it a great choice for a casual and enjoyable meal together.

What a great burguer!
Smash burguer super tasty, The meat IS so good and products.
Lots of combination of burguers, toppings, and other meals to order, on Craft beer and several drinks.
It's has several locations around The city but I like specially this one for the seats and location.
Service IS quick and great!

I was very disappointed. We were a group of 5 people and ordered burgers, fries, and chicken crispy/wings. The portions were small, and the fries smelled strongly of old oil, very greasy and tasteless.
The chicken with spicy sauce was the same – soaked in oil and not appetizing at all.Nothing special about the food, and for this quality the prices are extremely high.

On top of that, we waited a very long time. We placed the order in two steps, 5 minutes apart, but the food arrived very late and unevenly – some of us had already finished eating while the others were still waiting for their meals.I am a tourist and I left completely disappointed. I do not recommend this place.

I really love the burgers here, and I also find the names of the menu items super fun and creative. I’ve tried several branches, and the food is delicious at all of them. The French fries are crispy and fresh, and the atmosphere in the restaurant is cool and stylish — perfect for young people.

The burger was decent. I say decent because competition in stockholm has gone a notch up over the last few years. This particular lunch deal appears to have been stripped of most bells and whistles. For the price, that was ok. The ambiance was great. If you are looking for a sophisticated burger though, look elsewhere.
Tasty and delicious burgers and fries. Recommend New York and London burgers.
Delicious burger to take home and feel like I want more!! We bought the first time ever burger with  glutten free bread for the small one
As expected. Ok food, ok service. Toilets cleaner than expexted !

Bastard Burgers never disappoints. Juicy, flavorful burgers with that perfect smash-grilled bite, paired with sides that always hit the spot. The menu balances classics with creative specials, and everything feels fresh and well put together. Service is fast and friendly, and the vibe is casual but stylish - great for a quick bite or a relaxed evening with friends. Definitely one of the best burger spots around.

We went here on our first day in Stockholm because it was close. The owner welcomed us and said hello. The app didn't work, but the express screens worked surprisingly well. The price was 190sek per meal which is pretty cheap compared to the amount of food we got.
We ordered cheesy chilly fries, animal style fries and double texas dorito burgers. The burgers were really tasty and the flavor was amazing, and the fries were what you expect at a high quality fast food chain.
They also had 29sek for a small Benn&Jerry's wich is all you can fit in your stomach after their burgers.
The place has nice decor and the music was nice. Nice place for a quick bite or a full dinner.

We tried out Bastard Burgers, and it was a fantastic experience. We ordered The Bastard, Texas, and large onion rings, with Bastard Original and Sriracha dips. Everything was incredibly delicious! The staff was friendly, adding to the overall positive atmosphere. The music selection complemented the vibe perfectly. In our opinion, it's the best burger we have had in Stockholm, so far. If you're on the lookout for a mouthwatering burger, Bastard Burgers is your place.

We will definitely go back to try more!

The quality bar of Stockholm restaurants be it fast or slow food is really high and Bastard Burgers doesn’t fail to impress here. Fast efficient and friendly service, even though we used the self order machine the guy was super helpful and friendly even offering free coffee.

The burgers are out of this world good too as well as the crinkly fries that you can order animal style (make sure to do plenty of walking after this meal).

Deco is pretty funky and chill, it’s a cross between the UK’s Honest Burger / Five Guys vibe but don’t with more elegance and style.

Went in for lunch. Could not find anyone to take an order.  Couldn't tell if the guy sitting in the corner booth on his phone was an employee or not
I left to have lunch elsewhere. Won't return. Not finding to many places in this neighborhood that are worth trying. Can't wait to leave.

Very good authentic north indian food..jalfrazie and naan are my recommendation.The owner roots from Punjab India ; is an involved and knowledgeable person and that makes the difference . 80 mtr walk from Sundbycentrum bus and tram stop.

Found it very authentic and delicious. Tried their tikki slider and samosa in starters and they were full of flavors. Palak paneer and garlic naan was an add on to the delicious lunch. Tarang the owner is very knowledgeable of the food they serve and recommends best. Will definitely recommend to anyone willing to have indian food.

One of the best Indian food I have tried so far.
The taste is very authentic, tried palak paneer, the taste is very unique and similar to what we get in India.

Really good service and nice flavor if u ask for spicy you will get the same .
Palak Paneer is a must try shuttle and creamy perfect for Non spicy eaters.
Garlic Naan was also good.

The staff here are very knowledgeable about their food & history behind it, i always learn something new here, nothing is ever too much trouble, will definitely visit again 😀
Revisit still can't praise enough, dairy allno problem made vegan bread fantastic thanks very much, next time will take more pictures.
Had this time prawns, BBQ chicken, potatoes & vegan nan bread all very good & highly recommended 👌.
Pictures attached, special order dairy free & was fantastic & couldn't tell the difference, allergies are welcome & please ask before ordering as I did. Would highly recommend.
Nice cafe, with some tables inside and others outside. Very good sandwiches, some warmed up. The coffee is good, the employee was smiling and relaxed, seemed to be in good spirits.

The best cafe in Södermalm, or maybe even the whole of Stockholm. The staff are a group of lovely young people, always vibing to their playlists and smiling ear to ear. The sandwiches are simple and tasty, the sweets are also great - but the star of the show is the coffee. This is the only cafe I visited in Stockholm that has good espresso, and not a sour watery blend. Love this place!

Very good coffee and tasty chia pudding. The staff was very friendly, probably the friendliest i met in Stockholm. Nice crowd, chilled and relaxed. Cosy atmosphere. Good prices. Only disadvantage that it can get crowded and since it's small the tables are very close to each other. Recommended, i will come back for sure!

Damn best coffee. If you like dark bread this is the place to go. Finishing the breakfast with a „Snickerskaka“ and another Cappuccino from the chef is the correct start into the Stockholm exploring day 2. The friendlyness and hospitality at this place is the „Bullerbü“ experience you are looking for.

It’s a lovely little cafe. The cinnamon rolls are amazing and so delicious! The coffee is really good too!
We went to this cafe nearly every day of our trip, as we liked it so much.
The cafe has a few little tables inside and it is very cozy. Staff was very friendly as well!

We recently visited the restaurant for dinner. Ask the food items were delicious. Great service, great food, great ambience.

We enjoyed all the dishes from hot and cold mezze. Prawns were delicious, baba ganush, chicken wings, grilled vegetables, Lebanese style salad, cauliflower 😋. We were taken good care of. Plus their chocolate cake was also yummy 🤤.

The best thing was we were asked if we were allergic to anything and food was adjusted accordingly without compromising any taste.

I would say that it’s a must go place if you like Lebanese food.

Beirut Bistro - You are wonderful! I am a die hard fan of Lebanese food and you made me fall in love with it yet another time!

We went for my birthday dinner and decided to try Beirut Bistro as it was nearer. It turned out to be a very good decision.

Food - Food was just scrumptious. We had veg mix meza, shish tauk and fatayer. Everything served to us was presented nicely with swift service. I ate until my stomach had no margin to take in more 😅!

Service - Service was swift, professional and with a bright smile on the face. They explained the dishes diligently and fulfilled side request from the kid. Half the good dining experience is good service!

Atmosphere- clean, pleasant and peaceful. The place isn’t so large but comfortable.

Overall full marks to overall experience! I certainly recommend it

This place is better than we expected.
We were created with welcoming smiles and menus and questions of we had any allergies they needed to be aware of. We chose shish kebab ground beef and rice and lamb racks with rice. They came with excellent hummus and 2 other tasty sauses. And parsley salad, crisp, lemony, perfect.  And perfectly seasoned with garlic! The lamb racks were expertly grilled, extremely tender and tasty.
We will absolutely be back!

Beirut Bistro, a cozy and elegant space for a great dining experience, serves some of the best Lebanese food. The food quality is excellent, the service is quick, and the entire staff, including the manager, is very accommodating.

I'm a bit disappointed,
I like the Libanese food, but this time, I was not enjoying the food. We had the vegetarian mix and the Mashawi Mix. The the non alcohol Strobery daiquiri was good.
The service is very good but in my opinion the food we were served was not worth the money.
Nice and cosy restaurant with very delicious food. We went there after climbing so we weren't dressed for eating out at all. But the staff was super nice and kind to us. Very good impression.
