This restaurant is a MUST! Perfectly located and the interior is amazing. The staff, service and atmosphere is 10/10. The food was amazing, we tasted different dishes. They were all perfectly made! Thank you for an authentic experience.
Such a fantastic dinner. Best libanese food so far, the hummus will linger in my dreams.

Really great food and staff is friendly as well!
Dog-friendly

Wonderful evening!  We focused on the hot and meze.  Enjoyed every dish.  The lamb racks were a highlight as well as the grilled halloumi and the Baba ghanoush.  Family recipes show the pride and joy they have for the food.

Small but cosy restaurant, very "Italian" with the red/white checkered cloth. Service was friendly and good, wine was tasteful at a price, food was also very good although the carbonara was soaking too much in grease, making it too heavy, especially with the wine. Big pizzas and portions ik general again within a reasonable price.
I really enjoyed the food, it was so tasty, and the service was outstanding. I can’t wait to come back!

Busy restaurant with a wide variety of meals. Visite for lunch and the place was busy (which is a good sign). Salad bar include really good bread (the place features a wood burning pizza oven). Will be back when in the area.
Very good pizza. Nice ambience inside - we were in the open section to enjoy our pizza and the sun
An average Italian restaurant with great prices and portion sizes. I was expecting more for the food but the personnel was friendly and atmosphere in the restaurant good.
The food is absolutely amazing. The most authentic Dal Makhni I have eaten in Stockholm. A little spicy and but absolutely worth the visit!

I loved the food, I felt It was true genuine Indian food. Portions could be bigger for the price or prices adjusted, but definitely good flavours and dishes variety. We had great time, enjoyed good cocktails also. Their samosas are amazing! Friendly staff and  it felt as a relax casual place. Thanks for good food! Will come back for coffee ;)

Surprised to see so many good reviews and kind of got fooled by that…The service lady was pretty rude (the lady wearing glasses), I booked in advance but we still got the table by the window (which was quite cold) and all the other more comfy tables were left for drop in. It felt like we were not welcomed there at all, the food was pretty good but quite a big price for such a small portion. Me and my friend both got stomach pains after. I think people should be kind to each other so would not return.

Awesome place. Visited with family during my recent trip to Sweden. The cocktails are the best and are unique to this place. Especially like the cocktails that contain the Indian old monk rum

The food is lovely and especially liked the Biriyani and the kebabs

The food was quite good and we enjoyed the homemade ginger lemonade. No dish missed the mark, and they all brought new, delicious flavors to our palates. My favorite was the samosas, which were deliciously seasoned and had a nice, thin outer layer. The only reason for the 4 stars instead of 5 is because the entree portions were a bit small (and pricey) for a main.

Fun Pub with Great Beer Selection

This is a great spot if you’re with a larger group and enjoy drinking together. The beer selection is extensive, with so many tempting options that you’ll probably want to try more than one.

The pub also has a collection of table games you can borrow, which adds a fun and social touch to the experience. Inside, the atmosphere is magical the wooden-themed interior is beautifully done and creates a warm, cozy vibe that makes you want to stay longer.however the bar is on the expensive side.

They also serve food, though I didn’t try it myself. I did only try the light sides which was good.
Nice pub just opposite to Sundbyberg Station but there are other ones in Stockholm city center
Cozy place , good location , quickly accessible from tram / bus . You can expect crowd who are mostly middle aged or after work . Staff is very responsive , overall decent experience.

A very nice pub with a great selection of beers and liquors ,experienced and knowledgeable staff ,good music not soo loud soo you can have a nice chat with your company and the food is good. No need for farther analysis 100% i recommend .

Nice place!

- good staff
- clean
- well located
- good beers

A wide selection of films get shown across Aspen’s two screening rooms (one very cosy; both with excellent sound and screens). The bar/restaurant area is cosy and the food on offer is very tasty. Best of all, the staff are always extremely helpful and friendly, which adds to the overall positive atmosphere. 100% recommended.
Beautiful retro cinema showing first run movies. Really good food too. A great place for date night.

Nice commercial cinema with a bar and bistro; snacks price seems to be quite reasonable but the seats may not be the best as those at the back aren’t high enough to let you watch the subtitles properly if those at the front are tall.
Nice cinema with retro feeling, often home to alternative movies and festivals. The bar/restaurant is renovated and gives an alternative vibe as well. Recommended!
Amazing experience. I will be back here often!

name: Bistro Bananas

googleReviews.text:
Very nice staff and lovely decoration.
However I wasn’t a big fans of the food, at least not the shrimps or the hummus as they weren’t very tasteful. the aubergine pizza was great though!
Very loud and with too many people going in and out, not a place for a chill night.

My fourth or fifth time here. I can't help but think that the quality of the pizzas have dropped significantly.  Taste of burnt dough,  cold when arriving, cheese that hadn't melted properly.  The atmosphere is great, the service is good. Not one of the top napolitaine pizzas in Stockholm anymore.

Definitely recommend visiting and to try their pizzas. Be adventurous and take non classical one!

Keep in mind that they operate on a walk-in basis only, as they don't accept reservations & weekends tend to be quite busy, so if you're willing to wait, the wait time is approximately 1 hour. Despite the crowd, we decided to wait because we were eager to experience their food. Throughout our time there, the staff was extremely friendly and helpful, lovely atmosphere and interior indeed!

As for the food: We started with the hummus, which was decent. However, I felt it lacked a bit more sourness and spiciness from the tahini, and it was excessively runny. Hummus is best when it's smooth and creamy.

Moving on to the pizzas—both the Spalla and Erba were extraordinary! The flavors were truly amazing.

The only issue we encountered was with the plastic plates, which had a curved bottom, making them spin in circles—quite amusing, but also a bit inconvenient. Perhaps they could consider switching to ceramic plates for a more stable dining experience.

Pizzas were quite lovely and the patio area was a nice spot to sit, relax, enjoy a beer and people watch.

Service was a tragedy.  Had to make two trips to get utensils, plates etc ourselves because the folks bussing and serving were nonattentive.

We will probably be back but I’ll go with different expectations.

A famous place round the corner in söder. It’s usually full for drinks. And also in summer very popular with outside sitting. In winters, it’s cozy inside. Famous for pizzas. I felt my pizza was over burned and a little bland. Could have been some more flavors. Appetizers were just ok.

googleEditorialSummary: Unassuming restaurant offering homestyle steak & seafood dishes, plus skewers & pizza.

googleReviews.text: Good beer with a good price. You can get a beer for 39kr and there are plenty of spaces. Although the bar is big with a lot of seating it still feels a bit on the smaller side due to the layout. Also it can be a bit noisy and it can be hard to hear each other compared to other bars in the neighbor

Probably the worst place to go for foreigners which are not welcomed ! We went at 1pm to have lunch, they told us it was too late... So we came back at 7pm for dinner, and we have been told it's closed, when obviouly some tasty fries had just been served to people sat there... Had to go to stockholm to have dinner ! Probably nice place for local people, but if you don't speak sweedish is no use to give a try.
Good place for a cheap beer during happy hour. Food is fantastic and very cheap and they have a beautiful outdoor patio. Love the Pasta Carbonara and Cesar salad.

We came for Lunch at 1p.m but we were told the service was closed. We came back at 7 p.m and again we were told the service was closed while people were still eating. They didn't speak a word of English. It seemed to us that foreigners and/or disabled people( our son with autism)are not welcome! It's a disgrace!
Pretty basic food options and taste, the service is average. Better options nearby.

Food: underwhelming. Nothing wrong per se, just didn't taste much. Oh, and the burger was burnt. Why mashed potatoes in a Reuben? And if you want it there,  you may need to up the other flavors. Fries were good.

The owner (I'm guessing, seemed to be in charge) was a loud presence in the dining area that we could have done without. Worst part: the waitress cleaning off the table next to us with a broom meant for the floor and the wiping only half the table. An awful big part of you check is just paying for the Bromma location and I don't know if it's worth all that much. If this place wants to be a nice place, it needs to become more of a nice place, if you see what I mean?

YOOOOOOOO. so good pizza! So hard to find good pizza outside of Stockholm sometimes. I’m not a fan of this Swedish style pizza in the Kebob shops. (As someone who grew up eating NJ and NYC pizza). But at Bistro Bromma they do a really good job. And at a reasonable price. And the other menu items are great too. I will be coming back and taking my NJ visitors here if they are craving some pizza.

Bromma Bistro offers a cozy and pleasant atmosphere, and it’s clear they’ve stepped up their game since the recent expansion. We had the moules frites, which were tasty, though I would have liked a bit more broth to go with them. The salad was fresh and surprisingly good. Overall, a solid 3.5/5, but considering the price, it’s a strong 5/5 for value. Great spot for a relaxed, affordable meal.
Excellent good large generous fish and chips at good price. Other stuff good as well. Now more nice space inside. My dog loved the free meatball service also. She will be back.
A better than expected bistro.  Food was excelent and atmosphere nice. Service was a bit cold and not so service minded but a good lunch place if you're passing by !

From the moment we arrived, the restaurant/bistro felt very cozy and intimate. It’s a small space, but it really feels like you’re having lunch or dinner at someone’s home. The waiters were extremely friendly and attentive. The menu is short but just the right length to offer something for everyone. Our waiter kindly explained everything, the wine selection was excellent, and the food was absolutely delicious. We will definitely be back!

Amazing place for solo evening dinner! Red wine was great. Chocolate cake with caramel - wow. Amazing!! One of the best experience for me in Stockholm. Also people working there are sweet and nice and kind.
Recommend this place for a date night also! Try it ❤️

A great dinner and I loved the wine.

A nice cozy restaurant in an upmarket neighborhood of Stockholm, with a bit of a French bistro vibe.

The menu is refreshingly short and well put together, and all the dishes were beautifully put together with love and skill. I would have scored the food and restaurant with five stars but for one reason - frustratingly, at the last minute they substituted the lentils with mash (I don't like mash).

The restaurant was quite cramped but this wasn't a problem and made it quite intimate. The service was truly great with very attentive staff.
Fantastic service, great champagne from Vadin Plateau and tasty vegetarian options!

A nice coxy place with a great atmosphere and a vast selection of wine. I had a delicious cod with lentils and cabbage as main course and a juicy olive-spongecake for dessert.

There could perhaps been an alternative to the lentils. It is a food that is difficult to elevate, in my opinion.

All in all, great place.

name: Bistro Süd

googleReviews.text:
Overall very good. Excellent service and fantastic food. We booked a table in advance.

Instagram senior_globetrotters

Nice place with pretty food presentation, ample portions. Crunchy potato pancake was too thin and not enough to hold up the roe, onions, sour cream. Food seasoned and cooked masterfully. Desserts were copious. Key lime pie had too much sugar and incompatible dollop of sour cream that made it unnecessarily heavier and not enough lime tartness. Gino dessert had a strange topping, maybe powdered milk that left an initial glue-chalky texture in the mouth. Hamburger was an absolutely delicious juicy meal. Pasta was a bit overcooked. Great service, outdoor seating, good wine selection.

Most delicious food we had on our 4 day trip to Stockholm. We had the sea bass, the tuna steak, the veal schnitzel. All of them were incredibly tasty.

The gino dessert was also nice!

Hungry, I arrive at this former star. The welcome is as lukewarm as the potatoes I’m about to be served. I carefully ask if the portion will be enough to fill me up, and the answer comes: “Absolutely.” Three potatoes and a bit of fish gratin later, I’m not so sure anymore.

Sure, 900–1000 SEK for two main courses and non-alcoholic drinks is something one might have to live with these days. But spending an entire evening at a French bistro without so much as a dry piece of bread feels a bit much. Go somewhere else — the shine has faded.

Beautiful and tasty food !
Perfect for a romantic date or a special occasion .

Staff was really nice and patient, food was of high quality for a good price in Stockholm.

I went for the tuna tartar and the burger of the house !

Would come back there any time!

googleEditorialSummary: New European menu in a bar/bistro with modern artworks & ornate chandeliers, plus sidewalk terrace.

googleReviews.text:
Too tired to go out to eat after one day of travel, so went downstairs from the courtyard hotel to the hotel restaurant to have dinner. Generally hotel restaurants have a bad reputation but this one is very decent. The Swedish meatballs are pretty yummy, though the portions are huge and a kids meal version is enough. The burgers are good too.

The food style here is scandic American and since we had the standard dish can’t comment on other plates. They have kids meal and kids coloring - child friendly too.

Would recommend!

First time trying authentic swedish meat balls and they did not disappoint. They were so incredible delicious with the gravy and the mash potatoes were soft and fluffy, and the berry compote was so tangy sweet and delicious. They could just add a couple of extra balls so it could be a bit more filling though.

While staying in the Courtyard by Marriott Hotel, we had breakfast at Björk, the hotel Restaurant. The staff was more than friendly and gave us an amazing feeling of welcome. The breakfast itself was really good. We didn’t have a chance to have dinner At this restaurant. Hopeful next time.
We had salad and the meat ball they were all so delicious. Nice restaurant will be back.

Normally my wife and I do not eat at the hotel restaurant, but because of our travel schedule, we had little choice... I explain this, so you know where our expectations were at walking into Bjork. It was Sunday mid afternoon of the Midsummer long weekend and the restaurant proper was closed, they only had the Bar's menu, so we each had the Burger... I cannot overstate how surprised we were! This was possibly one of the best burgers we've ever had!
Excellent patty, perfectly cooked with a nice balance of veggies, a nice thick cut of provolone cheese, and just the right amount of caramelized onions and chimichurri mayonnaise... Truly excellent.
So, if you happen to stay at the Courtyard by Marriott hotel don't miss out on sitting on their patio and enjoying a burger and a drink, you will not regret it! Nicely done, Team Bjork!

The concept is interesting. You make your steak over hot stone in front of you on your table. For starter we had garlic bread and olives. Garlic bread was not good and the olive oil over olives tastes better than the olives themselves.
For main course we had mix steak which was wonderful and yummy and Tenderloin which was very tender as well. The staff are helpful and attentive

Have eaten at a couple of other Blackstone steakhouses around Sweden and always enjoyed the experience. Very happy to now be able to have the same experience in Stockholm.

The food was great and the service was friendly and professional on the night we ate here. The venue is close to the train station and is welcoming and warm. They have a couple of good vegetarian options. Can highly recommend the chocolate bomb for desert!
The atmosphere of the restaurant was nice. The steak portions were very small. The experience was different you have to grill your own steak at the table.
Good restaurant, interesting concept to cook your own food.
Marvelous, food 😋 service 👌 the best experience cook myself the meat at the black Rock was fantastic a bit expensive but totally worth it 👌 I will be back

Varied selection of food such as salad and sandwiches. It is a waterfront cafe so you can eat with a beautiful view. Lots of seats to pick from. This cafe is also on the bike route if you wanted to stop by during your cycle like we did. There are lots of birds so be careful as we watched a man have his food completely eaten by huge seagulls!

I was surprised about the quality of the food. The salad was fresh and tasty. We enjoyed our sandwiches and cake, too.
The view is beautiful!

Nice cafe right on the water. Has a good amount of outdoor seating (typically Swedish cafe tables and chairs) but limited indoor seating. It is very popular so expect a possible wait, though it was fine when we were there mid may. The food was tasty and the shrimp salad was large enough for two to share. Getting your coffee drinks unfortunately takes a long time. Somewhat expensive, but the only cafe around. You cannot drive to the cafe. Take the ferry, ride your bike, walk, or park at the parking lot a bit away.

The desserts we had weren’t that good and coffee was lukewarm even though everything we got were expensive compared to similar cafes so we weren’t happy from fika perspective. The only thing we liked was the location which can be enjoyed on public banks alongside the water that is free of charge.
Nice people, good coffee and perfect location at the entrance to the Stockholm harbor. A good start or end point for walks or bike rides in the area.
Hidden gem in the city.Amazing music atmosphere and drinks

Small but cosy heavy metal style bar in central Sundbyberg where clients can choose their own music. The place is often crowded and everyone talks to everyone ec. No privacy. But still good atmosphere and friendly staff...

Tiny Cozy place.

Thumbs up:
Decent selection of craft beers :)
Dogs are allowed! ❤️

Thumbs side:
A "tad" brash barmaid.

Thumbs down:
Horrendous music! Unbearably Craptacular music!
It should not be called The Blues Pub.
It should be called The Tik Tok RnB Pub.

My ears are still bleeding.

But then again, it was a Tuesday early evening.
Maybe it was just a bad day.
Give it a chance, it might be great any other day.
But bring earplugs just in case ;)
Go for a Indian Pale Ale. Just amazing it is!!!
Love this place,  it's like home. The owners know everyone that visit,  they know what kind of beer you prefer and the bar change beer all the time.

An absolute gem in Stockholm!
Café Bla Lotus is everything you want in a cozy neighborhood spot, warm, welcoming, and full of heart. The owners, best friends and now celebrating an incredible 30 years of running this café, bring such a personal touch to everything. The food is all prepared by them, and it’s absolutely delicious — from hearty soups and warm sandwiches to fresh salads and tempting desserts.
There’s a great outdoor seating area, plus private nooks inside where you can relax or get work done. They also have an alcohol menu, live music on select dates, and even a private space you can book for events. The atmosphere is peaceful, creative, and inviting — I simply love it here. If you’re in Stockholm, Café Bla Lotus is a must-visit. A place that feels like home, with food made with love. 💙

I only visited once and loved it, i had a delicious savory pie and good coffee. Friendly staff and cosy atmosphere. It did get quite busy and loud though but i guess you get a lot of crowd when you are that good. I would certainly visit again.

My all time favourite café in Stockholm ! Stumbled upon this place a couple of days after moving in Sweden and have been a regular customer ever since. The staff is very nice (and patient with my poor Swedish skills), the food is great (I highly recommend their dagens special, always different but never disappoints) and the decoration is unique and pleasant. I’ve brought all of my friends to this café and they all loved it too !

Very good place to relax and have food and drink at lively area of Stockholm. Interiors of the place reminds Indian style of decoration with photo frames of Hindu God & Godess and Bollywood film posters, which shows the love of Indian culture displayed by the owner with her Indian memories.
I wish there were more cafes like this. Not like the booring cafe chains. Haa its own bohemian cosy atmosphere.

name: Blå Porten

googleReviews.text:
Given its proximity to the ABBA Museum and the many other attractions on Djurgården, this place could easily be a tourist trap - but don’t be fooled. The food is excellent. They serve traditional Swedish dishes that are genuinely delicious, with generous portions. The prices (by Swedish standards) are also very reasonable. In fact, we enjoyed it so much that we returned the following day to try different dishes.

I had the meatballs on my first visit, served with mashed potatoes and pickles, and lamb mince balls on my second, accompanied by small potatoes and leafy greens. Both were impeccable. My husband ordered the potato suet on his first visit and poached salmon on his second - both of which he thoroughly enjoyed.

Service is quick and efficient. The only downside is that it doesn’t feel particularly cosy, with more of a canteen-style, quick-turnover atmosphere - which is likely exactly what it’s aiming for.

That said, we would HIGHLY recommend this spot for lunch.

Best place to eat in Stockholm. We tried many restaurants during our stay, but nothing compares to this place. Great prices, amazing food, friendly staff, and a fantastic location. Highly recommended if you are visiting Stockholm.

Cute little cafe near the ABBA museum. Perfect place to grab a bite to eat.  Stand in line and order food. Bread and butter are included.  Various soups, sandwiches and quiches.  Small bites plus pastries.  The tables are quite close to each other.  Food was rather tasty. Ordered the feta salad and picked up a sandwich.  Good variety of drinks as well.

A good fika/eating place at djurgården. Pretty big space both at the inner courtyard and inside sitting. Fika selection is nice. Also there was soup and main course.
Loved the overall evening ambience to sit outside.

The outdoor seating within the courtyard was nice. Salmon and lamb patty was good. It's a self order and pick up. We came in just in time and placed our orders before a very long queue started forming.

googleEditorialSummary: Modern Mediterranean cuisine in a self-serve cafe with Nordic decor & a picturesque patio garden.

googleReviews.text:
Really nice dinner experience! Go visit them!
We were a group of 5 middle-aged friends, dining in a weekday.
The staff was welcoming and the service was really nice and fast enough.
The small room, with big street-level windows and Greek background music, is charming and cosy.
The portions may be a bit small but that allows you to share and discover several dishes.
All in all, it was our first visit and, yes, we highly recommend "Boca Grande"!

I had a party here with 25+ people - this is a fun local tapas bar where Spain meets Greece. This is not a chain, it is not McDonalds meets Tapas like Pinchos! This is cooked and served freshly by the same team. For my party they worked really hard to make sure it was a fun evening - thinking about things beforehand and on the night. We had the red and white sangria as welcome drinks which worked really well. The house wines are really nice. We have been back as a family since and the service was fast and with a smile. Particular favourites are the chilli prawns and the asparagus wrapped in parma ham - but have enjoyed a large selection of dishes. Great to support a local business :)
The best food ever!!!very nice place,very cozy and very tasty food!!

Awesome Food and the staff was super nice, friendly and welcoming.
Will be back for sure :)

This is a genuine Tapas bar, unlike the other local option "Pinchos" - (DO NOT GO THERE!). The food was good and freshly cooked to order. Although there is adequate outside seeating it was still just a bit cold and a bit cramped therefore on the inside with just a few tables.
Healthy brunch / breakfast. The bowl was super delicious, raw, selected natural ingredients. Matcha was great, too. Will be back.
We had breakfast twice here and loved everything about the food, the staff and the atmosphere! I can highly recommend the Snickers Chia bowl!!

Delicious, innovative and healthy food.  Great and unusual drinks options too including the golden and beetroot latte. Comfortable to stay for a while. No table service but at least you can leave without hanging around for the bill. V highly recommended. Everything I tried is great.

This is the review based on multiple visits. Most of the time, I eat lunch there.I am always satisfied with my choice. Remember, this is the place for people who value healthier lunches but somehow they didn’t have time to prepare a meal. Macronutrients seem to be balanced. Each ingredient is tasty and high quality. I like their short menu because I hope it allows them to maintain a good quality of the meals.
Apart from that, they serve very tasty coffee and absolutely amazing sweet treats ❤️

A cosy breakfast spot with quite a limited healthy menu, mostly bowls, a salad and a good avocado toast (comes with a sliced boiled egg). My cherry berry smoothy bowl was big but too much frozen smoothy portion that melted and turned the bowl into a cold soup. All dishes are gluten free and lactose free, several options of non-dairy milk alternatives. Prompt service and cute minimalistic design.
location full of food, snacks and culture. I recomend eating at wildman resturant located there. perfect food there from swedish culture.
Nice area...
Interesting

Wonderful to stroll around the area.
Lots of people this Sunday.
Great atmosphere, nice scents and sounds. A highlight: Cotton candy.
Last day of the year with activities for the little ones on carousels, carousel, airplane.
Had tickets left for these. Was welcomed by the lady!!!
Beautiful square in a green environment, with gift and food shops, picnic tables and an original communal grill.

Great spot! They had lots of options for breakfast, pastries, and sandwiches! I highly recommend the Mini Frukost. It was the perfect amount of food and the drip coffee was great! They had lots of milk and sugar options. Definitely stop in if you’re looking for a tasty, cheap breakfast

It’s a very cosy place. Good to relax or study.
And you must definitely try buns and pastries here!

There are some gluten-free options of pastries but no gluten-free buns or bread. 🤷🏼‍♀️Several vegan pastries and I can recommend raw balls and raw snickers.

We had a bit of a weird experience on Dec 27, 2021. We went in and tried to order a cappucino but were told that “the coffee machine had already been cleaned”. Therefore, no coffee. It was 18:15, 45 minutes before the place closed down. Such attitude from personnel in a place which earns on coffee sales sounds quite ridiculous.
We’re locals and appreciate the bakery and would want it to profit in the long run rather than go down the drain because of the staffs incompetence and lazy attitude.
Lovely cafe on the island!
Great waffles and some really good coffee. The interior is playful and there are plenty of places to sit outside, on two different sides of the house.

name: Boqueria

googleReviews.text: Loved the place. Ofcourse it’s a popular one and mainstream in Stockholm. They serve really nice tapas/small bites. Nice ambience and overall great vibe for weekends. Late night, it also converts to a dancing place. And then there are queues outside. Food wise very nice

The atmosphere is great, the staff were friendly, and overall the food was really tasty. I’m Spanish, so I was curious to see how close the dishes were to traditional tapas.
Everything we ordered was good except for the tortilla, which was almost burnt and extremely small — you can see it clearly in the photos. That was the only dish I genuinely didn’t enjoy.
The croquetas are my favourite Spanish dish, and even though they came with alioli on top (not very traditional and it hides some of the flavour), they were still delicious and I would order them again. The gambas al ajillo, secreto ibérico and the beef tenderloin with foie and truffle were also very tasty — just incredibly small portions.
Between the tiny sizes, the modern twist with extra sauces and spices, and the fact that the dishes didn’t feel fully traditional, I found the overall experience quite expensive for what you get.
Great atmosphere and good food, but if you’re looking for traditional Spanish-style tapas or more generous portions, you might find it a bit underwhelming.

Best Spanish restaurant at the heart of Stockholm! Roberto, Juliano and Joel always rocking the show with their lovely personalities, energy and smile ❤️
Keep up the good work!.

A restaurant in a very central and well-visited location. The interior is modern and pleasantly lit. Tables and chairs are quite high and somewhat uncomfortable. All the tapas ordered tasted good. The quality of service varied depending on who came to the table. All in all, it felt like a stingy and mediocre restaurant for being in this area.

Food was good, but a little plain and not as fresh as you could expect in Spain (understandably so, after all, we came in winter too). All in all, not bad, but we missed more warm food options, not just cold plates, and a bit more flavor.
Make sure to try the deep fried goat cheese!

googleEditorialSummary: Relaxed Spain-themed eatery with a terrace & a stylish ambiance serving meals & light bites.

googleReviews.text:
Update July 2025. Great menu choices, always on the fresh side. Tried both the canal burger and the shrimp salad, excellent!! My company was very happy with the falafel and the grilled salmon.
Service is great, the location unique (watch the boats and sailing ships pass  by under the bridge).
I also come for the Czech beer!
I was waiting for summer to come here. It’s one of my favorite places. I love the view, the music and the atmosphere.

Great location with delicious food and friendly service. Lots of seating space outside makes it a great place even for a spontaneous visit with several people. Nice selection of beer. Heaters allow you to sit outside even when it’s getting a but cold in the evening.
The food was simply marvelous. Didn't expect much but i was wowed. Also I really enjoyed the sympathetic view of the river which combined with the music makes great atmosphere.

Love the combo of beer & boule. Food is OK but not more than that. This is more a place to hangout, drink and enjoy the view and great location. Perfect outdoor place for summer evenings. Friendly & helfull staff. Parking  garage nearby only 2 minutes walk.

name: Boulebar Rålambshov

googleReviews.text: Best place for spending time with your team or family. Play boule and taste the best food. Period! The beef - sirloin was so tender and tasty! The fries 🍟 is simply the best. We had a 3 course meal with fruit salad, meat meal and dessert with drinks. It was a bliss. I spoke to the head chef Tomas and gave him my compliment. I strongly recommend this place. Have a good time guys. Cheers 🥂

Its a great way of spending quality time with friends or family. The boule game is quite popular all over Stockholm and this is the biggest boule bar in the city. You can order food and drinks while playing or after it. Reservation should be made earlier to ensure availability in gaming area.

Quiet cozy and chill enviroment. The staff were okay and the food was also decent. The boule playingfields were good but they were pretty much stacked upon eachother. The pricing was on the more expensive side but that's what you expect from Stockholm. The seating was very good and the seats were nice. Altogether I'd recommend this place if you wanna play boul and at the same time have a bar and resturant nearby.

We had traveled from the states and were looking for a relaxing lite meal near our Hotel. Boulebar was perfect. A very friendly environment, with great Service (Ellen) and the perfect charcuterie plate with a nice Bordeaux blend.  It was nice to find a place in the park where the locals appear to go, but the crowd did not make you feel like a tourist.

The experience was not so good.
At least not what I expected.
The service was ummmm not what I expected.
We ordered 3 Holala lunch set and a kid set chicken. Only 2 fries and salad was served…. The food was ok but not super.
Wouldn’t visit a second time

googleEditorialSummary: Summer-only parkland bar with a buffet of rustic French dishes, plus boules courts with instructors.

googleReviews.text: this is a pizza for 125 crowns from this restaurant. I think this is deceiving your guest! the place is generally good and the cocktails are good, but this pizza ruined the experience.

Good food, great atmosphere and excellent service

A bit weatherdependant, it’s an outside venue but great to spend a few hours playing pétanque and sharing a few drinks

Great spot for some boule activities along the beautiful waterside walk though the southern parts of Stockholm.
Only tried the food at the boule area which are more like small bites and bar snacks.
Go there, rent a court and enjoy!
Amazing spot down by the water, perfect for socialising with friends or colleagues. We had great service from Jens who bought fun and energy to our table... and plenty of Rosé, of course!
Very nice lunch offer! A beef or vegetarian plate + fries + bread + water + salad + coffee + two pralines for 125 sek. Plus 30 min boule play included. Best with friends!
Great restaurant for both daily lunches and evening dinners! Warm atmosphere and nice location by a river. Tasty dishes and a very kind service! Highly recommended!
A cozy place. Quick with food to the table. And a warming dish from the cold.
Nice restaurant next to water. Good food and drinks, liked the cider. The waiter was funny and sarcastic, which even improved the overall experience. Will be back!

Very nice food. Price is normal and fair. Locale is small and familiar with a nice outdoor terrace for that cold beer in summer time. Ate here wit some work colleagues and the whole process was very smooth. Ordered and found d our table, got some salad and bread (yummy fresh) and just as that was finished, food arrived. Very tasty and the coffee afterwards was great too. Will definitely be coming back and recommending this place to anyone who wants a nice place to eat a good meal for a fair price!
Our group of 6 arrived just after 7pm on a Sunday evening and we were super impressed with everything. The food was delicious and the service was fast. Great wine list and lovely ambience.
Really lovely French brasserie, great atmosphere and the service was friendly. Chef really knew what they were doing with every dish. Worth a visit!

Very good food, and finally a place where the amount of vegetables was perfect ( it seems many restaurants in Sweden deem vegetables a garnish). The waitress was attentive and welcoming. My guests did enjoy this restaurant.

Minor things: if a party asks for a quiet location don’t give  a table right in front of the kitchen…btw for some of us the point of going out to eat is to not look at a kitchen…( the very attentive waitress fixed this ) secondly charging 50 Sek for tap water seemed a bit petty…

Will be back

This is a lovely local gem that has developed really nicely. The food is of very high quality, and anyone in love with French food you’ll see that this restaurant really knows how it is supposed to be. The long list of Bordeaux and Burgundy wines with the traditional French food items on the menu tells me that the owner is French.
I sincerely recommend this place for a great dinner!
Excellent service and affordable. My purchase was so comfortable, I bought 2 and wore one home. I would definitely recommend this store.All of my needs were met.
I ordered the lamb racks and they were served well done, complained they were overcooked and then again served with similar overcooked lamb racks. Expected a lot more given the price level.

We stopped by because the empanadas caught our attention. We ordered two beef empanadas without checking the price, and later realized they were 80 SEK each, which felt quite expensive for the size.
The café itself is lovely and the staff were friendly, which we appreciated. However, the empanadas were smaller than expected and the filling was a bit underwhelming. The powdered sugar on top was also unusual for a savory beef empanada, and it didn’t come with any sauce or ají on the side.
Overall, the place has a nice atmosphere, but the price didn’t quite match the portion and quality in our experience.

Cozy place but super slow service - got our pie after we finished half of our coffee. Barista kept saying they are bringing it. Coffee was the weakest coffee we have ever had. You could see through and didn’t taste much. We will not come back.

Best princess cake I tried in Stockholm. Stopped by spontaneously to get some cake on the go. Sponge cake was bouncy and moist, whipped cream had some taste unlike in other place and fruit filling was a nice surprise that elevated the cake. Really nice service.
Best soup in Stockholm - soooo delicious and nice and spicy. Coffee is also great.. brought coffee bags as  christmas presents last year for my whole family.
Been here multiple times, amazing tea, no bags as far as your eyes can see, with delicious pastries and desserts
I had the toast skagen, it was good portion size and good flavour. Pretty fast service, but cannot pay with card if you don’t have a PIN code (americans) so bring cash just in case.
Laidback place where everyone can feel welcomed (including people with kids / strollers). Great view, and they serve a generous Aperol Spritz!
Excelent attention! People talk in English and Spanish so you can feel at home and they have a very tasty beer, Mariestads

We stopped off here for a break after walking on a sunny day, great location with a nice view but had to spend a long time in the queue to get our drinks. This place is okay if you just want a quick drink, but not really worth seeking out.

Quite uninteresting menue, but it’s almost the same as the other bistros on Strandvägen. Too much mayo on the shrimp sandwich. Stressed staff, no paper on the toilette and when I told the staff there was an uncomprehensive response and no action. A typical tourist trap. Great location though.
This is such a cute spot! The outdoor seating was very peaceful and they had a large selection of Swedish food and desserts. The servers were also super nice and accommodating. I highly recommend!
Such a cute spot by the water. Food was great and the service amazing. Highly recommended!
Great service and amazing food. Close to the waterfront so amazing views as well.

Had a fika there and got a decent taste of cake and normal coffee. Many sitting area outside, perfect for summer. Didn't try the main food but it looks good. It's a normal sallad, sandwich and other mainstream swedish food. Price is normal for Stockholm. They have an open grill for burger, which look so nice, have to try it next time. There's an ice cream hut too.
Our tour guide recommended.  The meatballs were the best I had while in Sweden.  Try the pies too and cookies too. Huge portions - everything had lingonberries.

Came here with a group of friends after work, had a few beers and were told by a waitress we were too loud. Mind you, this is a pretty loud environment and it was full. None of us were intoxicated or rude. Apparently having fun in a group is not allowed here. It should be noted this was a group of all women of color and only one man. The rest of the bar was pretty male and Caucasian so just a word of caution. We are not welcome here.
Nice pub/sports bar with good food. Fair prices.  Clean dinning room and bar (the restrooms/toilets could be cleaner).  Friendly staff.
This place felt as a proper Irish bar. Not that I am an expert on what a Swedish bar supposed to be, yet... The fact is!
Really nice staff, at least on a Monday. Weekends, this place is crowded. But in a nice way.
I was satisfied with my food

It was our first night in Stockholm and also our first anniversary, and this restaurant made the evening truly memorable. The atmosphere was perfect — located right next to the river with a warm, inviting ambiance that felt both romantic and lively. The staff were wonderful; our waiter was energetic, friendly, and genuinely attentive throughout the night, making us feel really welcomed and cared for.

We absolutely loved the food. The plankstek was cooked to perfection — tender, flavorful, and beautifully presented. The seafood dish was just as impressive, full of rich flavors and freshness. Even the bread served at the start stood out — warm, soft, and delicious.

Overall, this place exceeded our expectations in every way. It’s not just a meal but an experience, especially for a special occasion. A must-visit in Stockholm — I’d come back here first thing if I return to the city!

had a fantastic experience! I went there for a romantic dinner, and everything was absolutely perfect.

We started with the garlic bread, warm, crispy, and full of flavor. Then I had the entrecôte, which was incredibly tender and cooked to perfection. The pasta was also delicious,rich, creamy, and comforting. Every bite was amazing!

The service was excellent – very friendly and impressively fast. The staff made us feel welcomed and well taken care of throughout the evening.

The atmosphere was cozy and intimate, ideal for a romantic night out. Beautiful setting, great food, and a lovely vibe.

I highly recommend for a special dinner or just a great meal in Stockholm!

Located just steps from Barnängsbryggan, this restaurant has a lovely view of the waters. Family friendly settings.

The meat is fresh. The steak, done medium rare tastes tender but not bloody. The cooking is good for a neighborhood restaurant though you should not come expecting the stronger and more hearty grilled flavors of AG, Sovel or Texas Longhorn. Portions are medium and leaves room for desserts.

🔸️ Plankstek på oxfilé
👍👍👍
Beef tenderloin on a plank with mashed potatoes, asparagus, grilled tomato and bearnaise sauce.

🔸️ Grillad entrecote 250g
👍👍👍
Grilled rib eye steak with café de paris butter and red wine reduction.

🔸️ Chokladtårta
👍👍
A slice of Swedish styled chocolate cake with berries and whipped cream.

🔸️ Bar
👍👍👍👍
There is a well stocked bar offering wine, beer, various aperitifs and barrista coffee.

🔸️ Service / Ambiance
Helpful, service-minded. A short wait for the food. High noise levels and gets squeezy when the place starts filling up.

Fantastic restaurant! Food is delicious, staff and service is outstanding. Top that with the entire atmosphere of this restaurant is that you're sitting in someones living room.
Regardless if you're going with a date, family or friends I'm sure that you will love it.

Second time visit was purely as great as I remembered first time.

Lovely little restaurant with great food and a enthusiastic crew. Will visit here again for sure.

Starters; Garlic bread, Gambas and Burrata. All great, well seasoned and cooked. Favorite: Gambas.

Mains: Vegetarian Papardelle. Great taste and texture. Creamy, rich and very tasty. Pasta on point. Plank steak. Medium (chef nailed it). Very juicy and tender. Bearnaise sauce was a tad below room temp (fair enough) - very tasty mashed potatoes and asparagus. Favorite: Undecided. Both are great.

Thanks for a wonderful dinner! Keep it up 👍

Update: Second visit a few weeks later. Still as good. Meat's tender and tasty, sauces yummy and prices in accordance to quality.
Incredible cocktails!
The food and staff are absolutely fantastic!
Cozy bar of the neighborhood
Small, nice with good service. Delicious food.
Wonderful atmosphere, good beer and drinks, very good meat, and interesting preserves. A very good place to sit and chat. But old and new friends.
I don't recommend it, you'd better visit the restaurant opposite. Service without any mood, coffee any miracle and sandwich? avocado unripe (hard) and toilets are not so clean.

A small coffee shop that feels a bit odd. They have a bunch of pastries, but also pizza slices and egg burgers.

The inside feels a bit thrown together and the space doesn’t really suit a coffee shop. Their furniture is stable though.

As for the stuff you consume, the coffee is ok, the food ok, the buns sweet. Nothing stands out in either direction.

We ordered Kokostopp and Kardemummabulle to take out. Both met our expectations.

There's a really nice outdoor sitting area if you prefer that.

Brod & Salt has hundreds of branches all over Stockholm
I don’t feel like typing but Croissant has bread-like texture! 😅
Coffee was a bit milky!
They had good coffee, but the croissant was disappointing. It was stale, as if it were from yesterday. You don't expect that when you come to a bakery in the morning.

Food was good but I'm just not used to the flavor and it's something different for me except for the cinnamon. We got 3 different breads which you can get for a deal. We had coffee which is really good. They have free wifi which is good for someone travelling or need a quick internet.

good restaurants. Make your own salad. Have vegetarian option. A bit costly then the other salad bar. They have very fresh coffee. Do recommend this restaurant if your are looking for salad bowl. Take away is available as well.

Awesome breakfast and lunch restaurant in Stockholm. Delicious and healthy sandwiches with freshly made sourdough bread. Classic and traditional Swedish bullar and big delicious salad bowls....
Although the staff was nice and smiling, they were a bit under staffed compared to the number of customers. 10/10 would come again!

There were plenty branches of Brod & Salt and I visited this one early in the morning.

All sandwiches looked really fresh and tasted really good. All description was in Swedish, so you will have to ask for the ingredients.

Staff was friendly and attentive. Good for a quick bite and for quality food.
You make your own bowl and pay by the kilogram. They also sell coffee and pastries. The prices are reasonable.
Service was good. I ordered pizza and a coffee. Food was good. It has seating on the main level and basement. Seating outdoor. Very limited on electrical outlets for working.
Terrible! It took over 30 minutes for them to warm up pancakes, give us a semla bun and 2 cappuccinos. The cappuccinos arrived in paper cups. 🤷‍♂️ they really failed on this day.
It is always very noisy, but easy/fast to grab a lunch
Lovely place to sit and chat, the barista was super duper nice and really made my day!

Beautiful, casual spot, with casual chic decor.
Pistache was amazing, as was the pizza! Delicious!
Great food selection, lots of fresh flavourful options. Very good cinnamon buns too!

While roaming around on our way to Gamla Stan, came across this chain store. Chose their pizza slices to eat. For SEK 146, you get 2 slices ( slightly big ones) and a coke can. It was ok the pizzas didn’t tasted good however the place was hip and dandy.
Tried their strawberry matcha with oat milk and it was so good! I was in the mood for a matcha while walking down that busy street so I decided to stop on in. I’m so glad I did.
Perfect for Fika we were lucky to be there for Semla but also enjoyed the cinnamon buns & chocolate ball. Coffee was delicious and had a great atmosphere even while very busy.
It's nothing wrong with the pastries but beware of allergies! They even add sunflower seeds in the Tosca cake and the personnel didn't even know!!

I love bröd och salt! The pancakes and sandwiches are great and they have the best kanelbulles in the city. But, specifically in this location, people come with laptops and hold tables for hours do not giving to the others spaces to seat and eat.
It had a nice vibe and very friendly staff. We ordered a pizza slice, a strawberry matcha and a hot chocolate. The food was delicious and came very quickly.
Jessica was super helpful and friendly to this group of tourists! She recommended which ones to get. We got the cardamom bun and marzipan/almond bun.

Excellent place to eat. Good healthy food, relaxed ambiance and very nice hosts. Linus and Cornelia made sure that all our questions were answered. We were visiting Stockholm and ate there several times. The salads were outstanding and their pastries super yummy!

Me and my boyfriend nipped in this morning on a whim as the store look lovey from the outside and the array of pastries in the window looked amazing. We were greeted by the loveliest staff, we didn’t get there names but they went above and beyond to make us feel welcome. Food was great and the coffee was great excellent. We are only here for a week but we think we’ve found our breakfast spot while we are here. Ireland’s 12 points go to Bröd & Salt Götgatan

Today I was there with my kid. Unfortunately, the bakery area has way too many flies, which really ruins the appetite and makes it hard to consider ordering anything other than coffee. On top of that, some of the staff seem very poorly trained in customer service and communication. Definitely not the experience one would expect.

Lack of toilet, small portion of cake (but delicious) and small cup which even does not got full of capuchino. Door opener doesn't work. Tables outdoor are dirty.

Bröd&Salt is a brand with good repudiation in Sweden however, they should keep careful monitoring of its branches not to downgrade it :)
Overpriced basic coffee. A good for nothing cold coffee in the names of a karamell frappe. Like wth. The taste is wayyy too basic for the price point

There were flies on the salad bar. Not one or two quite few.
Apart from that the salad bar in general in this branch is obviously much lower quality than other branches (e.g. Mood, kungsgatan). And the price is ridiculous the quality you get.

I am very happy there is a quality cafe opened nearby, would go there daily but found the staff was not really for this job, one girl had no idea how to make coffee, and she failed 5 times with hot chocolate getting visibly frustrated as every time the cream was leaking out and made a mess or she forgot the chocolate..on the 5th attempt I got a cup of hot water with barely no chocolate 🤤🤤🥴🥴 and I saw her throw a returned bag of cakes on top of the cakes on display, unhygienic so didn’t order a cookie for myself. Cafe is great but they really need right employees , hope in the future it can change

Amazing food, amazing service. I ordered ceaser salad. I forgot to tell me about my allergies, but they immediately redo the salad. It was really a nice gesture from receptionist and from the cook. kudos to them

The Service was nice, very friendly.

Size of the Burger could be Bücher, but it was really delicious. They we're served very quick after ordering. So it is more Like "fast"-food, but the taste was good.

Mac-cheese bites were good and Espresso Martini also

Great tacos (on the picture). Terrible service. Ok atmosphere. They ran out of ice cream included with the apple pie but never told me. Served the apple pie before the coffee was ready. Come on guys, this is really simple stuff…
The food was good, hamburger and Cesar salad, the servos was friendly. The fries were amazing.

Brödernas is always a solid choice when you’re craving a really good burger. The chili chicken burger deserves a special mention - juicy, flavorful, and with just the right kick of heat. Fresh ingredients, generous portions, and quick service make it a go-to spot. Definitely worth a visit if you’re in the mood for something tasty and satisfying.

A decent place for a simple lunch or dinner with okay-ish prices. The salad was simple and good, and the burger was tasty too.

It was a bit strange that fries didn’t come with the burger. The service was good, although only one of the two toilets was working, so there was a constant queue.

Extremely oily food but I must admit that I could not stop myself from finishing the crispy onions rings that were still crunchy when cold.

Fries were inconsistent, more tasty when warm but once cooled, they were still mostly crunchy but less enjoyable.

The truffel burger was a let down. Dry burger pattie. Burger is not very well put together and unenjoyable. I only managed to eat half and had to stop.

Overall, food is not salty but ingredients are not of high quality.

There are no set menus so everything is ordered individually.

Ok service. Restaurant has lots of seating. Wait for takeaway took about 15-20 mins.

Great and juicy burger. Try the parmesan fries .... they are amazing as well!
Very nice and friendly staff ... what else do u need?
Try it out, all was great!

Wouldn't recommend. Ordered takeout with scheduled pickup at 14:00. Arrived there 15 min early and got my food soon thereafter. Food was tepid to cold and the burger had no frying surface. It looked like it had been steamed instead (see images). Got some fries but they were cold and somehow overfried. Wondered if my food would've been even colder and worse if I arrived at the scheduled time. Very dissatisfied.

The server was nice tho.

The only thing nice about this place is the location being in Hammarby but the quality of food is crappy. The quality of food was much better a year or two ago but today, this was one of the worst burgers and pizza. The size of burgers were tiny and the pizza was like billy pan pizza which has not been heated enough in the oven. Truly disappointed!
Top 3 burger joint/chain in Stockholm. They taste excellent. Nice friendly staff and not very expensive.

Lovely staff, incredible fresh burgers and the seating outside is great!!
The lunch menu was super cheap too (around 15 euros)
The dirty burger was amazing. Great service and has a cosy atmosphere
Great burger and sides for a friendly price, served by friendly staff!
Pleasant service but greasy food, dirty glasses and a filthy restaurant with days old food on the floor.  In a city with many great burger outlets, our experience Brödernas was very poor.

Staff: Friendly, cheerful, and helpful.
Fika: Incredible semlor. The almond paste had a slight saltiness that really made it stand out ➡️ top tier.
Venue: Quite busy around lunchtime, but calmer after 2 PM.
Space: Spacious and very stroller-friendly.

I visited for the first time because I was craving a Semla, and it was absolutely delicious! The cream had a lovely, subtle sweetness, and the bun was exactly the texture I was hoping for. I love the filling. it was rich, nutty paste!

Cozy place with good food, but overpriced. I usually stop by for bread, pastries, coffee, or sandwiches — everything tastes fresh and well-made.

The service is friendly, and the atmosphere is nice, though nothing particularly special. Overall, while the quality is there, it just doesn’t feel worth the high prices.

Great for an occasional treat, but not somewhere I’d go regularly.

The place was really charming, with a cozy ambiance. I enjoyed two traditional Swedish pastries along with a cup of tea. It was slightly pricier than expected, but still reasonable. A lovely experience overall.

This place was on my to-go list for a while and I finally managed to visit. The staff were very kind and friendly and helped me to choose a good lunch option. The mushroom soup was very delicious and had the right texture and it was paired with a very good grilled cheese toast. Quite happy that this place is very close to the campus so I will definitely visit again.

It was so warm cozy place👍👍Thank you for your kind  meeting🌺👍Sofia. İ love the cappucino 👍it was so delicious  and tasteful . Thank you so much for your jest for your  chhocolate treat 😍.It was delicious . And both you are so kind owners. . My best wishes  for the NEW YEAR🎄🎄🎄🎄🎄🎄🎄.if ı come again ı certainly visit you.GREETINGS 🌲🌲FROM İSTANBUL.   Happy christmas🎅🎅🎅  Tülay
Nice, cozy and warm place. The owners are so kind. Coffee is so delicious. Both for take away and sit inside in. Thanks. greetings from Türkiye/İstanbul

Convenient cafe right next to Thorildsplan station. They serve easy like lunches, sandwiches, soups, salads, and some warm dishes on the menu. Nothing extraordinary, but definitely not bad.

Service can be a bit slow if there are more than 2 customers at a time, as there is only one man working to both take the orders and prepare the orders (at least that was the case when I visited). Other wise his demeanor was bright and friendly.
Loveliest owner, super cozy and delicious. We had a great time. Morning well spent and felt like home. We’ll be back for sure 🥰

If you are looking for fresh bread, a quick non-Asian lunch or some Swedish sweets, this café around the corner is the place to go. Arriving a bit after the usual lunch time, we were immediately seated and served by friendly staff. The quality of food is as good as it possibly can get for such a small place.

The only Thai restaurant in the area. I got myself a Tom Yam, which tastes fine, not special. I waited for 15 minutes although it was empty, but they do plenty of phone order. It costs 20kr more to dine-in for each meal, that's why many people order take away from phone. The sitting area has a unique interior although I find that the chair is uncomfortable.

Best Thai food I have had in Sweden any anywhere actually. The perfect Gapao special ordered Thai style with an egg on top of it. And an immensely delicious Tom Yum Goong soup I couldn’t stop slurping. This is already one of my favorite restaurants in Stockholm. Highly recommended.

Ate the food in the restaurant.
We ordered the pad Thai chicken and green curry. Both were good and would order it again. Not the best I ever had though, but still good.

The food was okay, nothing great for the price. The rice was a bit mushy and had quite a few brown bits as if it had been scraped from the bottom. And sadly there was a floating insect in my soup, which I guess can happen, but dropping one star for that.
Wonderful food, great service, kind staff.

Lovely and cosy restaurant on the corner of Kungsholmen,  a great place for a fika,  especially on a cold day.  I felt that the buffet breakfast was a little overpriced for the variety on offer.  Good atmosphere and great tasting sour dough filled bread rolls.
They have amazing Caesar salad but I had a daily special and it was super disappointing. Lacked balance and flavor. I think if you want a simple breakfast or something to go then it’s great.

What a lovely atmosphere for a great lunch @byfiket. So relaxing and quiet. Good spot to recharge your batteries during the day. This grilled sandwich called "Värmland" with goat cheese and beetroot was really good and the dressing had a lovely freshness.
Cosy place for lunch, the food menu was short but okay. I would have loved the dillvealI took to have some more flavour. Very friendly staff.
Nice breakfast place but I lack decent vegetarian alternatives on the breakfast buffet

Absolutely love the food and coffee here! You can also grab a nice beer with beautiful seating looking over the water. The owner/staff are so friendly!
With love from Australia!! ❤️🦘

It’s a cute, cozy place by the water view of Hammarby. Open timings could be a bit different. But cute and cozy to sit outside which is a nice seating. I had coffee. And sandwich was nice too. You could come and try it if u r around

I recently visited a charming café that served an exceptionally tasty latte accompanied by a warm welcome and excellent service. The balance of robust coffee and creamy milk was delightful, and the friendly, attentive staff made the atmosphere even more inviting. It's a perfect spot for anyone seeking a comforting coffee experience. Highly recommended!
Nice for a Coffee and drinks, great view, good atmosphere.
Excellent Coffee

name: Café Albert

googleReviews.text: This was the last stop on our Stockholm Weekend. We wanted to spend some time in a cozy atmosphere and with good coffee and Fika. What am excellent choice. Feels like old school stockholm and the food was home made and so tasty. This place has a a sense of pride in their products and delivers in a nice atmosphere with good not fake service. Can only recommend
Fantastic little coffee shop with the best little cakes available.  Would happily come back next time we are in Stockholm.  Well worth a visit.

• Recommend for watching the city go by!

Great location in Stockholm. You can sit outside and watch the city go by. However, it's a café and not a bakery so it doesn't have high quality buns but still quite good and the service is exceptional! 🙏🏼 Both inside and outdoor seating. A little cramped but in a french cafe kind of way.
Tasty, cozy, food and drinks are worth the price. Very pleasant staff. Quietly and calmly, especially  if you are cold want to warm up and relax from the noise 🫡
Very basic desserts. I’d expect something like this in a supermarket rather than in a restaurant.

googleEditorialSummary: Unpretentious counter cafe dishing out baked goods, cakes & sweets alongside tea & espresso drinks.

googleReviews.text: Really nice staff and nice view if you can get a window seat. The hot chocolate was good but not remarkable but the latte was really nice. The cinnamon bun was also pretty nice and prices were fair. The 4 is because the tables were fairly dirty so we had to clean our spot before we could sit down.

Wonderful café just before the Modern Arts Museum. Loved having lunch in the garden.
Friendly staff, beautiful setting, and a delicious classic räksmörgas with shrimps, eggs & mayo on sourdough bread. Added an ice cold lager beer, and have been very satisfied.

I've eaten at this place for about nine years or so. It's one of my favorite cafes in Stockholm! Their salads are delicious and they have a lovely outdoor area where you can sit. I recommend their grilled sandwiches and their salad with buffalo mozzarella😋

Really cosy place, loved the playlist on Friday night! Unfortunately, the matcha latte tasted mostly of milk, although made with good quality tea. It could really use about double the amount of powder... Basque cheesecake was very good.

The café of the museum for architecture and design, Arc Des, on Skeppsholmen. Very pleasant place with fresh salads and perfectly executed sandwiches and why not a glass of red, white or rosé to accompany your food. You order and pay inside and is served by the friendly staff at your garden table when the weather is nice. Very good value for money.
We were back a week ago again and could observe a considerable increase in price, for instance their avocado sandwich is now priced 79 SEK compared to 69 a year ago, up almost 15%, what we call "greed-flation", so not such a good value for money any more...

Well a nice antique small cafe by the water along the garden. It doesn’t have the best view but is quite peaceful. But nothing like a full blown cafe feeling. Table chairs are out in the garden. It’s and old rustic feeling. But yeah could be tried sometime, but don’t plan it especially. If you are around, definitely give it a try. Soup was nice. There were no grill warm sandwiches which was such a bummer
Definitely not a place for lunch. They do have fika options which is a better choice to go for. The toast are extremely overpriced for what you get.
Favourite place in Nacka - always friendly staff and great selection of cakes. Mysigaste caféet i Nacka. Come to yearly Apple celebrations with great selection of apple pies.
Very nice place but not too many food options and expensive!

After losing our ticket, watching order after order go past us, we finally got our food  (40mins for four dishes), the atmosphere and overall quaint'ness of the place saved the day.

The roast beef was nothing  to recommend (159 for something out of the packet) but the pie seemed to be home made.
Perfect location, very well thought through and very relaxing atmosphere. Serves a mix of swedish and latin food, and some both warm and cold beverages (also alcohol).
Cosy waterside spot selling food and drinks. Perfect for a break while taking a walk.

Very cozy and decent place for a stop strolling/walking around Årstaviken or Södermalm. Still just a small kiosk, but mid-May (15 May 2023), they open up the “garden”. Small menu with coffee and fikabröd, but also some dishes (when we were there, Smashed burger, some sausage dish). We sat down on the wharf in the sun zipping some coffee :)
On Årstaviken near Södersjukhuset the cafe has home cooking, a good selection of beer and wine by the glass. The backdrop of music from the 70's and 80's adds to the relaxed and retro feel.
Fantastic place to have a beer and the best choripan in the city. Oscar is a brilliant host and they played good classic salsa music. Fantastic atmosphere.

Had amazing experience there. I ordered a Chicken sandwich which was delicious ,really enjoyed the meal .
And the best thing is that food is halal.
Amazing cozy place! The service is super Fantastic the food delicious.  Super clean, The energy high. An Marvellous experience to do. Let’s meet there! 😊🙏❤️

Small cafeteria amongst no other in this area. Extremely kind, warmhearted and friendly staff. Variety of salads, toasts, sweets and drinks. Unfortunately the quality is very inconsistent. It’s more a rule than an exception that your order will be wrong. Sometimes the toast is toasted, sometimes not, sometimes you get all of your order and sometimes you get a part of it, sometimes your cold drink is not cold sometimes it is, sometimes the brewing coffee is hot sometimes it’s not and most of the time you don’t get your order as instructed for example if there is a ingredient you don’t like and tell them - you will most likely get it anyways. But with that said, when you get it right - it’s good!
Very nice place and great coffee.
It was a wonderful experience, tuna sandwich and chicken sandwiches were tasty and juicy. A must visit place.

This bakery is a real gem. Not only does it have a fantastic range of breads and pastures, but they have an excellent lunch menu I had not expected with really great lunch deals. I was surprised by this little place so much so I had to create this review.
I had shrimp and avocado salad with coffee, bread and butter which was included. I kind of enjoyed this place, as everything was to my liking, so will visit again in the near future.

I was in the neighborhood and saw this bakery and gave it a chance. The strawberry tart was quite good, and the staff was very kind in contrary of the other comments here. One thing that I would recommend is that they should improve their coffee.
Nice little cafe that serve surprisingly good salads, pastry and bakery at this side of town at very reasonable prices. Try their homemade ice cream during summers!
The coffee was excellent, and the walnut bread was fresh and tasty. I liked that they had a bread-cutting machine, which made it easy to get just the right slice.
Good sandwich’s . Nice outdoor oasis before the Prince Eugene home.

Amazing café in the middle of a beautiful park in a beautiful island in Stockholm. This cafe has an amazing view, even with a bad weather. Super relax and quiet place. Best place to relax after work or during the weekend. Good menu with prices higher than average. They have vegetarian and gluten-free options. Sustainable approach. Heaters outside for cold days. Definitely worth to visit.

Lovely cafe in a wonderful park. Just stopped by whilst on a bike ride around the island. Really worth it for a break or even a lunch. Beautiful views. It was quite busy but at the same time it was quite calm and relaxing (we were in the terrace, didn’t go inside). I would definitely stop by again.

Very lovely quiet place hidden in the green gardens just a bit away from the tourist masses. A good place to get some rest when going Prince Eugene villa right after visiting the Vasa Museum or vice versa. The menu could include a larger variety of sweets or food, but still, what you get is of good quality but a bit pricy though. Restrooms are very clean as well.
Very cute place located near the waterside with a fireplace for a cosy atmosphere. Delicious food, good coffee and nice services!

A small cafe nearby the city hall with a scenic view of the waterway and planes descending. May not open according to their Google hours, they were closed 45 minutes past their posted hours. Coffee was okay. Place is more for the view.

We stopped here in the morning to get picked up for a boat tour. While my son and I sat down to wait, my wife and his girlfriend went to the outdoor counter to order drinks from the café. Almost immediately, we were confronted by an older blonde woman who scolded us for sitting in the chairs without purchasing anything—even though we were in the process of buying drinks from her establishment.

I understand the concern about people taking advantage of seating, though the place was nearly empty at the time. A more welcoming approach—like politely asking if we planned to order—would go a long way toward making guests feel comfortable and could even help boost your sales.

I’m not sure how good the drinks actually are—after that interaction, I told my wife to just get me a Coke instead of a coffee since we no longer felt welcome. We ended up consuming our drinks on a nearby public bench to avoid any further embarrassing outbursts from the woman.
Standard coffee. Little higher price. But what can I say, the outdoor atmosphere with view to the Stockholm waters is great.
The view around the harbour is quite nice.

Beautiful view, completely shattered by the fact that we payed 70 SEK(7 USD) for 2 cold hot dogs that we promptly returned. Please don't buy hot dogs here, go to the closest petrol station instead. The hot dogs will be twice as tasty, and not ice cold.

We loved it here! ❤️❤️
Staff greets you in a very friendly way and offers you help right when you come in.
Many different seats available and calming atmosphere! 🥰
Cappuccino was very good!
We also loved the sandwiches for breakfast as well as the pancakes 🥞 (a little bit small)! Super delicious!! ❤️❤️
Definitely recommend coming here!
Very nice coffee shop, prices as expected, really good coffee ☕ , nice sweets for a fika, apparently it is supposed to be the oldest coffee shop in Stockholm. Recomended of you are near here
Great food for breakfast. A little bit pricy, but good if you don’t know where to go
lovely interior and selection but can get loud quite fast, and strange that there seems to only be one worker handling serving+counter…? good health options, would try again

This place has been here seemingly forever and makes for a good lunch stop in Kungsholmen. It'll be great, if they would label the vegan dishes on the blackboard behind the counter, but you can always ask the staff.
I had an avocado bagel and it was super fresh and very nicely plated.
Prices are in line with the area. If you order a main course at lunch, you get a free coffee with it.
Great service by Giorgos and Sia! Amazing food, really worth it! Recommended
Great view and very good position to sit and enjoy.  Coffee is good and staff is nice
Ordered from Wolt and unfortunately it wasn't great. Soggy bread and they forgot a third of my order.
Excellent brunch, very reasonable prices and a friendly service
Super nice

name: Café Junibacken

googleReviews.text:
So much fun for 2-5 yo
If they know or like Swedish kids books like Astrid Lindgren’s stories, with Pippi Longstocking, Emil of Lönneberga, and Ronja the Robber's Daughter much better and exciting for them !
The activities are well planned for children short and friendly. The big rat in the train was a bit scary for my kid but nothing a hug would not solve.

It can be very busy so choose a morning weekday if you can out if vacation season

We were here when the child was 10 years old. I think if the child were older, it would be difficult for them here – many of the attractions would be too small, they simply wouldn’t fit. But we had a great time visiting this place. A special favorite was the Story Train, which won’t leave even an adult indifferent.

The place was packed with people even though we visited on a Tuesday. Cost per ticket was quite high that day, we paid 240 per person. The rooms are fun for bigger kids. If you have a very small child I wouldn't recommend it. Plus, you cannot enter with a stroller so if your kid does not walk yet you'd be carrying them around so bring a babybjörn.

Majority of the kids are 3-4 years old and up. The ride was the best part of our visit but not sure it was worth 480sek.

The store has many good books if you're looking to pay full price instead of purchasing second hand.

Restaurant was packed and it was hard to find a spot to sit for the 3 of us. Food was ok but quite expensive for what it is. Prepare to pay 150 per a plate with 5-6 meatballs and some mashed potato or some falukorv slices.

Recommendation: check the proces in advance and book in advance. Some days the tickets are  much cheaper than what we ended up paying on the day.

Wonderful experience. I went alone as an adult on my trip to Sweeden, and I enjoy a lot with the decoration, and I love the attraction where you make a tour between all the tales. I'm also an author and illustrator, so I was so inspired to create fantasy!
Great place for children 5 and below. Nice spaces outside to run around in the park.

googleEditorialSummary: Fun park devoted to young children's literature with a theater, a train & a playhouse, plus parties.

googleReviews.text: I love Café Koya SO MUCH!!! I've actually been going there for about 2-3 years straight now and it has always been amazing everytime! I'm so glad that I found Café Koya before it got super popular and went there with my friends all the time whenever we would hang out. The food is AMAZING(specifically the strawberry shortcake!!!🤤🤤) Really recommend the chocolate layer cake as well! The boba they serve always hits as well! The place is medium-sized and the staff/owner are super nice and friendly! This place is legit a hang-out spot for me and my trio🫶🥹
Tried this Cafe during the summer and loved it! The matcha is perfect, not too sweet or not too faint like so many other places. Mochi was fresh and the strawberry cake literally melted in my mouth

Very good services, I came here more over 10times, because of staff service mind and their kindness was very touching my heart. And also food and matcha very delicious too! Hope this cafe getting more bigger! Love it
One of the best matcha I ever had, wow! The place is so authentic and has a lot of Japanese touches, very welcoming and cute. And the matcha was from paradise - such a good taste. Perfection!
Lovely desserts! Gentle tastes, not too sweet. Just perfect. Also great variety of teas. Pleasant ambiance and very friendly owners. Try their hojicha latte, it’s very good! Our new favourite 🌸✨✨✨

Worth the trip into the city for the fresh bins.  Great cappuchino and just a few steps away from some of the finest views in the city.

Truely authentic cosy atmosphere and great service.  The best traditional swedish baked goods I have had and so increadibly fresh (the also offer gluten free options)

Great place to stop for a coffee break. Located at very nice spot where you can view the city. Prices are regular for Stockholm. We had coffee with milk and tried the home made cake, which was delicious.

I’m not visiting this café for the first time, and I’d like to recommend it. It’s a wonderful and cozy place where friendly people work — people who truly love what they do. The pastries are fresh and delicious, with a real homemade taste (especially pear pie 😀). The café has an authentic atmosphere that’s sometimes missing in modern service. ☕🍰
Tried the veggie sandwich and the cinnamon roll and liked them both. Great location

I came here given the great reviews and turned out they didn’t disappoint! It is a lovely cafe with a friendly dog. I ordered a very traditional Swedish dish and a Chai Latte with oat milk, every thing was super delicious, the Chai Latte is the best I have had so far! The atmosphere is also the best I have come across so far in Stockholm. The owners are very friendly and helpful, every customer who comes in is like a friend!
A café next to Kista+/IBM. Serves breakfast sandwiches, coffee, soda and protein drinks. Perfect for stopping by and buying breakfast on the way to the office. Friendly staff.
Great comfortable cafe, with excellent and personal service, easy to become a regular here and feel like part of the family.
Honestly one of the best cafes I’ve been to in a long time! The drinks are tasty! The Pastries were amazingly delicious, and the reception was great. Great vibes!!!!

This place will always be special to my heart, as once upon a time, my parents owned the place under the name “Café Smulan”. I went to visit it with my boyfriend during the Easter Holiday, and also managed to have a friendly chat with the current owner. I promised him to send some pictures from the time when my parents were the owners.
The food was delicious, and it was awesome to see that locals were regularly stopping by there, it was full house.❤️I’m also glad that the owner handled my enthusiasm so openly when I walked up to him to let him know about the history of this place.😌We will be back for sure!❤️

Happened upon this little cafe and something attracted me. The menu looks great, finally a place with great breakfast options for me. There is eggs and pancakes and porridge and sandwiches of different kinds. The bar man is oh so busy putting things right and cleaning but he welcomes me and tells me I can let him know when I'm ready. I look at the rows of delicious looking sandwiches with veggies in every color. In the corner there is a sign, "we'll fix your own favorite sandwich, let us know what you feel like." I can hardly decide but go with pancakes and coffee. The coffee is of the self service kind but to my surprise he heats up milk for me on the side.
