When the pancakes come I ask him Are you the owner of this place? He seems a bit shy but says "two, there is two of us"... The feeling I get of this place is love. There is thought and love in this place. You do you, and they will put something something extra on there and serve.

The pancakes are simple with just the powder sugar on but he's brought a bottle of chocolate and sirap and banana on the side... I can devise this delicious meal just how I like it...

Good coffee, simple but good food, places with electrical outlet to sit and work.

Improvement: well, maybe a bit more social, and clean up on the tables faster. The guy next to me ate and left and his tray was removed within a minute mind you... Maybe they just leave things until you are gone?

Good American pancakes! Plenty of them as well. Place is a bit small during the winter but sitting outside during the summer is nice if the weather allows it. Friendly staff as well and lots of other food to choose from.

Many friends had recommended this place so my expectations were quite high.
The food , while good, didn’t owe me.
The wine selection very broad, but quite expensive in my opinion.
The staff very professional and kind.

It was over my expectations. Dragged into this restaurant thanks to the recommendation from my hubby. Took the course menu - appetizer, pasta, main and dessert with 695kr. Fantastic choice for each and very good wine assortment. Everything was good, - from the bread and butter, light but well cooked vegetables appetizer, cacio e pepe!!! Fabulous pasta with perfectly cooked and seasoned. Main - pork or pikeperch with well cooked and synchronized garnish was so taste ( we wete so full with all those food).

Super nice staffs who made great recommendations for wines, quick, friendly and also professional...

Strongly recommended!!

Overrated place with overpriced food and wines.
The only super delicious dish was agnolotti. The famous cacio e pepe can be liked only by those who have never tried a real Roman one. Pasta itself is fresh.
The fish was a joke, it was frozen several times, so you really had to chew it. I’ve never experienced anything like this in Sweden. Pavlova was interesting, perhaps meringue was too chewy.
Wines were weak, especially for this price.

Delicious food with great service. It’s a bit pricey, but totally worth it. I peeked and caught the chef was making fresh pasta for my dish—it was amazing. Every ingredient was perfectly chosen and made the dish stand out. Highly recommend!

The service was wonderful. The server was attentive and often checked on us, making sure our waters were filled, and ready to order.

The restaurant is super cozy and trendy! Feels very low key but still a nice place to go to impress your friends.

The quality of food was great and highly recommended!

Our bottle of wine costed $169, which was on the pricey side. We each paid about $100 per person.

visited this place with three friends yesterday evening for coffee.
we had three cappuccino and one black tea.
and one cheese cake..
service, ambience & attitude all are fine.
its a small shop with old ambience, traditional look and feel kept as is, well maintained.
cost 260/- sek for us.
Very cute and cosy coffee with an amazing history dating back to 1600s! Their mango dessert was mind-blowingly good.

A very cozy place in nature with good Swedish fika, coffee and pastries, and friendly personel. Nytorp Café is an excellent place to get to by walk or bike, and either sit outside in the middle of the forest or indoors in a tradition Swedish cottage house environment. The nature is the proximity is amazing, biking there one can can across domestic & wild animals, such as horses, sheep, deer and hare.
Really cosy place up to date with latest trends with reasonable prices on the fancy fruit look alike chocolate pastries ! (99sek vs 130-140 at Liljeholmen C)
Very cute cafe with delicious soups, cake and drinks. Two buildings with indoor seating and lots of space outside. Very friendly and homey place.
Good service, simple food, quiet and cozy atmosphere. Only a few outlets to charge your phone.

Great place to have a drink with a view on the boat AF Chapman.

I came twice. First time was great but unfortunatelly second time this saturday morning 16th of August
the guy at the bar forced a 10% tip on me instead of letting me choose and it doesn’t feel right.

Your typical swedish cafe with both indoor and outdoor seating, with the latter having a nice view overlooking the Chapman ship and old town. They have teas, coffees, soft drinks and alcoholic beverages, and a few cakes and treats, and a few dishes.
Good cappuccino, loved the fact that I had a lot of sweetner options: honey, agave sirop, integral sugar
Got the chicken and bacon panini and chips. Sat outside in the nice weather and the food was quickly brought out. Panini had a little bit of an almost smokey bbq flavor which was nice.

A cozy café with plenty of seating and a wide variety of options. Here, you can enjoy a small fika or have a delicious breakfast or lunch. The café also serves alcoholic drinks such as beer and wine.

The food looked great, but I didn’t try it, so I can’t rate it.

Another plus is that dogs are welcome, which was a nice touch.

New cafe in the neighborhood — cheerful staff 😍😍😍. try the vegan cake from the Unbakery. HOWEVER the cutlery had prices of previous cake stuck in eat - when I asked why ? they said the replacing they dishwasher is expensive 😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱

Staff is eager to help with any accommodations for vegan adjustments. This is one of their grilled sandwiches with grilled veggies and green pesto. They have lots of raw fika options and vegan pastries and serv a good cappuccino. Allows pets and has a good accessible wc!

Usually friendly and a great location. When all seats are taken, it can at times be very crowded.

Great gluten-free / vegetarian options.

The Greek salad in particular is very nice for a small meal.
Cinnamon bun, chocolate ball, cafe latte, and a chai latte. They were all fantastic! Add to that a beautiful natural view and a cozy inside. This is a great spot to take a break.

This trädgåd is the main thing I miss about living in this neighbourhood. A beautiful cafe and garden, with community events and sometimes live music; The food is always surprisingly good, and there's something for everyone here. It makes me want to be a full-time vegetarian :)

Super cute garden cafe. Wide range of easy food options. They use some ingredients that come from their own garden. So lovely to sit in a garden with the flowers in full bloom while enjoy a nice meal.

Summer time they have a live music series in the evenings.

Amazing garden with coffee place, entertainment area, many cozy places to sit around beautiful flowers. Nice walk distance from Asppuden metro station.  Food is wonderful with vegan options. Breakfast and lunch menu, tasty deserts.
Can be booked for birthdays or events.
Nearby there is a swimming beach and beautiful places to walk by the water.

Vinterviken feels like a summer paradise with lush and colourful gardens that you can walk in and meander, a cafe to grab some drinks and snacks, and with a short walk you can go kayaking, canoeing or swimming. There are public toilets around but not many places to fill water bottles. Loved it and would recommend anyone visiting in summer to check it out.

A lovely 'country side' retreat in the middle of Stockholm city. There is a very large outdoor area filled with fruit trees and vegetables. Plenty of outdoor seating (limited indoor) amongst the plants and trees. Regular cafe menu items, but they do have local produce.
Modern interior with high ceiling. The tables were however very close to eachother and it was quite noisy during my visit. None of the items I had was remarkable.

The kind of place we needed in this area! Great coffee, great vibe, amazing food selection and wow this interior! Easily my new go to place for morning caffeine fix.
First day of opening feels like a slightly missed opportunity to do more for the customers but that’s just a lack of marketing and customer experience touch
Tried @cafevolta and loved it! The French toast was crispy outside, soft inside, and perfectly sweet. Great coffee, cozy vibes, and friendly service — definitely coming back!

The location of this Café is perfect- away from the busy and noisy parts of the city. It's interiors and even the outdoor seating are stylish. The place is almost always crowded due to its popularity.
The food was good. The chocolate mousse cake was decadent and the French toast was an absolute indulgence. We also tried the eclair which was okayish. The caramel cheesecake was nice, but I wouldn't call it the best. The coffees were creamy and amazing. On the whole a must visit spot for the vibe and amazing food.
Amazing place, variety,  food, lot's of options 🤤🤤🤤

Cozy café and restaurant offering fresh and healthy food at a good price.

The portions are generous and will leave you satisfied. The restaurant offers plenty of seating, making it ideal for small to medium sized groups. Here you can enjoy good quality coffee, tasty desserts, and lunch made with fresh ingredients. In the summer, you can also sit outside and enjoy the sun. Coffee is included on lunch time which is a nice touch
One of my favorite cafés in the area! I always go for the berries waffle and the cream cheese & avocado bagel; both are fresh and super tasty. I just love coming here! The staff is also very nice.
Best coffee ever — Freddo espresso! Well done to Café’s Favourite. The pie selection is excellent too, including delicious Greek pies. Please open a location in Copenhagen as well 🙏
The coffee was smooth, the avocado toast fresh and flavorful, and the kanelbulle waffles with ice cream were just heavenly. A cozy spot with great food — definitely worth a visit!
A small and cozy cafe in Sundbyberg. The carrot cake was really good but I did not like the coffee so much.

name: Caffè Nero

googleReviews.text: Nice caffè, clean, cozy and in a good location. I got a Too Good To Go lunch for 49kr. My bag had a vegetarian wrap, two savory croissant and a chiapudding. I even bought a semla but unfortunately it was nothing special.

Nice coffee place with good vibes, amazing staff, amazing coffee and nice snacks to munch over. The prices are reasonable for the quality. A cappuccino and a brownie will set you back 89 SEK. There are places to sit outside as well but the seats inside are cozy and relaxed. You can work or read a book with a warm coffee here. Definitely recommend 👌
Such lovely people. They are patient with customers even if it’s busy.

Large cafe with a cozy atmosphere. Coffee and espresso drinks are pretty good. Nice pastry and food selection. They offer some breakfast combos with drink+food which is a good deal. Staff have all been friendly and helpful to me.

The inside of the cafe looks smaller than I thought, but it feels homey, especially when it snows outside. I tried their lemon cake with mascarpone, and it was yummy. As for coffee, for me, coffee is coffee, all the same.

googleEditorialSummary: Casual coffee shop with a menu of light dishes & specially blended hot & cold drinks.

name: Caffè Nero

googleReviews.text: Cafe Nero is officially my favourite coffee chain. No matter which location you visit, you will receive the same level of quality and service. However, out of all the locations in Stockholm, this one is my personal favourite. I've visited this coffee shop every other week for a while now, and not once have I found a reason to complain. All the staff members have always been so kind and welcoming. The coffee is always incredible, and so are the baked goods. I also really appreciate the music they play here as it sets the perfect mood for studying or working. I have tried many different drinks from the menu, and I have never been let down once. I also recommend taking advantage of their app as you can get discounts, especially if you are registered as a student.
The croissant with scrambled egg is so good. Will totally go back while in Stockholm. The cappuccino is very tasty. The waiter was so nice and helpful.
Very cozy atmosphere, the coffe is great and the staff is fast, skilled and friendly. I prefer this spot to most others eventhough I normally shop at a different chain.

It does what it says on the box :)
Chain café with good coffee and mostly tasty sandwiches, lunch dishes, deserts. Friendly staff. Am i amazed?no. Is it good?yeap
This place seems to not be about pastries but coffee. Very dry and expensive bun, with an excellent flat white.

googleEditorialSummary: Casual coffee shop with a menu of light dishes & specially blended hot & cold drinks.

name: Caffè Nero

googleReviews.text:
I love it: best coffee and yogurt.
Listen to me. When you will be in stockholm go there. You will see also the Most beautiful smile in the city.

Visited on Friday morning when it was snowing. Not many people, a lot of seats to choose from, the atmosphere was cozy and spacious and the waitress greeted me politely with a smile. The coffee was okay, the breakfast croissant was better.
I'd probably come back again just because it's cozy and the service was good.

Great portions and friendly service!
Really enjoyed my visit to Caffè Nero — the drinks were generous in size, and everything tasted fresh. I ordered a latte and a sandwich, and both were better than expected.

The staff were super friendly and welcoming, which made the experience even better. Cozy atmosphere, plenty of seating, and a perfect spot to relax or get a bit of work done. Will definitely come back!
The atmosphere is really good. There is no lousy music and decaf coffee taste was amazing. Also I suggest drinking ginger tronic tea. A very nice resting spot after spending time in the old town.
Great way to people watch and have a nice drink while you’re at it. The service is also good and the staff are helpful!

googleEditorialSummary: Casual coffee shop with a menu of light dishes & specially blended hot & cold drinks.

googleReviews.text:
Nice Mexican inspired restaurant. While the food looks amazing it sometimes lacks bit in the taste.
The people working there are super friendly and will explain all you don't understand.

I had beef tacos, the meat was tender and cooked well. I only wish that the salsas which came with them would have more kick to them.

Tried their sunday brunch. Classic Swedish brunch with the addition of some mexican options. The food was promptly filled up and there was no lines or waitings. Nice American pancakes. DIY waffles. Falling off the bone ribs. A nice mix of healthy and not so healthy foods. For its €25 price tag i wish something besides water should be included for drinks.  Altho i will likley go again!

Pleasantly surprised as I had been here once before many years ago. The staff was friendly, the place was airy but not noisy, and the atmosphere was quite cozy. The food was delicious and flavorful. I have not been to Mexico nor California (yet) but in my head, this is how Mexican/Californian flavors should taste. We were 3 adults and had different dishes and all of them had their own unique taste. I will for sure visit again.
Nice place with good value and good food. Fast service

Wonderful helpful staff and amazing food. My lobster taco starter and cod with sweet potato mash was unlike anything I have ever tasted. Who knew basic food, could taste so exquisite. Compliments to the chef and all staff working here. We need a branch in London, I’ll travel back to Sweden just to eat here again. Slightly expensive for Mexican food, but worth every penny, simply for the mind blowing flavours!
The male waiter we had, is such a credit to this establishment, he offered us menu’s in English, gave me a lighter to borrow, and found the equivalent to £30.00GBP, which I thought I had lost for good after irresponsibly not storing it in my bag properly.
He came to the venue next door, where I was attending a concert just to hand it back. Now that is what I call a remarkable person and a credit to the restaurant. A must visit establishment if your ever in Stockholm!

A completely unplanned visit as we just walked past and went in, and we don't regret it!

Cozy restaurant with tapas dishes as a guiding star! We tried the tasting menu for 2 people and it was delicious and filling!

The sangria cava was refreshing and the beer was good!

A touch of Spain in Stockholm!

Good place for semi-authentic Tapas.
I know the traditional spanish cuisine quite well, so I have high standards.
The tapas I ate have been good quality wise, as well as taste wise.
From a pricing perspective, it’s quite expensive for the amount and taste.
The staff is nice.
A very cozy place. Nice weekend night out. Super nice staff. We took tasting menu for 2 (8 plates). Perfect. Cava sangria was sweet and delicious
Pretty good selection of tapas, staff is friendly. Decent prices.

Been here plenty of times. Last time food was adequate, they have a new cook now - food was brilliant. Scallops were great now. Service has always been awesome, but this hit the new all time high! Do recommend! Atmosphere have 4/5 because of emergency vehicles passing by once in a while.

We stopped here for a couple drinks as we were staying in a hotel nearby. We didn't eat but sat near the bar and enjoyed the really nice outside park atmosphere. We liked all the plants and the design of the sitting area. The service was great and our server was very friendly. Will definitely stop back in !

What a hidden gem in the heart of the park!! The front desk at our hotel (The Bank Hotel) recommended Calle P and it did not disappoint.  The space is very unusual design but cozy.  The food was absolutely delicious !!!  Fresh with a lot of different flavors .. just a party in the mouth! Don’t forget the desert either…And the service  fantastic!! Our whole experience was 5-star!

Been here a few times and I do like it. The pasta I had was amazing! The staff was also nice, had to re-remind our waitress of salt. The toilet was very dirty when I visited during the evening. They also have few toilets so had to wait 15 minutes for my turn. However, overall a great experience!

EDIT: visited after a couple of years. No idea what happened to the service but it’s below acceptable.

Came here for lunch on a weekday. Wasn’t too packed. Ordered veal tartare (incredible), sea bass (also fantastic, the flavours paired up together worked so well) and beets with greens (pretty average) and a side of focaccia. Easy and quiet atmosphere with lots of light inside.
We spent New Years Eve there — food was very nice, wide range of wine options, service was kind and efficient. The vibe overall was very nice too! A bit pricey but it’s part of the occasion.

We had dinner as a group of 6 and we had a great time.
The food was amazing and we got very great recommendation from our waitress.
The place is very lively and fitting for friends to gather especially for the tapas concept to share across the table.

They attend to you table at the beginning fine, as any restaurant would. After, throughout was so difficult to ever get them to attend to us.

The starters I absolutely hated. I did voice my opinion and she tells me it was the most popular dish and she was lovely and requested if I wanted anything else but I said no.
I ordered the tapas, fried eggplant with hummus and honey. Firstly, it was crispy thin eggplant, 3 slices, absolutely no taste to it. They should edit the menu, as there’s fried the there’s crispy thin. The honey was so overpowering it ruined the whole tapas. My friend got the shrimp, which was too large for the plate it was served on. So difficult to even take out of the shell.
For the main, it was all well, the server did want to know how I found it. I just found it very filling for quesadillas, but i did enjoy the whole meal. My friend enjoyed her wagyu, didn’t expect that kind of presentation though, in a pool of gravy and mash potatoes.
It was the ending we must’ve waited 30 mins to get my quesadillas boxed away for takeaway and to pay our bill.

My friend and I had a gorgeous dinner here the other night. We got drinks and the tasting menu, which was definitely a great deal - lots of delicious, filling tapas! We thought the sausage was the best but we also loved the fried dishes, the lamb, the octopus skewer... Just a lot of great seasoning and flavor. Server was kind and helpful, and the vibe was very relaxed. Fun music! We raved about the meal the whole next day.

We accidentally stumbled across this restaurant, the food was wonderful as was the cava… I’m from Pamplona and we take our food seriously especially tapas aka pintxos.    The croquetas were delicious, silky and tasty, as were the pimentos del padrón. The patatas bravas had a novel twist to them that we loved. Delicious tapas too.
Went there for weekday lunch. Tasty meals for reasonable prices, nice extra salad bar and nice interior.

Wonderful setting on the edge of the park makes this a fantastic spot to relax at and watch the world go by. There’s no indoor seating but outside catches the sun pretty much all day so it’s ideal. Blankets are available for the colder days.

Order your food and drink inside where the staff are friendly and willing to help with the menu if you need. It was surprising that the club sandwich wasn’t available because “it was new and the kitchen wasn’t sure how to make it yet”, but fortunately there was enough other choice to quickly pick an alternative.

The chicken burger did arrive in good time though, had decent presentation and was a large portion size for the lunch we were there for. The side of coleslaw was particularly delicious and really made the dish memorable. Draught beer was available on tap as well as an extensive range of soft drinks.

Overall it’s a lovely relaxing spot on a nice day and I’ll be sure to return next time I’m in the city.

I was there couple of days ago , i wanted to eat a burger , i didn’t know which one to pick !,because they had many delicious burgers, so i asked the guy who took my order to recommend me a burger and i went with his recommendation, i loved the burger , the guy turned out to be the manager that I found out after a short conversation, super friendly with wild smile that made me feel welcome and happy !
The staff were really fast and professional which i like !
Before i go i thanked them for giving me a nice lunch experience in Stockholm!
Last thing , the park is such a nice park with a lots of events all the time , so go there if u want to enjoy sun and nice food !
Our shevre salad was perfect, delicious & rich in ingredients. We even come back for a 2nd time in our weekend getaway. 100% recommend this place.
Super unfriendly service and the chicken was clearly kept out raw, on a day it was 27 degrees celcius outside. Avoid.

The food was super good and the people super nice. It was a surprisingly good stop for food after looking around the area. We wanted to give it a try and it was very worth it. I would go back for the salmon or shrimp poke for sure.

name: CC

googleReviews.text:
We came to this place to try new things, so basically we ordered moose and reindeer.
Although we thought the meet was going to be tough, in reality it was so tender and aromatic... Delicious! They didn't disappoint at all!
Super tasty sauces and vegetables Both preparations were outstanding!!!
Kind and helpful staff. Fast service.
Central location, near souvenir shops and Stockholm's old centre.
Hunting restaurant ambience.
Totally recommend this place!!!
Very nice restaurant in a side street. Tactful and attentive waiter. Delicious mushroom soup, salmon and moose steak. Cranberry mousse was a delight. Higher price, but I would happily return here.

Came here to eat dinner. It did take a sec for us to be seated, but once we were we were taken care of pretty good. Plenty of food options. We had the moose, and reindeer during our visit. Both tasted great with a bit more liking on the moose. The food is presented on a decorated plate which adds to the experience. Worth the visit.

Delightful place for a tasty swedish lunch! No wait for party of three for lunch on Sunday.

Ambiance has vintage swedish decor but it's very relaxing, quiet piano jazz plays in the background.

All of our meals were traditional swedish and we all loved them and ate our plates clean!

What a wonderful place and the food was AMAZING. I totally recommend this place. We had a moose tenderloin and it was absolutely amazing plus Swedish meatballs. If you’re around old town you must try the food here.

googleEditorialSummary: Informal establishment featuring traditional cuisine like reindeer, meatballs & seafood.

googleReviews.text: Good bubble tea selection. Bahn mis were decent - tried pork and chicken curry . Red bean bun can be missed .

They are so good, and this is the best high-quality store with authentic taste in Stockholm. The boba is soft and chewy without a hard texture, and I can feel they are so fresh💗 I recommend visitors to try the Passion Fruit QQ and Taichi Supreme milk tea🧋 By the way, I also like their kiosks because you don’t need to worry about choosing your beverage in a rush, and they also offer images of every beverage and ingredients for more visual effects!

I ordered ice oolong milk bubble tea, regular ice and regular sugar.
It tastes the same in Taiwan!!!! Good job 👏👏
Good bubble tea but we took the large cup and half of it was only ice

I ordered boba. 69kr right? And the machine asked me to pay again? Because it was an error but it already took 69kr. I told one of the staff what happened and she just told me I should get it back in a couple of days? still haven’t gotten my money.

Expensive even by Stockholm standards.
The cafe is cozy though and coffee is nice. The pastries were ok.  Don’t recommend the sweet stuff here!
A good option at Mariatorget with their fresh sandwiches and cakes. All they serve is very fresh. Plus no people with computers :) Their semla is also delicious!
Nice coffee and cake place in Stockholm. Prices are ok. Good coffee.
It was the beast chocolate cake I ever try in Stockholm very lovely and cozy place 🫶🏻❤️

The apple pie is my favorite.
Also tried the cheese pie for lunch and loved it.
It is very cozy but usually crowded

Very delicious and authentic Chinese food! The restaurant environment is also great. The dishes were served very quickly — we ordered four dishes and they all arrived within ten minutes. The prices are also reasonable by Stockholm standards, not expensive at all.

Their dumplings were light, flavorful, and paired with great dipping sauce. For dessert,  ice cream. The service was friendly, and the ambiance cozy. I can't wait to return for another delicious meal!

Excelent food at very fair prices! The place is nice and cozy and the service is very good. We tried 4 different starters and 4 mains and all of them were delicious. The Dumplings and the sweet&saur Aubegine dishes didnt make it to a photo, but were also very tasty. They also brew their own beers. Definitely coming back very soon!

I was on my way to lunch at another spot when I passed by Restaurant China in Fridhemsplan. A friend had recommended it for dinner, but I noticed they serve lunch, so we decided to give it a try.

I had the fried noodles with seafood – a large portion with great flavor, though I couldn’t finish it. My partner ordered the beef fillet with mushrooms and bamboo, which I also tasted. It was delicious and well-sized. We enjoyed some Chinese beer with the meal and finished with fried bananas and ice cream – another generous portion.

The service was attentive, and the total came to 470 SEK for two, which felt like good value. We’ll definitely be back to try their dinner menu, which offers different dishes. Stay tuned for that review! 🥰

I liked it here. The interior is very nice, the house-brewed beer is tasty, and they have some (albeit not many) vegan choices.
I had the tofu gryta, which came to the table steaming hot and tasted great. It's a mix of tofu, mushrooms, vegetables, and glass noodles.
I also shared some of the green beans - great dish, simple, spicy, and made with fresh beans here.
Service was polite, although somewhat lacking in attention. Lots of dropped cutlery and plates and the menu I got had seen very much better times. Yet food- and atmosphere-wise, this is a place to return to.
The most expensive hot chocolate and cinnamon roll in my life, I've paid for both 178 SEK. Is it a scam? Probably, but I've enjoyed this time, taste was good 😁

Seems like a normal cafe. But got charged almost 14 euros for 2 cokes and 20 euros for 2 freaking ice creams. Absolute scam. Doesn't make it obvious until check out. Upon sight one may think it has cheap prices because it looks cheap. Hindsight i see everyone who walks in, walking out as soon as they see the prices. But once you ask for ice cream for your kids its hard to return the icecream when paid.

They massively overcharged for just two iced lattes, and both were awful—sickly sweet. With so many great (and cheaper) coffee options nearby, this place feels like a complete scam. Save your money and go literally anywhere else.

AVIOD! Completely disrespectful treatment. My 80-year-old friend and I were passing by this café when my friend felt dizzy and needed to sit down for a moment. He sat on one of your outdoor seating chairs, where there wasn't a single guest. The staff (an Iranian?) immediately came out and, in a very unpleasant and aggressive manner, told us that he was not allowed to sit there. I was contemplating to order something, but due to the incredibly rude treatment, we decided to leave. Never before have I experienced such a lack of compassion and inhumanity.
A Cute & Simple spot for a fika in Old Town Gamla Stan. The two adorable and kind people who work there make for a happy visit. Had mulled wine and Princess cake - some of my favorites
I had hot dark chocolate with marshmallow and whip cream. It has rich flavor while the milk chocolate is easier to drink and it tastes good too!

Really good home made chocolates with big variety of tastes. The environment is very fresh. It was a great stop to drink a coffee and eat a chocolate before going to Fotografisk. Staff is very friendly.
We had a vegan hot chocolate and cake. It was very delicious and for a good price. Highly recommended!

I went there on a freezing afternoon and had their hot chocolate! OMG. It's soooo good! First of all it looks so Christmasy ❤️ and the taste is really really good. And I had their blueberry cheesecake cake. And it tastes heavenly. Perfect balance of sweetness and creaminess.
Yum yum.

Fantastic soup and cake lunch buffet &
very nice and friendly service every time!

Chocolate shop and café with options to purchase packaged chocolate and a variety of chocolate confections/pastries from the counter, for eat-in or take away. Menu of coffee and tea beverages as well. There were a few vegan options at the counter, which as a vegan I was excited to see. I decided on the vegan biskvi and a cappuccino with oat milk. The cappuccino was fantastic, but the biskvi was a disappointment. The almond pastry base was very stale (both in taste and texture), the mousse was very dense and the chocolate shell too hard - I had a difficult time using a fork to break it apart and biting into it when the fork proved too difficult was also unpleasant. Overall just hard and stale. Taste-wise, it was just okay and I personally found it too sweet. I wouldn't have it again. It's too bad.

It’s decent place with high quality chocolate. Yet not special enough so I would like to come back. The hot chocolate was good but more like a “kakao” and less like a hot chocolate. More over it was only a little warm and the marshmallow didn’t melt really.

The praline I had was very good.

Overall I believe that it’s high quality chocolate. But the drink was ok - yet not something I couldn’t just make myself. Also the seating is rather basic (as compared to the typical cosiness of cafes in Stockholm).

If you’re in Stockholm for a visit and you fancy something else then coffee - then it’s a great option. For a local, I don’t think I would come back.
It's a high quality chocolate shop in Stockholm. You need to walk little bit far from downtown but it's worth to visit there. Their staffs were very kind and polite for our family.

Mediocre quality at best... Hot chocolate with weak taste and stale hallonmousebakelse (had certainly been several days in the fridge). A disappointment for a place called "chokladfabriken" (chocolate factory). Very basic environment. Not recommended.
Fully recommend Lakritskola pralines, even if you don't like liquorice! They are amazing!

name: Ciao Ciao Grande

googleReviews.text: Ciao Ciao Grande offers an elevated dining experience with an interesting and gourmet menu featuring delicious pizza and pasta. The team is decent and ensures a smooth dining experience. Their pizza and pasta selections stand out with rich flavors and high-quality ingredients, making every bite enjoyable. The restaurant is also a great spot for families, as the menu caters well to kids. Whether you’re looking for a casual meal or a special dining experience, Ciao Ciao Grande is a solid choice.

Editing the below review and taking to a lower score. Adding that after this meal, all family members felt unwell. Recall having flies around the table, and even more near the toilets, seems to be a pest issue despite being mid-winter. Honestly, this restaurant is one of the lowest quality experiences I've encountered.
Original review:
Very disappointed with the experience. Service was slow and not very friendly. Everyone thought their dishes were mediocre. Next time will go to another local restaurant instead.
This is my favourite restaurant in Stockholm. And I am Italian I live in Sweden only since two years and it is like feeling at home

Ciao Ciao Grande has quickly become our new favorite restaurant. We’ve been here three times already and never had a bad experience.
My absolute favorite dish is the carbonara, while my boyfriend loves to try something new each time — this time he went for the pasta con salsiccia, which was excellent.
Since the weather was so nice, we chose to sit outside. It was a great atmosphere, though I did feel it took them a bit longer to take our order — we waited about 30 minutes. I imagine they were quite busy inside, as it’s a large restaurant, but it’s something to keep in mind if you sit outdoors. That said, once we ordered, the food came out in about 10 minutes and was absolutely delicious, as always.
Price-wise, I’d say it’s very fair for the quality and portion sizes. We usually spend around $20 (200 SEK) per person, which is more than reasonable.
Overall, Ciao Ciao Grande continues to impress us every time — definitely a place we’ll keep coming back to!
Went twice, loved it both times. Decent prices and both portion size and food quality was exceptional. I highly recommend the truffle beef pasta.

googleEditorialSummary: Smart eatery delivering a regional Italian menu including pizza, with candlelight in the evenings.

googleReviews.text: Seems like a nice place with good personnel. But, I only ordered a latte and it was more of a warm milk. I mean, it was beige, and didn't have the syrup I ordered, as far as I could tell.
We went in to get something quick to eat but the serving time was slow but we ended up getting a quite flashy meal which was supposed to be just a grilled sandwich.
Very cozy place with nice coffee and fresh food! Prices are good!
Traditional cafe. Try the carrot cake
Good coffee and latte😉
Delicious food; definitely recommend lahmacun and Mevlana pide

So far the best lahmacun i ever ate in Stockholm! Mevlana pide was also perfect as it has the perfect balance of the meat, cheese, tomato and green pepper. As a Turkish who lived in Istanbul for many years, this place has very near quality in terms of lahmacun and pide. Definitely will revisit!
Really nice place with very good food and super friendly staff 👌🏻👌🏻👌🏻

Best grill I ever had in Stockholm,
Nice and welcoming stuff amazing food . I can’t be happier 😍

Izgara has been around in Årsta for about 3 years now and has become one of the best restaurants in the neigjbourhood.

The menu offers a variety of dishes from turkey, but also pastas and pizzas. I wouldnt buy any of their pastas or pizzas, not because they are bad, but because their turkish dishes are so good that it would be a waste of money if you spent it on that.

Swedish kebab is often a sad story, but izgara offers another take on it with its different dönerkebabs and sauces.

Izgara is a charcoalgrill restaurant and therefore their grilled plates are the ones you should try. The adana kebab and the mixed grill are both fantastic dishes with perfectly grilled meat, a variety of sideorders and sauces, and also a big loaf of bread with every meal.

The staff are always nice and sometimes they will even slip you a free soda. The only downside I have with Izgara is that sometimes your order will take some time to get, but that is because its often very crowded. The guests are 90% cabdrivers and familjens from turkey/middleeast, which is a great sign of the food being autentic and genuine.

I would definitly recommend everyone to try Izgara since its a gem i southern Stockholm.

Great cozy little spot! We went here on our first night on Stockholm as it’s across our hotel.

We shared the Duck, Wings and Calamari. Everything was amazing and looked great (we only took pictures of the calamari as we jumped straight into the rest)

Highly recommended!

The grilled pork, crispy duck Pancakes and mango salad dishes were delicious. Really Recommend it!

Now the basil smash drink and the Vietnamese Creme Brulee desert unfortunately did not live up to the expectations. The drink tasted like a mocktail even though Hendricks is a ingredient. And as for the desert, somehow we were served a different desert from what we ordered, tiramisu, and seemed to be bought and delivered from some bakery around the corner. This tiramisu is not even on the menu.

A Crazy character filled place. Staff are great and super friendly and not like your everyday service but engaging and fun. Food matches perfectly! Simple menu but food hits perfectly! And the tiramisu is perfect & good for those who aren’t super into coffee. Made me feel super welcomed while on my solo travels and trusted the old adage of go to the place full of people.. means they are worth any wait you might get! Thanks guys! 😊🙏

We visited Cong, a small and cozy Vietnamese restaurant in Stockholm. Loved the warm atmosphere, quick service, and delicious food. We tried the Tofu & Aubergine salad, grilled pork, and crispy duck pancakes, all full of flavor and beautifully presented. A perfect spot for an authentic and tasty meal!

Overall great experience, food was tasty and both the meat and the vegetarian options. Place has a great vibe just like the owners! Also the drinks are prepared with great ingredients and passion🙂
Strongly suggest it both for a families and a group of friends.

A small charming place with indoor & outdoor seating, open kitchen, big windows & nice music. A community-get-together-feel & atmosphere. Lovely staff.
Great vegan (plant based) food cooked & freshly served with care.

I really love stopping by for lunch or dinner. Everything I've had has been absolutely delicious and often very creative and interesting too. Lovely people, very cozy both inside and outside. The perfect place to relax with some perfect food.

A favorite cafe / restaurant in Stockholm ❤️ they do wonderful pop ups with vegan takes on food from all over the world. My only wish: open a second location in Aspudden where I live! Then I’d be there every day :)

Some of the best, most creative vegan brunch dishes I've ever had! The atmosphere and staff are lovely, and the food is simply great. I've been looking forward to Sundays just to see what they have up their sleeves this time!
A heart warming all vegan café in a nice relaxed area of Stockholm. Amazing food and desserts made by the owners. The atmosphere was cozy and welcoming🌱💚

Can't comment on the food as I only had a drink with friends there.
It's a pretty nice pub and the staff is very friendly and attentive.
A little cozy bar at the corner of Hornsgatan and Timmermansgatan. Easy to order and get is served at the table. Loved the way they serve Jäegermeister.
It's a traditional Pub with nice food. Decent prices. Enjoy the place !
Avoid at all cost. Do yourself a favor and buy Mcdonald’s. They have better food quality than here. You have been warned.
Cheap beer and a friendly environment. I did not try food. Recommended for night out with friends 🍻🇸🇪

This is packed with young people during evenings. Most are also quite nice and well behaved which is of course an added bonus for everyone looking for a nice place to grab a beer and chill with friends. Staff was like staff should be and we got our beers quickly. Will most definitely be back when around the area looking for a cold one.

Very cool place. It has been an spot for me for years already, it doesn't disappoint but it has its flaws.

Cool place, nice atmosphere. The food is good as well as the drinks. Perhaps one of its strengths is the price. It's quite reasonable, and even cheap, considering the centric place it has. I spent several holidays there. It's good enough for me to always come back. The major drawback to me is the music, the sound system is not good... 6/10... also the mix... it doesn't make justice to the place. Always random music here and there. Overall I recommend for having a good time.

I’ve never felt so unwelcome in a bar before. From the moment we walked into Crazy Horse in Stockholm, the staff seemed annoyed we were even there. No greeting, no eye contact, and when we asked simple questions, the attitude was unbelievable. A bar should make customers feel comfortable — this place did the opposite. Definitely wouldn’t recommend.

You get what you pay for.
Cheap "stor stark" (large beer), nice food (we both chose Chicken fajitas), ok service, rush hour traffic on Sveavägen, but anyway, nice to be able to sit outside in the sun, even though it is in March in Stockholm.

Crazy Horse in Stockholm has a great location, but the service is among the worst I’ve experienced. The staff acted like serving customers was an inconvenience. Very cold and unwelcoming atmosphere. Won’t be returning.
Went for lunch at this place and was very satisfied with the atmosphere, the balance of food taste, and the nice wine selection. The personnel were friendly, and I will definitely go back here again🥰

Tiramisu is overpriced at 105kr. I think it should just be 50-65. Capricciosa alla Romana was a unusual. The egg-artichoke-olive combination was interesting but weird.

Staff was super friendly. Location and atmosphere is good.

The best pizza I’ve had in years. The service is excellent. The prices very good. The location amazing. Grab yourself a pizza, park yourself by the waterfront and enjoy the long slow sunset during summer. It makes for a perfect day out if you grab the ferry from downtown and sightsee on the water and up here for dinner. It makes for an excellent day / evening.

Just to notify everyone, but this is the best place to get pizza!

We're on holiday in stockholm for the second time, and we've eaten here before. This year we just had to come back! The place is run by a family that just pours their love and passion in their business. You can taste that in every bite. The pizza dough is tender but every bit so crunchy in the best way. The tomato sauce is packed with flavour and the topping ever so fresh. The tiramisu and heavenly espresso was the cherry on top for this dining experience. The staff is open and friendly, which just makes the whole experience ever so delightful.

I'm telling you, if you're craving a pizza in Stockholm, go to Antonio a Lucia!

Family run and serves mainly pizza. There is a small selection of antipasti. Well patronized with dine-ins and having takeaways during lunch and dinner. We had a takeaway of a Salsiccia (Rosse / with tomato sauce) and a Romana (Bianche / no tomato sauce). Size wise, it was regular like those at most pizza restaurants in Stockholm. The pizza is fired in a stone oven and dough is of medium thickness and chewy, drier to the edges and slightly charred. The quality of both pizzas are overall ok. They fill a hungry stomach. Taste wise, the pizza base is bland and does not leave a desire of satisfaction or wanting more. Of both pizzas we ordered, the ingredients were average but praise goes to the plump stalks of artichoke hearts in the Romana. We also tried the Tiramisù. Very fresh, good tasting but also very small and expensive. Nice, friendly folks, quick service.

Lots of outdoor seating which is great in summer. A relaxed vibe and truly Italian food! The pizzas had generous toppings - rare in Stockholm! The pasta was fresh and handmade. The tiramisu could have been better but the only thing lacking was it was not well set- the ingredients were still top notch! We had a great experience and will be back for more.
Recommend make a reservation. The food is so good and the portion is large. 🤤

This is a fabulous restaurant. The pizza was like being in Italy. Perfetto
🇮🇹

The restaurant was very busy with a public holiday but they were amazing. Zero waiting and fast service.

The waitress made me feel very welcome and once she knew I was Italian everything was easier so she could speak freely and quickly. Fantastic restaurant 👌

The food was delivered very quickly and beautifully cooked.

Everyone was enjoying themselves ☺️

We have been here for a few tilmes. During my last visit I took mum and dad as well. To my surprise, although they do not like they ordered pizza (the veggie one). They both loved it! I also had a bite and found it quite delicious! The topping was generous. I always eat pasta here and am always pleased with what I chose. The service is slow and one is sometimes needing to remind oneself, but the positive side of this is having lunch/ dinner with no stress, having good enough time to choose your dish and chat with the people you come with. They have outdoor seating during summer which is nice though I like the cosy atmosohere indoors as well.

The outdoor atmosphere was quite nice during summer although somewhat cramped. The food was okay. We ordered garlic bread to start with and two different types of pizza along with a seafood pasta dish. All of it tasted just fine. The biggest complaint was that it took around 40-45 minutes to get our food out which is quite long compared to other restaurants of the same calibre.

Pros:
* Nice outdoor atmosphere.
* Pizza dishes price matched the quality. (Not expensive for what you get basically)
* Friendly staff.

Cons:
* Very long waiting time.
* A bit cramped in the outdoor seating spots.

Italian flair with a fine dining vibe.
Excellent service, the staff are gracious. They know their product.
Loved the food. The Carbonara hit the spot and did the Ricotta starter.
The decor was elegant and tastefully done.
If you're looking for a change from Swedish fare, try this place.

Good Italian food. Nice decor, good service.  First day in Stockholm and we wanted something simple after a long day traveling (and Italian was the option), and we were pretty satisfied with this place. Service was good, despite one of our dishes arriving a bit later than the other two. For appetizers, the Ricotta was great. I wish it came with more bread. Garlic bread was tasty as well but few portions of bread as well. We had the Pesto di Pistacchi (really good flavor and the Burrata extremely fresh, I recommend it). The bresaola on the Honey Bunny pizza was pretty good also. Prices were decent for being in the middle of a touristic place. A decent place for coming back.

It was honestly one of the best pizzas I’ve ever had in my life. The atmosphere and decor felt so cozy and welcoming, which made the whole experience even more enjoyable. It’s definitely a place worth visiting. A special thank you to Evo, for the great service truly appreciated!

I was a little disappointed with my visit here after the glowing reviews. Arrived a bit early for my reservation and the staff struggled to find my reservation and I had to pull out an email even though the restaurant was more empty than not.  I never quite felt at home or appreciated here. I did appreciate they divided our pizza in half. I also would have ordered pasta but the pasta seems overpriced compared to the pizza. After eating in Scandinavia for a week, I’m pretty tired of overpriced food so I went for pizza, especially as some of the other reviews did not like the pasta.  🤷‍♀️
Thank you for the delicious pizzas and salmon. The whole team, especially Mr. Ahmet, are very friendly and helpful in every way. (Thank you also for the Turkish tea!)

We stay at the Globe Hotel and were looking for a nice dinner and came across this place. Best choice!
Service was quick, and we were well informed about thees different dishes and received perfect recommendations. Smell and taste were just great!!
Worth to come here and try the East African cuisine!

The food was undeniably good. It was a mesmerising blend of chilled comfort: unpretentious, genuinely welcoming, and clearly endorsed by the fact that many locals were dining there. Coupled with the kind waitress, this experience confirmed that a warm, authentic environment is paramount, even beyond great cuisine.

Good atmosphere and quick and fast service.  The vegan options are good and the food is well presented and quite tasty and spicy.

The place is quite hard to find in the first place but it’s really worth a trip.

Ridiculously cheap for Stockholm, super cosy food and great niche music which Shazam doesn't recognize.
It is not fancy or elegant but it will make you feel at home.
Really tasty and different from what I’ve eaten before. It was a nice experience. I’ll go back!!
Beautiful spot, great music watching the sun go down. Staff couldn’t care less and drinks were meh. But I would come back anyway as it’s the perfect Stockholm summer-spot for live music.

We liked it very much.  Good vibe,  open air,  water and super service.
It's  non touristic place and it's make it even better.
We had made a reservation but the restaurant was closed.  No words, real disappointment! No one even answered the phone.  Does not deserve the name of the restaurant!
Beautiful location.

We had
a great experience. The location and views were great. All our servers were excellent and the food was very good.
Hip and cool  place to dine or have your take out. The food was good and portion are really good that you will be full in your belly. Drinks are good too.

Din Din Club is newly opened in Kungsholmen and has a warm, inviting atmosphere, plus the convenience of two restrooms.

We tried the Korean Brisket BBQ Ramen (without coriander), but the broth lacked depth and mostly tasted like BBQ sauce, while the meat was tough. The Spicy Karaage Bowl was good, though the kimchi was a bit sweet.

The Spicy Cheese Onigiri was crispy and tasty, but the highlight was the Tteokbokki-Style Chili Mac & Chees. Coffee is included, and the service was good. We paid 508 SEK for everything. The portion sizes were normal.

So far, I’d rate the service, atmosphere, and presentation 2,5 out of 5. Looking forward to exploring more of the menu! 😊
Good spicy ramen. Looking forward to coming back in the evening one time and trying some of the exciting looking craft beers.

Ramen is very good .
The most important for us is welcome Dogs  ❤️❤️❤️
Tasty, friendly staff and for us very important, our sweet dog can be inside.

The food is very delicious, everything is fresh and beautifully presented, and the cocktails are simply excellent. The staff are incredibly polite, attentive, and friendly, you can truly feel that guests are genuinely welcome here. The atmosphere is cozy, stylish, and at the same time very fun, making it perfect for spending time with friends. This is a place you really want to come back to again and again. Highly recommended!

Happily surprised with the quality of the food. The price is good for what you get.
The staff is friendly and accommodating, but have had mixed experiences, but hope that that was just a one-off.

The location is lovely during the warmer seasons where you can sit outside, no direct sun during some times of the day, but that is nicer sometimes, not having the sun directly in your eyes.
The interior is good, but I have to come back in terms of a bathroom verdict, have yet to visit.

Will definitely revisit and explore more of their menu.

Was skeptical about going to a place that had more things on the menu besides ramen. But let me tell you, D E L I C I O U S!
Broth was super tasty! Good chewyness on the noodles and perfectly boiled golden eggs!
Staff were super friendly and the atmosphere was relaxed.
おいしい！

The food is great and quite ok with price. I really enjoy my self with their SPICY MISO KAKUNI ramen which is amazing. while my wifes favourite is the SNEAKY SAMURAI bowl. And dont forget to try the SMOKY PIGGY BAO snack!.

With wide varirty of different unquies dished and drinks that are constantly getting added I tend to like this place since I get to experience something new all the time.

I was here before when it was restaurant Kato. I remember that ramen and sushi  here was nice before. I wanna try when it has been changed to Din-Din Club. Food looked great but I was not happy with the taste of ramen and sushi.  Spicy miso ramem was too much salty and they serve sushi with Thai soy sauce that we usually use for wok instead of Japanese shoyu. It didn't go well together. I also didn't like the way they put too much spring onions and crispy onions on top. I felt imbalance about the taste and ingredients. Only 3 things that made the meal better were beer, the atmosphere and a good service. You need to improve many things about food.

I can't recommend this place enough: the food is delicious, is served with beautiful presentation, the staff are friendly and helpful, and the atmosphere is relaxing. Seating is very comfortable and the restaurant layout works really well.
You're made to feel welcome from the moment you enter, and the restaurant has a trendy-but-not-pretentious vibe. The place feels alive, but you can have a conversation without having to raise your voice.

Great place! The classical burger tasted great and fries were crispy with good sauces. And the steak was juicy and tasty with very interestingly presented potatoes but they were great aswell. Serving sizes are good and service is nice. Atmosphere is also nice wether you choose to sit outside or inside.

A fabulous and affordable restaurant, we stumbled across DiWine at lunchtime on our first day in Stockholm. Service was incredibly quick and the food was delicious - we loved how the menu changed daily and also that there was a free salad bar and free coffee and tea. So much so we went again in the evening a few days later. Service was equally as fast and the food was incredible again. Would highly recommend this restaurant - great central location, friendly and quick service, and fantastic food.

DiWINE is a nice restaurant in a not too busy part of Stockholm. The restaurant has quick service, as we got our food less than 15 minutes after ordering. The food itself tastes nice, a personal recommendation being the Cajun Alfredo pasta. Lighting is nice and slightly dim at dinnertime, which is a nice  atmosphere.
I was pleasantly surprised by both the food and the atmosphere. We tried the pizza, burger, and beer tower, all were excellent!

There were a lot of dishes to choose from, and although they were out of a few ingredients, it barely limited the options. The food was good, though the chicken in one of the dishes was a tad dry and the spicy dishes are not well marked. The staff was friendly. We even had the option of taking home the leftovers in a takeout container. Great view while eating!

Nice place whith an amazing view over the ocean and Stockholm!
Tried two different starters which where really good, the plan was to have a beer or glass of wine but the drink menu was quite booring so I had a coca cola instead.

Didn't eat here, just got refreshments. The place is great if you like to watch the boat traffic and enjoy the sun. I am interested to eat here as well some other times, they prepare pizza, thai and kebab. The owner was welcoming.

Great food (see photos of ribs and mussels). Lovely member of staff who served us, was very busy and an error was made however that was rectified with a couple of free drinks. The views are amazing from here and the prices reasonable. Great value and recommended.

Amazing food and wine, the service here is a incredible experience. Polite, knowledgeable and accomodating. The view is stunning as it looks over the water so you can enjoy all the boats going past. The 80 ferry stops right next to the restaurant making it easy to get to. If your looking for somewhere to eat in Sweden this is the place to come!
Great pizza, would recommend the burata pizza👌🏼 Fries is also great. A very small but cozy place.

Ate here for the first time. The chef brought us our napoli sumthn pizza... Nice! The place was cozy and clean. Great to hang with friends or bring the whole family. The cashier/ servitris was very friendly and accomodating. Had our pizza not been a bit burned, I would give this place 5 stars. Also, I suggest to add some other drinks (juices etc) and small dishes to complement the wine and beer. I would go back to this place even we live so far away.
Amazing food, it’s such a nice local restaurant the quality of the food is amazing and their wine selection is amazing.
Sadly needed to wait one hour for my pizza.. seems they can’t manage their orders.
Quite an industrial impression , friendly young stuff seem to be some kind of fusion a bit of pimentos a bit of pizza nice upstair outside garden

name: Drop Coffee Roasters

googleReviews.text:
I would not say it is the best coffee shop I have ever been, but it is quite nice one in the city.

If you are espresso/ V60 lover, don't have your expectations too high.

However, the atmosphere is very calming and the girls are really kind.

The coffee was pretty good — I ordered a hot latte, and it smelled amazing. I also bought some coffee beans to take home; they had a nice variety to choose from, and my family really liked them. The banana bread was delicious too — not too sweet, not too heavy, just perfect. I finished the whole thing! The café had a warm and cozy atmosphere.

Hip coffee place in Södermalm.  Very good coffee, perfect cappuccino. Exceptional service and friendly.
Food and pastries looked fresh but I didn't try them this time.
Comfortable space to eat, drink, work, meet and chat.  Toilet was clean/stocked. Was looking for Kalita filters, which I found at a reasonable price.
Right outside Marietorget T-bana station at Wollmar Yxkullsgatan 10, 118 50 Sthlm.
Recommended!

One of the modern hipster places on Södermalm where you will see a lot of beards, tattoos and beanies. Disregarding the streamlined customers and focusing on the important stuff, coffee. It falls flat. It’s bland and tasteless. The cup below does actually not contain tea , it’s coffee. But very weak. Add a bit not so charming facilities. As you realize this was not my cup of tea. And as an added bonus the place was full of wet dogs making it smell like a kennel.
Simple cafe that was reasonably priced, comfy vibes and highly accessible by public transport. sweet treats paired excellently with their coffee.

googleEditorialSummary: Sandwiches, pastries & coffees are offered in this trendy locale with a terrace & a shop.

googleReviews.text:
An excellent experience from start to finish. Very pleasant atmosphere, stylish interior, and a calm, welcoming setting right in the city center. The food was outstanding – classic Swedish dishes prepared with great care, high-quality ingredients, and beautiful presentation. The meat was perfectly tender, the sauces well balanced, and the sides exactly as they should be.

The wine selection was another highlight, with great recommendations that paired perfectly with the food. Service was professional, friendly, and attentive without being intrusive.

A perfect place for a relaxed dinner, a date, or an evening with friends. I would gladly return on my next visit to Stockholm.

We visited this restaurant when it was quite busy. Although we had reserved a table in advance, we were seated near the entrance where it was cold. The staff, however, were very friendly and helpful, and thanks to them we managed to change our seats slightly.

For starters, we ordered the shrimp, which was very delicious. Our main dishes included pasta — which was incredibly tasty and highly recommended — the Swedish-style grilled salmon plate, which was excellent, and a steak. The steak was good, but unlike most restaurants, it wasn’t served with vegetables or sauce. They brought the sauce only after we asked for it. We also ordered a pizza with white sauce and shrimp, which I personally enjoyed.

For dessert, we had the pistachio tiramisu and créme brulle, but unfortunately it had almost no similarity to a real tiramisu except for a single ladyfinger.

Another downside was the waiting time: it took more than one hour and fifteen minutes from the moment we ordered until the food finally arrived. The long wait was quite tiring. and unfortunately They didn't even have a child seat.

Mouthwatering classic Swedish food!!!
Wide variety of dishes. Everything we ordered, which were starters, mains and desserts, was delicious!!!
Kind, helpful and efficient staff!! Excellent and fast service.
Nice and cosy ambience.
Central location.

Amazing experience. We had a three course dinner with live jazz playing for part of the night, which created a great atmosphere. The waiter was extremely kind and flexible, even removing a no show guest from our party of 14 with no extra charge. Food was 10 out of 10, super delicious and flexible menu. The pistachio tiramisu was the perfect ending. Highly recommended.

This was probably the best meal I’ve EVER had. We had the garlic bread and espresso martinis to dessert and then as my entrée I got the traditional meatballs and my friend Emma got the tortellini! Our waiter Argos was incredible, so kind and very helpful!

name: Dryck
openingHours: Mo closed; Tu-Th 16:00-22:00; Fr-Sa 16:00-23:00; Su closed

googleReviews.text: Enjoyed COD fish cooked in Swedish style. Loved every bit of it! Awesome food, atmosphere and service.

Charming place.
We arrived at around 7pm and the place was buzzing. Unfortunately there was no place inside so we sat outside in a shelter like outdoor seating area, it was so cosy out there so we didn’t wanna move in when space was available inside.

Brilliant service from the staff, and very interesting wines on the menu.
We tried a lot of wines and it was just amazing.

The cheese and meat platter was also lovely.

Will deffo be back 😁

04/03-2023

I love this local gem of a wine bar! Dryvk has an extensive selection of natural wines, many of them local. The staff is friendly and knowledgeable, making great recommendations. The atmosphere is lovely - we sat outside on heated benches overlooking the lively street the wine bar is located on. Highly recommend coming here for a glass or bottle of wine if you’re a wine lover!

Thank you for this great afternoon/evening. I was able to try some very nice and special wines, thanks to a very kind and knowledgeable Portuguese employee (João?)!! All the credits for you 🥂!
I could not wish for a better Saturday in Stockholm! I will definitely come back next time.
Amazing wine bar with lovely staff. Matilde was particularly helpful in suggesting some amazing wines we'd not tried before. Didn't try the food but it looked very good.
Awesome breakfast sandwiches, nice lunch. Great outside seating when the Swedish weather allows 😎
Super tasty! Great selection! All quality!!! I will become regular!
Coffee 📉

Fantastic cozy cafe in Solna! Super good coffee, sandwiches and pastries:) I was treated so incredibly nice by Rebecca who was working when I walked in!

Will definitely be back

The best cafe in the world!!! Such incredibly good buns and absolutely fantastic staff!! Becca is absolutely fantastic and you always feel welcome!!! The atmosphere is so calm and cozy, this cafe is something you have to visit.
Quite place and wonderful to unwind slowly after work on the weekdays.
Good neighborhood pub. Usually go there for lunch. They have different suggestions every day including coffee and fika.
best place in Stockholm in terms of food and atmosphere !
Nice place, but food disappointed. no english menu, but waitress very kind and helping
Excellent service and food is super tasty

Duvel Café offers a relaxed yet polished atmosphere in central Stockholm. The food is solid and well prepared, and the pairing of Trappistes Rochefort 8 with the picanha works particularly well, balancing rich, deep flavors with hearty simplicity.
Good cocktails, composed by Johannes. We didn't eat so not rating that

They were run out of all their food except two salads. It was 1pm. We ended up staying, beacuse I actually wanted that salad... I loved the atmosphere as well. The first waiter was lovely, then their shift changed and the second waiter was extremely stuck up. He wouldn't look at us. Very bizarre. Despite all this I'm giving it a 4 star, dunno why. Food was good! 😆
The food was nice but the service was really poor. They would rather not have us there kind of vibe.

Amazing restaurant !
The service was perfect: not too slow but not too fast, and the waiter was very nice.
The food was simple but very tasty! We really enjoyed our experience. Thank you !

I came for breakfast in the morning. The food was delicious and fresh. The sales person wasn't very friendly or smiley; on the contrary, looked at me strangely, as if there was something wrong with me. I think that in the morning, cafes like this set a warm mood for the whole day. That wasn't the case for me. But the atmosphere in the cafe is cozy.
Everything's lovely here - people, food and coffees! You can't go wrong with what you'll choose.
Best breakfast and fika place in Stockholm!
Good coffee and atmosphere. I really like the kanelbulle / kardemummabulle / cardamom bun. The bread is soft and it is not too sweet.
Very nice atmospheric small cafe. Have some Italian feeling around...and nice salads, wraps and desserts. Price range also good. Good to sit down and relax or takeaway on way...Recommended!

I visited this place on a lunch date with my friend. I'll accept that we were pleasantly surprised by the food, service and ambience. Both the food quality and quantity were amazing. I'd love to visit again and even recommend this place to everyone.

Nice place, although quite loud... a bunch of guys celebrating a birthday.
My steak sandwich was superb! And the staff was service-minded.

We came here for lunch and it was alright. The food came out fast and was decent. There was also a good selection of wine and beer, together with pancakes for dessert.

However the tables lacked cutlery and we had to collect cutlery from different tables. Some staff were on their phones at nearby tables.

But we did also get the after work drink prices at 13:30 so it made up.

We went here for lunch, must admit it was a bit confusing at first, but after being told how it works it made sense. I had the Mushroom Cannelloni, it was tasty but lukewarm, personally I wasn’t bothered, it went down 😂.
Tasted some of the pizza, which was very good.
Champagne was tasty.

Staff could do with some more energy.
A nice find in this neighborhood. Simple lunch set menu but you can tell that chef actuallyb spent efforts on making the food look nice and taste good.

I was strongly recommended by a friend to try this Vietnamese restaurant, and it really didn’t let me down! The pork rice noodles I ordered were right up my alley.

First of all, the pork belly deserves all the praise – its outer layer is pan-fried to a golden crisp. When you take a bite, you can taste the aroma of the fat, yet it’s not greasy at all. What was even more surprising was the rice noodles; they’re chewy with a slight springiness, and they soak up the soup perfectly, making every bite rich in flavor.

The Thai sweet chili sauce is a highlight too – it’s sweet and sour with a hint of spiciness. Dipping the rice noodles and pork belly in it takes the overall flavor to a whole new level, and every bite has wonderful layers of taste! I originally came just to give it a try, but ended up finishing the entire plate. Now I’m already looking forward to coming back for a second visit!

We had an Asian craving and decided to try Eatnam, and it did not disappoint! Coming from Australia, where Vietnamese food is known for its quality, I can say Eatnam is truly authentic. The service was excellent, and the beef pho was comforting and delicious, especially on a rainy day in Stockholm. We’ll definitely be back!

Best Vietnamese in town!
Cozy ambience.  Tasty Food. Good Price.
Generous portion.  Friendly staffs.

We order Pho Beef and Salmon with fish sauce, both are very yummy.  At first, I was hesitating between chicken pho and salmon.  However, the stock base for Pho is made from beef & chicken so I chose salmon, which is excellent choice^^

Pho beef has a meat ball on top but also a sliced beef at the bottom as well. My husband said the soup is really nice.  We paid SKL 400 for 2 dishes and 1 sparkling water, which is quite reasonable.

Definitely come back❤️
Very good food, easy to order and fast delivery. The portions were big, fresh and tasty. Would recommend

I lived in Vietnam for a few years. This food threw me back for some time. It's not like the local corner on Xuan Dieu, Hanoi, but close enough to remember. I missed the Truc Bach beer and had to go for Saigion export, still a pleasant lager.

The food was good, but the service felt unenergetic and the staff seemed a bit sad. It also felt like they treated us differently from other customers. One boy who served us kindly and made us feel welcome — he truly stood out.
The food was absolutely delicious with authentic Vietnamese flavors. The atmosphere was cozy and relaxing.

Ok food, but it's very localised and some is clearly fusion. It tasted fine, but it's not really Vietnamese. For example, you'd never get jasmin rice in Vietnam. The baguette bread was disappointing though, as it was way too soft and soggy. A bit on the pricey side for what you get though, but the portions aren't stingy.

We've been back a couple of times and the food has been slightly better, but still very much localised. Overall it's a fine place for a quick bite. What gets me is that they use Thai fish sauce, rather than Vietnamese, which no self respecting Vietnamese restaurant would do.

It’s reasonably priced and tastes good.
My favorite is number 3 (noodle) and 6 (pork)

I’d heard so many good things about this place and finally tried it. Hands down the best Vietnamese I’ve had so far. Got the tofu banh mi and spring rolls - everything was sooo good. Definitely a must-try

Could obly order in English (staff did not speak Swedish) and she was a bit rude and not very satisfied with her job (so it seemed).
The food was very good, nice and calm atmosphere.
Hi The worst place to have food! service was horrible, staff were very rude and food overcook and messy , do not recommend the resturang

Wonderful place to be in winter, with a daylight room with tropic atmosphere, but a really bad place to go to for a one-hour lunch break. First time I went there I had to wait for my soup for 40 min and only got it when I reminded them that my lunch break will soon be over. The soup (Tom Ka) was really good though. Today I ordered the raw food which was ok, but very little food, so I went to the bar to ask for some bread. When I came back to my seat, they had removed my food although I had left my coat and everything at the table. They said they would get me new food, but once again my 1h-lunch break was over before I got any food. They gave me a take-away box when I asked for it, so I was not left without any food, but still I don't think I will not come back for lunch since I got quite stressed both times and could have spent the time so much better. But for people who are in no hurry, it is a nice little oasis in the middle of the city.
Really good raw food place in Stockholm. They serve food both inside Centralbadet as well as in a restaurant area separate of Centralbadet. During the summer it is possible to eat outside as well.
I ate here few times. Food is really good and always everything is so fresh, place is very nice,  personel is friendly and helpfull. Thank You!

This was one of the best places we had dinner on our trip to Scandinavia. The food was so fresh and perfectly prepared. The DJ was spinning fun music that was a great sound level for us and our 7 year old. The views and ambience were spectacular. It brought together sophisticated and simple dishes with a chill atmosphere that a family can enjoy. It likely gets more hip in the later hours for younger patrons. We left about 7:30 PM. We will definitely come back on our next trip to Stockholm.

Serving size of the food rather small, but overall quite delicious. Vibe is amazing and that’s why you come here - French Riviera straight out of the 60s/70s. Recommend to come here for drinks - Reserve a table!

Went here to use the sauna and to dip on the lake after a good friend’s wedding. Would highly recommend. Even on a Sunday night was a good level vibe. Great natural wine as well. And fantastic service. Slightly treacherous getting in and out the lake but don’t let that put you off.

Such a lovely and lively place buzzing with people. Even though it’s recently opened, it was full. There are 2 sides to it, one towards boats view and one towards sun view in the evenings. Both sides are equally pretty. A must go evening place for drinks n light snacks. Loved it loved it.
Food was yummy for lunch.

Super nice place with great view. Food was surprisingly really good, though portions are quite small.
Amazing personnel!

Dinner in Stockholm Slussen

A visit to Eken Bar & restaurant - Hilton Stockholm Slussen ❣️❣️❣️

We stayed at the hotel ourselves, but the restaurant is open to everyone and can also be accessed directly from the riverside.👍

The service was excellent and my allergies were carefully taken into account. Big thanks for that 🙏.

The dishes were beautifully presented and made with seasonal ingredients – a perfect balance of taste and presentation. So tasty 😋.

The restaurant and hotel are in a lovely location right by the water, and while dining you can enjoy views towards the Old Town. 🌊🏙️

#slussen #Stockholm #restaurantreview #seasonalfood #beautifulplating

We ate the menu that was included in the Raw stand-up comedy show. I ate the vegeterian option, my boyfriend with meat. We both thought that the food was among the best ones we've experienced in a restaurant. Wonderfully balanced, tasteful, beautifully displayed, great contrasts with flavor and structure. 11/10. The staff was very polite and they even placed the dessert with the lit up candles for my boyfriend and sung Happy Birthday to him after I mentioned that it was his birthday. The cocktail drinks (one needs to ask for a special meny for them but they can even craft something that's not on the meny like Pina Colada that I wanted) were OK though a bit too much alcohol taste and too little coconut and pineapple for my taste buds. BUT overall I recommend this place 100%!

Great service and expert reccomendations from staff. Had some oysters with an excellent homemade hotsauce to start. The main was a delicious duck dish. Thanks to the waiter for making the perfect recc.
Visit this restaurant during my stay in the Hilton hotel as a fast choice for dinner. But lovely suprised by quality of service. Food was really delicious!

Eken is a fantastic experience you shouldn't miss. The bartenders crafted absolutely delicious cocktails, and each one was perfectly balanced and full of flavor. My favourite was "The one with Bumbu". The service was outstanding, incredibly friendly, attentive, and welcoming. Their professionalism and warmth took the experience to another level.

Highly recommend stopping by if you're in the area!
P.S. the sunset there is a whole experience on its own.
Absolutely masterful cocktails! Highly recommend! Creative ingredients with passionate and personal service! This place should be a lot more crowded!
Fabulous cocktails made with exceptional local ingredients.  Staff were exceptionally knowledgable and informative, and took their time to explain the construction of our selections.
very nice and clean bar/restaurant. The atmosphere is very warm and friendly. Highly recommend for a breather and a drink in Stockholm
Cozy atmosphere in a nice neighborhood! Great cocktails and friendly service. The best Gin selection in Stockholm!

We were a five people group that had some post dinner drinks and were met with some lovely options which suited each of our tastes.

The absolute best part of the experience was the staff that were really helpful with getting us seated even when it was quite busy and they were just immensely friendly and helped make the evening into an unforgettable one.

We mostly tried the cocktails but I am eager to come back to try the great selection of gin and tonics.
Super delicious, fabulous taste and service, worth trying, will go back again 😊！

This is a small Asian eatery in the picturesque town of Ekerö, an archipelago of islands.  I came here for lunch and had a combination of sushi and cooked beef served with rice.   Fairly basic food,  but delicious.  If you are here on a boat trip as I was,  this would be a great place for lunch.
Best Thai food we had so far in Stockholm!!!
Delicious! The roll was absolutely packed with flavor, definitely recommend!
Delicious food and very friendly, efficient and helpful staff

Wow! This place was an absolute find. The food and service were equally amazing and they managed to fit us in for dinner on a Saturday night despite us not booking in advance, we had a slight wait at the bar for that reason but nothing terrible and they made a special effort to speak to us at the end when we were leaving and things had calmed down a bit!

You can speak English, Swedish or Spanish here and get along just fine. They were a touch intrigued by me speaking all three equally badly! 😂

Would absolutely visit here every time I'm in Stockholm, no questions at all!

I've been to many restaurants and this has been one of the best ones so far (personally, I like the concept of Tapas) but the food tasted really good, especially the roasted and grilled ones, the food arrived pretty fast, the service is super friendly, and the ambience is really pretty with good music. Must have is also a Cocktail, I had a Mojito and it was finally a strong one after trying many cocktails in different bars/restaurant in Stockholm, so if you prefer stronger ones, you should definitely get one here! ☺️
