Very good food and good portion. The beef-menu was the best dish with great flavor combination we have ever had. High quality beef and very tasty. Good service and the place is cozy and chill. We’re coming back for sure.

Easily the best restaurant in the Globen area. Newly renovated, the atmosphere is very laid back but the service is impeccable. The Thai food is made by fresh ingredients such as crispy veggies and a variety of both vegan/vegetarian dishes. Their sushi is my favourite through many years now. I’m coeliac and they really know what food intolerance is and they prepare the food accordingly. (Yes they have gluten free soy sauce!)
Good food great service. Big portion of food. I will come back next time.

Wow, this was the best experience ever. If you ever visit Stockholm you CAN’T miss this restaurant. The service and food was out of this world. We had resevetions for another location but on our way out of the museum we checked the menu and we had to try at lest one item (the raindeer bone marrow appetizer) but next thing you know with the awesome personable service and perfect food and presentation, amibance and view this place is a MUST COME. Thank you chef Irene and Alejandro for this amazing epxirience. We will come back!!

Best experience! We only had a few hours to enjoy Stockholm on our way back to US.  The atmosphere was perfect! The food was beyond delicious! Our waitress was phenomenal- Margo was adorable and explained everything on the menu and the mead tasting! The staff is welcoming, knowledgeable and friendly. The chef makes every dish her prized possession. Such attention to detail! We tried the duck pate and fresh bread- to die for! The steak, the venison chef’s kiss! The fish, we had halibut,is always freshest so it varies- all menus are seasonal with purpose. My 3 Vikings were very pleased!
Highly recommend the mead tasting- entertaining, interesting, and delicious.
This was the crown jewel of our family vacation! Thank you so much💖

My husband and I decided to treat ourselves after we noticed the menu from outside. This restaurant is in the Viking museum next to the gift shop. We had a wonderful mead tasting and lovely meal. When we go back again to Stockholm we will make sure to stop by again. Thanks for a lovely last meal in Stockholm.

Thanks for an amazing experience, from the welcoming to the end. The food was really something different, but with lovely tastes – and marvelous food design. We also tried the taste-plank with mjød, great to the food!
Everyone should try this place sooner or later...

The visit at Eld restaurant became a highlight for our stay in Stockholm. The place itself is very cosy and neat, staff was super friendly and thoughtful, and the food was absolutely delicious. Also the mead tasting is a must. Thank you for thansforming a simple lunch in one of the best culinary experiences we had!
we tried a lot of things here, the porridge was very filling and the 2nd one is like dessert for breakfast. the service was excellent!

I stopped by for an Americano and some eggs with avocado, served on their own freshly made bread. Everything tasted really good. The place itself is quiet, comfortable, and easy to work from. They have solid Wi-Fi, plenty of space, and a relaxed atmosphere that makes it perfect for grabbing a bite while getting some work done.

A simple, good experience. Worth visiting if you want calm vibes and good coffee.
Cozy little spot with hearty porridge. The peanut butter one is on a salty side.
Cozy nice vegan/vegetarian cafe in Kungsholmen. Had tried the lunch and it was superb. Will be back again for sure :)

I came here to have breakfast on my last day in Stockholm. To be honest I did not expect anything special from a bowl of oatmeal but it was definitely one of the best bowls I have tried!
I love the idea of serving extra hot oat milk and that it is possible to add additional components to your bowl.

Portion was big and I left satisfied :)

Overhyped place that charges like they served perfectly cooked food.
The orange juice was terrible and the pancakes was really dry. I think that the chicken waffles was okey but dry as well, funny since its called ”grease” spoon. Egg sandwich with avocado was okey, but how can anyone make an avocado sandwich with egg bad… instagram friendly place but if you don’t want to spend your money on mid food, go somewhere else.
Popular spot, crowdy and noisy just after opening. Nice service, ok food, small portions, watery juice and smoothie.

Absolutely loved this place! The atmosphere is cozy and welcoming — perfect for a relaxed bite or catching up with friends. I came in shortly before closing (sorry!) but the staff couldn’t have been kinder or more accommodating. They still served me with a smile, and let me enjoy their delicious pancakes without rushing me at all. And let me just say — those pancakes were totally worth it. Fluffy, flavorful, and just the right amount of indulgent. Definitely coming back! Highly recommended.

This is my first meal in Stockholm, my friend recommend me here!
Ppl are nice and the waffle is greatttttt
It’s a good start for a day!

The patio felt a bit too bright for us, so we were pleased that the kind staff accepted my large dog indoors. They even brought her a bowl of water and made us feel very welcome. The food came out promptly and was quite good! Lots of sweet and savory options on the menu. I recommend the house lemonade.

Very busy café! There’s a QR code waitlist on the window which makes it easy to sign up, and it moved pretty quickly. We were seated next to other people, so be aware you might be sharing a table. Staff were friendly, and the food was delicious and super filling. I had the salmon rosti which was really good — would’ve been nice to add some eggs, but that was on me! Overall, definitely recommend.

Came here on a weekend for breakfast. Having seen some amazing reviews on Google, we decided to give it a go.

The place is walkable from gamla stan. It was quite busy when we arrived. But we got the table pretty quick. The staffs are super friendly and and helpful.

It has a good rustic ambience. I found the food to be okay and the quantity was decent.
Cute and cozy brunch/coffee spot. Staff was friendly and attentive throughout, food was tasty and prices as well as portion sizes were fair. Crowd is mixed, which makes for a relaxed atmosphere.

Had an amazing breakfast this morning! ​We tried the Classic Benedict and the Salmon Rosti, and both were absolutely delicious.
Everything was perfectly cooked and seasoned, especially the sauce on the bacon.
​It might be on a more expensive side but it's totally worth it to try.
Very busy Saturday morning but had an efficient QR code waiting list. Food was perfect with a great vegan breakfast. Be careful with the hot sauce on the table it’s no joke 😅

The food and experience was so amazing that I’m leaving my second ever Google review!

1. Our first experience here was with Jamila. She was really nice, attentive, and her smile brought back a second time.

2. The check-in process is super smooth and people-centered. The host provided QR code instructions and the technology communicated to us exactly where we were in the queue.

3. From Cherry French toast to pancakes to English breakfast to brioche sandwich, there’s no such thing as a wrong option here.

4. Enya is quite possibly my favorite person I’ve met in Sweden. Very welcoming, warm, responsive, and patient with us Americans immersed in Swedish culture.

Highly recommend!

The Full English was as it should be, but if I were to point out one thing it would be that the food wasn’t hot when it reached the table. If fact, the fried eggs were just room temperature. But the food was still very tasty.

The restaurant was nice, the bathrooms were clean, and the atmosphere was welcoming.

I would go there again.

Toward the end of our trip, we made a stop at The Greasy Spoon in Stockholm, and it turned out to be one of those unexpectedly memorable meals that stays with you. Everyone in our group was pleasantly surprised by how inviting and comfortable the atmosphere was from the moment we arrived. The space has this perfect balance between modern and cozy — lively but not chaotic — with warm lighting and a casual energy that instantly makes you want to settle in.

We sat in the bar area (not directly at the bar), which ended up being a great decision. Our bartender, who also served us, was absolutely wonderful — upbeat, friendly, and genuinely interested in chatting with us. She shared bits about her life in Stockholm and her dream of visiting Los Angeles, which added such a personal touch to the night.

The food was a standout. I ordered the folded egg dish on toast, which came topped with a nori-like seasoning — and it was amazing. Perfectly cooked, flavorful, and surprisingly elegant for a casual brunch spot. The drinks were excellent, the service warm, and the overall vibe was easygoing and memorable. For a relaxed but top-quality dining experience in Stockholm, this place is a clear win.

I had looked up the menu beforehand so their breakfast specials were a nice surprise. I had a granola bowl, packed with all things delicious, and a 1/2 avo with a poached egg. Servings were a lot bigger than expected but I am not complaining. The granola bowl was quite amazing...This will be my go to breakfast place in Stockholm from now on! Very good value for money too.

The second visit was a much better experience. The service was impeccable, place is nice. Everything in Full English was very tasty. We had a pleasant and delicious time. Thank you for inviting us again and for the opportunity to explore the cuisine even in more.
Nice pub, good beer. I've been here for after work and there is a calm and warming atmosphere.
Darya was a brillant server, such a welcoming experience! She was really understanding with my lack of Swedish language and so helpful! Really great staff! First snus experience!

It was very good for us with nice drinks and yummy fried potatoe chips(yummy dip) but we surprised with high price compared to their website menu.

Also disappointed when we came to know that we could not order pizza . In burgers we do not have option of vegetarian or chicken .
Hope they improve by our next visit.
Nice pub! I recommend it!

Me and my friends was forced to buy alkohol in the bar even if some of us only want sodas or water. Half of the group order beers or cider and the others took soda, 1 person order water to not become more drunk. The guard asked us 3 times in a short while to go to the bar and told us to leave if everyone doesn't order alcohol. He told us they need the tables even if it was many free tables in the bar. Too too bad :(

name: Greken på hörnet

googleReviews.text:
Food is easily 10/10, on two we ordered 4 starters and a main each, everything amazingly good, really recommnd their dolmas (im a big eater, a normal person dont need that much food).

Unfortunatelty, their service is nowhere close to match thwir food. Waitress had no clue what grapes their house wine had (I asked if she was new - clearly not the case), and didnt had recommendation for wines in general.
I tried twice to get waitresses attention to get more water, without any respons - resultet in my girlfriend got embaressed of me as I felt I had to cleary wave to get attention.

Its definately worth going to for the food!
Cozy place but the light was really dark where we sat. The appetizer saganaki had a good sour kick and the cheese was great. The main dish, briam, was decent. It was just a tad too oily for me.

Came here for the first time after my wife recommended it and I must say it is splendid. The food has a distinct pleasant taste, I recommend the Paidaika, it was worth every bite. (compliments to the chef). The service is fast and accommodating as well as the waiters being very humble and cheerful. A good place to experience.
The food was full-on Greek. The souvlaki and the melitzanosalata were perfectly cooked.
We had a very nice evening here. The restaurant is nicely furnished, the staff is friendly. The food is very tasty. We had a mixed starter plate, vegetarian balls, Souvlaki and mixed grill.

googleEditorialSummary: Classic Greek menu in a candlelit space with a bistro vibe, plus an intimate conservatory.

googleReviews.text:
Great place to brunch!
The food is pretty good, even if the fries are very oily.

The space design is comfy.
Lovely place with cute ambiance. I had a very good double espresso and a princesstårta. A bit pricey but you are paying for location and aesthetics.

Really nice atmosphere!
But I recommend a reservation for the weekend because it's so crowded.
We ordered salmon Benedict, an avocado sandwich, and American pancakes. They were so delicious.
The cafe latte tasted good too.
Amusing food!, I was enjoying each bite of my sandwich 😍🔥Very tasty wine! Personal- super 👌🏻 I’ll back definitely! 100% recommend ❤️❤️❤️

Great place for a fika or lunch! The atmosphere is cozy, with free Wi-Fi and helpful staff.

Special thanks to Suzanna!!! She’s warm, welcoming, and genuinely makes you feel comfortable. She speaks at least four languages (!!) and knows how to connect with people from all backgrounds. You can really feel her kindness, it adds something special to the whole experience.

Definitely recommend stopping by!

name: Grillska huset

googleReviews.text:
This spot comes with a higher price tag due to its prime location in Gamla Stan, near the Nobel Prize museum. However, the staff makes up for it with their exceptional politeness. When we needed to use the restroom, they kindly directed us to their adjacent restaurant, which has facilities available - as long as you make a purchase and show the receipt.
Interior is so nice too with modern and vintage style. Will definitely come here again.

If you are looking to rest your feet after walking around in Gamla stan this is the perfect place to do so. It offers warm and cold drinks, snacks and pastries as well as a couple full meals in a very cozy atmosphere. We had the köttbullar, which were great. All prices are very fair, especially compared to the other places in Gamla stan.
We were there twice during our stay in Stockholm and both times the staff were very friendly and service was quick and uncomplicated.

My Swedish friend brought me here for a fika and although slightly pricey, it was lovely and cosy. The fika was especially lovely. Coffee and hot chocolate were more basic (not a proper coffee machine just filter) but still very nice. You can refill the coffee at the station as much as you would like. A nice break from the busy touristy sites. You feel like you’re in someone’s grandmas living room.
The meatballs were amazing! Super tasty and perfectly cooked. Definitely worth a visit. Fully recommended! I’m already planning to come back to try the bakery next time.
Amazing place. Recommend by local guy. I came to have the meatball every single time i have a chance. Free coffee/tea.

googleEditorialSummary: Swedish savories & cakes in a cafe/deli set within a 17th-century structure, plus sidewalk terrace.

googleReviews.text: Quite peaceful fika, nice garden and also surprisingly much space inside with more table upstairs and toilet available. Good traditional style sweet pastries. Coffee was mediocre. Limited free parking available around.
A wholesome and quaint Swedish cafe. A regular for breakfast with fresh bread rolls and pastries, whenever I’m in the area.

One of the cosiest cafés I've been too. Feels homey, staff is lovely, atmosphere relaxed. Coffee, baked goods and sandwiches are great! Can get a little chaotic when there parents come with small children since it's a small place, but that's part of the charm!
Nice place and good food! However, pizza days could be better and more often. It says there is pizza from 16.00 to 20.00 but it's rare to still find pizza after 18.30 pm
Quaint cafe with great food! Excellent Skagen toast and very nice staff! Lots of outdoor seating if it's a nice day!

This little gem, is a stone throw away from Sundbyberg.
The waterfront location provides a charming and cosy setting; outdoor seating on a sunny day created a delightful summer ambience on the water.
The service staff were attentive and friendly.

The food was simple but delicious. The chef definitely got the flavours right.
We really enjoyed the pulpo and crispy artichokes as a starter.
Kids loved the burger, smoky and juicy.
For the mains, we decided on the fish of the day- which was a cod with a lobster sauce and razor clams, and also prawn "pil pil"- delicious!
Definitely will be back again.

Place next to water, which we visited on the biggest holiday in Sweden Midsommar. Local menu was perfect fit and all dishes represent perfectly local holiday tasty meals. Perfect! Enough seating, aged by time and big amount of use. Ordering on one spot and meal delivered to your table.

The food wasn't of the highest quality and some dishes are quite expensive. Overall it was ok. There is a nice view but the place was quite messy with stuff just laying around. However a great place if you want to have a beer in the sun while watching some boat traffic. They serve a lot of querqy, interesting beers from various breweries.

A hidden gem in Stockholm, combining a sense of being in the Swedish archipelago, and looking across say, one of the many lakes in the center of Hanoi: Urban and rural at the same time. Their own beers are excellent, and the menu shifts with the seasons, always prepared with great craftmanship.

Waitress and waiter are snobbish and not service oriented at all. (Snacks) Black Squids tasted very fishy and salty. Do not get this! 65 sek with this look and absolutely tasted horrendous. The inhouse Pale Ale is quite good. The food is no good save your money. The toliet is absolutely disgusting. I cannot imagine how the kitchen will be. Staffs were rude, unfriendly and unhelpful. This place will be a lot better with proper handling. Such ashamed as it is close by the lake.

The café has a good location, by the lake and close to street and parking place. It has a typical swedish stuga vibe. I had an apple paj and it was good taste and portion. It costs 130kr for one apple paj and two filter coffees.
Café next to the lake lötsjön, serves some food items, has outdoor seating, bus stop is also just on the road.

Great location, obviously, and an overall cute cafe with friendly staff. I'm sure on sunny summer days it gets totally rammed, but early in the day or on a sunny weekday afternoon, you usually find a space. Compared to other places that focus on Swedish husmanskost, Gröna Stugan has at least one plant-based option in most menu sections, which means vegetarians and vegans don't need to feel totally excluded.
Great food, excellent service, romantic atmosphere, beautiful view of the Lotsjun lake. Great for children. Definitely will come again!
Good location, fresh shrimp 🍤 sandwiches and cakes. Price ok‘ish.

What customer service and knowledge the guy had.
Will only shop for jewelry there in the future.
Few in the industry have I encountered with such honesty and knowledge

Best goldsmith in Stockholm.
Ordered a completely custom designed ring which with their help became a reality and is simply amazing.
Also, in just 5 weeks from idea to finished ring. Thank you!

Fantastic jeweler, helped me design a ring for my and my fiancée's engagement. Extremely helpful and clear about what works and what doesn't work and how to solve any problems. The result speaks for itself.

Absolutely great customer service and care, I came in with a necklace that my lock/carabiner/runner spring (many names for the same thing) was messing with, another Christmas maker on another street wanted to change the lock.
Here they checked a little and fixed with their knowledge that my lock now works again, and this completely free of charge! :-D
The studio is really a nice experience, the craftsmanship really showed. The master's certificates on the walls and other small art that is always nice to see.

A fantastic goldsmith. I brought in a ring that had been passed down for generations to be remade to suit me. They explained how they would make it as good as possible and match my image of what I wanted. The end result was perfect, I couldn't have been more pleased!

Amazing food and very friendly staff.
My flight to Stockholm was a little delayed due to high winds. I wanted a lighter meal as it was later than I normally eat by the time I arrived at my hotel.
The Sag Paneer with rice and a Nan bread was just perfect. Delicious, plentiful (I could not finish it all) and washed down with a Swedish Tap beer.
Highly recommend.

This is the worst Indian restaurant near stockholm. The owner lady is very rude in behaviour, which is a completely contrast in this area. Also, the quantity of food according to price it just not worth it. Very dissatisfied and I am not going to this place second time.

The restaurant lacks a friendly and welcoming atmosphere. The owner’s wife, in particular, behaves in a very rude and unprofessional manner, which creates an unpleasant experience for customers. Despite claiming to serve authentic Indian cuisine, the restaurant fails to reflect true Indian culture or flavors in its food. The dishes appear to be mostly pre-packaged or ready-made rather than freshly prepared, which raises concerns about both authenticity and health standards. Moreover, the prices are unreasonably high for the quality and experience provided. Overall, this restaurant gives a misleading impression of Indian cuisine and does not offer value for money.
Very authentic Indian food and atmosphere with Indian music playing in the background. It’s very tasty food excellent service.

Terrible experience. The lady serving us was extremely rude — we just wanted tea for three people, and she refused unless we also ordered food. Absolutely unreasonable, especially when the tea itself isn’t cheap. The attitude was dismissive and unwelcoming, and it ruined the whole visit. Won’t be coming back and wouldn’t recommend this place to anyone.

Got the goat cheese salad. It was good but the portion was a bit small. The homemade bread was very good though! I wasn't a fan of the seating, many antique chairs which weren't in the best of shape so for those who are a big bigger or taller it's a bit uncomfortable. The staff was friendly 😊

A peaceful place in nature. They have pretty good options for lunch/Fika. The Halloumi sandwich was so good . It is so easy to get there by bus . The staff was so friendly! The price was not high for a place like that. Absolutely recommend! 🌸✨ Thanks for the nice experience!

Had lunch here on Friday and it was a great experience. Tasty sandwiches with salad for 130kr, waiting time was very short, very friendly staff. Place seems to be very popular, so it was hard to find a table outside. What could be improved is a menu selection, too few items to choose from.

I had a wonderful experience, great staff, a young brunette girl was so nice and wonderful to me not like the others who worked there, loved her. She deserves a raise immediately. Splendid atmosphere and awesome food and drinks. I Would definitely recommend.
What a beautiful café!

Newly opened Chinese restaurant in this residential neighborhood.
The owner and the cook are quite nice.
It’s usually full of Chinese people, coming here to find some authentic Chinese dishes.
Some plates are nice, some taste the same because of the use of very similar spices.
Recommend : the fish, the salt/pepper pork, the cumin lamb and the mapo tofu.
They also have actual Chinese tea.
Some dishes needs to be ordered up to 1 day before like the roasted duck, or up to 2h prior like the chicken with potatoes and large noodles, so best to call them first.

It’s definitely a hidden gem for authentic Chinese cuisine, we had Yuba in red oil(hong you fu Zhu), saliva chicken- mouthwatering chicken(kou shui ji), Mapo tofu, Sichuan boiled beef(shui zhu niu rou) and grilled lamb chops with cumin was absolutely delicious, the restaurant is small but cozy, staff are friendly and dishes comes good time without long waiting, highly recommended for anyone looking for spicy/ non-spicy authentic Chinese cuisine.

The best Chinese restaurant in Stockholm!!!!!! Super nice and friendly staff, suuuuuper authentic food. I really like the spicy dishes and this Shanghai pork. I will definitely come back a thousand times in the future;)

It’s indeed the best Chinese restaurant in Sweden! My husband loves the Sichuan spicy chicken he ordered and finished before I had the chance to take a picture. I ordered the fish soup, one sip brought me back home ❤️
Food was fantastic. Noodles was great. Service was ok. Recommend this place for authentic Chinese food

Excellent North African food! Really tasty and reasonable prices. For the food I would come back. Music choice is a bit different to what you would expect for a traditional cuisine place. And later in the evening it becomes a bar with louder music and people inhaling laughing gas to spice it up. That’s …. different to say the least :)
Very pleasant and cheerful waiter. Treating you like a best friend. I tasted Moroccan food and I liked it. There were enough visitors and pleasant music was playing. Score 10/10

Very nice place, cosy atmosphere , food is super tasty and staff is very friendly 🙏🏽 Habibi takes you to the orient, with a hint of Tunisia. For any occasion, glas of wine or green mint tea with pine nuts, while trying out what chefs have to offer 👌🏽🇹🇳🇸🇪 Merci beaucoup :)

I brought a Morrocan to try the food, and he did not think the tagine we had was anything like Moroccan food. For my Swedish taste buds it wasn't bad tho. And since one tagine was enough for two medium-hungry people it was an affordable meal. The decor is quite nice N African inspired, but the music is boring mainstream pop. I would have liked to hear something to go with the theme.

We went on a Friday night around 8 and the place was more or less empty. Waiter almost seemed surprised to see us, and the service was a bit confused.
We realised after 9 pm that the place is in fact not niched to serve food, but to sell laughing gas to visitors that come for a beer and a balloon and then quickly leave. Bit sad, but I guess it's a way to survive

I've been there a couple of times and it's always the same thing. Overly crowded place. The hype over the balloons is seriously not worth it. If you want a packed place with extremely loud music, pushers trying to sell you coke, and expensive nitrous oxide balloons, this is the place for you. The rest of you can pick and choose any other bar on Skånegatan.

Very limited menu. We ordered the meatballs, and unfortunately they were not good at all. The sauce tasted artificial, and the overall dish felt low quality and poorly prepared. The mashed potatoes were bland, and the presentation made the meal look unappetizing.
The sandwich was dry and completely forgettable. Plain white bread, minimal filling, and no balance in texture or flavor. For a café, the offering is far below average. There is no whole-grain bread and no variety—nothing you would normally expect from a standard café menu.
Based on both the food and the atmosphere, the experience was genuinely depressing. It did not feel welcoming or enjoyable, and we regret choosing to eat here.

Nice cafe next to butterfly house. It is very easy to have a lunch break here. There were meatballs with potato mash and pancakes as warm options. Also many sandwiches and cakes. The place is spacious and it was easy to find a table. I would say that the quality is a bit worse than I would expect for the price, but it is still ok to just have a meal and relax after some time in a butterfly house or around.
The pie was fine but coffee is undrinkable. Maybe one could clean the coffee machine. The environment was nice.

Salad and sandwich cafe. Dine in- or outside with lots of tables. Homemade class food with restaurant prices. Got a lot of sand in salad, it was not rinsed thoroughly. When I notified the staff all they replies was "ok.", clearly displaying no interest in me. Only one change table for baby diapers, sharing it with the whole museum.
Prefab fika and food, acceptable prices, if only they took mobile payments (Swish, please) we could have tasted the food also.
Love placeds where you can get Guinness on tap. Will return

Half Way Inn delivers service so fast it should come with a warning. You barely sit down before your drink lands - talk about "halva inne". If premature service was a thing, this place would be the gold standard. Luckily, it’s exactly what you want at a bar. Five stars, no regrets.
Nice pub with good beer a also vine at a reasonable price. The fish and chips were really good. Looks as if we come back soon :-)
I had great time there. Only music is missed. Variety of beers 🍺 and snacks 🥨.

great pub friendly staff and mood
great choice of beer
i really enjoy the place
The food was delicious. The price also very good. It was a great experience.

Just right opposite of the tunnelbana station
Lunch buffet 140 sek really good deal
Food is delicious with lots of variety, instead of fried noodle(just personal preference)
I love their toilet very fresh the manager son is very goofy when u see him please run he will haunt you down otherwise very friendly i recommend the food very much for good price and good taste!

Absolute worst Chinese food I've ever had. We tried four dishes and all were bland. One was actually a bit spicy, but somehow still bland also. The place was filthy. There were flies. I can't figure out why we didn't get up and leave before ordering... I guess we were just really hungry and tired at the time. We got there shortly after they opened and even the front glass doors were covered in greasy handprints. It was dusty everywhere. I am just praying now that I don't get sick from this. Oh, and one more thing. At the end of the meal a waiter came over and told us he was bringing us complimentary ice cream. Neat. But then one minute later he came back and said he was sorry but he had made a mistake; that's only something they do on Sundays.. What a tease! Should have just given it to us anyways. Then again...did I really want to risk eating anything else from this dump? I do NOT recommend this place.

I will update if we get sick...

Also, it was expensive for what you get.

UPDATE: Sick.
Delicious food ! Good personal service , nice restorant & good price ! Only 99 krone lunch buffe ! Hightly reccomandet !tasty :)))

I’m not gluten free but decided to try this place as they offer vegan options. Vegan pastries cost 55KR each (approx £4.55 each), I did think it was a little pricey but it seemed most bakeries in central Stockholm charged that much. I tried vegan chokladbollar (chocolate balls), vegan vanilla custard pastry, vegan cinnamon roll and vegan cream pastry with some sort of a nutmeg filling. Personally I didn’t enjoy it that much as I found it dry and overly sweet. Texturally you could tell that it was lacking gluten. if you do eat gluten I would not recommend to come to this place as you will inevitably compare it to products with gluten. However, if you are gluten free and vegan, then I am sure you will love this place, hence why I have given it a fair rating.

Such a lovely bakery! They have the best gluten-free pastries in Stockholm. The vegan vanilla bun and the saffron vanilla bun are amazing, super soft and full of flavor. Don’t miss the sesame bagel they have every Wednesday! The staff was really kind and friendly. Highly recommend:)💛

If you find yourself in central Stockholm and have gluten sensitivities or just prefer gluten-free foods, find your way to Happy Atelier. It will be one of the best gifts you can give yourself. Once my wife discovered this place, we visited it every day we were in Stockholm. Before we flew home, we went back to load up before we left for the airport. They have a wide selection to choose from but my wife particularly loved the cinnamon rolls (she refused to share them!) and she thought the sandwiches were wonderful. As someone who isn’t gluten sensitive, everything tasted like regular baked goods. To top it off, you can also get a very good cup of coffee.

I don't think I've ever left a review before, but I really want to show my support for Happy Atelier! I can safely say that it was the best cinnamon bun I've ever had, period, not just the best gluten free version! They can often be very dry but this one was super moist with lots of cinnamon filling. I tried a bite of the couple of other buns/cakes in the photo which were equally delicious, and I also got a mini pizza to take away which was incredible! I've only recently been diagnosed with coeliac disease so I was very grateful to find this place. Absolutely delicious baked goods, and my brother and sister (who are not gluten free) loved it just as much!

Very good gluten free bakery. I think I had the best gluten free chocolate chip cookie ever.

No croissants. Average price for any piece is around 4 euros. The place is small, so there isn’t much place to seat.

Had a good curry here , kids loved it (5 & 9) aswell ... only issue was there was only one lovely server trying her best .  who was run off her feet .. needs another server for 5 stars ... but recommend this place

Ok nothing wrong with the food is good. The fish tank! Please let them have a bigger tank, the bigger one bullies the smaller. they should be separate or a much larger aquarium. #Freethefish(es)

EDIT: DONT KILL BULLY; please move him if he is an angry type. :)

worst experience. Rude staff with no minimum sense of how to treat customers. Group of 5 Indians visited the restaurant hoping for a good Indian meal. They barely attended us and told to two choose from only couple of dishes they have and gave a free suggestion to go to near by Indian restaurant. In my many years of stay in Sweden I never encountered such a unprofessional & manner less staff.  visit at your own peril.

A great beginner place to try Indian food if you haven't tried it before. Everything tastes like Indian but diluted in water. Very bland and all the spices that you actually should taste in a typical Indian food, just felt so distant and far away. A food that you can eat but expect nothing much of a true Indian taste sorry.

Honestly, the best Tika Masala I have tasted is several countries! It was on the day menu, so we got food immediately at lunch time. Very well presented food, friendly staff. Help yourself coffee, bread and salad table included with meals. Very satisfied.

Harvest Home is the kind of restaurant every traveler secretly hopes to stumble upon but rarely does, a place where the warmth of the welcome matches the soul of the food. Tucked away like a well-kept local secret, it offers a dining experience that feels less like going out and more like being invited into someone’s home for a lovingly prepared meal.

From the moment you step inside, a sense of coziness washes over you. Despite arriving without reservations to a fully booked room, the staff went out of their way to find us a corner, an early sign of the genuine hospitality that defines this place. Service here isn’t just friendly; it’s heartfelt.

The meal began with a simple but telling gesture: slices of rustic local rye bread paired with salted butter. It set the tone perfectly, unpretentious, comforting, and unmistakably Swedish.

The soup of the day arrived first, steaming and warmly seasoned, wrapping us in a comfort that felt tailor-made for the evening. The mussels in cream sauce were a standout: fresh, plump, and swimming in a broth so delicately balanced you could taste the sea and the skill in equal measure. The cod, lacquered in a creamy sauce, was cooked with pinpoint precision, flaky, tender, and impossibly satisfying.

Dessert was a revelation. Vanilla ice cream with cloudberry jam, a first for us, was nothing short of delightful. The tart, aromatic berries paired with the silky ice cream created a finish that was both traditional and exciting for a newcomer’s palate.

Harvest Home proves that great dining isn’t just about technique or presentation, it’s about heart. And this place has it in abundance. For a night that ended with full stomachs, warm spirits, and a feeling of belonging, Harvest Home earns an effortless and enthusiastic 5 out of 5.

A nice cozy and warm place. But a bit old fashioned. Not very modern in design and ambience. But gives a good feeling.. Soup was deliciously good. Main course was just ok.
I would need something more to go back to the place otherwise it is more of a Sunday eating place with cozy environment

Update 2025: favorite place! The staff is great and the food and beer as well. This was my first time here, happy times. The service is friendly and happy and great, the Guinness and other beers were fresh, tasteful and cold, the place is cozy and lively, with great vibes and the Moules Frites o aioli were excellent, to much tasty food I would say. Looking forward to come back soon. Update 2023: great place!!

Expensive Guinness 104 Swedish kroner per pint, and i think that's expensive even for Stockholm, and the most i have payed in Stockholm for a Guinness,i  just did'nt like the atmosphere of this place at all  i could sence it right away, even my son who i was with me said the same. So to say i won'nt be going here again.But the guy and girl serving behind the bar were friendly though.

Yeah, you are looking for excellent Dutch beer, nice food and great atmosphere- this is it. Somewhat crowded, somewhat booked (tables &seating), but squish in among the locals. Absolutely recommended, nice service,  had a great time!
A nice outdoor cafe infront of the Hedvig Eleonora church. You can spend good time enjoying a coffe and/or a snack in the calm area, despite being so close to the crowdy Nybroviken :)

Cozy open air coffee, between trees in the shadows of one of the most beautiful churches in Stockholm.

Delicious fika and meals. A must if you need a lunch in summer.

Managed by volunteers, they create a unique atmosphere for this "under the trees" coffee.  👌 😀
A lovely little cafe to get some fika. The actual shop portion is in the small building to the right of the church entrance.
Very relaxing and friendly setting .. and a great alternative to Stora Bageriet just down the road which always seems to have a long line of people. This cafe is much quieter !!
Beautiful and lovely place at the front yard of the church. Prices are also very friendly😉👌

I visited the place with my husband. I had a 50% discount for the meal (not the drinks) it was good that we had the discount because the schnitzel i took had no taste, too much oil both on the Meat and the potatoes. The presentation was not good either. Luckily the starter and the desert were good and the mojitos too.

Pleasant service! They have a whole page in the menu for different flavors of mojito, which was quite fun to try.

The food had good presentation but unfortunately was way too salty. The potatoes were over fried and therefore quite dry.

Nice little restaurant - probably full summertime with a terrace by the water. Varied menu. Extremely quick service - maybe as only 3 tables were occupied when I ordered. The schnitzel a bit salt but huge portion.
Not happy with our experience. The buffet misses some of what was advertised.the food was terrible. We didn't finish as I felt bad halfway true the lunch.  I would not recommend this for lunch.
Great! A nice place by the water. Really good food for everyone and every taste! You will not go home hungry.

name: Hemma Vasastan

googleReviews.text: Highly recommended for lunch. Their fish soup is one of the best I've had in the city, offering exceptional value for money. The wallenbergare (meatballs with mashed potatoes) are also of excellent quality. Great value overall. The warm and welcoming service, true to the restaurant's name "Hemma," makes the dining experience particularly pleasant.

Had dinner with a bigger group, and have to say the service was great, especially considering the number of people we were. Had a toast skagen and artic char as main course. Everything tasted good. A good selection of wines,  and very kind and attentive service.

What an absolute gem of a restaurant, from the moment we booked, to getting there earlier than expected and still being greeted with the friendly atmosphere, our waiter was lovely and chatty and the food was divine. The whole experience was so good that I highly recommend this restaurant to anyone.

We both had the Toast Skagen and it was very tasty, then mains, I had the beef tagliatelle and my partner had the rib eye steak, both cooked to perfection!

The service was amazing, the food came out in perfect timing and the price was reasonable for a place of this quality. We had a bottle of Chianti and tipped well and our bill was just under £150, which for 2 hours in a beautiful restaurant is very good!

An above average restaurant that I’ve only had the pleasure to visit during lunch hours. I came away was a very good impression.

The service was fast and the personnel helpful. They found a table quickly even though we hadn’t booked and we came just before the rush hour.

The lunch selection was really good. Daily specials with fish, meat and pasta. Several weekly specials too. Something in there for everyone.

The food arrived quickly and tasted good. Especially the mashed potatoes. It was also well presented, considering it was during the lunch.

Well worth a visit.

Had lunch here and food was good, prices fair and service good. Buggest surprise and reason I decided to write a review was a really really amazing salad bar. Usually these are simple, not too good but this place has amazing salad bar so you grab a salad while you wait for main course. Definitely will be back

googleEditorialSummary: Warm, stylish eatery serving contemporary Swedish & European fare, plus cocktails, wine & beer.

name: Hermans

googleReviews.text:
THE vegan place to go to in Stockholm

You not only get an amazing vegan buffet experience but the place is super cozy with the most amazing view over Stockholm and the water.
Totally recommend
Even if you are not vegan. Take a vegan day and enjoy the most delicious healthy food you can imagine. With sauces and dishes cold and hot. Dessert and coffee
Really just an amazing experience

My all time favorite vegan restaurant in the whole of Sweden. Excellent view, atmosphere, quality of the food - they even have super tasty desserts. Everything is absolutely mesmerizing and magical and I love going back to this place whenever I can.

Visiting from NC 🇺🇸 and was looking for all vegan restaurants near by, came across this and it didn’t disappoint. Amazingly delicious buffet with a whole lot of varieties. Friendly staff and lakeside view for dinner, what else can you ask for. It’s everything we were expecting from this place. My most fav was the mushroom creamy soup.
Definitely recommend to all.

This vegan restaurant is absolutely amazing. Went there for NYE buffet and it was really delicious. Really good quality of food.
I especially liked the seitan skewers and Herman’s pickles. Also enjoyed a stunning view over the city.

The buffet had a variety of dishes and was constantly replenished. The food was excellent, catering to all tastes, with good, fresh ingredients and delicious recipes. The atmosphere and, of course, the view were amazing. Overall, the place is quite clean without being anything special in terms of layout and decor. The staff were friendly and helpful. I definitely recommend it and will go back again. PS Photos with the amazing view.

googleEditorialSummary: All-you-can-eat vegan buffet in a waterfront location with terraced garden seating.

name: Hermitage

googleReviews.text: The clerk at the counter was super helpful answering our questions about the food. It was mostly Indian Style food. And everything tasted wonderful. I felt like it was a very fair price for this buffet. We tried a little bit of everything. I’d highly recommend this place. And we’ll probably come back before we leave Stockholm.

Wonderfully delicious, healthy, well balanced meal at great value.  You get good energy service with a smile! Definitely recommend it, especially if you are looking for a good option amidst the most touristy district of Old Town. You get the charm with quality nourishment, so be sure not to miss it!
Wonderful, vegetarian (mostly vegan) buffet for a good price, in the middle of gamla stan. I especially liked the stew. Friendly, helpful staff

Good vegetarian restaurant in the old Town with limited varieties but tasty food. The good thing is they provide water infused with lemon or mint. The staff are friendly. The reason for the four star is one of the dishes there is a bit oily. Remaining everything was very good. The bathrooms are very clean. They have additional cakes but it's not included in the buffet that needs to be bought separately. I liked the lasagna and hummus very much. The soup of the day is also very good.

Excellent taste, huge spread, hygienic setting and great service. What more can you ask for? I thoroughly enjoyed the buffet lunch . Thank you for making vegan/ vegetarian food available in the old town of Stockholm

googleEditorialSummary: Self-serve cafe with buffet specializing in vegan & vegetarian dishes with an international flavor.

googleReviews.text: My favorite spot for lunch in Solna. Good value for money. Always makes me full but in a good way. Healthy and yummy. Lax Bowl is the best!

Hezo Donburi and 11 bittar were my personal favourite.
The staff were professional and food was just so good and well rounded
Only 2 people are working there, yet they deliver with such high quality! Not to mention their delicious Miso soup.
Best sushi in Sweden by far, everything the right ratios and temperature. Highly reccomend
Great food, although the bowl was a bit too acidic for me. The service and free soup more than made up for that though! Must visit!

I stayed at the hostel, so I had a dinner downstairs, it's convenient. The beer and pizza were superb. The staff were super friendly and helpful. She gave me recommendations for food. When I was in the middle of eating, a stranger talked to me, I don't know him... After few seconds a male staff came to me asked me if I knew that guy, I said no, he said I could find him for help if that guy disturbed me again. Omg he's so charming, I appreciate his bravery. At last, I made a girl friend who was from the US.

!!!TOURIST TRAP!!!
If you stay in Hostel better find different place for eating or drinking.
Be careful when ordering a beer. The menu only lists the price for a small beer, but the waiter will give you a large beer without asking if you want a large or small one and charge you more money!! Absolutely arogant waiter. But Karma its free.

Fancy restaurant next to the Generator hostel, convenient for having lunch/dinner when staying there and not wanting to go out on bad weather. The place looks modern and stylish.
Unfortunately when we were there for dinner the food took too long to arrive, and when it did it was already a bit cold. Not as if it has not been cooked enough, but as if it had been left sitting for too long

A pretty average lunch place connected to a hostel just outside of the city center.

Food was fine, serving a bit slow and the setting very bar-like.

Sound level was good, which I almost don’t expect in a place like this.

I have a hard time to say much of anything at all about this place. To quote a vitty brit - mostly harmless.

Brunch once a month, with a combination menu of Asian fusion and more traditional breakfast options. The decor is a kind of post-modern dungeon motif. The service is friendly English speaking with mainly backpackers.  Cool bar music.

I loved this place for the drinks, the people. It's a cheap place so you meet real people. Many are poor and want to enjoy their evening. I e been many times.

Tonight I ordered food, and I was so incredibly disappointed. I ordered the pork steak dinner, Plankstek Noisette. The meat, was an embarrassment. Two tiny flakes of pork. Probably two or three bites.

This is so sad, that it's a cheaper place to eat, and those poor people who come here regularly are ordering this food and getting a ridiculous, offensively small amount of meat with their meal. Like a war ration.

I may come back for drinks if my friends are here, but it is an embarrassment for Stockholm that this is the level of food they offer to their poor customers. I am disgusted.

I walked away from my food after complaining, the staff said that this is what you get. It's totally unacceptable.

Had a wonderful time here, traveling from the USA for the week. Bartenders were a joy and the lady was so great to talk to us about culture and her recommendations for our stay. Food and drinks were both so great. Overall a nice spot to stop in for a bite and a drink.
Poor service. May have been a slight language barrier but guy on the bar just seemed rude. Decent music and prices but not coming back due to bartender.
This is a local pub where the beer, the wine and the meals we had were nice. There is nothing to say about the service because the pub is self service however the bartenders were polite and helpful.
Very nice place with locals that love beer, what else could you ask for!

Amazing value for your money!

At the time of writing, between 11:30 and 14:00 you can pay about €11 and get a main meal, a drink, and all you can eat salad buffet with pizza bread.

I ordered the Salamino pizza which wasn't mind blowing, but it was pretty good.

They have classical soft drinks like Coke and Fanta, beer and water with squeezed lemon but without sugar.

The staff were very polite and professional.

Lovely place to have your pasta dishes, fish with remoulade or pizzas. Good choice of beer too 👍🏽

We were a very large group of hungry people and the staff were able to get the dishes out quickly, no mistakes in any orders we placed (including special request for a pizza without cheese 🤣) … WOW!

Highly recommend!

We happened to stop by while passing through that neighborhood with my wife and daughter. They treated us with such kindness and generosity that we were at a loss for how to properly thank them. This place can be described with the following words: clean, friendly, delicious, kind, and generous.

The location is great and the staff is super friendly! The only reason I have rated it with 4 stars and not 5 is because the staff doesn’t speak English, which is problematic, we ended up having the wrong pizza, which we are allergic to, and wasn’t able to sort it out! One more thing, that if 2 people share 1 pizza they charge you 20 sek for that. And yeh, the beer is 65sek i think little bit overpriced!

One of the best lokalpubs in sthlm.
wont be as good as when steven was there.

The food was generally good, especially pasta (not sure if worth the price though).

Restaurant did not put utensils, so given I was staying in a hotel room, had to improvise late in the evening.

Something was wrong with Caesar salad and I got a food poisoning afterwards.

This is one of my favourite pub in Ärsta. This place is special to me because this was the first pub which I visited after landing to Stockholm !!
You can sit and relax and have couple of beers.. enjoy amazing view from the restaurant.. overall best option for a romantic date !!

Don't order plankstek if you don't like powder mash potatoes. How can a restaurant even be serving that, making proper mash is so easy. Meat was good, but the whole experience was ruined by the "mash" =(
A great classic pub with amazing atmosphere and sometimes some fun wall art and decorations.

Old school Swedish style diner. Protected as a cultural heritage and it got somewhat charming atmosphere... Go there for the local soft vibe, drink beer, watch sports etc. Food is nothing special... its OK..

Our server was a young gentleman, he was very nice honestly. Made our drinks fast and efficiently, if I lived in sweden I would likely visit here more. The drinks were overall pretty good! The good was good as well, especially the pizza! Also it got fairly busy for a Monday in my opinion, and that didnt lower the quality of the drinks or overall service.

The beers we had after 12am were nice and cheap but wanted to get two don julio tequila shots and were charged 340kr which is DIABOLICAL???!! I do not know if this is normal in Stockholm but menu had 39kr price and server explained that this price is till 9pm

Affordable prices and good service. It's the perfect spot to enjoy cheap beer and good cocktails with friends. A special bonus is the outdoor terrace with heat lamps, where it's impossible to get cold. Sometimes it can be weirdos visitors but it’s not so surprising.
Very good behaviour from staff and good value food and drinks 🍻
First timer checking in. What a lovely little hole-in-the-wall beer drinking place. Will go again i guess. If i have to.

Lovely restaurant in Stockholm for a delicious, quick meal, drinks and dessert.

We went here for dinner and sat at one of the booth at the back, although cramped the vibe is very casual , good place to watch some football and relax.

I had forgotten my ID hence was not served alcohol so be sure you don’t forget it!

The meal was absolutely delicious and well presented, we ordered them plank-steak, salmon and beef as well as the salmon with asparagus , shrimp and potatoes, all were 199kroner.

The plank steak is very unique and filling , I’d reconnect it. The food was so good and very very filling, the rum and bernaise sauce that came with the food was also very lovely .

I got the fried camembert with cloudberry jam, loved it! Cloudberry is very unique and tasted delicious paired with the creaminess of the cheese.

For drinks we got beer , cider and lemon iced tea. Good service and decently priced .
The fastest service I’ve experienced in quite a while at a restaurant! Brilliant staff and the food was gorgeous - and a great experience sitting outside in the weather. Highly recommended!

Please avoid going here, they are very rasist,
I was there  to watch a football match with my girl and was treated very badly that we even left the drink and the match we came to watch and left ..
they have no respect for black people.
Please avoid

Me and my sister had walked the whole day in the city (sightseeing) and was tired, and wanted to have a late dinner near our hotel. The waiter outside told us «no alcohol» and claimed we were drunk. We had not been drinking any alcohol today, only water and coffee. We went to another restaurant and ate dinner. We will never return to this place and felt very unwelcome.

Walking along from Ringvägen yesterday with my family and stumbled apon Holly &Bush. Decent inside, great 80's song/music playing inside :) ! Like english 80's :) music.

We ordered 2 Fat21 beers on tap. The beer tasted a bit off, unfortunately.  So I'd come back and but order a different kind of beer..perhaps not on tap. Hopefully they can just clean it and serve Fat21 again.
Because of the music and decent vibe 🎶😃 PS. You can sit outside ( on benches, sidewalk) .

An excellent place in central Stockholm serving healthy meals!

The ingredients are fresh, they are nicely combined with color, texture & definitely tasty. Fair pricing considering the quantity & you get the food very quickly.

There was a long queue when we arrived but the staff is quick & efficient but still maintains a personal touch despite that. It’s a nice atmosphere in a place that’s simple but nicely decorated.

Worth a visit if you’re around, it’s worth it.
SOOOOO GOOOD. Took beef vietnam with extra edamame beans and Mexicali. Mexicali, quite spicy and amazing. Would recommend to take the noodles.
It's a good, healthy, lunch. I liked the food and the theme was nice.

An excellent place to eat healthy meals! All the ingredients were fresh, nicely combined & very delicious. The prices were reasonable for the meals offered & the atmosphere was really nice & quite cozy!
3 small pieces of chicken for 145kr, robbery
This place is amazing! The ambiance is really nice, and the service is attentive. The food is simply delicious, and the value for money is totally worth it.

Tried the brunch on a Sunday in October. Hornsgatan does not offer a brunch buffet, so all orders are single which makes the cost/food ratio expensive compared to most other brunch offerings in Stockholm. The menu is somewhat limited. Service is good. The wine was fine and the location is excellent. The main downside is music. Why play background music which is uncomfortably scrawny and loud during a family sit venue?  Roof speakers are quite close to tables, and volume seems cranked up high for staff enjoyment. We at out table and others around were unable to speak freely, something that a bunch is designed for. Tip to manager: guests might stick around longer and keep buying if they could socialize in peace. Visit restaurants that have no music and figure out why they are packed full while yours is almost empty. Try a couple of days with zero music and evaluate results. As it was now, most people ate quickly and left the premises to continue at calmer locations near by.

I´d point out to 3 things during my brunch time in February 2026:

a) no privacy - tables are placed with a little space in between, it doesn´t create a nice atmosphere
b) menu on the website is different than the brunch menu in the restaurant - I didn´t ask the staff why but I´ve chosen the restaurant based on menu I saw online - update the information then and don´t confuse customers!
c) staff was nice and attentive

However, just an average place, nothing I will remember and need to visit again. Food was ok, I can make the same at home.

Stumbled upon this place by accident while wondering where to eat, and it turned out to be a great find! The indoor design is stylish and well thought out, creating a cozy atmosphere. I had the Swedish meatballs, and they were absolutely amazing - perfectly cooked and full of flavor. Overall, a great experience. Definitely worth a visit!

Super cozy place. Loved the setting and the decor. Food was great!! Bikini toast was so super delish. Overall vibe was very chic. They have a lot of outdoor seating as well which is great for summer sitting. I just felt that chicken options were too less or none. Could be a bit more warm starters option in chicken/lamb etc

Fantastic , fresh Kebab with homemade  garlic-dip!!! Everything is clean and fresh!!!
One of the best Kebabs in town!👍👍👍
Literally the best lunch place with a great variety and amazing people working here. Prices are really good. Always fresh and truly makes us want to come back 💔

We ordered a Panpizzor "Chicken Pan".
Delicious pizza.
Lots of cheese and toppings.
Very, very tasty.
Amazing kebab pizza! A lot of cheese and kebab!! Super friendly stuff and good price! 99 kr for this pizza!
Super friendly guy, pizza was ready in less than 10 minutes. The size of a regular pizza was surprisingly big and the the taste was quite good.

Just an overall two for this tourist gem in gamla stan. The menus only come in English which should tell you straight away that this place is for tourists.

The burgers are okay, nothing special. Everything being served on the wood planked bothered me and made me feel a bit icky about eating. The boards are clearly weathered. How are they caring for them? In the dishwasher? I don’t know but thinking about this affected my thoughts the whole time I was eating. The Greek salad should have been called a feta salad as there was more feta on the plate than anything else and the Olives are not pitted which was so wonderful to bite into.

You order at the bar and then get a little flag so service is minimal and we did have to go to the bar to request the beer that was never delivered.

They played the Olympics so points for that! Otherwise, the place is weathered, seats tearing, numbers taped on the table, menus peeling and again everything being served on weathered wood planks…

Stopped by House of Burgers in Gamla Stan and went straight for the New York Cheese Burger 🍔—and wow, it did not disappoint! Juicy, cheesy, and came with a mountain of fries (no complaints there). Pair that with a pint of super cheap draught beer 🍺 and you’ve got happiness on a plate. Great vibe, great value, and a must-stop if you’re burger-hunting in Stockholm.

Great Experience with Ellen, she's so positive and amazing! Food was tasty nachos was a bit bland but for the price is great, i had a nice burger with fries, they seated me near a plug so I can charge my phone, great beer too! Music was also nice, and atmosphere is very friendly!
Stopped by here for a quick bite on my last day in Stockholm. Very decent menu and the burger was amazing! Service was also lightning fast so kudos for that too!

While the atmosphere of the place is very nice, the staff looks soulless. The bartender is totally unpleasant, midway through me ordering at the bar (since we werent serviced), he started talking to another waitress who was on the other side of the place. Waiting at the table for more than 10 minutes, waiters passed by without coming to let us order (another table came 10 minutes after us and they were serviced in less than 2 minutes). Place is poorly maintened, waitress cleared a table near us and left a considerable mess (photo attached). With the setting and location being lovely, the staff ruins the whole experience.

If you were to ask for a Swedish family restaurant with friendly old school waiters, delicious Swedish food worth the price, and a good atmosphere; I would definitely recommend this place. We order two courses per person, wine and dessert, all of them were worth it.

Oh. My. God. You HAVE TO try this restaurant when you visit Stockholm. We already recommended for our friends. Great space!
Look at these dishes, aren't they amazing? Me and my friends were looking for Swedish meatballs, we chose another restaurant but they only served that for dinner so we left. When we arrived here, Hubertus did not serve meatballs for lunch either but the kind cook said he would make it special for us. And they were better than I expected! We came back for dinner and received a great table filled with wonderful dishes. Everything tasted amazing and the portions were great. Love this restaurant so much!
Ps: Free salad bar, which is rare in EU for free vegetable

Being Irish, I may not know much about proper Swedish food, but what I do know is when food tastes good. And I can honestly say that you won't find better than the Swedish meatballs with potatoes and lingonberry sauce that Restaurang Hubertus serves. It came hot and well plated, the potatoes were gorgeous, and the meatball sauce will be something I hope to replicate the taste of for many years. If you are looking for a decently affordable, clean, and comfortable restaurant to eat in during your visit to Stockholm, try here. My only comments are that the service could be improved upon, as we were left alone after we finished our meals, without being asked if we wanted dessert or more drinks, however this may be down to the crowd that was seated at the time we went.
I had the best meal I have ever had in my entire life here, I cannot recommend it enough, I had the 2 entree Capresi Salad with the Pork Oscar with Cheescake for desert, it was unbelievably good.

Ok food - nice for Swedish husmann. They have an inner garden which is often full for lunch but has a great view. Interior is rather worn-off but has its charm. Friendly staff, food comes quick. OK salad buffet, water and coffee inclusive during lunch.

Lovely experience here, just decided to eat here on a whim and glad we did. The food choice is a bit limited but everything was very tasty.

Staff were friendly and attentive. Location was nice and the park setting really does add to it. Would fully recommend

☕ The coffee was okay—but that’s where the positives end. Surprisingly, the menu doesn’t list coffee prices, and if you’re only stopping by for a drink without ordering food or alcohol, expect an inflated bill. The atmosphere is passable, but overall, I wouldn’t recommend this spot for a casual coffee break.

Would recommend the fig focaccia, however the melanzane (main course) was a bit disappointing. Worth noting is that the prices are on the higher end.

The staff was ok, a bit slow and felt a little uninterested. Too bad since we had such high hopes on this place! But as written, the fig focaccia was really good!

We decided to check out Ollis while visiting Stockholm and we are so glad we did! First off it’s the cutest restaurant nestled in a park. We were quickly greeted by staff with plenty of seating available.

We started off with drinks and the olives and worked our way to cold cuts and sliced meat. I am not lying when I say that every item was clearly made with love and quality ingredients. If you’re visiting Stockholm for the first time you will soon realize that locals don’t go out until later so if you want a table, go early!

Lastly, they play some of the most unique house mixes I have heard so if you like house music, you’ll love Ollis!

This place has gone down so much in recent years it’s a shame.
If you’d like your bar keep to be rude and condescending, please by all means come here.
The decor is dirty and unkempt, and it’s incredibly loud for a nice outdoor venue.

Surfers on the other hand is a great restaurant and why they would want to tangle them selves in this mess that is Humlan, I don’t know. Go to their original restaurant location. Only come here if you’re too tired to walk anywhere else.

Didn’t try the food but the place is really beautiful and warm/welcoming. The staff is nice and also very welcoming and the general atmosphere really cosy.

The drinks are good and the menus propose a nice variety of dishes that all looked and smell good. Had some garlic bread as a snack which was delicious.

Overall I would really recommend the place if you’re in the neighbourhood.
Great service, really nice gluten free pizza and awesome lemonade. A nice variety of wines as well as knowledgeable about how to serve them. Well worth a detour.

I found a hair in the pasta vongoule, it was not compensated in any way. The owner, who was not interested in new customers at all, behaved disturbingly. The atmosphere in the restaurant is definitely not the most pleasant. The partner's dish was tasteless and terrible. We will never go back there again. I strongly advise against it.

An upscale pizzeria with a few beer and wine options. Nicely decorated and a large outdoor section.
The service is friendly but a bit lost. They insisted trying to place us, and other guests, next to the toilet door, even if the restaurant was half empty when we arrived, and we had made reservations. They forgot to bring the winelist, we had to wait for the drinks, and then everything arrived at once.
The entrees were tasteless, the main course, the pasta vongole, was good. People around us mainly ordered pizzas.
Very pet friendly with dogs under a few tables, even inside.
Not worth your time or money.
Beautiful place, great food and great service! So great that a small neighbourhood like Ålsten can have a nice place like this. And fair prices, I think :)

As many other reviews, this cafe is quite cozy with a great environment if you plan to work from here. It offers you the french press alternative instead of brew coffee, which is much better in my view! The cafe has as an inner yard with plenty of space (quite nice during sunny days because it is fresh) and they also have indoor tables and outdoor tables by the street level.

There is a nice inner yard with plenty of outside seating. Also some space inside with tables suitable for working. Good coffee, basic sandwiches and sweets pastries. One customer toilet. Fast service.

Perfect cafe for digital nomads to work at. WiFi, wall-plugs, and toilet available. Vegan options too! Cozy atmosphere, nice people, good coffee and just a short walk from the central station. Would definitely recommend!
Really nice place to get some work done with a good coffee and a sandwich. Wifi is good, power outlets everywhere. Staff friendly.
Cute place with outdoor seating in their backyard. I wasn't given a small cup with milk instead I was told to take the whole package out with me. Not the level of service I expected.

As for me, too much salt in my tortellini( may be because of salsiccia, but the chief should take this into account).
The pizzas was fine, but just that.
The service is ok. Nothing special negative or positive.
It is fine to eat her once.
Food is insane. Service is amazing m. Ambiance was great. I have nothing negative to say! 10/10 recommend.

Wow what a surprising undiscovered for us pleasure, we popped in for a simple dinner and was blown away by the food and atmosphere. We ate outside and the pulse of the city maximized our experience. I took Zander and it was a exquisite, I will be back just for this. My companion choose pinsa bufula . I will be back and I’m telling my friends
The best pizza restaurant around this area. Delicious food, amazing decor and friendly service. Highly recommend!

The pasta dish is frutti di mare,  I don't recommend you take this if you have eaten real Italian Frutti di mare because you will be  disappointed. The schnitzel was ok
The service was great 👍
Tasty pizza and nice staffs. Well done 👏

Really liked the food (both pizzas and pastas I tried)

Also the atmosphere
Price vs Quality/Taste of pizza is the best in the region - we live here since 4 years and have tried all places. Especially since the owner changed a few months ago, it’s been great!

Service was great and the food was good, would have given a higher rating if it wasn’t for the paper napkin covers on the table, that made the whole feeling less nice, food was also a 4 out of 5, but recommend this anyway, good prices and service was excellent!
Cozy Italian place close to Hornsbergstand, I tried thier pasta Diavola,Creamy and filling,just right size portion,also pizza salad, If I try thier Pizza I will update the grade from now 3.

name: Il Tempo

googleReviews.text: I’ve been here before and I really like it. The food was great and perfectly balanced, and cooked. Tuna tartar was very interesting with Italian vibe. We were served by a lively girl from Albania who knew a lot about wines and found the perfect match for the dishes. Thank you so much for the hospitality, we will come back 😊

Nice Italian food of good quality and ok portions.
The service was a bit slow. There were only a few waiters and they were sometimes hard to find.
The restaurant is densely decorated and has nice atmosphere. There's much noise and people talk loud so it's hard sneaking to each other but I'm not sure if this can be improved somehow.

One of my worst experiences in downtown Stockholm. Got food poisoning from the carpaccio, our server obsessively touched us at every interaction and to add insult to injury the POS terminal is programmed in a way so you MUST leave a tip.

They advertise this as a "New York Italian Experience", maybe the mandatory tip is a nod to the US customs, I am pretty sure the sub-par food is not an Italian thing. Avoid this place.

We visited yesterday and had a great experience from start to finish! Great service, amazing accomodations for dietary restrictions and very tasty food! We left very full and happy! We will definitely be back again. Really tasty gluten free and vegetarian options too

A true gem in Södermalm! We had an absolutely fantastic dinner at Il Tempo, where every detail was thoughtfully curated. Their spaghetti gamberi with lobster broth, garlic, chili, and tomato was a flavor explosion—perfectly balanced and rich in depth. Served alongside freshly baked focaccia and an excellent wine recommendation, it was a meal to remember. We ended the evening with a simple yet delightful green tea with honey, all for under 500 SEK—an unbeatable experience!

Beyond the food, the ambiance was truly special. The classic deep red wallpaper with zebras gave the place a unique and cozy charm, transporting us straight to a lively Italian trattoria. And the service? Warm, personal, and attentive without being intrusive. A restaurant where you feel genuinely welcomed and taken care of. We’ll definitely be back!

googleEditorialSummary: New York-style pizza restaurant with Italian classics & pizza cooked in a wood-fired oven.

googleReviews.text: One of the best expresso coffees in Stockholm. Really nice place!
Great place to sit and study/work. WiFi available
Great atmosphere! The coffee is excellent—no frills, no fancy latte art, just classic, old-school coffee. It reminded me that sometimes, simplicity is all you need.

Very rich and tasty coffee, the espresso shot. I had a bun with it which was average. They also have sandwiches which seem very tasty. Cozy and chill place, with space for working with your laptop or some studying. Friendly staff. Good atmosphere with many locals and tourists.

I know Saturdays are a lot of work, so I understand that with the rush it's hard to give some quality. But charging 46kr (about 4€) for a small cappuccino looking like this : milk is burnt (big bubbles at the top), almost no foam, no latte art... That's not ok. Overcharged for a not good quality. The taste was ok though. Customer service is quite terrible too. Haven't gotten even a smile.

name: India's

googleReviews.text:
The experience was quite disappointing overall.

The food was just okay. We tried several appetizers, and they were all decent, but the prices are too high—you’re clearly paying more for the ambience than the food itself.

The main course was far from authentic Indian cuisine. Adding carrots to a lamb biryani is unacceptable and completely ruined the dish. The naan was soft and tasty, which was one of the few positives. The tikka masala was below expectations but still passable, while the chicken dishes were genuinely bad.

Overall, the restaurant is not value for money.
I would give 1 star solely for the ambience.
Definitely not recommended. ❌

This is the first time in a long time where five stars is not enough.

This night blew me away completely. Every sip, every sniff and every bite was surprisingly good! From the moment you walk in and see the scenery in the rooms you know that this is going to be a great evening.
The music might seem loud at first, but just speak up, It's allowed, and it completes the atmosphere.

The signature drinks offers new tastes that no other place in Stockholm delivers right now. They challenge themselfs and you with spices that normally would not be found in drinks.

The food was super great! Might be a little spicy, and there was no warning about it, but it tastes amazing!

The dessert, especially the Mango Sufflé, was amazing. Though the unusual spices in the cremebrulé was a great new touch, it would have needed a bit more time in the oven.

INDIA'S is defenetly a place I will be visiting again soon to try out more items from the menu.

My husband and I recently visited INDIA’s and really enjoyed the food. The staff was very kind and took the time to walk us through the vegetarian menu, even helping us customise a dish to our preferences (paneer tikka masala).

The highlight of our experience was the cocktails. I ordered a Bloody Mary with achaar, and it completely blew me away, such a unique and memorable twist!

The only downside for us was the price-to-portion ratio of the appetisers, which felt a bit on the higher side. We ordered avocado pani-puri, truffle paneer pav and artichoke samosas.

Overall, it was a great experience and definitely a place we’d recommend.

We ate Lamb Biryani, Pani Puri, Prawns Garam Masala and Gulab Jamun. All dishes was great ! Nice vibe of India's modern fusion.
Good service started from a woman who took us to the table and especially Linda.
Highly recommended this restaurant.

My visit to India’s was one of the worst dining experiences I’ve ever had. If you are from India and expecting authentic Indian flavours, please don’t waste your time or money here. The food had no real Indian taste at all — it felt completely disconnected from our cuisine.

What concerned me even more is that within two hours of eating, I became extremely sick and started vomiting. This was my personal experience, but it was serious enough that I feel responsible to warn others.

I strongly advise anyone considering this place to think twice. There are many restaurants in Stockholm that respect Indian flavours and quality — unfortunately, this is not one of them. Save your money, save your health, and choose a better option.

googleEditorialSummary: London food scene-inspired restaurant serving modern Indian dishes, creative cocktails & pastries.

googleReviews.text:
Very small portions.
Also its too expensive for what you get.
The food doesn’t taste much either. There are better indian food alternatives in stockholm.
Never this one again.

Nice food but noisy atmosphere. I went here on a weekday and had an overall nice experience. It was no problem to get a nice table and the food  was good but a little on the expensive side. However, the restaurant itself was quite noisy and there was loud music playing throughout our meal making it difficult to have a conversation across the table.
Tasty food and nice set of choice from vegetarian to famous chicken masala. The naan pan was delicious! I recommend to take their pasta plate, instead of 1 dish! You can taste more :)

Very pricey for just rice and lamb. I was choc the food wasn’t served with Chutney and chili sauce on the side to get the 6taste. Compare to true food from India it was far away to be as good. Just very fatty and not fresh.

Food was decent enough. Toilet area too open to eating area. Did not like that. They had space to put up a door but chose curtains which kept moving over our dining space when guests opened and closed toilet doors.

This review is for delivery and to-go orders. We’ve received several orders where the naan was burnt black on the bottom to the point where it was crispy in the middle and tasted bitter. The paneer was bland and I resorted to cooking my own to add some flavor. The service was lackluster when we went into the restaurant for a to-go order.

A quick note to indians:  places is good.but don't go with expectation that you get typical indian taste food. I would say that it's a bit customized for sweds, although it looks colorful and not so great for it's price . It's quite expensive. Photos are flashy and colorful because of filters :p

Another one using ”Indian” however no way near an authentic Indian restaurant. It is so ironically weird to call it Indian food!
Anyways let me outline my experience!

Food - I went for lunch. I have had lunches at this restaurant a lot when I lived here during 2015-18 and quality and taste was way better than it is now. Palak Paneer felt out of flavour and gravy tasted undercooked. Nan bread looked like pulled out from oven already in the morning!
Overall food was cold and tasteless!

Service - Service was fine! Food was delivered on time and they have a complimentary red drink which is nice!

Ambience and atmosphere- this restaurant is located at a great place and quite big & nice from inside. You can always find a nice table and good place to sit. Interiors are great too. So ambience is always good!
