It was completely illogical and unnecessary to lecture a paying customer about hypothetical overcrowding in an empty cafe. I didn’t want to argue in front of my son, so I bought the ice cream he wanted and we were forced to eat it on a bench outside the cafe in -3°C weather just to escape the hostile atmosphere.

A cafe is supposed to provide service and hospitality, not lecture customers with confusing, made-up problems. This was my last visit. Avoid this place if you have a stroller.

A cozy cabin mixed with a rundown shack. Delicious pastry. Pretty good cold food/salads. Friendly staff.

The location is on point, right by a small beach and some cozy benches. There is also a swimming pool nearby. Close to toilets.
Tiny cafeteria next to the water. Cozy in both the summer and winter. Nice to take a quick break there when walking along the shore.
Good coffe ! Prices are low 👍 Thank you!
Best food at student prices! Extremely convenient, I highly recommend it
As an international student having a great fika place like this just on campus is extremly valuable! Totally recommend.
Offers quick meals for students at KTH campus
Good convenient store with good prices

Super friendly staff, who remembered that I don't want ice in drinks, bc I had bit of sore throat. That was really sweet of them.
Music was nice and not too loud. Perfect place to hang out with friends.

Nice ambience good local draught beers. There are a lot of places to sit outside when the sun is out. Nice and fast service. Plenty of board games or sports to chose from, Playing pool will cost you 55 SEK / person / hour which is a decent price. A short walk from the Stockholm central station perfect place for an after work.

Kungsbiljarden is a great place to spend an evening out with friends. The atmosphere is lively and fun, with a great selection of games and activities. From pool tables to darts, there is something for everyone here.

The staff are friendly and helpful, always on hand to assist with any questions or concerns. The bar serves a good variety of drinks, and the food menu is also quite decent.

Overall, Kungsbiljarden is a great spot to relax, have some fun, and unwind after a long day. Whether you're a local or just visiting Stockholm, I would definitely recommend checking it out.
The place has a lovely view and ideal locations. In addition, the prices are good comparing to other places in Stockholm and their staff is very friendly but I wish they renovate the bathrooms!

Requires ID valid in Sweden to play pool, even if you aren’t drinking. This wouldn’t bother me except that they wanted a passport and they wanted to hold it while we played, which is not the vibe IMO.

The drinks were really nice and the small bites we had were okay as well.
The only downside was that the window seats have these tiny tiny tables that didn’t even have the space to hold two wine glasses and two small plates of snacks. The water glasses and jug were placed on improvised “table” made out of a regular chair that blocked access around us.
On the service side, very friendly and accommodating but once we were served it was nearly impossible to get a hold of the waitress for anything else and it took a really long time for us to get the tab.

Other than that, really nice location and overall atmosphere
Little gem of a wine bar. Cost atmosphere, decent wine card as well as few high quality dishes on the menu. Nothing our of the ordinary but decent.
Sophisticated wine bar with lots of good wines by the glas and excellent service.
Our preferred spot in Stockholm.  Friendly and excellent.  Thanks to Pamela.

We had a date night here. It was really great the service was really good and the staff were super friendly. They have lots of wine choices and good food options. I wish it was more affordable. We ordered the meat platter to share and it was 4 different kinds and two each. So expensive for such little food. The wines are also overpriced
Great local pub with a huge selection of beer and gin/tonic. Very family friendly, dogs are also allowed. Also very good food and friendly/knowledgeable staff.
Excellent beer selection! Will definitely return to try out the food, as well!
Was in a hurry to get dinner quickly and decided this on a whim since it's so near the hotel.
Great "kvarterskrog" food, huge beer / wine list, friendly staff. Love the all-in Xmas decorations. Took a while to get the food, but it was a fairly busy night and worth the wait.
Great food. Their mashed potato is especially great. Good selection of beer. All food we had was well made. And great service from the friendly staff.

Really cute cafe in a basement. The interior is very unique and alternative, it all looks very Quaint. We only had some coffee here but can say the quality of said coffee is good, it is important to note that the place is self service (at first we waited to be served) so keep that in mind. Definitely a place to remember when visiting Stockholm!

Really cool spot! Delicious traditional food and nice drinks. The venue itself is really nice with lots of great places to sit. Perfect for a chill time with friends. Also the bathroom has a disco light which was interesting but cool.
The stalest kardemummabullar and scone I’ve had in Sweden – they were like rocks. However, the rödpesto feta baguette with the salad was very nice.

we wanted to try the moose meatballs, they were amazing!!
this place is very welcoming, you come in, order and get a table number to sit, they bring the food to you.
very tasty food!!

This is just the most eclectic place I have found! Moose meatballs are delicious and the atmosphere is such that everything in this place invited me to stay, relax, enjoy and be. And there is an excellent quality excibition in the back hall of this fantastic dive. Absolutely delightful place!

We went here for our dinner and had an amazing time. The owner greeted us and it was a very nice welcome.

Really lovely atmosphere and I really appreciated when I couldn't understand the menu (In Swedish) the owner talked me through it in English.

I tried the Pasta with Fillet of Beef which was my main course and was absolutely delicious and I am very picky on how my beef is cooked. It was perfect.

Please check this place out, you won't regret it.
Extremely kind service. Wonderful manager and lady behind the bar (I think she's called Jackie, beautiful smile). They helped us with milk for our baby
We had pizza and salad here on a sunny afternoon. The food was excellent and the service very friendly. We can highly recommend the restaurant.

Nice location and friendly server. Unfortunately the food was nothing to write home about, salads were pretty basic and left much to desire. A outdoor seating area dirty/messy and bathrooms were smelly and disgusting.
Do not come here if your an international visitor. Awful and rude staff, who look down on non Swedish speakers.

No, it's not Italian. It is Swedish pasta with an Italian name. Taste ok and solid, but not the Italian touch to it that we expected to find. Service low as mainly operated from the open kitchen and ambiance so so as it is too cramped and too cold with the door opening straight to the outside.
Will we do it again? Most likely not.
Food was so good! Just enough ingredients to bring out their flavor. Pasta was perfectly al dente. Anytime I’m in Stockholm I’ll come back.

This place is amazing! I ordered take out and they were really friendly. Good price. Gluten-free options are really good, they informed me that they cook in a different pan and that everything was sterilized. Good portion size, and worth the price, I recommend the carbonara!
loved it! incredible vibes and food! the service was amazing!

Finally got to try this place after rave reviews from colleagues. Fantastic pasta! The place is super small so be strategic on when you go so you can get a table. We had the carbonara (creamy and peppery) and the oxfile pasta (so so good, meaty and flavorful). Guess we’ve found our new local pasta place. Super nice service as well!

Loved it very much. The food was great however the pizzas came topped with rocket or arugula which I personally don't like but I know most people don't have an issue with the taste of it. Otherwise the meal was perfect.
Lovely atmosphere and the service was spectacular.
For 2 pizzas, 2 pastas, 2 soft drinks and 2 glasses of wine it was 1200 kr.
Very good Italian Restaurant in Stockholm Center 🇸🇪 | Very Friendly Service, would definitely repeat dinner here🥂
Tasty meal, good atmosphere and nice service
Ina provides a very good service. Our family likes the taste of the dishes here very much, and the music in the store is also very tasteful! I hope I can come again.
Food was excellent! Very good service. Loved the Cuban Social with salsa dancing and wonderful dancing show! Amazing experience.
Their pasta is amazing, and those meatballs are out of this world! 😋 The place is lovely, and the staff is super friendly. I'm definitely going back.
Nice peaceful place in the Old town. Pasta portions are really hearty and kill your hunger. Pasta itself was ok, no frills. Good value for money.
Yummy! It was so good we ordered 2 times. Just randomly went in and had really good traditional swedish food.

Lunch 119:- bread and soda included. Best price in whole Old Town? My food was good but VERY good for the price and also my girlfriends Tortilini was good. A beer for 59:- was well deserved after a windy sunny day in Old Town. If you are on a budget visit! The friendly staff was fast and attentive and also I could charge my phone at the counter. Thank you Le Chef for the nice lunch!
Amazing food, amazing staff, absolutely stunning experience. Very impressed, definitely recommend.

name: La Cucaracha

googleReviews.text: Food was good Spanish tapas. Loved the feta and honey croquettes. Rest everything felt standard tapas. Not like extraordinarily special but yes very good in terms of taste and standard tapas food items.There could be more dressings and more flavors in tacos.

Very good tapas, a lot of flavors and heat, just like it should be 👌 excellent service! We really loved the fish tacos and the quesadillas and the feta cheese balls with honey. The churros were perfect 👌
Super tasty food, cozy environment and good music. Highly recommend that folks to come visit here. :)))
You must try this wonderful restaurant!

By far the worst restaurant in Södermalm only triumphed by the worst Hells Kitchen episodes.

As we entered there were no tables prepared and we had to wait 15 minutes to get a table despite booking in advance as the staff who were preoccupied with other guest. After standing around for a bit we finally got to our  table and another 15 minutes later a waiter took our order.

The food experience starts off with semi frozen bread and tasteless aioli which might as well be off brand hellmann's mayonnaise from LIDL.

As the night continues and a long wait the server eventually brings out the food and asks the guest what they ordered, as the staff have no clue what food had been requested. "Food" might be a bit far fetched for what they're serving as microwave food is probably tastier than whatever is on the menu at the aptly named La Cucaracha. Everything was improperly seasoned, tasteless with an accompanying bad texture throughout the menu. Fried potatoes were soggy, meat was tough and the chicken sandwich was so bad I spat it out.

googleEditorialSummary: Extensive choice of Spanish tapas dishes in a rustic candlelit restaurant with a cellar bar.

googleReviews.text: I was a bit skeptic of getting tacos in Stockholm. (I'm Mexican). This locations has a very nice atmosphere and casual mood. The food is actually quite good and as authentic as it can be. The tacos were amazing. I had the gringa (10/10) and the alambre (10/10). These are large tacos. (They also make standard size tacos). The salsas and the chopped onions, cilantro and fresh lime, drive the experience home. Definitely worth checking out.

No news that La Neta serves amazing mexican food, just the fact that they have proper hot salsa and unlimited coriander is great.
While not a big fan of the electronic ordering system (normal QR code)

We popped in for dinner and were delighted with this authentic Mexican food.  There were no tables available but the friendly staff (Mexicans all, with excellent English) placed us at the bar and were attentive to our need for food!.  The menu is relatively limited, tacos, quesedillas and large tacos with a variety of fillings, both meat and veggie.  The eldest got 10 mini ones, one of each type, and 5 of the same.  I got the quesedillas, and they were just lovely.   The draught beer is limited to four or five types including of course Corona.  I'd recommend this place to anyone who likes Mexican food in a heartbeat.

Believe me, if you are looking for an authentic Mexican street taste, this is the place. The bisteck tacos are amazing, the tortillas are as genuine as they can be.
I'm a Mexican and was not disappointed at all.

Nice vibe to the place. Upbeat and relaxed.
Could always go there if u r in city and up for drinks. Cocktails were great. Loved the strawberry chilli drink. Was amazing. Tacos and nachos could always go along to munch.

We went here after our wedding at the city hall. We had a wonderful experience. The food was great and the atmosphere as well and also the service. The waiter ask why we were dressed upp, if we were going somewhere and when we told him that we just got married he congratulated us ans gave us some complimentary chocolate truffles and my husband a grappa (I am pregnant and don’t drink alcohol). I can highly recommend this place.

Nice and cosy place. We made a reservation beforehand and were welcomed very nicely. We had the mushroom and bruschetta starters and they were reaaaally good.

For mains we had the polpette with pasta. Although the pasta was tasty, it could’ve used a bit more tomato sauce. Other than that: really nice place.
Impeccable service and good food! 🥰🥂 we ordered almost everything in the menu 😅 and we’re all ended with a clean plate.
Amazing food and good value for your money. Very cosy restaurant and sweet waiters. Good selection of wines and beers. Definetly a place that I'll visit again when I'm in Stockholm

One of my favorite italian restaurants in Stockholm. Went here multiple time and tried multiple dishes.
Great food the money.
- I give the veil pasta (Fettucine di Vitello) full remarks.
- Tuna was perfectly cooked
- Cod with asparagus risotto is amazing
- The Lobster pasta was unfortunately not al dente, and lacked some depth of flavor you’d expect from the lobster.
- Tiramisu was above average, but a tiny bit too watery for my taste

I had this restaurant as my "Want to go"-bookmark in Google Map for a while. I got recommended this place by a friend of a friend. Yesterday I had some Chilean food cravings and this place satisfied them for me.

I had the a full three course lunch at the place, beginning with some sopaipillas with some chimichurri, later the entrance was two smaller empanadas (beef and cheese) and again with the same chimichurri.

Once that was absorbed and done the waitress came with the real meal of the day, which was viel beef with potato pure and some assorted salad. The food was good and had all the Chilean hallmarks in place. At the end I had some thé and cake (torta de mil hojas).

Let me tell you, that was good. I've tasted better, but it rounded off the total meal quite nicely and I was really full at that point. So full that I had to use the restroom, while in the restroom I saw the biggest tree trunk in a room I have ever seen. I told the personal of the restaurant that I left a rather large log in the restroom, the response from them tells me that it was not the first time they head that.

I'm going back with friends next time.

Great place if you like meat and seafood. It's tasty and the portions are very generous. We  really liked the corn bread too.
Service is attentive and friendly. We are coming back!

What a fantastic restaurant! Just been there for dinner and I had the slow cooked beef and it was possibly one of the best plates of food I’ve ever had! The restaurant is very cozy and the staff is amazing. Really went above and beyond! Will definitely be going back! Highly recommend!

Whenever I work out of our Lindhagen office this is my go to lunch restaurant.  Great and friendly staff, cosy restaurant with an open kitchen and the food. Of the food!  Large portions and so flavourful.

This place, staff, owners and everyone else involved deserves everything good coming their way. I came over and wanted to eat there at the one time of the day when they close down for 1 hour to clean up after lunch and start preparing to serve for dinner. Nene (the server deserves a raise if anyone is reading) has in typical Chilean fashion as hospitable as they are, allowed us to stay and served us a lovely pork chops with fries, sause and it was exquisite. Not only that the food was delicious and the service was above and beyond but it was also very affordable because together with coffee and soda it was a 160SEK per person which is unbeatable. I will be telling everyone I know and will certainly come back for more next time. Thank you so much Nene, Forza Colo-Colo!

Indian Buffet

An okay Indian buffet where you can try a few different options. The selection is on the smaller side, but it included lamb, chicken, and vegetarian stews that were enjoyable. The sauces were flavorful, and the lamb stood out tender with just the right amount of spice. You can also enjoy a beer at a good price, and the restaurant itself is spacious with plenty of seating.

On the downside, the chicken was a bit dry, and the garlic naan tasted more like plain pita bread without much garlic flavor. I also felt the place could have been kept a bit cleaner, which took away slightly from the overall experience.

Had food delivered and got a pathetic excuse of a dish which they called "palak ponir" which resembled nothing of a palak paneer, it was orange in colour and didn't had the correct spices used and had palak as whole leaves. But how it looked was the least of its problems, the orange abomination was too sweet which makes me wonder if the restaurant gets sugar for free. It felt like they put paneer and some spinach into a orange coloured Lassi, I am not exaggerating the sweetness here. I was so pissed about the food I received that I used a sieve to drain out the sauce and fish out the palak&paneer from the dish to salvage something edible. I am just sad to have wasted money on this food.

The worst Indian food we have ever tasted They would riot in India is given this appalling food.
Chicken Jalfrezi was sweet and sour with an aftertaste of Ketchup.
Lamb Birka I was dry with no side sauce.
Chicken korma was so dry and bright yellow.
Naan bread was bone dry and tasteless.
Even the Coca Cola and Fanta were Pepsi and Zingo. AVOID, AVOID. AVOID

Ordered daal poori, samosa, chilli pickles, indisk chai, chicken pakora. Ordered through wolt.

They really need to work on packaging. Most food was spoilt due to spill over and we couldn’t eat it.

Daal poori & chilli pickle was the only items that was saved and could be consumed. Daal poori was okay, a bit hard but not too bad. It would have been good if it had little more stuffing as the daal stuffing was very very less. Chilli pickle was the standard chilli pickle of priya from market and okay. Chicken pakora was a bit hard, chicken seemed old. Though the chicken pakora was spoilt and my husband could just eat one pc of it .

Very worst experience for me, I have ordered Lagan special Thali worth of 270krs. It has very less quantity of food and the garlic naan was almost burned. Attached the picture and kind of bad response when I call them.

We visited Lalibela for the first time to experience Ethiopian cuisine.

Initially, we had planned to order the Lalibela Special platter, but after discussing with the staff, we decided to try a few of their recommended dishes instead and we’re glad we did.

We ordered Yebeg Tibes, Blandat Fat (Mixed Dish) and Zilzil Tibes. Each dish had its own distinct flavor profile. The lamb tibes were tender, well-spiced and full of aroma. The mixed dish was a great combination of different stews, giving us chicken, lamb, beef, lentils and cabbage all served beautifully on injera. The spices were rich but balanced, flavorful without being overwhelming.

When we arrived, there was a slight delay in attending to us despite having a reservation. However, once we were seated, the staff were extremely helpful in explaining the dishes and guiding us through the menu.

Lalibela Ethiopian Restaurant in Stockholm is the best cozy place for family and friends. The prices are reasonable compared to other restaurants in Stockholm—some dishes are even almost half the price of what you find elsewhere. The food tastes very good, and the portions are generous. They have the best sambussa, served warm, and it’s excellent. The food is not too much oily like in other places I’ve tried, and the service is perfect. I highly recommend this place.

My second time at an Ethiopian restaurant after 10 years, I was pretty satisfied with everything here, the service is slow and they take their time but the food is good and tasty and culturally it is an amazing experience, 1st you eat with your hands, 2nd the flavours are very unusual and 3rd you get to learn a bit of history as there are interesting details in the restaurant and on the menu. Also make sure to try the Ethiopian coffee in the end 👌 good bonus is that they do live African music on Saturday 🙌🏽

I had dinner here last week and picked the Yetsom Beyaynetu, a vegan 5 dishes sampler. There's also a 9 dishes vegan sampler, but given the amount of injera the dishes are served on, the 5 dishes seemed the better choice.
The food tasted fine, although I'd have preferred things a bit spicier. Service was as friendly as it was slow, so bring time.

First time , very tasty ! Was a mix of Indian and African taste in my opinion ! That soft thing under the sauce is the Ethiopian pancake ! Very tasty and a bit sour
Ps: one portion will be enough for 2 people and you end up paying around 500krona including appetizer And coke ! ♥️♥️

The food was delicious and prices really alright. Rice free. The staff was friendly and many vegan/vegetarian options.
The interior was not super inspiring,  but clean.
It got pretty crowded towards the end. So for people eating after 19 it might be good to book.
Love this place! Small portions are perfect for travellers to enjoy different dishes. Good prices too. Will definitely come back when I visit Stockholm again!
Super delicious food and very reasonably priced! Would 100% recommend to anyone that is looking for some good Chinese food in Stockholm.

I have been here both for lunch and dinner. There are plenty of seats. It's very affordable and has good portions. You order at the counter. You get rice from rice cooker by yourself.

During lunch, there's set menus with 3 small dishes. For dinner, you can get jianbing or small dishes. I prefer jianbing.

Great place, highly recommended!

I love this place, very good food. Perhaps one of best things is the price. For the location, it can't get better! It's full from time to time. I guess you have to good at the right moment. I talked to some colleagues of mine, they didn't like it, they said the flavor was mild but i loved it. Its a 9/10, highly recommended it!
Good fish and chips. Tasty batter, good portion for price. The bartender didnt know how to pour Guinness properly 😅

After dinner at the Sheraton and getting my work counterparts we decided to go to the laughing duck at it was one of the only places open in that area for food and drinks.  I walked up, bouncer looked at me and says you can't come in your drunk. I said "I am drunk" he said yes. I looked at him, looked at his friends beside him which were all guys eating kebabs, also looked like they made them.  I just walked away. Power of the dollar.   I didn't drink but after walking by there again and seeing the people going in and out it's just understandable.

Think twice about entering. I walked in with high hopes but there is nothing to laugh about here! My enquiries on local IPA beers were met with a gruff hand gesture and a terse message that none were available. So I got a lager and was told how to put in a tip. I took my lager out the front to be confronted with smokers (including the security guard and staff) just two paces from the entrance with smoke blowing back on the diners. I retreated inside and went to try and find a menu. An enquiry at the bar saw one procured but with no engagement or information on how to order. So I went back to my table and waited, and waited, and waited then eventually caught the attention of a staff member to find I needed to order at the bar (despite others seeming to order at the table). So I went to the bar to unfortunately inconvenience them with my order and again ran the gauntlet of distain from the bar staff.  My meal, a simple penne pasta in a tomato cream sauce, eventually arrived and was ok and better when I mixed to cold shrimp piled on top through the dish. The serving size was good. The venue was at maybe 30% capacity so no excuses there. The rest of the staff could learn from the one girl that I saw looking after the outside tables with attention and a smile. I chose to move on but you have been warned!

Staff wasn't really friendly, could barely look at you when you order and any question seemed to be too much. Maybe they were all just tired tho. Outside security told us not to smoke infront of their entrance. Fair enough until he lighted his own cigarette right infront of the entrance. Anyway its a good place when everything else is closed. Id come here again, just with lower expectations.

The location is super convenient, just a short walk from the city center, which makes it an ideal stop after exploring. The laid-back vibe and friendly service made the experience even better. Definitely a cool spot to relax and unwind! Best place to enjoy sport and having Irish British view..

Best sushi place in sweden! The staff was super friendly and the food arrives in a few minutes aswell. I highly recommend it to everyone, must try if you in the area. Poke dragon rull ramen is my go to order.

LAX offers delicious Asian food like sushi, poke bowls, bibimbap and dumplings to an affordable price.

LAX has taken an extra step to make sure their food and restaurant interior stand out against other Sushi and Poke Bowl restaurants in the area in their price range.

I have tried their veggie poke bowl (both with tofu and another one with vegan salmon), veggie bibimbap, veggie sushi as well as veggie dumplings. They all come nicely garnished and with variety of ingredients that are tasty.

Their interior is fresh and clean. I can recommend both takeaway and dine-in.

The staff is friendly and helpful in regards to questions as well as figuring out allergies.

All in all very pleased with the food for the price point!

LAX sushi - It's always fun to walk into a restaurant and be convinced it's newly opened because everything is super clean and with luxurious decor. In this case, it has been "new" for over three years! . Well done! I settle into one of their comfy leather chairs and am served an Entrecote Bibimpap. Yep! it matches the experience! You will not be disappointed here. I will definitely come back. 🍣 ❤️
Very good food and service. The atmosphere is not great but ok! Highly recommended place to get your sushi fix!

Food Is very good.
Service is very bad.The lady works in Register (curly hair , may be African)having head phones in her ears, I have to tell her 5 times my order.
At certain time she get angry, and start taking with other customer.
Very disappointed.
As a poor tourist - pleasantly surprised. Expensive but very good. Would definitely comeback.

me n my bf both tried the meat n vegan kebab and it was literally the best kebab we’ve ever eaten !!! quite expensive yes but you get alot of food, come hungry lol. only maybe ? caution is that both my bf and i had to use the bathroom for hours when we got home 😅
It was a decent lunch for 135 sek. It's quite cozy, but can be full during lunch. There's 2 Pacman ding dong machine, cool! It's quite clean, including the toilets.

Service and atmosphere were great. It was quick and easy. I got to play pacman while waiting. The food was a lot, I tried to eat it all but couldn't. It's really filling, and even hours later, I still feel stuffed 😂. I think there was too much sauce on it, though. I drank 3 glasses of water. You can add your own sauces (free) from the self counter on the side anyway, so I don't think it was necessary to have so much sauce on it. The pitta bread was crispy and delicious, but the sauce drenched it, so I peeled off the top/ parts without so much sauce (so I ate about half of it). It was also not spicy (which I prefer), and had more sour flavours from the sour chilli, picked cucumbers within it. It's not the norm for kebabs from England (where I come from), but it tasted fine. There's also raw onions (that I usually don't eat), but I couldn't really taste it much since there was so much sauce. There is no English, just pictures and Swedish. Overall, I enjoyed it.
Very good veg kebab, the fries were crispy and the sauce was saucing. Definitely coming back again!

name: Lebanon Meza Lounge

googleReviews.text: Absolutely delicious Lebanese food! The chicken was so tender and cooked perfectly. We loved everything we tried, even the drinks. Staff were attentive and friendly. Highly recommend! **edit** so good we went again during our trip in Stockholm! Just as good as the first time
Great place, enjoyed everything about it! You definitely owe it to yourself to have a nice, big meal here with all the variety! Delicious!

Tried Lebanese cuisine for the first time and loved it! We had shish touk, shrimp, and coffee—the smell of the Lebanese coffee is so aromatic. The interior is beautiful, and the food was tasty, though prices could be slightly lower. Definitely worth a visit for trying Lebanese cuisine.

I experienced a wait of about 30 minutes before being seated, even though the restaurant was not very busy at the time. Once attended to, I was given a pleasant table, and the staff took the order without delay. The food arrived after roughly 25 minutes. The portions were satisfactory, and the food was acceptable in taste, though the quality could have been better considering the price point. Overall, it was a decent experience but with room for improvement in efficiency and food standards.
Great experience! The food was delicious, generously portioned, and halal. Highly recommended for tasty and satisfying meals.

googleEditorialSummary: Lebanese restaurant with a colorful interior with silver candelabras & a menu of classic dishes.

googleReviews.text: Just explored it today! I don't know what exactly is it about here. It's just as soon as we entered I loved the ambience and felt like just sitting there. Surprisingly, the food was equally good😍 so was the background music and the peacefulness vibes. In fact, if you are alone it's best place to just sit, relax, enjoy your drink and be yourself. Lovely experience!

We were here on a friday night on the 2nd week of November. The place was almost full with customers, the waiters were nice and friendly towards us, and the food tasted good. I had oxfile pasta and my husband had acapulco pizza -- both tasted superb!
As any other restaurant in Sweden, once you ordered food you can get yourself some appetizer (consists of bread, knäckebröd, butter, cabbage salad and water) as much as you wish. They serve alcoholic beverages, e.g. beer costs around 45 krona.
I ate here last summer too where we ate on their outdoor seating (which of course not exist during fall and winter). They often put out a big screen also during football match season.

Nice ambience..food was average..staff was decent friendly..affordable price for food and drinks.. tried garlic bread and Kalamari..it was ok not that fresh.. usually crowded during weekends and evenings.. close to 40 seats available.. restroom available.. close to the station.. have a good time guys.. Cheers 🥂

Yet another example of more is not better. This place tries to do everything and does nothing well. Pizzas look like from the supermarket, Kebab plates are not good, pasta and burger did not look good neither. I have been forced by my innebandy team to often eat here, so I tried everything. Hint to the owner, fewer dishes but better!!
It’s always a treat to be here. They sometimes have live music which is great! Makes your day. Food is great as well.
Really cool place to have some drinks and pizza. The vibes are amazing. A lot of seating tables so even if you don’t have a reservation you can be lucky and get a table.
Stockholms best Pizza. Recommend especially the basement, the main room is really noisy and makes it difficult to understand each other.

I think it has many things to be a great pizzeria in Stockholm. Nice location, pretty nice design. However, the quality/price is very low.

The taste of my Napolitana was very disappointing. Even though it was very good in some parts, it was dry and boring in most of the pizza. It did not have sauce as all other Napolitanas I have tried.

We tested a Margarita as well and it had sauce. A bit better than Napolitana
Fantastic staff, really friendly and helpful. The vibe of the place is also great. I was expecting the food to be a bit better but still can’t say a bad word. I really liked the pizza.

Delicious pizza- very welcoming ambience. Although busy, we were attended to and seated at a table immediately by a friendly waitress. The wine I ordered was out of stock so I was offered an alternative and given a taste to check it was ok. I ordered the capricciosa pizza and my partner had schnitzel.
The pizza had a thin soft base and was topped with delicious mushroom, artichoke and a generous topping of delicious ham slices, then drizzled with pesto oil- divine!

The perfect burger!! 🍔
Honestly 0 complaints.
Best burger I’ve had in a long time!
Fries were just right and many different dips!
Service was kind and fast.
Music was a vibe and the inside was spacious and cool 😎

Definitely recommend coming here!

Great place and good staff, very friendly and with vegan-vegetarian options, the falafel salad was amazing and very tasty, the burguer was very delicious as well.

a good place to make a stop and eat, the outdoor seating is just as amazing as the food and the staff.

The restaurant was packed on a weekday. We came as a group of 10 and had seating at a long table.

My companions enjoyed their meaty burgers and Falafel Halloumi Salad.

I had a yummy Ceasar which came as a large plate of crispy lettuce, cocktail tomatoes, cornflakes battered deep fried boneless chicken topped with parmesan and tobasco.

I also tried the sides of corn ribs and Teriyaki chicken wings. They were good too but the chicken wings were too salty.

Sufficient drinks list. My Brooklyn tap beer was fresh and cold.

Service was good and the food + drinks didn't take long to arrive.
Ordered 2 burgers: Chicken and Levinskys. The burgers are quite tasty, but a bit small. The service is good. The atmosphere? Emmy, it was in the evening, a big rat ran nearby))

So, I have been eating here three times now! Should I give four stars and risk more people to come and eat here on Sundays...so I won't be able to get any chance to eat? Yes. So why don't I give five stars? I can't order from the table...have to go to the cashier and then go to the table. Tastefull food and cosy though
The food was really delicious❤️ The meat was well done and fresh. The staffs are also very kind and perfect behavior 🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩
Such a great finding for a Vegetarian!!! Amazing food, simple place with very friendly staff. My kind of restaurant.
The food quality is acceptable but they charged us 45 SEK for a glass of milk for our kid. Feels being rubbed.
We had a nice dinner here, and it  was delicious, large portions, kind staff.

Food was okej but not so yummi. Expensive like other lebanese restaurants but less food I guess. Little bread and not heated, nothing special.
I asked them to play Fairouz song they said ok but they didn’t open it.. they didn’t seem to care much about their customers.

name: Lilla Capri

googleReviews.text: The food was superb. Quick service, smooth experience. Very good overall. Will come again if I'm in the area!

Friendly staff, good food (me and my friend both had pasta so I don't know anything about the quality of the pizza) and the prices are okay (especially in sweden).
However the plates were cold and so the food for cold fast as well. Therefore only 4 stars.
I still would recommend this place!
Tried their Isterband för lunch. Large portion but could be a bit more taste.

Great place, pizza made fresh right in front of you when you get takeout.
Amazing crust.
Quite nice atmosphere. The pizza was quite ok, however the lamb steak was a little bit dry.

googleEditorialSummary: Pizza, pasta & hearty Italian entrees in a casual, glass-fronted restaurant with a sidewalk terrace.

googleReviews.text: Their coffee really is remarkable. I had pistachio croissant with my latte, which was also quite promising. I will revisit and try more of their products for sure.
A super cozy espresso bar in Södermalm. Plenty of seats inside though it could look crowded around the counter. Affogato was really lovely, not too sweet and rich in pistachio flavour, 95 SEK.
New favourite espresso bar in Söder. Passalacqua coffee beans from Mexico is great for espresso but their pastries and affogato with pistachio ice cream looks super tempting as well.
Pistachio affogato was really good, loved that it wasn’t too sweet like sweetness was balanced. And the croissant was really nice:)

Love lilla! The affogato was topped with pistachios which added a pleasant texture. 65 sek, the overall vibe of the place was amazing. Plenty of seating and I loved the red plastic chairs. The owner/barista was very nice and accommodating.

The matcha was one the best ive had. 9/10, even without sweetner, it had a lovely after taste. They dont skimp on the matcha which I appreciated. 55sek for takeaway
Such a cute little cafe with a garden by the water!
Try fresh baked Kanellbulle with coffee which were tasty!
Tea water was a bit cold. But nice sandwich! It’s a cozy place!
Perfect place to enjoy a summer day, getting coffee and reading a book.
Nice stop
Kebab (for 130 sek) is a joke, pizzas are terrible (cheese is disgusting, just melted fat).
Very nice presentation.
The interior maybe outdated but they make very good pizzas. We always stay there for dinner on our way back from Drottningholm.
Good choice of meals, and great portions.
Good food

We visited Lillebrors Bageri and tried the cardamom bun (kardemummabulle) and the almond croissant (mandelcroissant) — and both were absolutely incredible. 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟 both for 86 SEK in total, which felt very reasonable for the quality

🥐The kardemummabulle was freshly baked, still warm, juicy and perfectly balanced in flavor. Honestly, the best cardamom bun I’ve tried in Stockholm so far. You can really taste the quality and the freshness.

🥐The mandelcroissant was just as impressive. It had a rich almond paste filling, similar to the one used in a semla, and the puff pastry was flawless — super crispy on the outside. Combined with the almond cream, it was pure perfection. Both pastries were outstanding.

❗️Important to know: this bakery is takeaway only (no seating inside). However, there’s a park nearby, which makes it a great option to grab your fika and enjoy it outdoors.

Highly recommended if you’re looking for top-quality Swedish pastries in Stockholm — especially if you love kardemummabulle or almond-based treats. ☕️🤍🌟

The fresh bread and semla place in Stockholm. The semla was tasty. The still warm Cinnamon Rolls (kannelbulle) was really good one. I realized this specific Swedish treat need to be eaten when it’s still hot. The bakery has no sitting space, so be aware that you buy packed treats. Probably due to its authentic taste, it’s quite popular and full of people.

After a 10 minute wait a very friendly lady welcomed me and asked for my order. We had a nice chat and she even had me try something. All pastries and foods are delicious. I bought so many Kanellbullars for my colleagues back home (like 15 pieces) for the next day. They loved it.
Cute store. Wait is quick (looks longer than it is). And the smell in the shop is amazing.
Would totally recommend and come back 👍🤩

Their desserts are not too sweet, and the bread tastes great! I visited for a cinnamon roll and a Semla (recently). the staff is always kind and engaging. Considering how busy the environment is, I was very thankful for the attentive service. Most importantly, all of their baked goods are delicious.

! No seats there if you come for a table.

The best bread I've had in stockholm!! When I visited, there wasn't a queue and I could buy the bread immediately. I ate the cinnamon bun and cardmum bun which both were all realllly nice! I tried them the day after I bought it but was still very crispy and juicy(even tho I used the microwave to heat it up!). I think some people may think it's a bit too sweet but it was just so perfect for me... Honestly if I had more time to stay in stockholm I would have visited again for sure. Please try both buns!!

Amazing milkshake, perfect size for the price. It would have been better to be able to take away! Burger was quite tasty though it fell apart pretty quickly.
Food was made and served during minutes of ordering
One of the better burger chains I've tried. The burgers are very good and the milkshakes are great. It's atmospheric and the service is good. Would recommend this place strongly.

Super delicious burgers and chips. We both ordered the normal cheese burger (one with bacon), normal chips and curly chips all really nice. Service was also fantastic, and very friendly. Clearly a popular place with plenty of locals coming in for their take aways too.

Excellent burger joint in Hornsbergs strand.

The food was fresh and tasty. The burger bread was carefully toasted, not too much, but enough to be hot and steamy. The meat (they use beef from sweden) was flavourful and nicely seasoned. I had the cheeseburger which nicely dressed with onions, salad and sauce.

Had the sweet potato fries which where crispy and delicious. One of the best burger in Stockholm so far. Will definitely be back.

Overall, good burgers and friendly  environment.
I was personally amazingly surprised by the chicken burger.. crispy but tender, and its flavor combinations were far different than anything else I have tasted. Good job!

Wow, I really cannot think of anything negative to say about this place. The atmosphere is fantastic, both the staff and their customers are very amicable and respectful (as for now, autumn 2024). Prices are reasonable for the area and quality of the food. They also seem to keep up well with cleanliness and maintenance of the place . Despite mistakes on our part (over 30 people arriving much earlier than expected), we were impressed how they handled the situation so smoothly and gracefully. Food was served quickly nonetheless. We're so grateful for the hospitality :) I wish this relatively new pub a lot of success!

This is a hidden gem of a pub in Hornstull. A real pub pub from the charming interior to the excellent music. Super friendly, welcoming staff and very reasonably priced drinks. We didnt go anywhere else.

Thank you. 💛

Best and affordable place with quiet atmosphere, and we had a laid back evening on a Easter Monday.. Pretty good Beer options with Happy hour offers until 19:00. Their Snackbox starter is such a value for money and comes with quite an assortment of items on the plate.. Located about 300 metres from the Hornstull T-bana Metro station on Hornsgatan..

Lion bar was always famous because of the price. This place used to be a great, affordable bar with a nice atmosphere, which made it one of my go-to spots. However, with a recent price increase of 20%, it feels more like a standard bar now. The main draw for me was the excellent price-to-quality ratio, which unfortunately no longer feels the same. There are now other options nearby that offer similar or even better value.

When Corna hit our moneys was good and welcomed. Now you get treated poorly when you enter as a dog owner. And let other guest complain. You can't sit where you want. If you allow dogs,  stick with it and treat guest alike. Our you don't allow dogs and act accordingly. The interior is run down.
Excellent service (very fast and kind), good drinks and affordable meal. We ate "plankstek". What more can you ask for in Stockholm year 2024?

The waiter with a white tshirt and shaved-cut hair working on Friday night should be reported. As I asked for a draft beer he shamelessly transferred an old pinte into a new glass, when I asked him what was this about he said « oh this was just poured seconds ago » the beer was warm and had no more bubbles.
Scandalous practice, should not work behind a bar ever again!
Cheap beer! But the aura is 😵‍💫, and I don’t like the stickiness. Cheers.
Good food, good service!
Nothing out of the ordinary, but cheap beer and friendly staff. They were all out of food when we tried to order though, so maybe the food is better than a 1, there just wasn't any to get.
So cosy and feels like home. You won’t find another cafe like this in Stockholm. The owner is so nice too.

It is one of the best little cafés you’ll find in Stockholm. The owner is very happy to mingle with anyone, it has an amazing local community atmosphere. It is self serve, so you can take coffee and pastries, however if you’re hungrier for some sandwiches they can prepare that on request. The pastries are phenomenal!!
We even got a pastry to takeaway from the owner🤭

Lovely owner - super friendly service and we had a great chat with him about our travels (we were visiting from Australia).

Food is great and good prices - we had the cardamom buns which were great, and other pastries looked good too. As we were there at closing time he was kind enough to offer us a bag of cardamom buns to take with us on our travels 🥹
Such a gem! Lovely cafe run by an extremely friendly owner, with genuine pastries and delicious coffee. Probably the best cardamom buns in Stockholm! Highly recommended!
We have had the best cinnamon buns there! And trust me, I have had a few cinnamon buns in Sweden. These are by far the best we have had so far and they are very reasonably priced!

The rumours are true! The scones is amazing, the grilled sandwich is good, the ambience is nice, the view is amazing! It's worth all the trip. If you want to have a more interesting way to get here, use SL boat from nybroplan to Nacka strand, the cafe is right above the SL dock. The selection of tea can be quiet mediocre, with usual tea bags selections. I was expecting a selection of loose tea but it doesn't diminish all other things they provide. They have indoor seating, under the glass house with warmer, outside in the yard and on the small hills look over the archipelago. Definitely will go back!

I think my experience was not great as I had another expectation of the place. I thought it would have focus on tea, so I chose a cup of tea. There were only tea in bags available and the tea brands were those I could find in grocery stores. (Loose leaf teas available only in pots)
I also thought the place would look like small private garden with view over the waters. But there were two kind of places - a couple of benches with view over the waters that looked like a benches placed in nature areas (i.e. not "garden feel") and seatings in small garden. But it did not have cozy garden feel due to big apartment being super close to this place & no grass.

I think this place may be a nice place if you know how the place looks, and if you want to enjoy nice food along with the tea.
Feels like a cozy small corner of Britain, the ambiance is nice. We try the scones and it’s fresh and good. The personal is also very nice and helpful.

The food was excellent and the staff friendly and helpful. The view from the back of the garden is wonderful.

I had the avocado and shrimp open sandwich which I have nicknamed the ABBA sandwich as the ingredients are excellent in themselves but in combination are magical. Extending the ABBA analogy the avacado and the shrimp, backed by the other ingredients, could be said to create a third taste. If you don't like the ABBA references then simply enjoy the sandwich.

Great place! Took my bf for the afternoon tea, it was very delicious! It was a bit much but no problem to bring leftovers home. Staff was really friendly and great service. Really cute spot! Will def be coming back.

I have visited this restaurant twice and noticed that the quality of the food declined significantly on my second visit. The pizzas were very bitter and did not resemble what one would expect from a proper pizza. In addition, I observed that the spices showed signs of pest infestation, which is a serious hygiene issue. Based on these experiences, I cannot recommend this restaurant.
It's a new restaurant called Farhida I think..middle Eastern kebab and shishlik , very tasty saladbar, above hemköp

They have 5 vegan options, though only 2 of them contain vegan meat, which is vegan minced/ground meat. It was made quickly, with fresh and good taste. Would like to return to try the other ones as well.
Ordered to eat in, but changed mind wanted to take home. They were happy to pack it up to go. Pizza tastes fantastic and me and my kid loved it. We will defenetly eat again.

Wonderful for getting good food after a long day in Stockholm. Personel was super nice, we sat outside and the food was great (water was included) and for 9 people we paid 900kr (including tip!!!). Definitely recommending this one :)

Super cozy, hidden spot. Perfect for an after work or a lunch, as it’s a sun spot!! You sit right on the water. Cheap beer during happy hour 🍻 Go here! If you like to walk around this place is by a walking route ☀️

The food was great! I ordered pickled-fried herring and it was so good. The rest of the team liked their dishes as well! Loopen is a great choice if you want to feel like in a holiday resort ;) with all the boats nearby and calm ambience in the centre. It’s hidden so you don’t get to hear the noise from the pedestrian paths. When boats pass by the platform floats and it feels like you’re on a boat as well;) so fun

Very cozy place .. nice ambience... Kind service .. good food... Good drinks... Very affordable and good for a summer lunch with family or team... Coming to menus only few options are there... Items on menu could be increased considering more people arriving... I treated seabass and potato ...it was good...Try not to miss out the chili sauce.. In a nutshell a good place for all... Cheers
Such a cosy little spot with front-row views of the boats a real hidden gem. Love popping by for a glass of wine and a read.

The good:

The food was great (steak and fish casserole were both fantastic). The dessert was also amazing (coffee cognac parfait). The location is excellent especially handy if you come via kayak, it's a godsend for a good rest and protein top-up.

The bad:

It's quite expensive.

The ugly:

The waiters hate foreigners. You feel unwelcome at all times. A Christopher Hitchens lookalike staff member rolled his eyes at me on every order from steak to coffee. No one told us the place is self-order, and they scoffed at us when we found out after sitting for a while like dunces. There was a nice lady staff member of some 50ish years who gave us further kayaking advice but the others were just short of shooing us away.

Visit this place as recuperation, but be prepared for unpleasant atmosphere if you smell wrong to them.
I ordered kebab pizza without vegetables but there is almost no kebab meat on the pizza. Just 5 or 6 pieces of kebab. LOL
Really good place: food is masterpiece (im not about pizza :-) ), service always welcoming (live near 4 years), price!

Lived in the area for a year, ordered many times, staff is nice, place is chill and cosy, pizzas are good for sure. Ordered pasta once and my friends had some other dishes, stuck to the pizzas afterwards, their better in comparison. Ösbergahöjden wouldnt be the same without this place so grab a pizza and a beer.

Used to be a five-star place until they increased all prices by 10% in less than 2 months. (Swedish inflation is slightly over 2% I should add).

It's a cosy place though and the food is nice. Large and roomy, they serve alcohol and they got a patio where you can sit outdoors during the summer.

Food: want to have a pizza that tastes good? No problem. Wanna have a pasta? Not a prob bob! Want to have a special order with only grilled meat and vegetables? Not even a problem! (Even though the owner looked quite strange at me when I ordered it)
Place: newly furnished and you are able to have a wine or beer without sitting in shady place.

Came here for a Sunday afternoon jazz gig and barbecue in early August. Incredible barbecue with vast selection of salads, roast vegetables, condiments, cooked camenbert - too much to eat. Great band of a very high standard (I'm a jazz musician)

Came here for my Swedish cousins wedding and had an absolutely fabulous time. The setting is rustic-chic, with different outdoor spaces to host games and activities as well as an indoor barn to serve dinner. The food was incredible, with a wide array of freshly made sausages, grilled meats, salads and sauces to make a decadent plate of food. We had the best time and it made for a truly memorable experience!

Amazing atmosphere inside a barn, so friendly, cosy, homely, beautiful fresh food, vegetables, the home made sausages and the grilled fish. The BBQ evenings are rare but well worth a visit (check website). The Italian ice cream was fantastic. Five stars without a doubt.
Ewa and her crew is doing an amazing BBQ and are very welcoming. Great experience for all ages! I will be back!
Never been to the old place, but the new place is boring. Barbecue station looked good, but cake selection was limited and just ok.

I don't eat sushi that often, and it was my first time eating here, and honestly, I'm impressed. I worked as a restaurant manager at a sushi chain, and the fact is, it's nowhere close to this. Very lovely presentation with a lot of detail and very creative. It doesn't just look lovely. It also tastes lovely as well. I bought a vegan combo of 13 pieces, it is a bit pricey but you get what you pay for. The bed of rice for Nigiri is bigger, and Maki rolls are bigger as well. Lots of garnishes and toppings. Miso soup is spicy and has good taste. Very cool packaging. I'll definitely be ordering sushi here again 👏🏻👌🏻

I ordered fried chicken over rice which is considered “lulu special” in the menu. It was way expensive than usual lunch menu price and to my surprise it was way below my expectations. Chicken was not fresh. Looks like they heated old over fried chicken pieces. And it was just marinated cucumber and bulky rice for 178 SEK. Very disappointed to be honest. Where do they take these prices for such a meal. Unfortunately I forgot to take the picture. But I don’t recommend taking at least this meal when going there.

The food is okay, lunch menu is quite reasonable but dinner menu is quite pricey.
They don't have enough staff to cope the lunch time peak. I had to wait 30+ minutes for the lunch to be served. Would've been nice if this was warned before so that I could be either aware or choose another restaurant.
One of my favorit sushi bar,so fresh and good taste 😋

The place, the food, and the service was amazing!
We came actually really late and they were about to close, but still they served us and the quality of the food was amazing.
I usually take pictures, but the food was so good that i started eating directly!
The food was ready quite fast as well.
Overall great experience, highly recommend
I like the generous side dishes provided with the burger (corn cob?). A nice place with a great name 😉

Really surprised the rating of this place isn’t higher. I normally check reviews before I eat somewhere but not this time. The food was tasty! Cannot deny. I had a basic meatballs and it was very delicious. The busiest place on the street when I went on a summer Wednesday evening.
Very average food. Not a place to go back to
Busy and nice place to have a bite or watch fotball.

My roomate and I came home yesterday so upset for the most unimaginable reason. We were kicked out of this bar with our friends only because we had 1 beer each in a bit less than an hour. Nobody told us before hand there was a minimum expenditure and that does not justify the rudeness of the wieters. We will never go back and definitely UN-recommend it to everyone we know and meet.

name: Lux

googleReviews.text:
Modern Scandinavian cuisine with locally sourced products. 5 out of 5 in everything, food, service and automosphere. We had dinner here and the food was amazing. We really enjoyed the blend of different flavours  in each of the dishes.

Definitely recommended to make a trip out to this restaurant.

Very happy about what we got! Food was fresh and the combination was creative. We liked the artichoke dish. Zucchini on the side was juicy. For starter we took deer tartar and roe. The roe was simple but of good quality; deer tartar had crispy root vegetable on the top, which made the dish balanced and interesting. For desert we took wheat ice cream and puff pastry with yoghurt ice cream. Can very much recommend the wheat ice cream - such an unique taste! Usually we find restaurant desert very heavy and it would become almost a pain to eat with a full stomach, but their deserts were light and not that sweet, giving the whole meal a very nice end.

No doubt, my favourite lunch place in Stockholm! I've been here over 100 times and maybe once I didn't like my meal. Cosy, stylish building which was Electrolux factory back in a days. Food is awesome, service is friendly and helpful. I like seasonality of their cuisine - all the time there is a fresh fish in the menu, great quality lamb and wild meat during autumn season. Also, vegetarian options are so good that I started to eat more vegetarian foods

Generally good quality ingredients, not much seasoning when I was there for easter buffet. Love how the main dish is served in specific thought out menu that you compose yourself. Calm and open atmosphere. Great outdoor seating with the view over the water too!

Swedish cuisine with a modern twist, I would give 4.5 stars coz there is an improvement that can be done.
The food materials of this place were selected from local providers, that is good not only because we could know the source of the food but also supporting local businesses.
The cured char fish had totally removed the fishy odor and the green tomatoes had neutralized the heaviness of the fish. It was very appetizing. The coriander cream with lamb was a genius combo, together with the multi types of veggies served, it was a dish that made you focus more on veggies than the meat. The flavors of veggies were brought up and enhanced by the flavors of lamb grease. The cloudberry pancake was served with melted brown butter, sounds greasy but in fact it was tasty, a perfect balance of milky and fruity flavors. It was a pity that I’m allergic to nuts and could not enjoy the almond ice cream, which I believe was better than the vanilla one.
The improvement can be done is the selection of the cut of the lamb. Mine piece of lamb had a lot of tendons inside, which was hard to chew on.

googleEditorialSummary: Hip restaurant in an old factory with modern Swedish dishes made from carefully sourced produce.

googleReviews.text: It’s your local gastropub. It feels like your second home. The staff is very friendly, and keen on ensuring you’re having a good time. We had the lentil stew and the beef steak. Both delicious. The lentil stew comes with a very tasty garlic butter toast. And size of potion is really good.
Too many pommes,the högrevsburgare was superb ..very friendly staff...my son's pizza was delicious too ...United match day .. fantastic 😊

My first time yesterday and happened to be a live music evening.
Ambiance atmosphere, lovely people around and nice staff.
Recommended!

This is a difficult review, the staff was very friendly and service minded, we were a group of six people on a Tuesday and had to wait for almost an hour for most of us to have the food served at a medium temperature while one of us got cold pasta. The cold food was quickly replaced.

Our common agreement was that the food was OK, it was not a taste sensation but for a local pub like this one it was resonable!

I'd like to highlight and thank the waitress (who clearly was a bit ashamed due to the long wait time and the cold food) for her good service!

We had a couple of beers before and after dinner, the glasses were clean but the beer was a bit buttery which usually means that the taps pipes aren't regularly cleaned.

Would I recommend this place? Yeah, sure I think that if you choose to go here your expectations of what it is will be met.

Is this a good place to have a beer before a concert or sports event at Strawberry arena? Yes!
Amazing veggie pizza and the falafel were the best I have had in Stockholm. The potatoes were unfortunately a little under done but the rest was just yummy!

name: Lydmar

googleReviews.text:
Hotel Lydmar is a truly outstanding hotel with character and soul, and it’s easy to understand why it receives such excellent reviews. The combination of style, atmosphere, and service makes it one of the most memorable places to stay in Stockholm.

The location is superb — right on the waterfront in the heart of the city, with beautiful views of the Old Town, the Royal Palace, and the harbor. Many of Stockholm’s main attractions are within easy walking distance, making it an ideal base for exploring the city.

Rooms are spacious and individually designed, featuring comfortable seating areas and unique works of art that give each room its own personality. The atmosphere is both stylish and cozy, with great attention to detail and a strong sense of warmth and comfort throughout.

The hotel’s restaurant, The Dining Room, is excellent, offering delicious dishes inspired by French and New York cuisine in a lively yet relaxed setting. Breakfast is outstanding — generous, high quality, and often mentioned as one of the best in the city. The bar and seasonal terrace are also wonderful spots to unwind.

The staff truly elevate the experience: multilingual, friendly, and genuinely attentive, always ready to help. The overall vibe is fashionable yet inviting — “mysig,” as the Swedes say — relaxed, artistic, and refreshingly different from traditional, formal hotels.

Hotel Lydmar is a perfect choice for travelers seeking a stylish stay, exceptional service, and a prime waterfront location. Highly recommended and a place you’ll want to return to.

This DOES NOT have a SAUNA. It’s an additional $85 to use it Nextdoor and it’s not even private. When booking this through American Express travel, it states there is a sauna available, mentions nothing about it costing extra, the gym ok. That’s the main reason I booked this hotel. Other wise it’s nice, but I wish I would have stayed somewhere else.

I’ve been returning to the Lydmar for over thirty years now, which means I’ve watched it age the way you watch certain friends age — with interest, occasional concern, and ultimately relief that they’ve figured something out.

The original location near Stureplan was the rock and roll hotel before that became a category. Viktoria Tolstoy singing, Swedish photographers on the walls—all edges and energy. The rooms were noisy. We didn’t care. That was a different era, when discomfort signaled authenticity.

In 2008, the Lydmar migrated to a small castle beside the Grand Hotel. Both occupy the finest position in Stockholm, water-facing, perfect. If the Grand is the elderly Swedish countess — impeccable, untouchable — the Lydmar is her subversive granddaughter. Well-bred but uninterested in behaving.

The Swedish breakfast remains gloriously excessive in that particularly Scandinavian way — abundance presented as restraint. The staff has stayed excellent across decades, which tells you something about how the place is run.

What persists is the cultural DNA. Art and photography still command the hallways, edgy and deliberate. The Lydmar never forgot it was supposed to be more than accommodation. It’s a gathering place for people who think about things.

I love it still. Though the rooms could use a little update.

On my last trip, arriving early from New York with promises of room access, I was denied — the room wasn’t ready. The manager couldn’t even secure me breakfast seating. I ate in the lobby. The food was good enough to restore my equilibrium. Even the Lydmar’s rare failures are oddly forgivable.

A genuine uplift.

We absolutely loved this hotel. The design elements in the rooms and common areas were beautiful and the rooms were quiet and comfortable. It is in a very walkable location also with easy access to public transit. The breakfasts were ample and delicious!

We only came to have a drink at the bar/restaurant. The interior is very beautiful but the bartender was honestly a bit cold/out of it, maybe she just wasn't having her day but it was noticable. Still a nice place to go to, regardless if you are a guest or not.

googleEditorialSummary: Polished rooms, some with water views, in a refined hotel offering a restaurant & free breakfast.

googleReviews.text:
A classic Swedish home cooking restaurant with small ambitions to be something other than that.
A lunch about 100kr.
There is an outdoor dining area in the sunbathing area if you do not want to sit half a staircase inside the restaurant which is housed in the apartment building.
Have not had time to test their beer range yet and it might affect the three stars I have given.  The size of the food varies but often leans towards more than less.
The serving takes its little time.

The hidden old place in the middle of Råsunda. Parking lots are very limited. Salladsbar is just a sour cabbage. Two sweaty  persons trying to do everything in the kitchen and to serve to a crowd. No hot water and no sweets to the coffee. Pretty poor choice for the buck (130 kr) even if the food was tasty (fish and potatoes).
Classic Swedish Amazing Place!
Great place. They serve traditional swedish lunch. The staff is nice and gives excellent service.
Great place for schnitzel

Löwenbräu at Fridhemsplan is one of those places that’s hard to explain but easy to enjoy. On the surface, it’s a German-style bar with the classic combination of beers and wursts. But step inside and you’ll quickly realize it’s also very much a Swedish dive bar at heart. The mix somehow works perfectly - cold beers served without fuss, hearty food that does exactly what it should, and an atmosphere that’s equal parts laid-back and lively. It’s not polished, it’s not trying to impress anyone, and that’s exactly why it’s great. If you’re after a spot that feels genuine, unpretentious, and a little bit unexpected, this is the place.

Went here for dinner and there's just a sign on the door saying they're closed for renovations. Management hasn't changed the hours on Google maps or marked it as temporarily closed. Do better in the future please.

A German restaurant with authentic German interior and atmosphere. The walls are filled with hunting trophies and old black and white photos.  However, the menu is quite confusing (e.g. Parisare that is said to be grilled like in Norrland).  Good selection but limited beer assortment.

I ordered BIFF LÖWENBRÄU. It tasted just ok. There is quite a large parking lot nearby. The restaurant is located near the Fridhemsplan subway.

We stumbled into this place as it was the only decent looking restaurant we found opening late (until 1am) in the Friedhemsplan neighborhood. Ordered the wienerschnitzel and steak for a late night dinner and were actually pleasantly surprised by the quality of the food. The schnitzel were made with veal and not the fake stuff(pork), the steak tender and flavorful. washed the food down with a few pints of genuine German draft beers and all were good. The bartender/owner was a cool dude and we enjoyed a nice casual conversation with him on Stockholm, Sweden, Germany, and all topics. A relaxing atmosphere.
Overall exceeded our expectations.

I liked the atmosphere and service but I was disappointed with the quality of my dish. For the price(301kr) i should have eaten a tasty meal but no mater my attempts to fix it with lemon and salt it was just tasteless.

However my companion's food was on a much better level. I still believe it was overpriced.

One of the best kebabs you'll ever have. The kebabs here are well made, full of lovely salad and every bite is just delicious. We had the Yerevan, which was lamb meat with tomato sauce, garlic cream, silver and red onion, pickled red cabbage, tomato, pickles, jalapeno cream, crisp salad. It was full of flavour and just delightful. We also ordered a side portion of sweet potato fries with parmesan, can recommend this as well.
Easily one of the best kebabs, saying after 10years in Turkey! Tried different variations but love chicken ones the most just simply coz I love chicken kebab the most.

Probably one of the best Kebab places in Stockholm. It’s not the average street food kebab place, it’s much more high-end. They have a wide selection of super tasty kebab with chicken, lamb, pork, beef or vegetarian alternative. Me and my friend tried the Bowl with lamb or chicken. Very tasty, fresh and more than we could finish. I’m a big eater and the size of the bowl was more than enough. Very good in my opinion. Drinks includes sodas and alcohol beverages. Recommend for a quick and tasty dinner or lunch. Staff was is ok. Sometimes a bit slow on giving attention to customers. All in all a good experience.

Ordered the Olympus from the lunch menu. It has pork, tomato sauce, garlic cream, silver and red onion, tomato, pickled red cabbage, pickles, crisp salad (english translation from their menu).

I don’t quite like it; I didn’t hate it but it’s just nothing special. If you work in the area then sure it can be an option but I wouldn’t make a trip here just for the food.

The outdoor seating area is also quite cramped when it’s full. You have to fight for your space with the other customers sadly.
Staff were super friendly, professional and helpful. Food was as good as it can be for döner. Fries were delicious and big portion (1 is enough for two people). The portion of food is on large side.

Energetic young barmen who are positive and help you if you are indecisive about what to drink🍸.  If you are looking for a tasty beer with good service and a good atmosphere, this is the place to come to.
Really nice pub!
Good atmosphere, good food, welcoming hosts.
Cold and good beer! Always open ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Good place. Full or regulars. Guiness in tap. Nothing more to say…

Tasty Sandwiches and Great Value

A really nice spot for a quick and satisfying meal. The sandwiches are freshly made with quality ingredients, and you can really taste the difference. The fillings were flavorful and well balanced.

The menu has a good mix of options everything from classic choices to more creative combinations. The portion size was just right, and the prices are reasonable for what you get.

The place is clean, the atmosphere is cozy, and the staff are friendly and efficient. Perfect for a quick lunch or a casual bite.
I’ve just had the lentil soup and a pulled pork & chilli sandwich, and it was superb!

Very relaxed atmosphere. In the foyer of the Wrecks Museum, which itself is fascinating. If you go to the museum you get 10% discount in the cafe.
Lovely girl working there. Very pleasant. Great English, like most Swedes I've met.
Just had coffee and Budapest (which is like a meringue roulade). Soup smelt delicious and you could get as many servings as you liked apparently! Coffee refills were also included.
They do sandwiches, cakes, soup, ice-cream in tubs, as well as salads. I did see a bottle of Jameson on the shelf so perhaps they make Irish coffees.
My cake and coffee came to 64.8 kr including the 10% discount. Reasonable really.

This little restaurant is fantastic! The sandwiches are delicious, and the waitresses were lovely. I took the chicken Parmesan sandwich—it was perfect! I also tried the soup, but it didn’t really like it tbh. The restaurant itself is super cozy, perfect for a meal after visiting the Vasa Museum. Just a heads up, it’s quite small, so finding a place to sit might be a challenge. Will come back

Got the pepe pizza which had pepperoni, jalapeños, and honey on it and it was by far one of the best pizzas i had in sweden! It is definitely on the pricy side because it was around $9…however other than that, the pizza was delicious.

The pizzas were very tasty and well prepared. Unfortunately, the service left a less positive impression. The staff seemed unfriendly when we asked to leave out certain ingredients, which should normally not be an issue.

It was also uncomfortable to understand comments made by the staff who apparently assumed we would not understand them. This created an unwelcoming atmosphere.

Overall, the food was good, but the service experience could definitely be improved.
I wont order there again.

Felt right at home. A truly Italian place with truly Italian pizza. Best pizza in Stockholm by far. High standards, even by Italian benchmarks. On top of that, you completely won me over with the Amaro del Capo. I’ll definitely be back as a regular.

The worst service from clueless server. There was large group of us and I am a vegan, so before we decided to go in I asked if vegan cheese was available and the server said yes. So we all went in and sat down. Went to place the order, then the server said oh actually we don’t do vegan cheese. I asked why he said they did just a few mins ago and he just had a clueless look on his face and couldn’t answer. At this point it was too late to walk out as everyone had already settled at the table. The server suggested I get cheeseless pizza with mushrooms and olives, and also pesto pasta. I asked him 3 times if the pesto was definitely vegan as it usually has cheese / animal product in there, he kept saying yes it’s vegan. I finally got him to ask the chef and I was right! They couldn’t make me a tomato pasta either because apparently at lunchtime they cannot take any special requests which I thought was ridiculous considering I had already been messed around. We had to get him to read the order back several times as well as he kept making mistakes. When my pizza came, it was missing the olives! I have never dealt with such a hopeless server before, ruined my meal and we all could have gone somewhere else if he didn’t lie about the vegan cheese. The pizza itself was just dry and tasteless with a mountain of unflavoured mushrooms on there. Only positive is that the dough was soft. Would not recommend this place to anyone.

Super yummy! 🍕 Pizza Magari makes the best pizza I’ve had in a long, long time. The wood-fired oven gives that perfect Neapolitan flavor – soft, chewy crust with just the right char. Very authentic, truly Italian, and miles away from the taste of the big chains.

We tried the Diavola and the Mr. Ryann – both were outstanding, full of flavor and made with high-quality ingredients. You can really taste the difference.

If you love real pizza, this place is a must-visit in Stockholm. Great food, great vibe, and an overall fantastic experience! 👌

This was the first restaurant I ever tried in Stockholm. Everywhere was fully booked for Valentine’s Day so we put ourselves on the waiting list for a table at Magari, they called 5 minutes later and offered a spot at a bar. We took it.  Once we arrived they offered us a table instead! The staff were so kind. Despite them being so busy, stressed and even one of them accidentally hurting  themselves in the kitchen, they stayed professional, attentive and  had a great attitude. The food itself was good! The fluffy dough is to die for. The recommended wine was AMAZING. Atmosphere was very loud but that’s because it was particularly busy that night.  I recommend this place definitely!!

The pizza here is absolutely amazing, top class. I’d recommend it any day of the week. We also ordered the meatballs as a starter, and those should not be missed!

The restaurant itself is cozy, but the service was a bit lacking. Even though the place was almost empty, the staff didn’t really keep an eye on us. We also got the feeling that we were a bit in the way since we didn’t have a reservation, almost like we were being squeezed in. That said, we were basically the only guests the entire time and stayed for about two hours.

You come here for the pizza, not the service.

We stumbled upon the Magari Pizza by chance and even though the place was packed and we had no reservation they still managed to find us a seat.

The wait was brief and the service was great, but the real star of the show was the pizza itself.

We got Ricordo di un panino and Carmelina 2.0 and both of them were out of this world amazing. The crust was chewy and airy and toppings were full of flavor and packed a serious punch.

Paired with a smooth IPA, I highly recommend you check this place out and I’m almost sure you will leave with one of the best pizza experiences just like I did.
A very good place on the map of Stockholm. The pizzeria prepared a meal for 60 people. It was very tasty and pleasant. I recommend Magari Pizza.

Magari should change its name to 'Certo' Because if you are thinking, will you have great pizza...the answer is Si, Certo!
Magari Pizza is the best Napoli-style pizzeria (in my opinion) in Stockholm city center, offering an authentic taste of Naples. This pizzeria distinguishes itself with its focus on high-quality ingredients, perfectly executed Neapolitan-style dough anda chill vibe. The menu is intersting and unique.

I visited with a fairly big group that allowed us to sample a wide selection of their offerings, and every pizza was a delight. The "Mr Ryan" pizza was a standout, boasting a great blend of truffle salami and  nduja. The dough, the foundation of any great pizza, was consistently perfect across all varieties – airy, with a delightfully chewy crust.

Beyond the exceptional pizza, Magari also impressed with its dolci. The quality of the desserts was on par with the rest of the meal, providing a sweet and satisfying conclusion to our dining experience.

For anyone seeking genuine Neapolitan pizza in Stockholm, Magari Pizza is a must-visit. Its central location, interesting menu, and consistently excellent food. I'll definitely be back for more.❤️
The music was great, the pizza was astounding, the service was brilliant. Highly recommend this place for everyone!

Magnolia is a quaint little mom-and-pop Asian fusion spot and such a great find in Stockholm. The restaurant has a cozy, welcoming vibe, and the staff is incredibly attentive without being overbearing.
