Stayed there to watch a rugby match at 18:51 when the bar wasn’t busy, yet the staff came to our table at least 10 times to pressure us into ordering something, even though we had all ordered drinks. Horrible place, the waiters were unfriendly and kept asking us to move, even though we weren’t blocking the way. Very rude service. I would recommend going elsewhere, overpriced but definitely not high standard. Really unfortunate

Went with 4 friends. Sat upstairs  They don't supply cutlery, how do we eat our food ? With our hands ? Need to ask them after recieving the food for cutlery. I ordered the steak, over €30 and asked for it medium. Comes out well done. Look at the size of it. No one enjoyed the food. The service was ok, not the staffs fault. Plenty of other options around the same area for the same price.

They have a nice casino which we couldn’t play as we do not have a swedish bank account, unfortunately. Also we really got into shuffleboard which is a cool sport in a bar. They have two of those tables. Service was alright, but stuff could be more friendly.

Won't be eating there again but will go back for drinks and for sports streaming.

Service was a bit slow in the beginning but otherwise it went smoothly afterwards. One of the doors was constantly opened and it was quite chilly. Some good screens but the ones above the bar aren't that great so you need to be smart about seating. Food was decent.  The espresso martini was priced at 169 SEK in the regular menu (last page) but the "campaign menu" on top said 172SEK. It's not a lot but it's silly when you forget to update the price across your menu. We paid 172SEK nonetheless even after I pointed it out to the waitress. It also had a large amount of foam (see picture). Edit: went again to watch another game. Had the chilli burger and I couldn't finish it like something was off about it. The streaming this time was lagging towards the 3rd period.

Incredibly higher price, they are not premium restaurants but they still charge IPA beers for 129 SEK, just a lemonade mocktail for 149 SEK, that is so high price. Never doing an after work there . My colleagues were so unhappy about the exorbitant higher price of the drinks.

The best burger in town . The cocktails and beers are amazing . The staff is so friendly and works fast even when it is very much work . The place is clean as a crystal & casino was one of the best part of the night. What can I say about the location, tunnelbana is close and it is so easy to find and pet friendly . This place is a must !
We didn’t eat in this place, but had a couple of drinks and a round of bowling and air hockey! Very quiet in July - lovely place by the water - recommend it! The service was very nice too!

For some reason this location puts curry on the chicken alfredo (which is not at all normal for this dish) even when you specifically ask them not to. Happened twice, and it's disgusting! My husband had the vegan burger twice also, extremely salty both times. The only positive is that the desserts were delicious.

Excellent experience! I've been there for an afterwork with some colleagues and we enjoyed everything! Delicious food, ice cold beer and exciting football matches kept us entertained for hours! I also recommend this place for both its cool vibes and the professional yet super friendly staff, especially wonderful Javier! It's definitely a must to visit and I look forward to going back soon to try bowling and all the other games!

We had a fantastic dinner with our group of four! The food was delicious, especially the Burgers! Lively atmosphere, fun entertainment options and kind staff, in particular Javier from the staff was so helpful to recommend us the best food! Highly recommend for a great night out!

I have been here multiple times and we always had the best time! We are a big group and the nice staff always found the perfect spot for us. The food is good and there are a lot of games to spend a lovely afternoon among friends. Absolutely recommended 🤩🤩🤩

name: O'Pizzicato

googleReviews.text:
One of the best places I’ve ever dined in. Me and my friends came to eat here on a Tuesday evening. It was busy yet still had a calm atmosphere.
The waitress was extremely helpful and just the right amount of attentive.
Food was.. wow. Everything was balanced and delicious.
Will definitely come back when I’m in Stockholm
I had bruschetta (120kr), lamb chops (365kr) and tiramisu (120kr)

Took vegetarian gluten free pasta. It was just amazing. They even have gluten free bread to begin with. Pasta sauce was very good. Fantastic staff with very warm and friendly approach. Highly recommend. They can introduce more vegetarian options is the only recommendation.

We had a great dining experience at O'Pizzicato, and we can't rave enough about it! From the moment we walked in, the ambiance immediately set the tone for a fantastic evening. The space is cozy, perfect for everything from a casual meal to a date night.

Our server was friendly and helpful with sizes and dish recommendations. The food was flavorful and felt both comforting and innovative. We could tell a lot of thought went into the sourcing of ingredients and the execution of each plate.

O'Pizzicato is a hidden gem that combines excellent food, a welcoming vibe, and top-notch service. Whether you're a local or just visiting, this place is absolutely worth a visit. We can't wait to return!

Overpriced, way too salty food, and tacky interiors. Good service, but plain. The olives where the cheap kind you buy at Ica and finess was lacking in general. Had been a 4 star if prices where two thirds of what it is (a plain over salted pasta at 280 kr and mains at ≈320 kr). Great place for people who cant tell the difference between a restaurant that stopped trying and one that actually cares.
Great & tasty food and super friendly service. We really enjoyed the experience tonight. Made it to our MUST visit again list for Stockholm. Congratulations 🍾🎈👏

googleEditorialSummary: Family-run eatery serving classic Italian specialties in a bright, modern setting.

googleReviews.text: Security guards are absolutely unprofessional garbage. Turned away multiple people for "looks" while the place was empty. I get it with me, but the guys before me were good looking, and brought girls!

I would give this place zero stars if I could. We were a group of 8 people enjoying a few rounds. After going out for a smoke, one member of our group was singled out by the security guard (Ordningsvakt) and told she was "too drunk" to re-enter.

She had only had three beers. She wasn't stumbling, wasn't loud, and was perfectly calm. It was a completely random, power-tripping decision with no basis in reality. Because of this one guard's incompetence, our entire group of 8 had to leave and find a better venue after only 3 pints.

I have been visiting Sweden for 10 years and have never experienced such poor judgment or "security" theater. If you want a night out where you aren't harassed by guards looking for a problem that doesn't exist, go elsewhere. Total waste of money and time.
Located in one of the best places on Sodermalm. The bar has a great atmosphere. Service is super fast and customer oriented. Ordered fish n chips and it was unbelievably tasty. Overall, great bar 🍻

Stoppedmof here for one before heading back to my hotel

Great bar, good selection of ales
Great relaxed venue near Slussen. Staff were friendly, the vibe inside was nice, and they show Premier League football.

Stopped by the Old George Inn for a pint, and it did not disappoint. The beer was cold, fresh, and exactly what I needed. Great atmosphere, friendly vibe, and a proper place to relax with a drink. Will definitely return for another round.
I've tried calling a few times, have you found a pair of black gloves? I think i left them there tonight, so sorry! it was a lovely bar!!!
Like this place a lot. Good nd fun service. Big variety of beers. Proper cevapcicci but food in general nice. The local with high ceiling is inviting for nice talkative evenings among friends.

An old pub which surprised me twice on my visit. Great food and a very cozy outdoor serving area in the backyard.

Cheap prices for a beer at a good location helps of course, but just the good itself coupe bring me there again.

A fine bar indeed with super-friendly staff, great atmosphere and suitably cheesy tunes for a post-gig Saturday night visit! An earlier visit meant we took advantage of their happy hour food/beer offer (fish and chips or burger) 😎🥰

an absolute gem in the heart of cool Stockholm... situated in the hipster area, this pub resembles a real ale pub in England... with genuine hand pulled cask ale bitters on sale... whilst pricey, certainly worth a visit if you like proper beer

Had really good experience, the server was lovely person and recommended two absolute hits of a beer. The first pilsner was peopably the best beer on our swedish trip. Food was really tasty and came out pretty quick even though the place was pretty full. When I look for a comfy place to have a beer with friends, this is it.
We went here our first night in Stockholm and loved it. The staff were lovely and made some excellent recommendations. Food was also excellent.

Oliver (not the owner) is an extremely nice and knowledgeable bartender, they have a great selection of beer on tap and also bottles and cans. Offered a great service and I'd totally recommend a visit to this bar 🤩
Great atmosphere, a very wide selection of beers and very decent food! The service is amazing!

Heard good things about this place, so we came on a Sunday around lunch.

I would say the interior is nice, and the service was good. Our waiter really did his best, especially around gluten intolerance, which I appreciated.

That said, the food was very average, with bland taste, and the menu felt a bit odd. Considering the price relative to the taste and overall quality, it did not feel worth it, and I would not come back.

Great Italian spot in central Stockholm!
Warm, cozy atmosphere and friendly, attentive service. The pasta was excellent - properly al dented with rich flavors. We also tried a couple of starters which were well balanced and nicely presented. The cauliflower was my favorite.

Good wine list with both Italian classics and some interesting picks. Prices are fair for the quality and location.

A solid choice for both a relaxed dinner and a date night. Will definitely come back.

10/10 experience. Food and atmosphere are fantastic. Music not too loud, and very good selection. However, the best thing about Olli is the service. Both Anton and Isabella looked after us with such care and detail. Their recommendations for both food and alcohol were spot on. Thank you to both of them as well as the rest of the staff. I will definitely be returning when I’m back in Stockholm.

We had the best possible dinner for our customer. All in our company loved both the hole menu and the wine served. We had Amanda how made a great job serving us.
Thanks for a wonderful time!

Placed near in the heart of Stockholm city this restaurant is easy to reach with a short walk from the Central Station.

On a Thursday mid July it was not packed, yet it still kept busy and reservations might not be needed but can help.

Not feeling for pasta but rather risotto I was disappointed to see the lack of that dish on the menu. Went for fish instead. Whole white fish fried in a pan, decent flavour but bit much butter for me personally.

Food is good yet not great, pasta might be better and can still Se myself going back here to try that.

name: Omnipollos hatt

googleReviews.text:
I have heard a lot of nice things about this pizza place and I must confess my expectations were quite high. Maybe that’s why I was left a bit disappointed.
The pizzas we ordered were nice, but none of them wowed me.
The staff is amazing, super friendly and professional!

Cozy place, nice atmosphere, service high quality, the bartender was very nice and careful to details.

Pizza super delicious, good oven and nice dow!

100% recommended!!

A supposedly LGBTQ Beer-bar sporting a Palestine flag at the center of the bar. Two things that would get you publicly hanged in Gaza... Queer beer... If anything shouts virtue signaling this is it.
I really wanted to like this place, but other than their masochistic political statements, the staff is genuinely unpleasant and help ruin the vibe.. Truly disappointing.
My advice to the ownership and staff; stick to mediocre pizza rather than mediocre political statements.

Great atmosphere and selection of beers. It's a bit expensive but really worth it for what you get. The pizzas are delicious, with a lot of vegan options too. The beers are really good and the staff really kind.

There are not a lot of seats available and it's not possible to book so you have to plan on that.

Would totally recommend to anyone.

Had been wanting to go here for a while! I’ve had a decent amount of omnipollo beer in the states but to make it here and taste it from the source was awesome! (Next will be the actual brewery, I am 2/3) the bar space was a bit crowded (I was by myself) but as it got later the crowd thinned out. The girls behind the counter were so nice and answered all the beer nerd questions I had 😂 I didn’t have any of the pizza but it looked delicious so I will have to try it next time!  I had one of the pleroma sours (so good) then the Three times Three collab and then ended with the basil Hayden barrel aged stout- wow! Cheers and thanks for the great experience and beer!

googleEditorialSummary: Cozy destination with outdoor seating & an understated vibe serving pizzas & craft ales.

googleReviews.text:
Quality beer with a fresh perspective. I enjoyed this place for its excellent beer selection and unique atmosphere. It’s housed in an old church that’s been converted into a bar a one of a kind experience I hadn’t had before. There’s plenty of space, whether you’re visiting solo or with a group, making it a great spot for any kind of outing. You can pick up one of their available group games and play along some beers.

The bar also offers food and to my surprise the burgers were really good. I also loved the fries which you could order as extra.
Food and burgers were good! Nice atmosphere , cosy inside! They have there own soda made, music really good.

Outstanding beer from swedens most infamous. Friendly staff, cosy fitout, limited access to merchandise options, beer is excellent of course however the food is grossly over seasoned they really need to get in control of that. Maybe the salt and pepper shaker is broken but all meals tonight are the most over seasoned food items I’ve eaten out this year. Honestly I cannot believe someone would dump this much salt onto their burgers so consistently.

Edit for clarity: Beer is a 5, Food is 4 star, burgers are 2 star max

I guess you could say that this is a cultural experience from multiple points of view. Quality beer and one of the first in the craft scene outside the US. That alone is worth the visit. Secondly, it's housed in an old church that's been converted into a bar. Don't know if there are any other places like this anywhere.

The whole neighborhood is nice, bringing lots of good vibes. Worth the visit.

Omnipollos kyrka is a former missionary church in Sundbyberg.
The nave—the central longitudinal part of the church (in Swedish långhus / mittskepp)—now houses the brewhouse.
The bar was moved up to the läktare (gallery, [ˈlɛkːtarɛ]).
When Omnipollo moved in, there was still an orgel (organ, [ˈɔrːjɛl]) in the corner—and it’s still there.
Super delicious food! Extremely kind people who genuinely care about feeding good food. Highly recommend the crispy chicken poke bowl 😊

Super tasty sushi. Salmon was very fresh and had much better taste compared to sushi I have tried in other countries. Staff was nice and prepared dish quickly. Miso soup and filtered water were included in the price. Overall a feast for eyes & the mouth

Have ordered salmon sashimi (160 SEK or  15.49 USD) in a big bowl. Had asked the cashier if this order was good (or big enough) for a dinner.  He didn't hesitate to answer yes.  I'm glad I had listened to him and I could hardly finish my portion.

There were many healthy ingredients in the bowl. I did feel I had been well nourished with this meal.

The best sushi I’ve had ever.  Their menu is different to my usual sushi spots however the quality and taste is amazing. 10/10

Order from front to back:
Tempura roll, Ono special, California roll.

Nice delicious Sushi for a good price.
We went here in the evening. The pictured meal was 140 SEK including 11 different Sushi and a Miso Soup.
You give up your order at the entrance and they bring it to your place.

name: Orangeriet

googleReviews.text: My favorite restaurant in Sweden. The view is amazing and so is the interior design. It is not too fancy but still a top class place. Very cozy with the fireplace in the middle.

One of the best Italian spots in Stockholm – easily Top 5, especially when you factor in the prices.

Orangeriet offers an impressive selection of drinks and wines, paired with truly authentic Italian recipes. The atmosphere, the view, and the overall vibe make it a perfect choice for any occasion, day or night.

The service is top-notch, with a level of professionalism that makes giving 5 stars feel like the only option.

Keep up the fantastic work, Orangeriet!

Nice Location by the water, unfortunately we received slow, unfriendly, if not hostile service by the waiter when ordering. Also a bit pricey.
As far as I know tipping is entirely optional in Sweden and not necessarily expected unless you want to honor exceptional service.
Nevertheless when we payed we were pushed to tip although we did not want to: the card reading machine was set up to refuse to accept the card unless a tip amount was chosen. Only when we explicitly said to the waitress that we refuse to tip she changed the settings so we could pay without tip. So please watch out for this type of tourist-scam. In all other restaurants we visited we could pay right away even if no tip was selected from the on-screen menu of the card reader

Looking for a chill spot to dine or hang out with friends? Check out this gem with a stunning view of Lake Mälaren! Whether you're lounging outside savoring a meal or sipping drinks in the sunshine, this place doesn't disappoint. The food? Absolutely fantastic! Perfect for those laid-back days with good company

I visited this place back in February and had a great experience. We were served by a lovely Albanian lady (unfortunately, I didn’t catch her name), and she was wonderful throughout. The food was delicious, the vibe was relaxed and welcoming, and the view was absolutely amazing. Would definitely recommend!

googleEditorialSummary: Easygoing waterside cafe/bar with a country-chic vibe & garden theme, with menu of burgers & salads.

googleReviews.text:
I love this little restaurant in Stockholm, I’m so happy that there is a place that actually provides amazing gluten free food made from fresh ingredients. Here nothing is pre produced  and everything feels very authentic and healthy.

The hamburgers are delicious, and interesting, since the buns consist of buckwheat flat breads, but they feel better than the dry gluten free bread that most places offer! Delicious dressing.

The soup is a big favorite of mine, perfect balance of flavors and served with the delicious flat bread. I think it’s one of the most delicious soups I’ve tasted.

The atmosphere, very cozy, very natural, doesn’t feel forced. Staff very friendly and extremely helpful. All questions are answered and they give great recommendations. Cozy seats, nice music and a perfect spot to relax and chill. I love it.

Great to have a vegetarian restaurant nearby. They have different varieties of hamburger, rolls and soups. I preferred the köfte roll after the detailed explanation by the staff, which I really liked the köfte itself. I think the pickled onions might be less which dominates the roll. The atmosphere was cosy and the staff were friendly. Would visit again.

It’s unfortunate and yet I am lucky to have found this place on my last day of trip. Enjoyed my breakfast and lunch. Such a cozy set up and the best flavours I have had. Such fresh food and just the moment you enter - the fragrance of the flavour really calls you in. And the owner is too sweet with the requests and the overall service. Definitely going there again for all my breakfasts whenever in Stockholm. I am a vegetarian and enjoyed lentil soup and kofte wrap! Still drooling just writing the review!
We went to Stockholm and instantly knew that vegans or even just people that don’t want to eat fast food here have a hard time…. That was until we found this beautiful and lovely place!

Great, quiet atmosphere with very fast service — our food arrived in under 5 minutes. The dishes were vibrant, flavorful, and beautifully presented. We tried the kofte wrap and the 'beef' salad, both of which were delicious. Overall, a fantastic experience and the perfect spot for a tasty, quiet plant-based recharge!

Coming from Munich where handpulled noodle restaurants are now everywhere, we were missing this in Stockholm. Glad to have finally tried the only one we heard about. Simple menu, but all you need is there. Additionally they have the perk of you chosing your noodle thickness. Food came super quickly. I also like that it's not an over-designed overpriced place, but simple and affordable with a focus on food. Definitely had a bit better meat though in other countries, maybe too expensive in Sweden. Broth and noodles were great though.

Delicious and very generous portions! 😋 The bowl was big and satisfying. Just be careful if you’re wearing white — it can get a little messy! I’ll definitely come back to try some of the other noodles next time.

One of the best noodle restaurants in Europe! The taste was excellent. Unlike many other spots in Stockholm, it wasn’t over-salted, and the spice level was perfect for everyone. I loved the broth, and the portions were very generous. We visited in the evening and received great service even late in the shift. I am so glad to see them open and serving such high-quality food again.

They serve some really delicious hand-pulled noodles. Great flavour profile in the broth. It was not at all too salty like I've seen some people's reviews claim.
This is the perfect go-to place in the colder months to get a warm and spicy refresher.

We even have out monthly agenda to here since they have a very good noodles that satisfies our belly and needs of halal food, as always. If you are new to here, I recommend to start with Signature Beef Noodle (the one with clear soup) with smashed cucumber. You may also consider the egg infused in tea for additional protein. Do expect busy atmosphere, since most people come and go go food, not for long chatting.

Only had the brewed coffee in this neighbourhood coffeehouse. The brewed coffee is self-serviced from warmed pyrex pots. For Swedish coffee, this was very good. Medium brew, not too strong, fragrant and the temperature was just right - hot enough but not burning the tongue. Costs 35 SEK and very affordable.

The ambiance at the cafe on a weekday morning felt relaxed. The shelves had a full display of local cakes, biscuits, bread and cold sandwiches.
Classic cafe in Vällingby, great coffee and selection of food. I had the prawn sandwich which was tatty but the bread was a little dry. Also had a mazarin with my coffee 👌

Bakery with a poor offer of food and coffee.

We ordered a cappuccino and also a semla and both of them were poor. As you can see in the picture the semla was half fill with the cream and not fully so it was dry, but at least it was good taste. The coffee was disgusting, it taste like it was burned and also weak.

Not recommended.
Not good as expected. Tried cheesecake with strawberries but it was quite sweet & the texture was a bit too soft. I put them in fridge again for an hour but still not very ok

According to the menu they should have a variety of coffee. But we were not able to get even a simple cappuccino. Once in the afternoon they said that the machine is broken; another time 30 min before closing they refused to make it saying that machine is closed already.

Overall the staff is very unfriendly and acts as if they are doing you a huge favor by serving you.

Although they have a large selection of cakes and some of them might look interesting, but to our taste they were quite average. I've been there few times and never enjoyed the visit.

Probably the best place for dumplings in stockholm. For a good price, you get amazing homemade dumplings, in a portion that will make you full. They have great vegetarian options, and I really recomend the dumpling with salmon. The staff was quick with the food (5 minutes from order we already received it) and the whole place is clean.

Extra points for the ability to taste different dumplings in one sitting! And amazing chilli oil!

The only downside is that there are few places to sit, so it can get pretty crowded.

9/10 Would recommend and will come again!
The place is very clean, even the toilet, the staff is friendly, helpful, good options for children, a big sort of flavors for all tastes. Very soft dough and tasteful inside. Afordable price.

I had the best wonton soup here, with a very well seasoned soup, with dumplings that had authentic asian flavors.

It comes with a free salad, and the portions are big, so for its price, definitely worth it!
I will come back here, so definitely recommended

Tastes of dumplings is quite Authentic. Chilli and vinegar also taste “China”
There is a microwave available - suppose it is prepared for the family with small kids - well thought!
Small and cozy place

The dumplings are so tasty and the owner is nice a person! He forgot our dumplings in the pot, but he was humble to apologise and brought new ones! Such a gem with a good price! I will return! Nice gesture to offer the starter / salad!

One of, if not the best, Eggs Royal I have ever had.

Texture of the warm toasted bread - slight crisp on the outside and warm buttery insides. Delicious hot smoked salmon paired with the runny poached egg and rich hollandaise.

What a treat.

Cardamom bun was great too, strongest cardamom flavour tried so far in Stockholm. Great soft texture, not dry. Definitely a solid pick too.

The hot chocolate is reasonably priced at 59 SEK and tastes great. The café is cozy and comfortable, with charging spots for your phone and a wide variety of bakery items to choose from. After walking around Gamla Stan and feeling tired, this is a perfect place to stop by, relax, and recharge.

Nice laid back brunch and coffee shop. Seats by the windows are awesome on a colder day if there is sun outside.

I ordered a cinnamon bun, cappuccino, sparkling water and a beef sandwich smothered in cheese sauce and fried jalapeños. It was delicious but it tires you out quickly due to the amount of cheese.😅
The cinnamon bun was soft and chewy, I really liked it, but the coffee was too bitter for my taste. It has the aftertaste of chicory root and needs maybe more milk or less water.

All in all nice place to take a break and enjoy a good pastry. 👍

Best place we visited in Stockholm, thanks to Chloé’s warm welcome and the uniqueness of the cakes. I can’t emphasize enough how kind and attentive Chloé was — she made the whole experience wonderful, guiding us through the options so we could choose the perfect treats. The cakes were incredibly good and truly unique (special mention for the lemon meringue cookie!), as well as the coconut brownie and the princess cake. I’d definitely recommend this place to anyone visiting Stockholm.

Great coffee and a beautiful atmosphere! I also tried a princess cake here for the first time I’d only seen it before at IKEA stores in Slovakia. It was delicious and the whole experience was lovely.🇸🇪

I had a wonderful experience at Paraden! I tried the chanterelle omelet and it was absolutely delicious, with a very generous portion. The service was courteous and quick, making the whole meal even more enjoyable.

I’m visiting from Canada, and I can honestly say that the Swedish hospitality truly shines here. The staff made me feel very welcome, and I want to give a big compliment to the chef for such a memorable dish.

Bravo to the entire team at Paraden:  this is a restaurant I would highly recommend to anyone visiting Stockholm!

Super nice, caring waiter! Not very nice bartender. The restaurant appeared to have given little thought to the ongoing pandemic, not even availing hand sanitizer or a hand washing stand, which didn’t inspire a lot of trust to be honest. Food was decent. Outdoor seating was great, next to a quiet street and with heat lamps.

My two colleagues and I went to this restaurant after work. I had booked a table beforehand. We all chose mushroom soup as an appetizer, and boy, it was super delicious and comforting. For the main dish, I chose the duck breast because I simply love duck. Very yummy! And for dessert, ice cream. Everything was delicious, even their homemade breads—those breads are to die for! The staff was friendly. Highly recommended!

Cozy atmosphere, well appointed restaurant with great service. Staff recommended great wine pairings with my food and was very attentive.

Had the burrata for starters and the steamed char, along with a glass of chardonnay.

Highly recommend, preferably better to book a table beforehand as the place is quite small.
Foods taste good and a lot of varieties for vegetarian. I think the Duck breast which is so soft. It is a bit salty but tastes good with its gravy.

This was our first stop in Stockholm and did not disappoint!

Came here right after they opened for the evening and had two delicious cocktails followed by some unique pours of rum (Rhum JM 1998 and 2003) 🤯

More relaxed vibes at open, but appears the crowd gets livelier as the night goes on.

Thanks Sami for the wonderful hospitality and recommendation to Günter’s (which we will review later)!

Friday night, someone's 32nd birthday, the DJs were kicking ass and so were the cocktails. Referred to me by two different bartenders at two different bars suggested this place. "Best Rum Cocktails in Stockholm" is a hard mantle to maintain?
We had a great time with amazing cocktails. The bartender knows what she is doing exactly..! Had one of the best cocktails:) I’ll definitely go back when I’m back in Sthlm.

Lovely place with a relaxed vibe and friendly staff! Good (and original) vegetarian options on the small menu. The fries are really good and their ice cream is delicious. I just wish the portions would be a bit bigger.

Cozy, small bar! They have a huge selection of Rum based cocktails. Ljke 2 full rows in the menu! You can never get less with the rum based selections. Have heard the vibe for weekends at basement is great, but unfortunately have just been there on a weekday - Monday.

I don't want to know how much butter I already ate indirectly from Park, but always worth it. You will not find much better pain au chocolat or croissants in France. I recommend to put the pain chocolat briefly in the fridge since it's usually too fluid inside.

Otherwise, of course amazing bread, no matter which one. Their bulle are really good, too. Still one of the best bakeries to me and always some new varieties and surprises when you go there since it's all made downstairs.

Lunch is quite decent as well and we'll presented, a bit overpriced and depending on the dish sometimes unfortunately also too little food, but luckily you have some really good bread with butter.

Lovely little bakery.

Great quality produce. Super nice breads and great buns.
Good service. Fantastic space to sit in, eat and relax.

Attention is payed to all the details: Candles on the tables, fresh flowers, clean environment, nice music.

Very nice cafe with superb buns and coffee.  Have lunch on work days but only small sandwiches during weekend.  Would be nice with some good weekend lunch options.
But go there for a sweish fika with "kaffe å bulle !"
I’d come back for the savory croissant and the cheese cake, they were really good.

NB! Mainly a semla review!

The Semlor från Park came warmly recommended and they did not disappoint. I tried their regular semla which was very tasty with a tasty, fluffy wheat bun, homemade almond past and a good whipped cream (not too whipped, a bit more on the soft side but not fluid). Overall, I'd put this among top 10 semlor in Stockholm, but with a price maybe on the high side considering the location (this is not central Stockholm).

The café is small and cozy (was fully packed when I came buy on a Friday afternoon to buy some semlor on the go). I also tried their "Morning bulle" which was really tasty and would recommend but in my opinion, a bit overpriced (though all the cafés that serve this type of bun charge a similar price).
I just took a Guinness on my way home. It is not what you would cal a cost place or romantic. But I'll guess it is very lively on weekends, so I will try it out on a Friday next time.
Friendly staff and a great atmosphere. They were incredibly kind to us — and to my dog. I’ll definitely go back, and I’m bringing my friends next time 🙏
Good price on beers and burgers. Nice and cozy environment with good outdoor vew in sunny spring afternoon
I can definitely recommend stopping by this place. The food is ok, but the beer and the staff even beat the meal I had! Great music, attentive staff and good drinks – what are you waiting for?

Stopped by because we were curious about the place after it became Parken Söder instead of its previous name.

After asking a few times to eat, we get a table, but no menus, we had to ask another waiter for that.

After ordering burgers and drinks, one of the party gets the wrong cider, but gets it replaced. Parken Söder's own beer I can't recommend, tasted stale and old??

When the food arrived, there was only one burger each, we expected that for that price you would get some fries, but no. Wrong of us for not reading more carefully!

The food was horrible though.. the bread was downright cold, burgers were barely lukewarm and bacon was so black that it just tasted like charcoal/burnt.

After pointing all this out, we got a "I'm new, but I'll take it to the kitchen"

When we were about to pay, it turned out that we had to pay for the wrong cider that was more expensive than the one actually ordered...

This is where you can handle it nicely, if you want to get guests back and also get a better reputation, you say "sorry that the food wasn't up to expectations, we're charging half the price and hope you'll give us another chance!" Or something like that. It would have given a completely different approach to the place, now we will never go back and won't recommend anyone to go there.
A plus is that it's nicer interior than before and better music!

Parklådan is a cozy and tranquil beer garden where you, like us,  can sit back, relax, and enjoy delicious cauliflower burgers, crispy fries, and refreshing beverages. All this while overlooking the serene oasis of Vasaparken. It’s the perfect spot to unwind and soak in the peaceful surroundings.

A nice outdoor bar in a park. The bar has a small minigolf course adjacent to it. Busy when the weather is nice but usually possible to find a table. 12 Swedish and fairly local craft beers on tap but also other beverage alternatives. Nice to see that one of the beers on tap is a non-alcoholic and another one with lower abv (3.5). Small menu with three options and possible to get in veggie versions that are good. Also serves ice-cream. Overall a nice park bar to hangout at.
Try ballpark hotdog, local beers on tap. Great park for family, with mini golf and soccer field for kids. Wonderful to sit out during summer. Treasure find. Best place for park food. Beer
Friendly staff and nice place to enjoy the evening sunshine with a beer and glass of wine! We then played a round of mini golf!

(3.5) Great service. We made a mistake in our food order and they didn't hesitate to fix it without extra payment! The food was ok but heavily overpriced. Atmosphere is great in the middle of the cosy park.

I recommend going there and having drinks with a nice atmosphere, but not for food.
Had a lovely lunch. The grilled tuna salad had two gigantic steaks of fresh tuna and was delicious. Service was excellent and friendly. Would love to go back and taste more dishes!

Both the food, wine, music and ambiance were absolutely lovely! It felt like being dropped into a French neighborhood bistro. All of us were very pleasantly surprised to find this gem.

I had escargots for starters and entrecôte for the main course. The meat was excellently prepared and very tender. The crème brûlée was also excellent.

We'll be back!

Excellent french bistro, escaping the touristy vibe of Gamlastan, and providing an authentic experience. It can get very busy, so it's best to book beforehand. The food was amazing, especially the mussels but the duck and the steak were great as well. Would recommend!

Went to Bistro Pastis for my Husbands Birthday.  A truly fantastic experience. As other reviewrs have mentioned it is like stepping into an authentic french bistro. It is cosy and intimate which adds to the experience. All the staff where brilliant, attentive and
nothing was too much trouble, even presented my Husband with a Birtday dessert. One of the owners had never been to France, which made the authenticity of the food even more amazing. We lived in France for 3 years and can honestly say this was like being back there. Thanks to all the staff for making it a great evening.

What an illusion...there is nothing french but the name, the service desinterested or overwhelmed. No Idea of service a la francaise...not originated in sweden...maybe somewhere in moroccaine or algerian. Very SMALL, OVERHEATED place and an awful smell of garlic. Do not go there...not for the service, nor for the smell. Fois gras and bouillabaisse was tasting...but not to be identifyed to be french cuisine. No Must have

name: Pat's Place

googleReviews.text:
We recently dined at this Thai restaurant and had a generally pleasant experience. The food was nice and flavorful overall. Out of the eight dishes we ordered, one or two really stood out as particularly delicious, while the rest were good but not especially memorable.

Unfortunately, the service didn’t quite match the food. Our waiter seemed like she might have been having a tough day. When the dishes arrived, they were placed on the table without much explanation or interaction. At one point, when I asked whether all the dishes had been served, I had to repeat myself three times before she responded, and she seemed visibly irritated.

Overall, the food was enjoyable, but a more attentive and welcoming service would have made the experience much better.

Pat’s Place is a cozy and welcoming spot in Stockholm with a great vibe. The food is delicious and well-prepared, and the staff are friendly and attentive, making you feel right at home. Perfect for a relaxed meal or a casual hangout, I’d definitely recommend stopping by!

I can't sing enough praises for the grilled aubergine dish called Purple Rain. Everything was delicious but this was a standout, simple yet packed with so much flavour! The sauce needs to be poured over white rice for maximum enjoyment, ordered 2 portions of this dish the 2nd and 3rd time coming back here

The food was fantastic across the board, with very reasonable prices. The place was already busy early in the evening, but we still got to choose between a table for two and seats at the bar. We opted for the bar, where the staff was attentive, and I even had the chance to chat a bit with them while they worked. Unless you’re very hungry, two dishes per person was enough. The prawns were my personal favorite. Service was friendly and laid-back, and the atmosphere was casual but still clean and fresh. Easily the best Thai restaurant I’ve eaten at in Stockholm, though most of the dishes are not classic Thai food.

Update: Came back after a great first impression, and this time we tried the Bathing Duck, Armagedon, Tear of tiger and Star wars. The winner was the Bathing Duck, simply delicious. We also tried the desert Green sticka rice with vanilla ice cream with coconut. Really good!

1st visit review: Amazing Thai tapas. We had the Donald duck, purple rain and the "ET go home". The highlight for me was the purple rain dish, which was the eggplant in the Spicy Thai sauce topped with garlic and mint. Even my partner, who is not a fan of eggplants, loved it! The only thing it disappointed was the mango juice because I was expecting it to be fresh from the fruit, but it was from a box.

googleEditorialSummary: Intimate, casual eatery offering familiar Thai classics like curries, spring rolls & noodle soups.

googleReviews.text: Pretty mid. We got the Swedish meatballs, which is at a fair price however the meatballs and potatoes are literally just heated on a stove on the market side. The taste is decent but they were barely warm, closer to cold. Service wasn’t anything special

Excellent food. I had the salmon, others had the meatballs both excellent and at a fair price.

I expected it to be nice and I was still impressed but how good it was.

The atmosphere was great and looked out onto either the street or into the food market. Both good options but we sat looking at the market.

Nice drinks selection too. Do go here, it's great.

We came 2 times in 3 days, it was that good. Meatballs are great, tasty flavor. Salmon was one of the greatest I had. For the salmon, portion is not huge, but enough for one person. Service is great and fast, plates are nicely organized and clean. Perfect spot to eat, but go early, sometimes the food is finished if you are late
This is the new salmon dish on the menu. Very good portion size and taste. Thanks.
Very authentic, rustic cafe in Ostermalms food hall. Swedish meatballs were very tasty and the glogg was great!

A lovely cafe wide variety menu for breakfast and brunch, they have plenty of seating inside and outside. Very nice members of staff and good service. The food was really good, the almond croissant and the grilled croissant with ice cream were a good choice of pastries. The lunch menu looks good as well, will come back to try the lunch.

Everyday I wish I lived closer to this fantastic bakery. I don’t lie when I say - every single thing I’ve had here has surpassed expectations 😍

Easily my favourite spot in Stockholm 🥰

Old-school Swedish fika inside Ersta Hospital. Huge sandwiches, fresh salads, cookies that could start a religion, and lunches that feel like a warm hug. And hey - if your arteries get clogged, you’re already in the right place.

We came for breakfast, enjoyed it then decided to try Pom & Flora the next day. Immediately regretted it as Paulina’s has so much more character, a wonderful vibe and much more reasonably priced food. We went back to Paulina’s right after Pom & Flora cuz we felt bad for cheating.

Really nice restaurant with ample space and a great choice of healthy food options. The fika vitrine is also well equipped. I loved my cauliflower soup. It came with some chopped nuts. The cherry on top was very good olive oil - which enhanced the soup.

We ordered 5 boxes of salami pizza and it was honestly terrible. The cardboard box was thicker than the dough and probably had more flavor. Service was fast, but that’s not surprising considering the pizza was completely inedible. Such a waste of food/money. Would not recommend.
I simple, fast yet nice restaurant. it’s nothing glorious, but it does the job just right! The stuff at the counter was really nice and really helpful!

This is in our neighborhood and we hadn't dined at this restaurant before. My God, whatta place.. Genuinely felt welcomed.. Big portions on offer you'll be full and satisfied.. Salads with Bread and sauce also complimentary, along with Coffee.. Go for it.. Large spread out space with glass windows make this place seem large and airy.. Located right outside Vastberga shopping centre.. About 5 to 7 minutes walk from Telefonplan T Bana.. Thanks Guys..

For the price it's awesome and the staffs were so friendly , we ordered pizza and falafels , I would say the falafel was nice crispy and and the taste was godly , the pizza 🍕 is okay , salads are normal box salads , but the bread with the salad is fresh and so soft want to give it a 3.5 but for the staffs and the freshly baked breads i am giving 4

We love the pizza and pasta here.
They can make pasta spicy for you if you want.
I live the bread they give with pasta. It’s always freshly baked.
We have tried vegetarian pizzas and pasta.
The taste is really good and service is fast as well.

What a nice Cajun bar with quite good food and some vegetarian and vegan options available.
The drink selection is also quite good although rather on the pricy side.

But really what sets this bar apart is the atmosphere. From the outside looking in you don’t imagine anything is really in this place but step in and enjoy the surprise that it brings. Nice music, decorations all over the place… it has it all!

A really special cajun bar that, according to my company, has been here forever, and it shows, but that is also part of its charm. The decorations are really over the top extra, and they have a wide selection of food to choose from. Nothing crazy in terms of price, kind of what you would expect, but the cocktails were crazy expensive for some reason. Ok selection of beer and wine, but if you prefer cider this is not the place for you. Accomodating in terms of adjustments to the food to suite allergy and preference options.

Randomly decided to go there and didn’t disappoint. Unique design, little bit funny but cool, ordered the seafood jambalaya and we liked it very much, tasty combination. But I’m giving 4/5 because of the prices of the cocktails/drinks. We are big cocktail drinkers and always trying out something new, but unfortunately they couldn’t fit here in our budget.

Unfortunately, you can't do a good job when you only have 1 person working service/bar (at a restaurant focused on cocktails) and only 1 person working kitchen, with a nearly full restaurant.  It's a bit disrespectful towards your guests to have your doors opened this way and not limit your capacity towards the service you can actually deliver. Getting my food and have to wait nearly 10 minutes for my beer to go along... no bueno.

I hope you can improve, because the place has a tremendous potential.

The food was incredible. The free bread was super soft and a little spicy from the jalapeño, the meatloaf was flavorful and delicious, and the fried potatoes were crispy on the outside, soft on the inside. Everything made to order, incredible service, and super fun and eclectic vibe!

We visited Pharmarium during our trip to Stockholm and really enjoyed the experience. The bar has a very unique atmosphere with its old apothecary theme, which makes the place feel special and different from typical cocktail bars. The cocktails are creative, beautifully presented, and the flavors are excellent. We tried Völuspá, Näcken, Eternal Lady, and Tomtar på Loftet. Tomtar was not really our favorite, but the others were very tasty.

The staff were friendly and the whole place has a great vibe, especially being located in Gamla Stan.

The only reason for 4 stars instead of 5 is the price compared to the amount you get. The cocktails are very good, but the portions are quite small roughly around 0.1–0.2 liters for about €20. I understand that this is normal for high-end cocktail bars, but compared to similar places in other European cities it still feels quite expensive.

Overall still a great place to visit for a unique cocktail experience in Stockholm.

We tried what turned out to be the most expensive “juice” of our lives 😀 Two cocktails cost 390 SEK (about 35 €) in total.

The presentation looked theatrical + the drinks were served with smoke and a special block, but once the visual effect disappeared, the cocktails themselves were very disappointing.

The portions were extremely small and the taste was basically like berry or orange juice with just a tiny hint of alcohol. For this price, the value simply doesn’t make sense. It’s hard to understand the concept: strange portion size and a drink that barely resembles a proper cocktail.

We didn’t even finish the drinks 😐

We’re continuing to explore Stockholm, so if we find a place with good cocktails and reasonable portions, we’ll gladly leave a positive review there.

For now, this was simply the most expensive juice we’ve ever tried.

The cocktail we ordered was Merlet Brothers’ Blend. Two cocktails cost 390 SEK (about 35 €) in total.

really cozy place. but a bit to loud music. and the drinks are very special it's like a positions theme (they were kind of small and a bit expensive) however if i'm honest i had a bit of a hard time understanding what was actually in the drinks. and we ended up ordering two drinks that were very bitter and not our style at all. and as like all bar places not really a big selection of alcohol free. the staff were really nice though and it's probably our own fault with the drinks.

Beautifully crafted drinks, definitely not basic. Unique ingredients, unusual combinations. But all very tasty. Also got a few snacks for the table, those were good as well. Be aware prices are particularly high, not a place you’d go to get drunk if you’re budget conscious.

Staff all seemed well briefed on the menu items and could help guide our decisions. They were attentive and easy enough to flag down.

Atmosphere is great, cozy and classy. Feels a bit like stepping back in time. Not too loud even when it’s busy, you can carry a conversation without yelling. We were a party of 5 at their large round table, and everyone could hear everyone. It’s best to make a reservation before hand, especially if you are more than 2-3 people.

The drinks here were fantastic, and the atmosphere was warm and inviting. The décor is beautifully done, and the staff was both friendly and accommodating, which really made the experience stand out. My favorite cocktail was Potion of the Ocean—a perfect blend of chemistry and art. You can even catch subtle notes of ocean water in the flavor, which made it truly unique.

We were three persons, one vegetarian.
Service was very friendly explaining all the food options, also can add some extra.

Portion that got everyone satisfied, Vegetables and meats were very good prepared, tasty sauces.

Asian food very good taste at reasonable prices and nice service

Loved this restaurant, service was very good, had a great welcome, had great help on the explination of the menu. As you can see on the pictures it looks great!
The chicken soup was a delight and well served. Will visit again if I'm in Stockholm.
Big portions, go hungry. Good taste and heat. Dominated by take out trade so not many siners there for,a full meal.

Loved the Pad Thai I got from here. Probably the best I've ever eaten. The taste was amazing, presentation was very good and all the veggies were crunchy. 100% recommend the food and would definitely eat here again
Fantastic restaurant in Luma very close to the tram stop on the main road. Food was delicious, portions are very generous & the staff are extremely friendly with fast service too.

This restaurant really impressed me at this price point! The staff had deep knowledge about the wine and was super friendly... But most importantly the food was amazing! My personal favorite from the dishes we tried was the Pasta Meduza 👍
Very friendly stuff and nice vibe! There were some birthday tables and the waiter heated up the place w music and clapping, it was really funny and cool. The oxfile starter was great!

Good food & good service from energetic personnel! Menu is good and they adapt it for children if needed. Recommend this place for both lunch and dinner.

Have no photo of the pasta, but their pasta is brilliant!
Food amazing! such a fantastic spot with top class service ! Its nice to visit a restaurant that cares about quality and good service!!

Wow! Came there, waiting for a friend who was late, no problem. Had really good drinks before with no rush what so ever. And when the food came, without wait. It was soo good! And the staff, just great!Recommended!

Randomly walked in for lunch. Lunch special was 5/5 super yummy, boyfriend had the moose meatballs which were also delicious! Service was great, very friendly and kind servers. Would recommend and would come back, all in all was a great lunch.

Very friendly and attentive waitresses – you feel truly welcome from the very first minute. The Irish coffee is excellent, truly excellent – rich, well-balanced, and perfectly prepared. The music is also very good, creating a cozy and relaxing atmosphere. A place you definitely want to come back to.

The gravy on these meatballs was amazing. Some of the best meatballs I’ve had in Sweden.

The server was friendly and offered suggestions.

We were able to bring our dog in which was a great respite from the winter weather, but it got a bit cold being near the door.

Can’t get over the meatballs. So good.

Food was too salty, after one beer they said we're too drunk to order anymore and i couldn't disagree more, but the blond girl (mvp) saved us with serving one more beer before heading out. Cool place but the people working there should chill out a bit. 😅

Evening meal for daughter and myself.  Swedish meatball and moose meatball platter was superb.  Daughters fish and chips was BIG.  Excellent food, excellent service.  Seated quickly, drinks served quickly, only 5 or ten mins wait for meals.  Desert was similar.  And it was very busy at the time.  Cosy, friendly atmosphere.
Only downside were a grim toilet and the prices.  That said its no more expensive than other bars and restaurants.  Nowhere in central stockholm is cheap.  Comparatively, it was value for money

We shared 5 tapas for two people and we were pleasantly surprised with how good the food was. The chicken skewers with the corn mash were the best but we also really recommend the artichoke and beef tartar. The shrimp and roasted goat cheese with beats and honey were also really good! Happy we gave it a try!

We went for lunch on Saturday and the place was empty. We ordered pan-tomate, but the bread was not toasted well. The patatas bravas were not fried at that time, so they were cold. For the main course, we ordered paella, one with seafood and another with chicken and chorizo. The menu said the preparation time was 20 to 30 minutes, which makes us think they cook everything fresh to order. But it wasn't like that, it tasted and seemed like they were heating up the food they already had pre-cooked, especially the rice. The food did not have an authentic taste, the taste of good olive oil was missing.
As Mvh Mikael mentioned in his comment, the waiter asked us how our food was, we did not want to comment, after paying the bill, it seems inappropriate to say that the food was not completely what we expected. It's a great place, with a menu that looks attractive, but they need a better chef.

Another thing that needed attention is that the bathrooms were not clean, they don't have changing tables in the bathrooms and we didn't know the place had more bathrooms.

I'm only sharing my experience fairly as someone who paid for their food, so I would hope the owner would consider it as an opinion to improve their service.

Disappointing! Food is very bad. They just warmed up some prepared food from the freezer. The food tastes not authentic Spanish food and very bad.
The Greek guy in service is not polite. The toilets when the restaurant was almost empty were dirty.
Food was good but too expensive. Tapas costed 150kr each. Waiter recommended 3 tapas which turned out to be really expensive. Tacos were too small portions
Artichokes and beef tartar was exquisite. Ceviche was one of most punchy food I have ever tried. Great experience in general.
Went for a casual Saturday lunch today (3 pax). Food and ambience is ok but waiting 53 mins for Pinchos food when the restaurant is half full is ridiculous.

Compared to the price, the portion sizes were very small, but the food was very good for. You have to order at least 3–4 items. However, the overall experience was good, and the ambience was also nice. It was a great experience.

To me the concept of service is good but the portion served is very little so if one person want to eat then he should order atleast 4-5 items. Otherwise the ambience is good and location is also very convenient to reach as it is very close to Sundbyberg tram and pendeltåg stations
Great tapas and drinks + really nice stuff. We like it here 😊😍

Nicely decorated restaurant with fun vibe but food is average.

The mushroom risotto was good. The sauce on gyoza tastes was strange. Salmon tartar was quite salty for me. The rest are alright.

It’s more to enjoy this place for the fun atmosphere.

name: Piren

googleReviews.text:
we ordered ägg- & parmesangratinerad chorizo, which was tasty and warm, served with nicely toasted bread. We did really enjoy this one.
But
I ordered the Eggs Benedict, and unfortunately, it was bad. The sauce was runny and bland, the prosciutto was thick and chewy, and the egg was clearly pre-cooked, cold and the smallest I’ve ever seen. The bread was so burnt it was inedible.

I asked for a replacement, which the waiter kindly accepted and apologized for. However, the second dish was no better— untoasted, ungrilled bread, an excessive amount of prosciutto, and another ready-made, cold poached egg. To top it off, the waitress simply dropped the plate in front of me without making eye contact or offering any service.

Overall, a very poor experience from both the kitchen and the service side. Truly disappointing.

Food was top notch and the servers did their utmost to accommodate in a friendly and efficient manner. The view is amazing, and the environment very beautiful. I really recommend as a solo treat, romantic dinner or elegant catch-up with friends.

What a view, ambience and location. By the water making it a perfect location for a cozy evening. U could sit outside in summers and enjoy drinks with a view. Food is also very yumm. I liked even the dip with the starter they gave. Would definitely recommend the place. Fish was very very fresh and so juicy. I only felt that portion was a little small.

By far the best restaurant in Stockholm!! Love the atmosphere, the staff is incredibly nice and the restaurant is just beautifully designed. Also: I’ve rarely had food that tasted this perfectly to the point where you just know the quality is top notch and the cook really knows what they’re doing!

Great place to enjoy the sunset either with a nice dinner or drinks. The place it’s incredible due to its location and architecture. Very high ceiling and open spaces. The terrace it’s also very nice. Service was nice and attentive. I wish the food menu had a bit more personality but we find couple of options for us that we enjoyed. Drinks menu is large which makes it great to enjoy a drink while appreciating the surroundings.

googleEditorialSummary: Modern, glass-walled restaurant on a waterside pier, featuring a contemporary Mediterranean menu.

googleReviews.text:
Authentic Greek restaurant owned by a Greek family with a real passion for serving quality food.

Before entering, you are welcomed by the wonderful smell of grilled meat. The food is excellent, with good options featuring both pork and chicken prepared in different ways. During lunchtime, drinks are included if you choose the lunch menu. They also offer some very tempting desserts, although I did not have room to try them.

The restaurant has both indoor and outdoor seating. There are not many tables, but enough to feel comfortable. Even though it can be a bit colder outside, the heaters make it pleasant to sit there.

The only downside for me was that the mixed plate was on the smaller side. I did enjoy it, but a slightly larger portion would have made it perfect.

Overall If you are looking for truly traditional Greek food, this is the place to visit.

This was the best gyros I’ve tried in Sweden. The environment really boosts the authentic atmosphere. It felt as if I was in Greece when I closed my eyes while having a big chunk of the pita. I’m looking forward to visit again during summer.

I will recommend this place to everyone I know.

Thank you Pita Baren!

If not in Greece go where Greeks are for Greek food, The scent from greek Kitchen surrounds the location and lure you in,the interior reminds of actual greek restaurants in the villages of Islands
I had the Seftalies,which is Cypriotic patty,tzatziki,sallad and french fries, lovely atmosphere, will go there for more

Cute restaurant. Has both indoor and outdoor seating.
Kind staff
Great food
Has 4 vegetarian options.
I tried the halloumi burger which was will sized, filling. It has a lovely hunk of halloumi. I requested a good amount of spice and i got it! The sauces are great.
The fries are well seasoned
Overall would recommend.
Prices are slightly in the moderate range.

Great Greek food in a cozy locale.

Went here to try their food since it was recommended and it didn't disappoint. Tried the Gyros plate for 149kr, and it's great value for the portion size and quality of the food.

When I went, I was quite packed in the restaurant (Sunday lunch time) so it might be a bit of a wait when it's busy. The restaurant is also very visible since it's a separate building near the road, so you won't have any problems finding it.

Some things that could be improved is that it was a little uncertain where you order the food, since it was quite busy and the server had to both take orders and clear tables at the same time.

The food is good, but over time the prices have gone up slightly, and I’ve noticed they serve less meat and more rice, fries, or salad. It’s a bit disappointing since the service is good, and the place is clean with a nice atmosphere. I don’t mind paying around 150 kr for a healthy lunch, but for that price, I expect a generous portion of the main dish and fewer fillers like rice or fries.

Expensive and not worth the hype.. Avoid if you can.. The menu is boring and does not offer anything special or unique.. it's just run of the mill and that wow factor is missing for the price you pay..
Loved this cozy place, lovely personnel . Allowed our little dog in. Thank you
Great location, friendly service and good food. Especially the sides were delicious. The pitas and plate were good but they can not really be compared to a greek pita 😊

Unfortunately the pita was very boring, the bread is run of the mill store bought.

Chicken was also store bought and plain, very sad to see and taste.

I had the Pips Special, and there was no taste at all from the mango/jalapeno-creme.

145 kr for this was a disappointment, would have expected the chicken to be marinated and bread to be made in store for that pricetag.

This is one of the best kebab places and its definitely a must try.

The restaurant is small and cozy, with a passionate and welcoming staff. You will be greeted warmly upon arrival, and the food is easily among the top three I’ve ever had. I come here regularly and have introduced many friends to this place, who are now regular customers themselves.

The restaurant offers three main proteins: Meat, Chicken, and Vegetarian which you then combined with the menu that is available. My favorite is the "Tellus" which I usually have with meat. The kebab also comes with fries, which are an absolute must—probably the best fries I have ever tried.

The food is fantastic, and the best part is that you don’t feel bloated after your meal, which can often be a downside with similar dishes. Here you’ll leave feeling satisfied without that heavy feeling, so you won’t be drowsy when you return to work.

A good tip is to go for the daily special which includes fries and dip sauce for 139kr. The tellus is served on Thursdays for example and for an additional 10kr you can add a soda of your choice. The restaurant also offers free juice and coffee.

I have had a very high expectation of this restaurant since there aren’t so many artisan kebab restaurants in town. However, the chicken kebab is just so-so. And I am not a big fan of wrapping with the pita bread, but rather more interested in the way that the fillings are in the bread. Also no alcohol serving is a minus for me.

Clean hygienic fresh and cozy.

You can see when staff is composing the product. Acoustic is perfect.

Staff delivers to the table with a smile.  Food taste delicious.

I have only been here once on a biz lunch. The place put a good beneficial diplomatic ground for our purpose/meeting.

I recommend this place!!!
Super exciting PITA but also VERY tasty plates ! People here are VERY FRIENDLY
Great vibe with dishes that taste and look awesome. Had the vegan PiP special which was great!

It’s really disappointing that on such a beautiful and busy day, there was only one person at the bar and one at the drinks station. It’s no surprise they couldn’t keep up. Waiting over an hour for fries is simply unacceptable. I had to ask the waiter three times before anything happened. On top of that, the tables and chairs were dirty. Where was the manager? This kind of experience is not what I expected — very frustrating! Not coming back at all!
Western bar style restaurant with Casino, generally good for after work or hang out with friends for a beer. By the way Beer is good! Food is ok one thing good is that food is not too salty!

Modern, nice looking interior. Had wonderful hot chicken wings that comes in 6 pieces/plate, so quite a lot. After that we had a barbecue plateau to share with beef, pork and lamb meat. The plateau had so much food that we could only finish half of it, and got the remainders as a doggy bag. So if you plan to have that, skip the starter and come very hungry. The meat had not been grilled on a charcoal grill though so it didn't have the real barbecue flavours we were looking for. Still good though, and the complementary roasted potatoes and sauces were also good.
Nice place, the food is great, cheese fries, burger, steak i think they were all great(went with friends so multiple dished tested).
Good afternoon on Pitcher’s. Familiar and welcoming environment. Polite and fun staff. Cold beers 🍻

I've never seen anyone so confused when asked for a coffee.

Asked for a cappuccino, "sorry, we don't have that." So I ask for an Americano, "we don't have that either."
The waiter looked so confused when I pointed to the coffee options on the menu, ended up with water. That's okay, had a good laugh.

The food was ok, we did pasta al pollo and penne pasta oxfilé. Very little meat in both, the chicken was a bit hard. Quite bland flavour.

We also had a burshetta as a starter, though it arrived with the main. Lots of bread, very little flavour, heaps of raw onion. The tomatoes was okay. A bit burned.

We'd been recommended this place by our bnb host, unfortunately not what we expected.
Really tasty Neapolitan pizza with good ingredients. I was here with my son who wanted black olives on his margherita - no problem!

we had two nice & tasty vegan pizzas there. The menue got some vegan pizzas and for a small account of money they offer to make all the other pizzas vegan too. We had to wait a bit, but it was worth the taste. :) They also do delivery service i think. Would go there again when in Stockholm!
I didn't expect such good pizza close to my home in Solna! We took Margarita and Fungi pizza! Both were fresh, tasty and also quite OK price! We will definitely go back!
I had the pepperoni pizza and it tasted good. The food came to the table very fast. It was hard to communicate to order what I wanted. But overall it was good.

name: Pizza Hut

googleReviews.text: We know what to expect from Pizza Hut . So, we get the familiar flavor for the pizza. Crispy dough and good pepperoni. The restaurant is large in a central area and we came for dinner so it was not crowded.

We ordered some pizza from this particular location recently and became extremely ill. We each had different types of pizza. But, still ended up getting incredibly sick. We kind of feel like we were poisoned intentionally by the staff!

We are now considering filing a lawsuit against this horrible restaurant! We have eaten at several different pizza huts in the past. But, something like this has never ever happened! They seriously need to be exposed and eventually shut down! Do not eat here!
Great service, fast and my mini peperoni pizza 🍕 was smash!

This place is situated in the main city of Sodermalm at Stockholm.This outlet was very wide in comparison with other branches.The customer service was good.However they will accept card only as tender type.They did not accept cash for payment.Make your own salad is available here.

We ordered vegetable pizza and chicken nuggets.Overall taste was good.The crust was too small.Prices are little competitive but the taste was good.The pizzas are served in a pizza pan unlike we see plates in other shops.The chicken nuggets was also served in unique way.

Restroom is available and well maintained.
Wors pizza ever. Overpriced.. i ordered chicken pizza but there was almost no chicken on it.. would never recomend

googleEditorialSummary: Popular delivery, carry-out & dine-in chain known for pizza, wings & pasta, plus sides & desserts.

googleReviews.text: This restaurant is located at the Metro exit. In order to visit the Stockholm Metro Art, we took the last stop of the blue line, AKALLA. We found the food very delicious 😋, the portion was very generous, and we met the friendliest service staff during the trip 🙎‍♂️🙎

Came here for pizza to celebrate our anniversary and there was no disappointment!
Service was amazingly friendly and the pizzas (and fries) were delicious, I had the Duccati which I highly recommend if you like chantarells!
We also shared a dessert made of deep fried ice-cream with kola sauce, Nutella and cinnamon, absolutely amazing if you love sweets!
We had to sit outside bcs of our dog, but that just gave us a great view of the sunset and night sky.
Definitely a 5 ⭐ experience and one of the best local pizzeria/pub/restaurants I've visited in Stockholm!
Hope to come back with the whole family some time soon 💚

Honestly i high recommend this place! I been there many times
The place is totally clean inside and outside and the toilets are always fresh
When it comes to prices it's so cheap according to the quality you get !

This establishment is a cultural landmark at this point. They’ve been around forever, and consistently serve great food. The owners are always kind and make you feel welcomed, no matter if it’s been one year or 10 years since last you were there. I grew up coming here, and my mom and her significant other were there at least once or twice per week until she passed away.
Their pizzas are excellent, and their daily specials are often classic Swedish dishes, made to perfection. If you ever find yourself in in the suburb of Akalla, do yourself a favor and have a bite to eat here. You won’t regret it.
Got kebab on a plate, was tasty and afordable.
Good pizza place, it's got nice pizza, not to many parking near by, but during lunch you don't find too many. Good spot to eat lunch and relax

Great location!
Very clean, organised with friendly and caring staff.
Food was very good as well!
Excellent pizza at great prices! Everyone is very friendly too. Definitely a great place to stop.

Still the best pizza on the island, whole family loves it and the pizzas are huge!
My favourite pizza place on the island, been going here for pizza 20+ years and always enjoyed their food.
Great service and fantastic pizzas (especially the panpizzas), what more could you want?
Only had takeaway so far but it’s great to have excellent pizza in the neighbourhood. Maybe more importantly also superb pasta, they serve the most authentic Carbonara I have had for years

A sad, underwhelming addition to the area.

Had the pizza carrying the same name as the place which should indicate a top tier dish. It had CANNED MUSHROOMS!!! For 130SEK!!!!

I have not seen canned mushrooms on pizza in ages. Completely ridiculous to open a new place, charge 130SEK and not have fresh ingredients.

The rest of the pizza was also unimpressive. Tasteless doe and cheap, greasy cheese that left me with an overall bad feeling worse than after a supersize me meal.

Please do everyone a favor and don't give this place your money so they shut down quickly.
Worst cafe ever in sweden
Your menu is wayyyy to long - this not modern for this area
Bad food and not real Italian restaurants…

Fast delivery and normal prices.
I liked the dough and the tomato sauce, even the meat was tender. However the pizza was too thin and oily for my taste and my stomach felt weird afterwards. There was no pizza salad either.
Amazing food. Super big and delicious pizzas. People working there are extremely friendly, helpful and nice. We definitly found our favourite pizza place.
We got pizzas for Iftar takeaway. We tried kebab pizza, chicken pizza, shrimp pizza, and chicken curry pizza. I tasted all the pizzas, and my favorite was the chicken pizza.
Amazing and very very tasty ,i will definetely visit again
American style pizza is amazing!👌 I took Di Pollo with additional mushrooms and salami

Got online foodora delivery. Pizza saggy and damp.
Pasta was so disgusting that I threw up after eating fourth bite. My kid has a massive stomach pain all night. The meat was probably old and wasn't cooked well. It smelled rotten. Very disappointing. And they didn't bother to pick up my phone call either.

Spader Dam has moved from Hägersten to Fruängen dur to the demolishing of their old house. Pizzas are still just as good. Thin and tasty pizzas, maybe not the most luxurious or biggest but very good price-quality ratio. Fast and friendly service, free parking outside.
I eaten here already and bought drinks , after gym I went in and asked "heey can I buy a pizza salad?" I had the best experience, lovely people !!
Very cozy place with very kind and helpful staff. I think that the food is good and i would suggest you to try it if you're hungry! My favorite is their pizza.
Tasty pizzas. I especially recommend their Madonna.
Bought fries for 55 sek and got approximately 25 french fries. Complained and they said 'the box is deep.' Could see the bottom after eating a handfull of fries.

The place is pretty cool, by the water and dog friendly. There are saunas you can rent which is also fun.
Some people there sadly were n9t behaving very nice and screamed and pe. d in the water

Plåtparken is a charming waterfront spot with a great outdoor bar concept and plenty of seating. They often have DJs which adds to the ambiance, though the music selection can be hit or miss. On the downside, long queues for food and drinks are not an uncommon issue. Their opening hours can also be a bit unreliable. It's frustrating to arrive and find it closed simply because the weather forecast isn't ideal. Some simple additions like heat lamps and rain covers would make it a more dependable destination.
Awesome experience with Live Sports & DJs - at Liljeholmskajen 👌

We were taking great care of stopping here for food with a beautiful view. We ate at hoi polloi, seriously recommend trying the bao bun! Unlike anything I’ve ever eaten. Great vegetarian options. The service was amazing! Even though it was a busy Saturday, the service was so personal and attentive. Family and pet friendly too. I will absolutely be returning

We have been going around for about 2 weeks now, trying out new food and restaurants, we have come to an end of our journey; and this has been the BEST food we’ve eaten. Faiza has helped us so much with ordering and taking care of us, we really appreciate it; she is so kind and sweet. Overall the food was delicious, we couldn’t stop eating even though we were full. It was amazing!

Cozy spot with a Swedish-Italian twist
Polpette in Stockholm offers a cozy atmosphere and a fusion of Swedish and Italian flavors. I tried the salmon meatballs and pizza — the salmon meatballs were definitely the highlight. The pizza was decent, but nothing extraordinary. Honestly, IKEA’s classic meatballs still win in terms of taste! Overall, a pleasant experience, but not a must-visit if you're chasing bold flavors.
A calm and pleasant place in the center of Stockholm. I chose a salmon dish as the main course — the presentation was beautiful, and the portion was generous. Highly recommend!

The pizza was not Neapolitan style, so don't be deceived by the menu or pictures from earlier reviews. The Quattro formaggi has 2 crumbs of gorgonzola and 2-3 chunks of brie or similar, and a dash of shredded Parmesan - so it's technically Quattro formaggi, but just barely. Way overpriced for the very mid pizza even by Stockholm standards.
There's a beef tenderloin dish which was very good, but it says it's with asparagus wrapped in bacon - and you get a single piece of asparagus wrapped in bacon.
There's also just a single toilet for all guests, in case that's relevant for you.

We sat outside
I took the meatballs and my friend a traditional Swedish kind of salad, which we didn’t like at all
Way too noisy, maybe because of the large group next to us
Simply the best Italian pizza in Stockholm. Great food, great service and wonderful atmosphere!

Sure! Here’s a super short, casual one:

Great pizza with legit vegetarian options. Fresh ingredients, tasty combos, and a really good crust. Definitely worth coming back for. 🍕💚

Real Italian pizza made by a Italian  pizza maestro . Dough is light , and ingredients are top quality .
Very important place for Stockholmers to learn how real pizza should look like and taste.
Place has one of the best views on the water and Södermalm.
Highly recommend 9.7/10

Unique and tasty pizza with gluten free options.  We enjoyed the Swedish pizza which had an abundance of roe which we enjoyed and also got the Ortolana. The gluten free crust was more crispy than chewy (sharing since people have strong crust preferences). Fast and friendly service for pickup.
Simply the best pizzas in Stockholm. But not only that, the best people, they make you feel like home.

We had a reservation made for 6 to meet up for a happy hour here. We had great service and a wonderful time catching up with friends at the happy hour. We all enjoyed the gorgeous views from the floating restaurant.  There was even a rainbow at one point from the short wain shower that passed over.

We ordered a bunch of food to share and it was all nicely prepared and there were no leftovers when we were done.

This is a great place to meet up after work and have a good time with friends.

Good, friendly service. Good wine recommendation and great food (the tuna starter is a must, and the lobster was amazing). The view is spectacular a clear evening and the place is good for all types of occasions. The cost for the evening was very treasonable for the experience

Unfortunately, we received no service at our table despite ordering bottles, and the staff declined to pour the drinks for us even when we asked politely.
