My favorite rooftop of all time, super cute area that literally looks like a park on a roof. I prefer this rooftop over any other since you can always find a place to sit as it is huge

Nice bar with nice view especially during the sunset. Drinks are nice. Nice place to hangout and after work. You can go through urban deli restaurant and there will be elevator in the back to go up to the bar.

Don’t let the outside of the restaurant fool you… inside is lovely, and the food is insane. A proper sushi chef stands and prepares an incredible platter for you, and the prices are very reasonable. We had a 30 piece sushi platter for two of us. And I saw some meals that others had in the restaurant which looked incredible too. Very impressed, and would definitely go back again!

weve been here in scandinavia for a week, so far the best meal!!! will want to visit again, specially the staff, a girl from mongolia, she was nice and offer us some drinks aswell!
the sushi was really good
worth a visit

It was my first time eating at Takumi, and I feel like it’s a hidden gem! Super cozy interior, the owners are very warm and welcoming, and the food was excellent — very fresh, good quality and super delicious! I have sushi-restaurants closer to where I live, but Takumi is definitely worth the extra drive. Will be coming back very soon!

Quality sushi in a cozy local.

Have been here several times now and every time the food is up to standard. Both quality wise and for the cost of that quality. Things in the menu that i would personally recommend is their sushi and sushi burrito.

Staff is also very welcoming and attentive. Location wise, it's located in a basement but has plenty of signage, so you can't miss it when walking by. The actual locale has several tables and is very nicely decorated.

You can both order online or at the location with a smaller self-service kiosks or at the register.

So, if you're ever in the area, then be sure to test it out.
Fantastically delicious food, great atmosphere, nice music, very friendly personnel. This place is worth the hour-long drive to the other side of the city to visit it.
New local cafe with good coffee, coffee and homemade food. A lot of home cooking. Very nice owner who both works himself and cooks the food. Unexpectedly affordable 90-120kr lunch
Really nice owners with a good lunch 😊

So nice staff!! Such good Persian food! Oh la la
Thank you so much for today! Mvh We who had the premiere with Persian food and got the best seats🌞!

Have to give them all 5's. This time i had bibimbap and it was an absolute banger. Probably the best one I've had in Stockholm. The poke bowl is also top notch.

Miso with togaroshi and coriander as well.

The tea is brewed to be full of flavour, rather than weak.

All in all, go here, enjoy good food and support local business.
Had the take away today, the sushi was good and the service was also really good!
Very nice freshly prepared sushi, large sushi mix was very good, salmon quality seemed great and very well assembled pieces. Delicious menu and very polite owner who made us feel welcome.
Best Chicken Pokebowl I have ever eaten 👌
Amazing little restaurant. Best food I've had at a sushi place. We got the beef bibimbab and the sushi rolls were huge. Flavour and presentation was incredible

Thank you for the wonderful evening and the special menu for our son. We liked the food a lot,one of the best ice cream ever. Very kind people also. If we return to Stockholm, we'll come back and also recommend to.our friends who'll visit Stokholm this summer.

Came here on a Tuesday evening, had a reservation but there were still a few tables available so walk-in is possible. Food, wine and service were fantastic. Very happy with this experience and I would recommend to friends. This is the second time I've been here and it's been pretty consistent both times.
Good food, good wine. Nice people. A highly recommended place!
Since I heard about longcooked oxtail I wanted to try it and I tried it here and really liked it, the pre meal is fresh baked bread with balsam & olive oil which is standard for Italian restaurants!
Look no further, great Italian food in Stockholm. Great place. We will be back.

We went here with my family (5persons) during on trip to Stockholm. Service were good and we got food very fast. Pizza's and hambuger were excellent. When ee arrived, place looked full and waiter adjusted table for us.

This cozy restaurant really impressed us with its food and service. The oxfilé pasta was absolutely delicious — rich, flavorful, and perfectly cooked — and the pizza was just as good, with a great balance of fresh toppings and a perfectly baked crust. Our waitress was incredibly friendly and welcoming, making us feel right at home. The service was quick, and the food came out surprisingly fast without compromising on quality. A fantastic spot for a casual but high-quality meal, and definitely one we’d happily return to.

What a surprise to find a great pizza with a lot of cheese! Totally recommend. I ordered the margarita and was not able to finish it but they offered a box to take away the leftovers. The puzza with shrimp had a lot of ingredients as well, they are not stingy

The best restaurant in Solna. The quality of the food is amazing, prices are moderate and the service very fast. I recommend the meat dishes, very very tasty. Kids menu is also simple and tasty. Thanks guys!

I read all the nice reviews and had higher expectations.
I got a plankstek entrecote because they didn't have biff. I didn't really enjoy it. The meat was fat, hard to chew and had a bone and the mashed potato had a powdery consistency. The sauce and vegetables were good.
The restaurant didn't have some basic things like cola zero and they were out of biff and meatballs so that was a bit sad.
On the positives, the service is friendly, the environment is nice and the prices are very good!

Good Persian food with lovely ambience. The koobide, fish, aubergine and chicken were all excellent and the food was served pretty swift. This road is fully of great restaurants and this is another one worth considering for dinner or that special occasion.

I visited the restaurant and had a mixed experience. On the positive side, the taste of the food was good, though not exceptional. However, there were two main issues that stood out:
1.	Although there were plenty of available seats, when we asked for a better spot, our request was initially refused. They only accommodated us after we mentioned that one of us was pregnant, even though it was quite obvious.
2.	The portion sizes were disappointing; they were much smaller than expected.

Overall, while the food was tasty, the experience was somewhat overshadowed by these issues.
Good service, nice ambience and great food. Vegetarian grill with halloumi had good variety of other veggies. In general, the vegetarian grill and accompanying sauce was on the sour side. Nice!

Delicious food. Rice served had a nice special taste. Main course served with little salad. Has both indoor and outdoor seating. Mocktails were good too. 10min walk from tbana. It's located in street where there are many restaurants with similar street seating arrangement.

We visited Tehran Grill for afterwork last week. I got the Sultan plate which is a lamb file skewer and lamb minced meat skewer, plus safram rice and sides. The meat was of good quality, well cooked and good seasoned. The side vegetables and rice really tasty. We had a delicious meal. The staff was really friendly. Nice atmosphere. Would certainly visit again.

had a great experience at Tehran Grill! We ordered Vaziri and Sabzi, and both dishes were excellent. The chicken was tender, the lamb kubideh was juicy, and the saffron flavor brought everything together perfectly.

It honestly exceeded our expectations. Great quality, great taste — strongly recommend for anyone looking for authentic Persian food in Stockholm!
Loved the Persian Cuisine. We had mix kebabs and Kashke Bodunjun and Dook (buttermilk) Really tasy food. Enjoyed everything.

Wanted to give a shout out to the great service we had! The lady (who's name I unfortunately lost) that served us was incredibly friendly, charismatic and forthcoming. What's best, the food was excellent so nothing to regret!

I‘m not sure if I’ve ever eaten food like this before - and now I know what I’ve been missing. It tastes like heaven and if I’d live here, I’d come again for sure! The atmosphere is cozy and welcoming, the service is super friendly, the food is beyond good. The saffron and pistachio ice cream with rosemary and cream was the cherry on top, I ordered it twice 😄 Thank you for this great experience!

I ordered koobideh, it served quickly with a nice design. It was juicy and tasty. High quality and delicious. Service was really good. Beautiful interior design. Just for me it was a little uncomfortable to sit on bar chair and a little dark. Otherwise, I highly recommend the restaurant.

Lovely spot: calm atmosphere, good wine, beautiful view, and delicious cakes. I recommend it! We stopped there twice during our stay. It’s also very charming, and lots of tiny birds come right up to the table.

We visited the restaurant on the 19th of May, 2023 (Friday).

The restaurant is situated within a park, and there were many having picnic and sunbathing. 🤭We found a cozy spot under the tree that provided a shield from the grouchy heat from the sun.

The burger🍔,beer 🍺and salad were good.The service was alright even though it was crowded.

Worthwhile to visit!.

This beautiful small is located in a small park very close to famous Kungstradgardens. We got veg salad some kind of veg cheese sandwich. The ambience was excellent we were sitting under the sky and watching the world go by.

Love this cute café house in the lush park garden. The cardamom bun and cappuccino were just perfect. Fast service, too. Here on a sunny Sunday at 12 noon. It‘s not too busy hence the wait wasn’t long.

We went twice while visiting Stockholm. It’s a nice place to chill. The food was very tasty and well presented. Each time we had a great time, enjoying the sun and the peace. We will definitely visit it again.

Tldr, dont waste your money here.

not enough for the exaggerated amount you pay.
We bought 2 full meals and 2 half meals. They had same portion size. Both not fulfilling.

We bought cheese sandwiches to compensate since none of us were full. Two of them sandwiches were hard as rock. I asked them to change and the person said it is supposed to be like this since it is sourdough bread. Not a joke.
I am french by the way and know how a sourdough bread should be.
Eventually she agreed to change with an attitude.
Friendly, quiet, and delicious.

Poor food. Spaghetti Bolognese with no topping - even a leaf of basil or even (shock) some parmesan.  Pasta was a little undercooked. Strange smell in the restaurant.  Need to make a bit more effort in the food dept., as well as general cleaning
Is not a Michelin restaurant, it's a place to eat if your kids don't want to leave the museum. For that, it's ok. Good enough.
Horrible food for horrible price. Never go there and rather take a sandwich with you. It was more expensive than Sushi in city center!

This is a good place to meetup and talk with friends. The food is so/so. Most of the condiments come from the franchise. If you’re looking for fresh nacho cheese for instance, this is not the place to go. I had a burger and it was good, however the meat isn’t salted or seasoned very much. However that could be expected as the Texas Longhorns in the USA are sub par if that.

Overall the service was good and we enjoyed the evening. My friend picked this place because he enjoys the 1kg steak.

We recently dined at Texas Longhorn and had a fantastic experience!
We ordered the Hot Fried Chicken Sandwich and the New York Cut Striploin, and both dishes were exceptionally tender and delicious!
The staff was friendly and attentive, adding to the overall enjoyable atmosphere. The restaurant also offers plenty of seating both inside and outside, making it a great spot for any occasion!
Highly recommended for a satisfying meal with great service!
Burger was not only overcooked but also burned. Fries were ok, but the fish was also overcooked.

A Texas Longhorn restaurant with a typical interior, just like all other longhorn restaurants, among many, longhorn skulls and cowboy hats. Great atmosphere, music selection and friendly customer service. Beer and burgers were perfect for the evening.

The atmosphere is very american, or the stereotypical of Texas, the food is a fusion of Mexican and American grill.I had bbq ribs and was craving for it, they have paper rolls at the table as they expect it to greasy

I like american food ,it’s filling and sits for you for awhile
the waitress was very social as they’re in America,will visit more to try other if food of the menu

The place a bit smaller than it appeared on photo but it’s ok. I had a new york cut. Even though the steak was somewhat thick but managed to cook just about right.
Great place for american-style steak.

Incredible food and friendly staff, what more do you need? Be sure to book ahead to avoid disappointment.

I've never been a big fan of steak, but Longhorn had me coming back for more! I think we went about 3 times in 2 weeks! Be sure to try the desserts if you visit, the cheesecake with ice cream was incredible!

Let me explain to you why this is best place to eat in Sweden.
1-freshest food is served here,
2-best ever polite man work here
3-fast and furious kitchen work
4-beause location is what makes this place cosy and close to people who live nearby
5-that apple tart with ice cream is to die for.
A few things have changed and they all for good. Prices are reasonable for the quality of food you receive. I don't mind paying more when good quality is served with a smile.

The food is great. That’s why it atleast got two stars. I would recommend take away because of the service and the cleanliness. The table I was seated at was full of salt. So I guess they don’t clean the tables that much. :/ I was seated so I could look between some kitchen appliances. However between the kitchen appliances there was full of dirt. I don’t know about cleaning in a restaurant, but I ain’t so happy about dirt floating in the air in a restaurant.
I ain’t coming back to this place but I will sure go to a Texas long horn restaurant again.

I love the steaks here the most. The grill is consistently good and the meat fresh, juicy and yummy.

The burgers, nachos, tuna steak, Caesar salad, coleslaw, baked potato and fries are also super tasty.

Drinks are tops here. Go for an Texas Amber, lager, margarita or jack and cola.

For desserts, the warm chocolate brownie topped with almonds and a scoop of vanilla ice cream is heavenly. Or just have the vanilla sundae that is just as good.

Great, friendly service. Totally great Texan ambiance for a meal with friends, family or cosy with a date.

Stumbled upon this place while heading to Omnipollo’s Kyrka. The service was fast and friendly. The food was really tasty and big enough for a late lunch.
4.4 easily. Highly recommended.
Ok tuna steak. Good garlic butter. Ok ceasar salad.  Accommodating and kind but forced service. It was us if he wanted to decide what I should choose.

The service and atmosphere of the place were fine, the food was very average.

I ordered the Ribs with Fries and Corn.  The corn was mushy, overdone.  The fries were good.  The ribs were a little chewy, the sauce a little too sweet.

I highly recommend Texas Longhorn. The staff is always very attentive, helpful and the food is delicious! Being from America and familiar with the chain, I’ll say this TLH in Sweden is better and definitely a step above the typical TLH in USA. This is a favorite spot of my fiancée and I when we’re in Sundbyberg and we’ll continue to go here in the future!
The steak was perfectly cooked as requested, with the right amount of charring the way I like it. No scrap, all edible. The sides were also good, even though I did not eat the corn on the cob.
Finally found a halal Japanese restaurant in Stockholm. The sushi is delicious! they have nine different maki varieties. Will definitely eat there again!

Great halal sushi, which is not easy to find. The service is always quick and very friendly, and they really make you feel welcome. Every time we visit, we get a small treat on the house, which is such a nice gesture.
The sushi tastes fresh and high quality. The atmosphere is cozy and relaxed, perfect for sitting, chatting, and enjoying food with friends.
Even though it’s far from us, it is always worth the trip. Best sushi I’ve ever had.

On Saturday, while in Stockholm, I was searching Google for a nearby sushi spot and came across Tezukuri Sushi. The reviews were promising, so I decided to give it a try.

The restaurant itself is nicely decorated and has a pleasant atmosphere. The owner, who also served us, was very polite and welcoming. After settling in, we took some time to look through the menu.

We decided to try some mixed sushi platters. The sushi wasn’t bad—it was decent overall. However, it was clear that this isn’t a 100% authentic Japanese restaurant, and the quality didn’t quite match that of other authentic sushi places I’ve been to.

Everything we tried was acceptable, and the prices were reasonable, so it’s a good option if you’re nearby. While it may not stand out as exceptional, it’s still a solid choice for a casual sushi meal.

Rating: 3.5/5

Lovely sushi platter, very tasty and fresh. The Manager was very accommodating ensuring the serving for take away would be beautiful for our party of 5. Excellent attention to client, very nice sushi variety and beautifully served for an esthetic alluring impression.

Many thanks for a wonderful dinner experience! I will most certainly repeat in the near future!

Great servise, tasty food.
We were a group of 7 adults and 4 kids.
Sushi were really huge!!
Miso soup, tea, water and coffee for free.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
If you’re craving authentic Thai food in Stockholm, Thai Korrupt is an absolute gem! 🌶️

The dishes are packed with rich flavors and perfectly balanced spices – truly a taste of Thailand right here in Sweden. We ordered the fried shrimp (so delicious that we forgot to even take photos 😋) along with other dishes, and every bite was outstanding.

What impressed me just as much as the food was the service. The staff were not only helpful but also genuinely polite and welcoming, making the entire experience even more enjoyable.

Although I’ve traveled to Thailand many times and tasted authentic Thai cuisine, I can confidently say the food here holds its own – flavorful, fresh, and made with real heart. Highly recommended if you want a memorable dining experience in Stockholm! 🙌

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Honestly obsessed with this place. Portions are HUGE (like, actual leftovers level), the flavors are spot-on Thai and totally transport you without the flight ✈️. The “fem små rätter” is a must-try—super tasty and such good value.
The staff are always friendly and quick, whether you’re eating in or grabbing take-away. Vibe is cozy, a little moody lighting, but that just makes it feel extra chill.
Price-wise it’s really fair—lunch deals are a steal, and even dinner is worth every krona. Bonus points for Thai beers on the menu 🍻.
If you’re craving authentic Thai comfort food in Sickla, this is the spot. 💯

I liked the Thai fish soup in red curry. Generous amounts of fish and felt authentic. Topped off with a large draft beer. In total 220:- which is reasonable. Will come back since their menu is vast and the people around seems to be regular.

Delicious food, and good customer service. We ordered fried fish. It was delicious. We didn’t wait for long to get the food.
The toilet was clean. One thing that could be improved is the lighting in the corner. As we sat in the corner, the lighting was not so good that we had to be a bit careful when eating the fish as we didn’t want to eat the fish bones. Other than that, it’s a nice restaurant. Love the fish.

Good food! Don't order take away! There is carelessness when you buy and pick it up. Poorly attached lids often make the whole bag messy and they give the wrong dishes has happened on several occasions. Check before you leave the restaurant.

I highly recommend anyone to pass by this Thai restaurant. The personal is super kind anytime I pass by. The food is also amazing, I think one of the best Thai fast food that I have tried in Stockholm. Perfectly spicy and salty. I recommend anyone to eat here, you will surely not regret 😊

Fantastic Thai restaurant! I ordered a pad Thai and my wife ordered a Penang curry. Both were extremely tasty and reminded us of Thailand! We will be back for more and they also have beer, which is perfect to wash down some amazing Thai food with. 5 stars!
Nothing special, but it is pretty cheap and they’re open for lunch. Not the highest quality Thai food, but typical for Stockholm Thai restaurants. Good for a quick bite if you’re in the area.

Pretty average, doesn't stand out from any point.
You can either get cheaper thai food for larger portion in the near by area, or same prices with better taste in the city.
I've eaten better pad thai, but it's really tasty. Good value for money

name: Thaiboat

googleReviews.text:
The food was really good, the drinks were great too, and I especially loved the starter they served.

However, the service was extremely disappointing and far below expectations. The staff was completely unwelcoming. My wife had planned a small birthday surprise for her friend , she brought a cake, and like any other restaurant in Sweden, we simply asked if they could keep it and bring it out once we were done with our meal. We weren’t asking for any special celebration or arrangement, just a simple gesture. To our surprise, they flatly refused, saying they “don’t have any policy for birthdays.” But I never saw it written anywhere in their menu etc.

On top of that, one of the waitresses was particularly rude. We were a group of four and politely asked if we could sit near the view. Another waitress was actually trying to help us, but an older one (I don’t know her name) gestured to stop her and said not to give us that table. We didn’t mind the refusal itself, but her attitude afterward was shockingly unprofessional. When we tried to ask her a few simple questions, she responded rudely, and her expression made it clear she didn’t want to deal with us.

This waitress seriously needs proper customer service training. Please ensure she doesn’t interact with customers directly until she improves, it truly spoiled what could have been a lovely dining experience.

By the way, I was speaking Swedish to her the whole time she’s clearly not a native Swede but I honestly don’t know what happened when I switched to English once; she suddenly flared up and became rude for no reason.
Wonder food. Pad Thai is great menu. So yummy and good taste. Believe me, we are thai. We miss Thai food. So we came here. Nice staff. Beautiful environment. River view is so nice.

Was highly recommended. Booked an igloo for a team dinner for 8 people on Thursday night. Choosing the igloo means you have to go with the set vegan/non vegmenu that is portioned for 2 people. So atleast two must share a vegan option. Thai menu was tasty, however several felt dishes on the sweeter side. The betel leaf starter was a good surprise. What could improve is the seating around the wide roundtable and not having to stretch and jostle dishes in the resolving platter.
The servers were polite but weren't able to answer about the dishes.
Worth a visit.

We had to wait some time to get in, but we loved the experience. It’s not cheap, but everyone was very happy with their food and drinks! The vegetables were fresh and had a bite, seasoning was well adjusted and some meals had some spice. The drinks were refreshing, not too sweet, and most of all: they tasted like we expected so there were no unwanted surprises.
Although it was busy, the waitress took her time to serve us and was very friendly. Also, we didn’t have to wait very long for our food.
Definitely a recommendation if you crave some Thai Vibes!

The theme is cool, really enjoyable atmosphere near the shore. Never seen a boat filled with sand to imitate a beach before. Definitely was amazed.

However, the service was awful. They first lost our reservation, then magically found it, then had us wait 10 minutes to find a table for our group, despite the reservation.

Took a millennium to serve the starters. Moreover, the waiters don’t know the menu. So if you want to be fancy and say “I’ll have no.66 or whatever” they’ll be confused and ask what the dish is. No idea what’s the point of assigning numbers then.

Really appreciate the artistic side of serving the dishes, though that’s probably the only reason the justifies the prices (well, and renting such a place).

The food wasn’t really worth the price. Price for quality is lacking. However, despite such a review, still recommend visiting once. Just for an experience.

googleEditorialSummary: Cocktails & Thai specialties served in an offbeat restaurant set on a boat along a custom beach.

googleReviews.text: Thailändska Tigern at T-Centralen is a great spot for flavorful Thai food right in the heart of Stockholm. The dishes are tasty and satisfying, and you really get a sense of authentic flavors. The only downside was the Tom Yum soup – while the taste was good, the lemongrass was a bit too hard and tough to chew. Other than that, the overall experience was enjoyable and worth a visit if you’re in the area.
The vibe is the same as in Thailand. If you miss Thailand and Thai food you should come here!!!!!

Authentic Thai food with Thai chef and team. Love the Thai music!! We ordered Tom yum soup, Pad See ew, Somtam Thai, Penang curry beef with Thai milk tea and Thai ice lemon tea. All are at good Thai standard. Happy with the experience and value price point. Would recommend to people who want Authentic Thai food.
Authentic Thai food in Stockholm city. Recommend! Been there so many times and Som Tam is thumb up.

Our best meal in Stockholm. We have eaten at restaurants all over Bangkok and Thai Tigern is as good as the best.  Very authentic and delicious. Green curry is perfect!  And everything is delicious. And great beer on tap. Our favorite restaurant now in Stockholm.
Wok med cashewnötter wasn’t bad, but it wasn’t good either. Sauce was too oily. Besides that, my order was completely messed up…got chicken instead of tofu and soft drink didn’t arrive at all.

Glad to say they seem to be back on their game. Have ordered a few times and everything went right and the food really is very good. Pad Thai and curries are our favorite. Hope everything stays like this :)

(Old review)
Was a loyal customer but have had 5 orders canceled without reason. So buyer beware. They are not cool

The wok part of the meal (sauce, vegetables & chicken) was good but some parts of the rice were colored and dry, as if it was leftovers that were reused. The beef springrolls were not bad but not good either, as they were a bit dry and not very tasty.

There was some mistakes with the order and I was made to pay for three dishes though I ordered only two. I pointed out right away when I saw the receipt. They corrected the order and promised to pay me back by swish. I gave my phone number  (I checked that it was right what they wrote down) and was told that they can only do it in the evening. Fine with that.

Now three days have passed and I only got it after I wrote to them this morning that I would file a case to konsumentverket. Their explanation is a receipt from a swish payment to a different person with different amount yesterday.

Yes I believe it might be a mistake but what is the business practice that they wouldn’t do it right away (as swish is so simple and instant)??

I also got wrong dishes: I ordered a noodle and and wok. What I got were two woks. Noticed it only when I have travelled far away by metro😂

Anyway I decided to change the original 1 to 3 just for my bad experience as I believe they didn't really mean anything bad.

Food is average, but the staff can be so incredibly ignorant. I was there 10min before they closed and was completely ignored. I said "pardon me, are you closed?" No response. All utilities and condiments were still standing on the counter, the manus were still up. If it's closed, tell me it's closed. They guy behind the counter didn't even look at me. I kept asking, no response. Then another person came out of the kitchen. This person neither looked at me or answered me either. They were standing 2 feet away from me and pretended I wasn't there. Service is important, treat your customers right. I'm taking my business elsewhere.

name: The Auld Dub

googleReviews.text:
If you’re looking for a slice of Ireland in the middle of Sweden, The Auld Dub is the place to go. It has that classic, authentic Irish pub feel with dark wood interiors, a cosy atmosphere, and a genuinely warm welcome.
The staff are incredibly friendly, and in true Irish fashion, we somehow discovered that one of the staff members has family from my own locality, such a small world and such an Irish thing to happen! It made the whole experience feel even more personal.
A good spot for a pint, great conversation, and that familiar feeling of home away from home. I didn't have any food so cant rate that. I’d highly recommend it to anyone visiting Stockholm.

A SOLID FIVE STARS! Between William’s terrific customer service & chefs creations, the Auld Dub should be on everyone’s shopping list when it comes to great food at fair pricing with exceptional customer service. We actually came back for a second time during our stay in Stockholm and enjoyed the nachos, the Chicken Burgee & the Wings, yet again great food and service!
A little pricy but a great English/Irish pub vibe in the middle of the city. They also stream a lot of fotball games.

The Auld Dub is just great, plain and simple.

A cozy slice of Ireland in the Heart of Stockholm – The Auld Dub!

Had a fantastic time at The Auld Dub. This place has all the charm you'd expect from a true Irish pub. We enjoyed a pint of Murphy’s and another of London Pride, both poured to perfection and served with that signature pub temperature.

The atmosphere was relaxed. It’s the kind of place where you can sit down, enjoy a great pint, and feel right at home. A must-visit for anyone craving an authentic pub vibe in Stockholm!

Called past last night for a few lagers and then decided to have some dinner. Ordered the ‘Bangers and Mash’. Tasty indeed main meals are approx 20USD each. The selection of food and drinks is decent. Staff were friendly and helpful and all spoke perfect English. Worth a visit if you’re in the area.

googleEditorialSummary: Jumping pub with an Irish theme & traditional dark-wood interior, with live music & TV sports.

googleReviews.text: The Bagel were very good. They are not like NYC Style bagel but they are very good and a big portion. The coffe was also very good. In the store the service was also very good. They were very friendly and you could have special orders without any problem. Overall a good place to have a good breakfast.

As an American living in Sweden, had to give this a shot!
The Tokyo bagel was pretty close to what I was looking for but it’s not your typical “breakfast” bagel that you can get back in states.. no greasy egg and cheese. still I’ll take it and will definitely come back! Coffee was good too.

American expat here. Are these authentic New York bagels? No. Are they the best bagels I’ve had in Stockholm? Yes.

The sandwiches are not hand-holdable: you have to use a knife and fork to eat them which is… odd. But they taste good and I appreciate the vegan menu. The price (150kr) is high but it is more food than you would think when you think “bagel.”

That said, I think I’d sooner pay 100kr for a more traditional bagel sandwich. I also HIGHLY suggest adding more variety (no sesame? No everything? No garlic?)
Super tasty, very fresh ingredients and a solid menu. Loved that they had several vegan options! Great service!

Food arrives in a minute or two - really quick service!

Would have expected more filling, for example bagel with turkey (Lyon 129 sek) and bagel with salmon-avocado (Tokyo, 145 sek) there were only few thin slices and mostly bread.

Only the one with chicken was big portion with lots of chicken and goat cheese (Monte Carlo, 149 sek) topped with handful of cashews.

Bread tho was moist with added lots of cream cheese.

There are plenty of places to sit and eat

Nice place for a beer.
I recommend booking a table if you are going to eat.
Super tasty wild boar with veggies and mashed potatoes, as well the pumpkin soup. Nice selection of beers, we’ve tried the Swedish brown ale tap one, creamy, close to a stout. Great service.

They have shifted the menu towards italian cuisine which might confuse one a bit.  Nevertheless the burger was great, though with a wee fleur of Italy (mozzarella and ruccola).
The beers and service are good.

The menu is really diverse here, best vegan bar food selection I've seen so far! The vegan fish and chips were amazing and the bartenders beer recommendation went really well with the food. Definitely my favorite place in stockholm :)
Really good vegan burger, upgrade from previous (that wasn't bad either). Also have vegan fish & chips (have not tried it). Friendly staff, calm environment early afternoon when they open.

Very interesting pub next to Stockholm's main station. They have many different beers to choose from. If the service is maybe not the best you could find, I must say that the Food was particularly good! Salmon with mash as well as the famous köttbullar were truly excellent! We did not expect to eat that well when we picked that place for a quick lunch after a long travel.

A great little gem in Stockholm, which we found cheaper than most places and Stockholm is quite expensive.  We had lunch here once and came here for a drink over three days.  It's a great place.  Just a note, cocktails are not served during lunch time.

This hamburger was delicious but the beer, even better.

We were so pleased to find this place still serving food when we arrived at our hotel nearby after 9pm. Was a really great welcome to Swedish style dishes, I loved my salmon with duchesse potatoes and my son had a really good chicken and roast vegetable dish. Staff were really friendly and the beer was good too.

The best pub I visited in Stockholm. The staff are very friendly, talkative and welcoming & the place has a great old pub vibe.  The beer selection is really good as they also have many imported beers, specifically from Belgium. Location wise it's in the middle of the city center, definitely recommend going there!

This pub has a good environment and professional stuff. The bartender can keep the conversation going and can advise you a perfect beer for your today's mood. You can even test a little bit of beer to find exactly what you need. So you will feel special in this tavern. They used to have around 200 kinds of beers and a good food for a cheap price( if we compare the prices in the center of Stockholm). I would advise this place for a beer experience, meeting with friends or if you want to be alone and just to drink.
Pretty good craft beer selection, especially bottles and cans

I like it!
Toilets could be a bit cleaner but the cask beer is great!
Beautiful interior, good selection of beers and average prices for Stockholm city.
Amazing place to get your beer-fix. The bartender had great knowledge and was really attentive. There are many seats for both introverts and extroverts. Plenty of speciality beer.
Great bar, plenty of local and imported beers selection.  Food is also good.

Was having a few drinks in Soderholm, and stumbled accross this bar.
A decent little bar
Reasonable Prices
Out door seating

Cheapest beer in Stockholm
Great atmosphere and staff were brilliant
Highly recommended
I can't believe how cheap the drinks were at this bar! If you're looking for a budget-friendly bar with seriously good drinks, look no further than this spot.
You can't beat this pub on Södermalm. Good price and, this is Söder. 50% locals on normal days. Weekends, i guess AIK people who want to drink beer in a normal setting.

I suffer from a slight speech imediment and was stressed because I had to pack my luggare in a hurry. The bartender was very rude, would not hear me out(i was 100% sob er) and when I at asked for water at least he refused me even that. My friends all got their orders and waited outside but I had to leave. Worst treatment ever. I would not recommend!

name: The Churchill Arms

googleReviews.text: Best and the most authentic British pub I've ever been to outside of the Britain. Where in the world would you drink a cask ale and unfiltered Urquell on the same seating?

beer selection is quite large, the price is reasonable compared to other places in stockholm and the vibe of the pub is marvelous. although there is one thing i would improve, the jagermeister could be colder.
beautiful
One of the best pub in Stockholm. Everybody is kind and the place has an incredible atmosphere. 100% recommend the house beer.
The atmosphere and the service is what truly lifts this place above most other Pubs in Stockholm. It's familiar, cozy and the people who work there are great at their job.
Went here a few times during a week stay in Stockholm. Great service, great beer selection, and very cozy. My friends and I had a great time and I’d be back anytime I’m in the city and I’m close.

googleEditorialSummary: Burgers, fish 'n' chips & other classic bar food in a homey English pub featuring sidewalk tables.

googleReviews.text:
Lunch at The Deck – Hornsbergs Strand

I recently visited Restaurant The Deck for lunch, following my mother’s suggestion. The restaurant is beautifully located by the water at Hornsbergs Strand, and my first impression was very positive – the interior was stylish and inviting, and it felt truly relaxing to sit and eat with a waterfront view.

Lunch was priced at 155 SEK per person and included a salad buffet and bread. We tried three dishes from the lunch menu:

Fried fish with French fries
Chicken with mashed potatoes
Shrimp salad

Unfortunately, the food quality was mixed. The fried fish was overcooked and the French fries tasted like they had been made earlier – not fresh at all.

The chicken dish was okay, and the shrimp salad was actually quite good.
The salad buffet was on the basic side and didn’t offer much variety.

Service was alright – not exceptional, but nothing to complain about either.

Overall, The Deck has a lot of potential, especially considering its great location. It’s a lovely spot to enjoy a beer with friends by the water, but the kitchen would need to step up in quality for me to return for lunch again.

My girlfriend and I had an exceptionally chill Sunday afternoon experience here after going swimming nearby. Food was on point and served amazingly quickly. Burger was surprisingly juicy. Pasta was perfectly al dente and the sauce was adequate. Relaxed sun-soaked atmosphere with a fantastic view, especially if you get a table by the water. Friendly and accomodating staff that seem to enjoy their job. I expected to pay way more given the location. I rarely leave reviews online but I felt compelled by the shocking mismatch between the abysmal online rating (at least at the time of writing) and my exceptionally chill experience. If you're a die hard foodie coming here purely for the culinary experience expecting a Micheline steak I could understand disappointment - otherwise not at all. I will 100% come back.

Top food, top drinking, top service.... everything was amazing. The view is great.. you can eat, drink and watching amazing sea. We had an event and the dishes the chefs provided us were at "Michelin" level, and the service was incredible. Helpful staff, nice and smiling young people. Thank you for the beautiful experience, we will visit you again!
The location is great.  But some fried over priced food is really a drag on the experience.  A place for a drink. Avoid the food.

Went to and Art Party event here, it was more stressfull than relaxing because it was so loud and we could barely hear instructions. When the event was over the restaurant dimmed the lights on our part even though we wanted to hangout, order food and drinks. We left hungry to find another restaurant.

This pub prides itself with having many tables, which was exactly what me and my friends were looking for. We were quickly served and the food was tasty. The noise level was all right for being a pub.

New owners. Staff is incompetent and do not speak Swedish, they scam guests by taking orders and close right after. They now serve disgusting overpriced beer. Other than that the atmosphere is quite horrible and the place smells pretty bad.
Had fish & chips and sweedish meatballs plus 2 beers. Excellent food & service.  Very busy & loud, but good atmosphere.  Toilets a big let down, very dirty, need a thorough cleaning & refurbishment.

A very ordinary bar with extremely dirty toilets 🙈—I’d be embarrassed to even share a photo!

On the bright side, the starters and wine were quite decent.
Had a fantastic time at The Flying Horse in Stockholm. The food was delicious, and Christos made our experience even better with his amazing service. Highly recommend!

The food was great, I had the “American Diplomat” with chicken and the chicken was nicely seasoned and the amount that you get for the price is amazing! Was full with like 4 bites left lol. I love Jarritos so that was a plus but my absolute favorite part had to be the playlist they had on, it was straight up 2016 vibes along with a few 2010s classics (13:30 pm Thu 22). Great place!

A cozy spot with both indoor and outdoor seating. The service was fantastic – when our first choice wasn’t available, the staff went out of their way to prepare it for us after just a short wait. The Mac Daddy Mac & Cheese Burrito was absolutely delicious. A really enjoyable experience overall!

Unfortunately they didn’t have our first choice of the Mac and cheese burrito which was disappointing because that’s what we heard they were good at so we had to settle for a regular burrito. Honestly is was a decent burrito nothing special. The service was nice but the atmosphere could have been a bit more welcoming in the way the space and the lighting was. My boyfriend who was eating with me is from California and has had his fair share of really good burritos and believes the ratios were off and he thought it was just a load of ingredients chucked together rather than curated burrito where flavours complemented eachother. If you’re just looking for a wrap of some sort and don’t really take burritos as passionately as we do this was a more than decent experience but if you’re a burrito fanatic it wasn’t anything special

Enjoy a good burrito with your friend in this cozy restaurant. The restaurant offers decent burritos for a good price. The restaurant doesn’t have too much options but the ones that is there is brilliant. I took the Mac n cheese with pork burrito and I loved it.

We ordered The Mac Daddy with carnitas and were given gigantic burritos almost bursting at the seems. Managed to munch them down after an effort. Yum! Good and very rich flavor. Will come back to try the other ones.
We enjoyed our dinner after a day of sightseeing! The skagenrora was refreshing and the chocolate mousse was rich & satisfied this expert sweet tooth.

Nice place. Welcoming staff & flexible to adjust the dishes & accommodate needs.
Outdoor seating nicely decorated with flowers. Plenty of seatings inside & a fresh interior that’s warm & inviting.

Most dishes on the menu were vegetarian, some vegan or available as vegan options. Generous portions with lots of flavor. Well-made food that is served creatively & invitingly.
We all ordered the pulled jackfruit burger, in bun with chipotle majo, pickled red onion, coleslaw & sweet potato fries. It was lots of food on the plates & really delicious. The staff checked on us to make sure we were happy with everything & they were very friendly.

Nice atmosphere, delicious vegan & gluten-free food. Great range of plant based dishes. Definitely worth a visit.

Short answer:
yes- go here!

Longer answer:
For all of the times I’ve been to Stockholm I’m kind of kicking myself for not finding this sooner. You walk into what almost feels like a flower shop. Beautiful green space inside with tons of plants and flowers.

The staff is incredibly friendly with great recommendations, but let’s cut to the chase… the food.

I’m an omnivore, I eat everything. But this soy based kebab was everything I want in kebab. It was perfect in every sense, I was honestly quite surprised. When vegan food imitates meat it’s tricky to get it right, but these guys really crushed it. It was incredibly good and the chef was delightful and friendly.

Anytime I’m in the area again I will definitely come back!

Everything is plant based, pretty cool location 😎 Inside was very hot and small, the music was super stressful to me 👎🏼 Big portions but burger was difficult to eat and the salad on the side wasn’t really my style. Pretty expensive too but the lemonade was delicious and the staff very friendly! ☺️

Stopped by here for a late lunch/early dinner kinda meal just after they opened for the 2024 season. The location is lovely and the outdoor terrace is comfortable.
Most dishes on the new brunch menu were vegetarian, but some were also vegan or available in vegan options. I had the quessadilla and they were supremely tasty. Would certainly recommend. The brunch menu contains some solid dishes, but also some which I'd classify as side dishes, so it's worthwhile asking how big the portion is. I had no issues with mine.

I booked myself a table after viewing online.  And the food was even better than i thought it would be.  The hunter's cold cuts platter featured Moose salami, wild boar chorizo, reindeer salami, smoked bear sausage and gratinated melted swedish "granbark" cheese.
Safe to say it was wonderful, and i also was given a complimentary mulled wine which was perfect.
For my main i had the slow cooked roast reindeer, with mashed potatoes, creamy sauce, lingonberries and pickled cucumber.
It was the best reindeer i've had up till now, it just melts in your mouth like butter.

Which was followed by a luxurious lingonberry and caramel tart.
The service was excellent, as the staff were very knowledgeable.
The beers were excellent, all went well with my meal.  And the atmosphere just lulls you into a sense of relaxation.  The music is excellent and helps project a very laid back atmosphere, and the interior style just adds to that.

I highly recommend to anyone visiting stockholm and gamla stan.

So incredible. We had such a nice meal here. The goat cheese croquettes, to die for. The starter for two, amazing. We also had the chefs desserts, can’t believe how yummy! Staff were very friendly and very helpful with questions from the menu. I recommend booking a reservation and expect to stay at least 1.5-2 hours to fully enjoy your meal. 10/10 stars if if I could!!

Cosy restaurant in Gamla stan. Delicious sharing boards.  Mushroom soup to die for. Love the small plates menu.  Ideal when you want to try different dishes.  Lingonberry gin and tonic was  great too.

We had a wonderful family experience at this restaurant. The atmosphere was warm and welcoming, and the food was absolutely exquisite. The meats were spectacular, we ordered the slow cooked reindeer, wild boar meatballs, and the pork belly, and every dish was perfectly prepared and full of flavor. Highly recommended for a special meal with family!

Found this place on a cheaper eats listing. As a tourist the prices in Denmark are high in the first place but here the prices are also very high especially considering the size of the portions were small for the price.  The dark beer was creamy and smooth but outrageously expensive. Had the Taste of Sweden Appetizer in attached picture and a Taco. This covered all the Danish meats on the menu and we enjoyed all of them. The quantity did not fully cover our appetites but we couldn't justify more costs.   Service was friendly and nice but as time went by and more customers arrived it slowed significantly. Sat outside and it was very pleasant

Food was above expectations and the atmosphere is super nice! The 4-star service comes with below story:
The first waitress was a girl with glasses, she didn’t seem to like her job, we had a reservation, when we came there was an outdoor table available, we nicely asked if we could be seated there, she said no because her colleague needs it, fair enough, then my partner asked if she can fix us another table outdoor, she literally said ’there is nothing I can do’ with a cold face. Well then she placed us at a table outside the toilet - I mean, seriously? There are plenty of better tables still empty?
We sat down but my mood was already killed, however, another waitress came, and she is the reason why I would still give 4 stars after the experience with the first waitress. She arranged a table next to the window for us, and really made effort to explain to us about the food and her knowledge of the pairing wine, highly appreciated.

Great experience, super friendly staff, and the food tastes just like in France - maybe even better (I work in Paris, so I can say that with confidence 😉). A wonderful evening with delicious wines and fantastic dishes! Would come back anytime!

Great atmosphere - good for people watching - but I was disappointed by the food quality - I ordered a steak and asked for it to be medium cooked - it came blue / raw and when I asked for it to be cooked a bit better the waiter told me the steak quality was so poor that if they cook it more it will be too tough to eat! So that tells you a lot about the quality of food!!  He did offer to have it cooked more but I didn’t want a tough steak. For SEK 345 I expect a steak I can order medium cooked and enjoy!

The place has a good selection of food options that caters to all taste buds.

The plate was satisfying and really good taste.

The staff are friendly
Great place with good quality food. Stuff is friendly and very helpful, described everything that was not clear to us. Tartar was amazing by taste, oysters are fresh. No complaints at all

One of the best halal Pakistani food experiences in Stockholm. I ordered the chicken tikka masala with naan, and it was absolutely delicious—rich, creamy, and full of authentic flavor. The naan was fresh, soft, and perfect for dipping.
I also tried the biryani, and it truly stood out. The rice was aromatic, portions were generous, and the chicken was tender and well seasoned. You can tell the food is made with care and authenticity.
Highly recommended if you are craving proper halal food. Will definitely come back again.

One of the best halal food in Stockholm, we ordered Margherita Bianca Pizza, Ulvsunda Special Pizza, Linguine Ai Frutti di Mare,  Karachi Biryani and Sulemani Chai. All of them are tasty, but their pizza is authentic and exceptional, 4 of us like Margherita Bianca the best, followed by the Ulvsunda. The portion of Biryani is so generous, the chicken is flavorful and tender.  And don't forget to order their Chai, perfect for winter

What a hidden gem in Kungsholmen! We originally went out looking for a pasta restaurant, but as we walked by, the incredible aroma coming from The Kulture drew us inside and we are so grateful it did.

We ordered the Butter Chicken, the Chicken Tikka Pizza, and a refreshing Mint Margarita (non-alcoholic). Every single bite was outstanding. The pizza was perfection, the dough baked just right, the cheese in the perfect amount, and the toppings beautifully balanced so that nothing overpowered. All the flavors came together harmoniously, transporting us away in a burst of taste and imagination.

The Butter Chicken was simply a flavor explosion, far beyond what we had expected,  rich, layered, and unforgettable. Honestly, we weren’t ready for this flavor journey, but it was one of the best surprises of the evening. And the portions were generous, making the whole experience even more satisfying.

On top of the amazing food, the service was outstanding. Our waitress was incredibly kind, warm, and even helped us order with such patience and care. She truly made us feel welcome and taken care of.

And the Mint Margarita? Absolutely delicious, fresh, cooling, and the perfect complement to the meal.

This place truly delivers the perfect Pakistani-Italian fusion, with amazing flavors, big portions, and heartwarming service. A hidden gem indeed, we will definitely be back!

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Nice restaurant in the neighborhood with friendly service, delicious variety of Desi and Italian food! Prices are quite reasonable and portions are big. Just watch out for the seagulls if you’re sitting outside on a nice day. The chai was also a perfect after-meal drink to get!

Beautiful setting and great customer service. Biryani and shinwari chicken stole the lime light. Lovely and fresh naans were enjoyed by all. Portions are good too. I would suggest you order a portion first to see if you need more as restaurant's portion is advertised as for one but for us, it was a bit too much.

Pretty nice little place, but the service today for me was not good.  Bartender was friendly, but after getting my Guinness the waitress never came by for me to place a food order or to offer a refill.  So I missed a food opportunity.  The three staff were engaged in happy conversation.  Maybe it was just a fluke.  Give it a try, but keep your expectations reserved.
Tourist scam. €16 for a vodka dash and €10 pints. Meant to be live music on a Sunday but there’s a better chance of Saint Patrick walking in this Irish bar than a band.

Great live music and Irish pub! The house musician and talent booker, Brian, is particularly talented. Far better than many I've seen back in the UK!

Drinks are more expensive than other places though. Expect higher prices for similar drinks in O'connell's a few doors down.
Food looked good, but wasn't hungry to try.

Go with friends or on your own, you'll have a good time either way!

Came back to see Bligh Walter, a young and talented musician from Oz, playing to a packed bar! One to watch for as he knows how to work a crowd!

We just had a quick beer before our diner elsewhere but the place is the epitome of an english pub. Large screens with football matches, a big selection of beer and pub food. They also have a ground basement with extended seat room which was really cozy.

We saw that they also organize karaoke nights and pub quizzes, so there is a lot going on there during the day. Actually you could spend the whole day there.

After a not so great encounter at another restaurant we happened upon this place by chance... nicest place, great food, and beautiful atmosphere!!! Happy accidents are always the best!!!! Please give this local gem a try!!!

Beared bar tender was more interested in watching football on his phone.
We had gone the night before and while welcomed with no smiles but some service, the food was good. Returned tonight to an aggressive and rude bar tender. We had planned to eat here again but due to his attitude we were quick to drink our drinks and leave. World wide bar nuts are free but this so and so / venue wanted to charge S45. He was too rude to make eye contact, converse to us in any way like paying customers then threw the card machine at us when he decided to not eat and had to pay for the drinks. When confronted about how rude he is he pretended to not understand hahah. An absolute disgrace and embarrassment to this business. We went to Santorini up the road 5min walk for real food, great atmosphere and amazing food. This guy needs fired and if he is the owner, steer clear from supporting his hip pocket. He is an awful human.

Bartender with the beard (again) was extremely rude. Pissed off because I ordered 2 drinks while he wanted to watch a football game on his mobile phone!
We asked for a menu and after we decided not to eat there because of his attitude, he instantly threw the credit card machine on the table and told us to go elsewhere if we don’t like it here. And if we are not happy, we should not come here. We are the problem !!!

At first glance I feel like in a Irish pub, although more cozy, comfortable, good music playlist. Variety of cocktails and appetisers, I had the beef plater and a pasta carbonara. It was indeed great choice! The beef came exactly how I asked. Very decent amount for the price. I definitely was surprised by the excelent food and the impeccable service. Congratulations keep it up! I'll come back 5/5
Good AW prices and fast service. Comfortable chairs and not very loud place, so it is easy to speak with each other.

Bartender with the beard (please see attached) was really rude and aggressive towards us. A very calm Tuesday night with not too many people and he was shouting at us when trying to order two beers and a few nuts. I’d recommend you don’t spend any of your money in this place, he doesn’t deserve it!

Taste of the chiliburger and fries was good. Well done. The ”ryggbiff” was ok and as expected.

Took an hour to get the food from the time of ordering. The place needs to staff up the kitchen or be less optimistic when telling customers about the time.

Atmosphere was a little sloppy, looked ok when entering but the salad buffet and the tables need more attention.

The staff that were there was nice and did their best but seemed understaffed.

Only go here if u have too much time to kill…
Arrived in Stockholm tonight. Tired from a day traveling this little place was perfect.  Tacos were amazing and burger was juicy and tasty.  Staff really friendly.
Ordered a medium well, got well done. Ordered a nacho plate, no salsa, no meat, no guacamole.

The food itself was good, and initially the staff appeared friendly. However, our overall experience was extremely disappointing.

We were asked to show ID when ordering alcoholic drinks, which we fully understand. All of us were of legal age (over 21) and presented a valid Swiss government-issued ID, officially recognized within the Schengen area and by the Swedish authorities. Despite this, we were refused any alcoholic beverages.

This situation felt unfair and exclusionary and completely ruined the atmosphere of the evening. After this incident, the mood at the table changed, and we no longer felt welcome.

It is unfortunate that such an experience overshadowed what could have been an enjoyable dinner. Because of how this situation was handled, we cannot recommend this place.

Pub like, dark and cosy atmosphere with friendly staff. Great tasting burgers and chips. If you go between 3-6pm weekdays, you can order from the more limited but much cheaper "after work" menu. Even the regular menu is reasonably priced for at such a centrally located restaurant.
One of the cosiest Pubs & Restaurant in this part of Stockholm City! Great atmosphere! Great variety of beers and tasty and affordable dishes on the menu! Very friendly staff! Well worth a visit!
Friendly, cosy, little pub with great food.
Great place to drink something and hang out with friends.
Best Service, good Food and the music is very good. Best place after work. ☆☆☆☆☆
Cosy atmosphere, fresh, authentic and tasty food, attentive and cool personal, good choice of beers and cocktails

A pearl of the Hammarby Sjöstaden area. Officially an awarded sports bar, but definitely also a bistro worth visiting just for the food (the Fish n’ Chips and Moules are great). Superbly nice and regular staff who really know their craft beers.

It can be busy at times (especially during quiz nights or big matches), so making a reservation is not a bad idea if you’re heading here during the weekend. A place where locals gather alongside visitors. Friendly for both families and pets.

Was dying for a good ‘ol fish&chips, so I thought an English pub might do it.
They were okay, but I cannot stress how crucial it is to add VINEGAR on top. There’s no point otherwise. The dish completely lacked vinegar or any side vegetables.
My partner’s fish burger was good too, we ended up enjoying the food although it was far from the traditional British way of serving fish & chips.
-
The staff is very nice and accommodating, and the atmosphere quite lovely especially outside
Bea was an excellent hostess. She practically chose and recommended our menu for us and we can’t thank her enough. It’s a great place to hang out and spend quality time. Highly recommended, thank you
Amazing place to have a drink. Very good service by a lady maybe in the 30s from South America or Asia. When I go back to Sweden I will be back there for dates with friends and lovers.
Wonderful place! The food is constantly delicious and the people working there are friendly and helpful. The Picts Bar is our local and favorite spot since we moved here.
Amazing spot for food and drinks on the outskirts of Stockholm. It is a cozy atmosphere, with great service and an excellent menu.

Big and open space, perfect for lunch or maybe an after-work hangout. The lunch here is really good, and they offer a variety of menu options each day. There’s also a salad bar, and I like that juice and coffee are included. The atmosphere is great, and I appreciate that the restaurant offers all kinds of seating from regular tables to cozy couch areas. There’s also a second floor and nice outdoor seating
Great ambience, delicious food (that comes in generous portions), and fast service. Could not have had a better dinner experience ✨️

This is a brasserie with a fairly extensive menu. The choice is interesting and we are well received. The service is fast and the dishes present themselves well. It's still a brasserie, but a good one.
The only tasty thing in lunch was the lingonberry juice.

name: The Secret Garden

googleReviews.text: Had the best time here tonight. What an absolute vibe. Queer folk of all stripes, so many of us just having a ball with our nearest and dearest. Where else can you get Rasputin, Alors on danse, Gangnham Style, among all songs that sing to millenial hearts. Lots of love from these two Australians, we'll be sure to come back and let everyone know about the wholesome time to be had at The Secret Garden🌈

We stopped by on a Friday afternoon after exploring Gamla Stan. The place was mostly empty, but we enjoyed burgers and several drinks in the front seating area.
I'm sure the vibe at night is much different, during the day felt more like a calm gay café vs. a busy gay bar (which is fine with me).

Admittedly I had a very fun time for a bit, until I was suddenly pulled to the side by security and asked “how I was doing?”   I was a bit confused as to why I was being interrogated in this way but I didn’t want to be a problem so I was very cooperative. In the end I was pushed out, very rudely. Honestly it was a fun place to be until I was suddenly singled out for, still, unknown reasons. I don’t understand why I was asked to leave, but I definitely will not be back after being targeted on 12 Oct 2025. The first time in my life I have ever been targeted by a club, and I wish I could say it was worth it (aka I was doing something worth
the targeting). Alas, I was just on the floor with friends, and my assumption is they wanted to make space. Looking back, and after speaking with friends, it seems I was targeted for being North American. The female security guard made it very clear that she did not want me there, despite my respectful response and demeanor. I was shocked. Best of luck to them. I will NOT be recommending this space to any of my friends visiting Stockholm.

Disappointed Experience Despite Great Atmosphere
I came in ready to support what seemed like a fun, welcoming establishment—but unfortunately, I left disappointed. The bartender was not particularly friendly and seemed more focused on chatting with friends at a nearby table than attending to guests. Our dirty dishes were never cleared, so we ended up enjoying our drinks surrounded by clutter, which made the experience feel uninviting and a bit uncomfortable.

It’s really unfortunate, because the food was very good, the bar itself is charming, and the music created a nice vibe. With better service, this place could easily be a favorite.

I will say the bartender does treat his locals very well, not good to be a stranger  in this place.

Don't go to this place! When we had two drinks here (10 euros), we ended up paying 50 euros! We saw this on our bank account afterward. We went back to get our overpayment refunded, but it didn't work, and the bartender said they'd handle it online. I contacted them about ten times, but they kept making excuses. So, the money hasn't been refunded; they're scammers!

googleEditorialSummary: Upbeat gay bar with a lounge & outdoor seating, serving global mains & nibbles, plus veggie options.

googleReviews.text: The julbord was great. The sliders were delicious, the tacos scrumptious and the apple pie taco was to die for. Only critic was the mac n cheese which didn't really fit

I could only qualify what just happened as a religious experience. My friend and I settled on this restaurant for my last dinner in Stockholm, and oh wow. Weighting my words here, this was hands down the best fried chicken we ever had in our twenty-one years of living. My friend almost cried. I almost cried. The chicken was perfectly crispy and juicy, sauced to perfection, and the rest of the loaded fries complimented it very well. The tacos were amazing as well with just a touch of spice. We were drowning in birria, sauce and joy.
Had to sit there in meditative silence for ten honest minutes. This restaurant has officially ruined fried chicken to me for I fear nothing will ever come close. 10000/10, will haunt my dreams (and stomach) for years to come.

A nice find during our vacation ! The food was great, frozen maragarita too, nice music, I would recommend
Think about coming early or making a reservation as it is really packed !

In my mind I thought there'd be a bit more variety, but from what I had it was still good. The corn was delicious, the tacos are about as best as you could hope for in Stockholm, the margarita was just what I needed when it was hot out. It was busy when I got in as far as the outside, Sweden being a very cafe culture, they seem to fill out the patio before the bar. But the food did arrive fast enough. They even had hot sauce.
The best tacos in Stockholm. Everything was very tasty. The atmosphere in the establishment is pleasant and calm. We will definitely come back. Thank you🤩

We were wandering around Gamla Stan the very night we arrived in Stockholm and when we saw a very big sign advertising the so-called Fatöl for 39 kr, we knew this was *the* place to be.It was crowded but we still managed to find ourselves a table. The beer is really good and the selection of Swedish snacks is huge  ;)

We had a really nice couple of evenings here watching football (personal highlight: the Germany-Luxembourg match) while having our Fatöls. We now feel like regulars in this bar and will come back if we're ever in Stockholm again! Tack

This establishment exudes a vibrant energy, making it a memorable destination.  The menu offers a delightful selection of food and drinks to satisfy any palate.  The atmosphere is truly inviting and sets the stage for a pleasant experience.  It's the perfect place to unwind and enjoy the ambiance.  A visit is highly recommended for those seeking a lively and enjoyable outing.

Temple Bar sits in the heart of Stockholm’s Old Town, and what really makes it stand out is the setting. We grabbed a table outside and immediately understood why this place draws a steady crowd: the view is incredible. From our spot, we had a front-row seat to the bustling cobblestone streets, with tourists and locals weaving through the colorful historic buildings that make Gamla Stan so memorable. It’s a perfect people-watching perch, especially on a clear day.

We ordered a round of beers and a plate of chicken kebabs, which turned out to be a great pairing for the early evening vibe. The beers were crisp and well chosen, and the food was exactly what we needed — nothing overly fancy, just solid pub fare done right. Service was generally friendly, though it leaned more toward casual and hands-off than attentive, which fit the relaxed outdoor setting.

Overall, we had a really enjoyable time here. It’s not a five-star, once-in-a-lifetime experience, but it doesn’t try to be. Temple Bar is the kind of place where the atmosphere does half the work — and for that, it’s well worth a stop if you want a laid-back drink and snack in one of Stockholm’s most scenic neighborhoods.

Quick pit stop after walk arround. Grabbed a couple bears very reasonable price with a chit chat with elders on sunday afternoon. On corner table with a stunning view of bridge, river and riding trains
Nice bar, nice service. Fries were with a weird spice on it.
Good and expensive! It's really nice and well designed. But I prefer cozy cafes more.

I don’t know why this place has a very low rating!

My Shrimp Sandwich was very good, and so is my coffee. They serve Lavazza.

The waitresses are friendly.

The inside and outside seating areas are nice.

Recommended

There are a multitude of this cafes in Stockholm, somehow this one has better food than others.

They have their one green tea which was disappointing ( as a tea drinker who drinks and buys only organic ones) it did not taste like green tea at all.

Friendly service.

I'm an often guest as this Thelins branch is nearly the best one quality-wise and also spacious and clean. Sometimes personnel doesn't give receipts which is important to be scanned within 2 hrs for points collection. I came after one hour and they couldn't do a printout with reasoning too late for the system

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Thelins in Kungsholmen is the perfect spot for a cozy fika! ☕🍰 The ambiance is warm and inviting, making it a great place to relax and enjoy some delicious pastries and coffee. They have a fantastic selection of baked goods, from freshly made cinnamon buns to mouth-watering cakes. 🥐🍪 The coffee is top-notch, and the staff are always friendly and welcoming. Whether you're meeting friends or just looking for a quiet place to unwind, Thelins is a must-visit. I'll definitely be coming back! 🌟

Got a semla and a piece of princess cake for takeaway. The semla bun was on the dry side but both were very delicious. They packed the cakes very nicely.
The atmosphere was nice, a bit of chatter and ambient noise but nothing that stands too much out. I don’t have anything more to add because I didn’t sit and eat my desserts here.

One of the best cafes in Stockholm. The princess cake is just delicious. The coffee is lavazza and tastes superb. Always a great time here when in Stockholm. Definitely recommend it over other cafes in town. And the service is always amazing and super friendly. Thank you

We stop here one morning on way to explore Stockholm. I swear this is the cutest cafe. The service was quick and kind. This place was so close to our hotel, which made it hard to resist!

The pastries are absolutely delicious. The lox salad is so fresh and flavorful. This place was so close to our hotel that we would venture out every day for a sweet treat and a latte or hot cup of coffee.

It’s just a cute shop with delicious desserts.
Clean and upscale atmosphere with great customer service!

A clean and upscale cafe, with plenty options of sandwiches and bakeries. It's not far from the touristy vete-katten and I understand why many of "the local" fika here rather than the touristy neighbours. I will definitely visit this one again.
It was next to our hotel and vibes was so good that we couldn’t resist to sit. So cozy , with kind staff. We tried cappuccino and was awesome . The bar has option for refilling etc . Ideal space.

Near to Tram, Metro and Sundbyberg station makes it an ideal place for some good bakery break.. Right next to the Bus stop.. Quite a decent sized indoor place, can seat 25 to 30 anytime.. Coffee and beverages priced right.. Great options for Pastries and Cakes..

Interesting pastries and sandwiches, the one I tasted was good and the coffee was great to but something about it is impractical, some sandwiches fall apart and not many to go options

the interior design feels stale, I personally prefer coffee shops to be cozy,with warm colors(brown,orange,dark green) woody and cushy

Thelins is designed as a office,and much smaller than Iam used to

I go here sometimes because my sister likes it,I am more of a starbucks guy but I like thier pastries,sandwiches and friendly staff
Nice place to have fast breakfast

The coffee was good as well as the bun! One of the best buns that I’ve had in Stockholm. It was fluffy and delicious. The shea pudding was so so. The location of it is nice, in the heart of Sundbyberg with outside seating 👌🏻

Great seating! Indoors and outdoors!!! The pastries were just okay nothing spectacular.
Friendly staff!!! Great spot for a coffee :)

Best poke I've had in the world. Supreme quality. The kimchi exploded with unexpected flavour the salmon lovingly rolled with a delicate soy, the warm rice had the sweetness of an adoring rice wine, and the rubbery seaweed was just crunchingly so. The almost Mexican salmon mousse with a kick lifted it all unter the Linden trees. I had it with a perfect Riesling. .
Delicious hot chocolate and classic swedish pastries. Wonderful service and  a very nice view. Lovely spot!
Tasty high quality food , cozy, kids friendly place!

5-star strömming, 3-star bullar.
I must say I didn’t expect to find such good fried herring in a touristic cafe. The fish was cooked perfectly, with crispy out layers and tender fish meat inside. Each piece of the fish was cut open and multi herbs marination were placed inside, and it gave the dish very pleasant aroma together with butter.
The cardamom bun was a bit dry and “lagom”, not bad but nothing special.

Situated at "kungsträdgården" the Royal Garden. The metro station is T Centralen. The lemong meringue cake was really good and fresh. The caffe au lait coupe was smaller than what normally is in other places. I asked to have my caffe au lait on a te coupe (the te coupes were a little bigger), but the answer instead was that i could have my caffe in a papper coupe. My daughter wanted to have a vegetarian sandwich and asked if we could buy a croissant with nothing in it (which they had) and put some slices of 🧀 but this was not possible either. Consequently, we needed to buy root fruit chips to compensate. On the menu, they had only one "non alcoholic" coctail 🍸 but to our surprise, it was just a sort of lemonade from a bottle. This is not how a cocktail should be! The place is beautiful, situated, but the management needs to focus on more flexibility to give a better experience to the paying customers. The prices are very high. I totally  spend more than 500 sek around (50 usd)  in 4 coffee, 2  🍋 meringue cake. 1 chocolate cake, 1 lemonade, 1 chips.
Very kind girl working there, very delicious products but they dont display prices which i think they should
It was awesome
Gottis!
Lovely 😊
Ok.

name: Tjoget

googleReviews.text:
Great place!
The appetizers were very nice, especially the bread with creme cheese and the charcuterie board!
Totally recommend the cocktails here!

Service was impeccable! Only minor issue was a large group of customers that were standing around the tables chatting loudly, that was a bit distracting but nothing the staff could help with.
This place rocks, we love it when we have visitors in town! We enjoy their food (tapas style) and their drinks, great cocktail menu!

Such a superb vibe with the cocktails. It has a super lit vibe. It was ranked in top 100 list of cocktail bars. Have been many a times for drinks but never went for food coz never managed their booking. Now when I went, food was great too. Starters tapas was nice. I would have liked to get some bread as an extra. But otherwise overall very good

Referred to me by other bartenders, it certainly had some interesting cocktails on the menu. All delicious, it was hard to tell if they were busy or not. The inside was mostly empty, but the bartender was always making orders non-stop. It looks like I missed out on food, but I did enjoy the drinks. Close to a station, it's worth a stop by yo check out what they've done and can do.

Used to be an amazing place with the best cocktails in town. Today became a huge disappointment with completely plane and uninteresting cocktails, microscopic portions of food and generally as bad service as possible.
The lady poured water all across the phone of my friend and said nothing, amazing starter!
Otherwise we received as little attention as possible, and, honestly, an evening at any other place would be literally a bliss compared to the experience in this new unfamiliar to me Tjoget.

googleEditorialSummary: Hip eatery with a cafe & a wine bar serving Mediterranean-inspired dishes in an industrial ambiance.

googleReviews.text: Delicious, fresh, and flavorful ramen! We tried the Spicy Miso Ramen, the Shoyu Niku Ramen, and the gyozas; all were outstanding. The broth was rich and flavorful, and the meat was cooked to perfection. Each bowl was well-balanced, with all the ingredients complementing each other beautifully. A fantastic ramen experience!

This spot serves a bowl of ramen that’s clearly localised for Swedish tastes while still keeping a touch of that classic Asian ramen feel. The broth leans on the saltier side—likely part of the local flavour profile—but still comforting. The chashu comes in generous, thick slices, though it could use a bit more depth in seasoning. Noodles are cooked perfectly with a satisfying bite. We also tried the gyoza, which turned out to be a pleasant surprise—so good that we ended up ordering a second round.

The staffs are very friendly 👍🏻

One thing for sure. TOKYO RAMEN 🍜 is better than WEIDAO (not worth at WeiDao)

We ordered:
- Tonkatsu Ramen
- Spicy Miso Ramen
- Gyoza

I came to this place driven by the many good reviews. I wanted to love the Niku ramen, but I found it underwhelming. I am used to Japanese ramen (in Japan), but I wasn’t expecting it there. I was rather wishing for enough of an Asian influence in the broth like in other places where I had Niku udon, but sadly, I didn’t really sense it. It was very salty, on the other hand.
Ramen were al dente, which is good - and the pickled onions were what made it interesting.
Had it had a slight twist - such as with yuzu, it would have tasted better.
The meat - I was rather expecting it thin sliced. The more I was eating my niku, the more I wondered if I should have gotten the Tonkatsu instead.
I didn’t want to leave with disappointment, so I got the gyoza - which I enjoyed way more. The sauce was good - the filling was rather compact - and kinda “isolated” from the meat.
In the evening, especially around 6pm, it gets really crowded - however, the noise doesn’t prevent from speaking and understanding other people talking.
Final bonus for the staff (smiley and polite) and the service (very efficient).
