The best ramen you can get in Stockholm (at least :) is Tokyo Ramen.
Simple delicios. Very friendly stuff and genuine Asian taste. Sodas are also the best, matching with the ramen.

We ordered the Tonkotsu ramen and it was really tasty. The meat was cooked perfectly and the broth was full of flavor. They also let you swap the protein or remove/add ingredients. The staff were super friendly, and the prices were very reasonable for Stockholm. Overall, a great experience :)

Looks like your regular Stockholm sushi joint, but actually has an above average selection of vegan options. I tried the bibimbap and liked it. Good portion for the price. I'll certainly come back to try the other vegan dishes.
Amazing sushi place in the entire Stockholm. Forget the sushi chain in town and try the sushi here.
Good decent poke bowl.
small ant on the  tempura rolls dish and the servitor does not accept to help, I am really sad for bad service and very expensive cost of the food.
Spicy tuna was great, very tasty and fresh! I would go to this place again.

Incredibly good ramen. We had the Spicy Miso and the Tori Paitan, both with pork and they were both delicious!! Noodles cooked perfectly, the eggs too, and you can taste the fresh ingredients. Flavor was very rich. Cozy to sit by the window if you can!
Cozy ramen spot in the heart of Stockholm. The ramen was really good and especially the chicken in it. We tried the spicy miso and the Tori Paitan. I recommend both! The staff was really friendly!

I must say that I had a very unpleasant dining experience. One of the staff members, who was of smaller stature, showed what I believe to be a significant difference in attitude when serving guests. I don't understand why this happened, as I believe every customer should be treated equally.
Because of this, my mood during the meal was affected, and even though the food itself was good, it didn't taste as enjoyable as it should have. I sincerely hope that the restaurant will review this issue and ensure that all staff provide the same quality of service to every guest.

Hearty bowls of ramen with the right consistency and rich broth packed with umami. Perfect soft-boiled egg with slightly runny yolk. Additional star for the thick chili sauce/oil.

The bun was not disappointing either! Great moist bun with well-seasoned pork and nicely pickled red onion.

Will definitely come back.

We both loved our ramen. I agree with over reviewers that the cold vegetables and cold egg was strange. The flavor was there in everything but it’s a shock every time to bite into something cold in your warm soup. Loved the pork and it was a perfect portion

What an excellent choice! Swedish-Mexican fusion with great quality products and incredible tastes! Also excellent cocktails and amazing coconut ice-cream for desert!

Beautiful place, warm atmosphere and nice and familiar service!

Very strongly recommended
Great view of the water. The vegetarian food was very tasty, beautifully presented, and served quickly. The place was lovely and calm.
Had julbord here and it wasn't a buffet, therefore i didn't feel stuffed at the end. Between each course it took a long time but that's the only minus. I really enjoyed the food !
Good food made with attention to detail. Service-minded staff. The restaurant has a lovely ambiance. A bit pricy but the romantic/candle-lit atmosphere is worth it.

I wholeheartedly recommend this place.

The food was colourful, wholesome and classy - it is exciting here. Complimentary bread is very good.

The view one gets of the harbour is gorgeous. Service was first class.

And the history of the building is fascinating. Such a wonderful birthday treat.
The food is aleays perfectly prepared. The staff is always friendly and professional. They get my orders right. Calm place, though it is sometimes crowded during the lunch rush.
Tasty food. Lunch menu includes complementary soupe ,salad & soft drink.

They have opening hours to 9 p.m. in working days but they are actually closed even at 08.30 p.m.
Very unprofessional to clients
A very good restaurant, the food was very tasty.

Touch of Bombay is an adequate lunch spot.  You get a lot of food for the price. Everything is hot, like really hot and spicy. I enjoy this place, but the atmosphere is kind of a dive. In my book it's just okay.

This is one of the best restaurants I’ve ever been to. The food is absolutely amazing, and the service is truly top-notch. They have, by far, the best chocolate fondue I’ve ever had.

It’s a family-owned restaurant, and you can really feel the personal touch. The owner designed the décor himself, featuring photos of his homeland in Italy and his family, which gives the place a warm, authentic atmosphere.

Me and my girlfriend went here for a dinner after some pool in the city looked like a cute and good Italian place, wrong, food was medeocre at best. After we got or food we where still missing a item, the potatoes i asked the server where they where and they had been forgotten in our simple order of 3 items.
Hurray the potatoes are here only we have already finished our food and we still had to pay full price for everything would not recommend.

Nice and cosy little Italian restaurant in lovely Vasastan. After leaving the other nearby restaurant disappointed - we’re totally ignored so we left - we were warmly welcomed to this place. Nice meat, good pasta and excellent service!
Such nice food and coolest owner and staff! Thank you for your hospitality 🫶 Calm street, awesome outdoor serving 💯 Grazie mille 🤌

Genuine Italian food.
Pesto is amazing , so fresh and must try it with the Buratta.

Tiramisu is a must.
Staff and service and really wonderful.

We planned to eat here, arriving straight from the airport 10 minutes before 9pm and they would not seat us. We were only 2, myself and pregnant wife, and offered to just order pizza so it was easy. But they would not seat us, telling us they close the kitchen at 9pm; and it wasn’t even 9pm yet.
Did not expect to find such a good pizza in this small town close to Stockholm. Amazing dough and good overall quality.
Great food and wonderful service. Tasteful and elegant. By far the best pizza and pasta on Lidingö!

So I eat a LOT of pizza... I'm no pizza expert, I just genuinely love pizza. Anyway that's just to say that of all the pizza I've ever had this place is top 3 for sure and honestly in recent memory the #1 pizza for me. I visit this place on average every other week during the fall and winter but I crave it... almost every day. The gorgonzola is AMAZING and I recommend it if you like gorgonzola. Otherwise I've tried the salsiccia (sausage) and that's my # 2 go-to pizza at this place. I've only tried non pizza things from the menu one other time and it was alright... nothing for me to mention tho so I'd stick with getting pizza here. Please do yourself a favor and go!

As for atmosphere, there's a great outdoor space in front of the restaurant- very chill and easy going. The inside gives this warm cozy feeling... dark woods, candles... you can probably imagine. All very nice. The only thing I wish is that it were closer to me... it is on Lidingö so it's not the easiest place to get to but you still not regret it... EVER!
Excellent pizza. I tried the Gorgonzola, which sets you back 154 SEK. Great service: they ask many times if everything is ok. Restaurant is really cozy. Recommend!

Such a nice little bar, warm great staff great food.
Staff were super helpful to non Swedish speaking customers like myself.
I felt so comfortable I went in twice!  Had the biggest Calzone ever.
Nice food

We tried there on Friday during happy hours and couldn't get a spot. It was too crowded.
We went again after happy hours and got the spot but by seeing the crowd worried about virus  😄. so simply ordered Vegetarian 🍕 to eat and leave quickly.
It is very tasty and I would definitely recommend this place for pizza lovers
A good place to spend a friday or a saturday night. We ordered ribeye steak and it was great. There was live music as well which made the experience even better. Good booze and atmosphere.

Nice little local  pub in the center of Sundbyberg i have visited a few times as i work in Sundbyberg.
Just nice to sit with a few mates
But they must improve their draft beer i had a Krusovich i drunk half and was totally flat and an IPA which was the same
I will have a bottle next time
Oh
The food is,nt to bad pub menu and good price

name: Tre Indier

googleReviews.text: THE best indian food in stockholm! the chicken korma and naan is magical
quick & friendly service, and most importantly really good food. had paneer with spinach (veggie) and it was DELICIOUS
Tasty food, good service, nice staff you would love it. Recommended restaurant,++++
Great if you like spicy food. Good prices, my favorite Indian restaurant.

Service was friendly and attentive the menu is extensive. We're not India food experts but we did live in India for a year...wait, I guess we are Indian food experts, and the dishes here were fantastic, some of the best we've tried outside India. We had Chicken Tikka Kashmiri and Palak Paneer, both were outstanding.

googleEditorialSummary: Indian eatery dishing up a menu of classic options from baltis to biryanis, plus sidewalk tables.

name: Tre Santi

googleReviews.text: Great spot with tasty pasta dishes! Lovely staff that is attentive in the right way - let us catch up with old friends, but we never had to get their attention! The ambiance is upscale but not stuffy, perfect for a dinner with couples (or family)!

What a nice classic Italian restaurant! They had English menu's. Staff was Italian and very friendly. They sang and hummed aling with the Italian songs. Especially Angelo took very good care of us. Food was wholesome and good. On a tuesday night is was quite busy. Good sign don't you think? Highly recommended.

An authentic Italian restaurant with high quality of wine and food. We spent a wonderful dinner here celebrating my partner’s birthday. Very impressed by their wine cellar and selection while the appetizers, bigoli frutti di mare and lamb filet were equally excellent. Would definitely love to go back soon. Grazie mille!
Very nice Italian place with pleasant ambience. Really good place for celebration with family and friends.

Had a lovely experience, not common to be served by sympathetic waiters here in Sweden,  but it was the case here. Awesome service with an extensive wine menu. Dishes didn't impressed, deserts have standout instead. Overall a wonderful experience. Keep in mind the budget, check the pictures regarding  prices.

googleEditorialSummary: Homey restaurant serving Italian staples such as pasta, meat dishes, seafood & desserts, plus wine.

googleReviews.text:
Friendly and familiar atmosphere with great dishes. The owner was friendly and engaging, and helped us order some great dishes. The pasta was simple and flavourful, nothing complicated.

Enjoy my extremely red photos of the food.

I went to this restaurant for dinner for the first time after a suggestion. I don't have much to say, the service was impeccable!!! In general the food, the drinks, the atmosphere all perfect!!!! One of the best restaurants in the area! Highly recommend it!
Great food(ate the Gösfilé). Phenomenal coffe. Good service. Cosy atmosphere. Recommend.

Ate a vegan vegetable burger. The patty was too small and didn’t get any ranch or dressing or mayonaise or sauce in the burger. Only got regular salsa. They’ve could had had a better dipping sauce for the fries in my opinion. The fries were good and I liked that I got a little salad too in the meal. I liked the onion ring too🧡☺️ For making this mela better I’ve would of had another patty which is bigger with more protein, a good burger sauce inside the burger plus had hanged the dipping sauce.
Good food. Nice staff. Olfashioned pub(ish) interiors which is charming in some way. Pub where people from neighborhood hang lut for food and beer.

I always like a place that gives a frozen glass to the beer - wonderful! Gives that Latin vibe that one is looking for when going to a Mexican restaurant.

Clean, good food - tasty and fast service. Good portions! Nicely decorated and good music. Would definitely go back to try other dishes. Very reasonable prices. I went over a normal lunch budget a bit because of the beer, still totally worth it.

One word: Mmmm.

There was a small wait for the food, but it was absolutely worth it. The birria tacos were the best I had ever had in Sweden and truly made my visit to Stockholm worth it. I have been here a year or so ago, and the food just seems to be getting more and more delicious. I highly recommend if you are in the area for authentic and high quality food!

Very good food. Birria sauce  was rich but not overpowering. All the food was comforting and homely. Cocktails were phenomenal, pricey but phenomenal. Location is amazing close to the central underground station.

The TAK Rooftop Bar in Stockholm is an absolute must-visit for anyone looking to enjoy the city from above. The views are simply stunning — offering a breathtaking panorama of Stockholm’s skyline, especially at sunset when the whole city glows with warm colors.

The atmosphere is stylish yet relaxed, with a modern Scandinavian design that perfectly matches the vibrant energy of the place. The bar attracts both locals and visitors, creating a lively but welcoming vibe.

The drinks are excellent — creative cocktails crafted with care, a great selection of wines, and quality spirits. The staff are professional, friendly, and always ready to recommend something special from the menu.

Whether you come for an after-work drink, a night out with friends, or a romantic evening, TAK delivers an unforgettable experience. It combines top-notch service, amazing cocktails, and some of the best views in Stockholm.

Highly recommended for anyone who wants to enjoy the city in style!

The food was delicious but portions could be a bit more generous. We got a corridor seat and sadly the size of the table is too small for two people, but service was very nice.
I recommend the margaritas, of course, and the nacho plate, it has steak pieces in it!
Really good restaurant. The burgers are amazing, the service is rapid and the staff is really friendly. My favourite burger place in Stockholm!

We had been travelling all day and this is exactly what we needed: friendly staff and the food came out fast and was yummy. Very reasonable prices, especially for Stockholm. Only the beers are on the expensive side, but most of them are 500ml. Tourist friendly.

What on earth! Beer for under 50 kr? I'm a tourist and I'm shocked, this is my first beer in Sweden and I thought a beer would be over 125 kr.
Wouldn't surprise me if I'm back here tomorrow for food too.
Really nice server and spoke English which helps with tourists.
Nice cozy bar/restaurant. Nice friendly staff and nice atmosphere. The beer was just fine. Food menu looked awesome.
Ordered blue cheese burger, but there was just a little blue cheese dressing. Would have liked a slice of actual blue cheese on the burger. Other than that, it was all right.

name: Tudor Arms

googleReviews.text: Excellent British pub. Good food, nice service and a nice sortiment of beers. Prices are a bit steep but then again the pub is located in the posh part of Stockholm. So you inevitably end up paying for that. All in all, if it's within your budget the Tudor Arms i a nice place to grab a pint and something to eat.

A British bar in Stockholm, i didn‘t know it was a good idea.
Apparently they made the most fresh fish and chips i‘ve had because maybe in Stockholm u get better quality of fish.
It was amazing!
Nice local pub with good atmosphere, decent fish and chips but nothing special. Good alternatives with sauces!
Nice pub almost like a movie set. Good beer and even better Guinness. The BLT was a disappointment though. But we didnt go there for the food :) Cheers!!!

Fantastic little gem of a bar . Came across this bar by pure chance. Being English myself I felt very much at home here. Warm friendly service.Didnt get to try the food on this experience but the next time I visit stockholm I will definitely try. Definitely worth a visit 😊

googleEditorialSummary: British-themed pub delivering hearty fare & live TV sports within cozy spaces with mock-Tudor decor.

googleReviews.text:
🧈 𝑩𝒖𝒕𝒕𝒆𝒓 𝑭𝒓𝒊𝒆𝒅 𝑭𝒊𝒍𝒍𝒆𝒕 𝒐𝒇 𝑺𝒂𝒊𝒕𝒉𝒆 [125 𝑺𝑬𝑲] 🐟
wow…first thing I have to say is the presentation! honestly, it looked like a work of art— the attention to details & the plating was js impressive 😳👏

this dish is served w browned capers butter, celeriac puree, baked cabbage, horseradish & mashed potatoes! first time trying celeriac puree & it was smooth, creamy w a subtle earthy sweetness, balancing the richness of the butter sauce!! there were q a few components on the plate but each one of them was executed so well! the portion size was spr generous too— just look at how filled the plate was! 😮‍💨👌🏼

I was honestly expecting a small, delicate piece of fish (uk like fine-dining style 😭) but when it was served, I was pleasantly surprised! the fillet was perfectly cooked, tender & paired perfectly with the rich caper butter & creamy sides! everything tied rlly well tgt, such a satisfying & flavourful meal! my friends who got the other dishes such as the pork shank & bacon wrapped meatloaf also said that it was rlly good so ig safe to say it was all hits this time HEHEH truly impressed ngl…🤭✨
Amazing place! The atmosphere is so cool, the food is delicious… Literally the perfect place to hang out after work 🍻

I randomly picked this restaurant for lunch based on its 4-star rating from users on Google Reviews. The place is very big, I liked its design, and everything was very clean inside. I arrived around 1:30 p.m. on a Friday, and the place was pretty empty. Only one guy was working at the bar, and he eventually served me and brought my food.
From the menu, I picked the Swedish meatballs and a black tea. Unfortunately, they didn’t have a big selection of teas, so I just got a simple black tea, which was from some cheap, ordinary brand. My meatballs came out fast - about 8 minutes after I ordered. The dish included a few meatballs covered in gravy, mashed potatoes, pickles, and cranberries. The portion size was reasonable, but I wish they had added a bit more mashed potato. There was nothing extraordinary about the taste - everything was just good. Actually, the meatballs were slightly dry. It seemed like they were pre-cooked and just warmed up in the microwave. I got the same feeling about the mashed potatoes - they didn’t taste freshly made.
Prices at this restaurant are reasonable. I paid around $18 for my lunch.
Would I return to this place again? Probably not. Definitely not for the meatballs! Can I recommend this restaurant? Maybe, for a quick lunch if you’re looking for something decent that’s ready fast and don’t care if it’s not cooked like a master chef made it.

I had a wonderful experience at this establishment. The service was excellent, and the food was simply delicious. I highly recommend trying the Swedish meatballs if you are in Stockholm. Overall, I couldn't find a single fault with this amazing place.
Went here for the meatballs! Pretty great and filling!

I had a wonderful dinner with friends at Två små vin.
​The food was absolutely delicious—seriously some of the best I've had recently!
​Beyond the great cuisine, the atmosphere was so pleasant and quiet, making it ideal for conversation. Highly recommend this spot for a relaxed and flavorful evening out!

Delicious Smørrebrød right in Stockholm! They serve various kinds and you are tempted to taste through them. Service was very comforting and they made an effort to get the most possible space for us, since we visited with a baby (high chairs are available).
I'd deduct one star since the portions are rather small and you have to eat at least two to get full, so it gets pricy pretty fast!
Excellent smörrebröd, great tenative service, ask what snaps goes with what smörrebröd and take a 2cl snaps with each dish. 2 or 3 dishes is enough. Not cheap per say but worth it.

This is one of our favorite restaurants in Stockholm. Unfortunately the secret is out and now it is often crowded, but the food is excellent, though not cheap. The outdoor seating is great and necessary as inside is very small.

The place is great! Cozy and delicious food. I can recommend 3 pieces for 2 adults. Although l really recommend trying it, I want to share something that disappointed me. When we first arrived, the waiter said that there were no tables available - he asked if we had a reservation, but we did not. The place is really small, but it was not full. So as we exited, I got into their website to check if there were tables for later on that day. And there were 2 free tables 15 minutes away from that very moment! We booked, and waited out side. When we got back in, the waiter placed us in the very same table that was free 15 min ago. Really, he could not have checked his own booking system for drop-in guests?
Cozy cafe with an open atmosphere was perfect for a fika break. Rested on one of the many comfy couches while nursing the perfect cappuccino and even more delicious carrot cake.
Very nice breakfast set, free refills on coffee. My only slight complaint would be that the egg was cold. But the charming interior and cute coffee cups made up for that.
lovely cafe with cozy interiors. i enjoyed the chocolate cookies very much, definitely recommend. service was a bit slow, but it was ok. not very crowded in early morning. views are good too.

This was one of my favourite cafes while visiting Stockholm. Wonderful choice for fika. It is quaint with a cozy atmosphere. Elegant wooden interiors with enough windows for natural lighting. Spacious to accomodate small groups/solo diners. Known for their waffles & cakes. Laid back vibes & locals seem to frequent here. Welcoming friendly staff. Their bathroom is super clean with nice art decor. Bonus: a vintage piano sits in the back area, near the kitchen.

On an almost rainy Stockholm day I was looking for a place to lunch and since on both Trip Advisor  and Google reviews it was listed mostly as "fika place" I wasn't necessarily going in there, cause I wanted a place for lunch.
However, passing by I saw the outside board saying there was the vegetarian lunch buffet for sek 130 I think (?) So I decided to give it a try.
The interior was very inviting, old building with lots of space and plants and nice art. The food was good (coffee and water included in the lunch buffet, as it should be). When in Stockholm, i will definitely visit this place again :)

My new favorite place! Everything we tasted here was absolutely fantastic.

We tried the steak, calamari, tartare, vitello tonnato sandwich, and crème brûlée.

The steak with Café de Paris sauce is the best I’ve had in Stockholm, and it’s not overpriced. In this price range, I don’t think you can find a better steak. The sauce was just as impressive.

Crème brûlée? I don’t usually like crème brûlée, and I don’t eat it at all in Stockholm, even at fancy restaurants. But here, we actually considered ordering a second one. It was just that good—the best I’ve had in Stockholm.

I’ll definitely come back to try more of their sandwiches and other dishes. The chef here is the real deal.

We wanted to come for a while, we were hyped and we weren't disappointed a bit!
We came for the "Oyster Wednesday" and stayed for the rest.
The oysters and the cava were good, also at a good price.
We then tried the olives, the fried calamari, the mussels and the sandwich. Everything was tasty, original and extremely good. We loved this new discovery, can't wait to go back!

My husband and I had a lovely dinner at Ubu! Very nice Asian fusion tapas menu plus amazing sandwiches! Chinese sticky ribs and stir fried green beans were to die for! My mouth is watering just thinking about those 😋 I will definitely go back to try other sandwiches 🫶

Came here by the recommendation of a friend, the place has subway sandwiches or Hoagies and it might be the best Hogies in Stockholm, I love philly cheesesteak and the roast beef I had is rubbing shoulders with it
the place also has cocktail,will come back to try thier cocktail and update my review

I love bread, I love fried chicken, I love hot sauce. This is truly a masterpiece that combines my favorite mentioned ingredients + more into a perfect balanced Fried chicken sandwich. It’s art for the tummy that’s more than yummy🤰🏾It’s just above all expectations delicious. Definitely top 5 on my list (right now).  Looking forward to explore the menu further, see you soon Hoagies!

One of the most awesome beer places in the heart of Stockholm. I have tried some of the most amazing craft brews at this place.

1. Beers and food - absolutely amazing beers! Loved “daydreamer” the most. A must  go to place for craft beer lovers. They serve pizzas which were very different and really delicious.
2. Ambience - Small place but very quiet and tidy! Nice place to have chit chats and conversations.
Overall a nice place - totally recommended!

I think I have a new favourite hangout in Stockholm. A very laid back place run by a seasoned importer with a great portfolio. When I visited he had an airfreighted 3 Sons DIPA on the boars alongside as a solid list of beers from Finland’s latest shining star - Factory.

The place is chill and Martin for sure has a beer brain worth picking.

Should be a mandatory stop for anyone interested in unique craft. Look out for the Udda-rating on the board to guide you well off the beaten path.

This is REALLY great place for craft beer lover. You can find a nice selection of beer on taps, bottles, and cans. Many high ABV beers that are hard to find, pastry Imp stout or barleywine also available. The owners are really welcome and eager to help with beers. They also have theirown micro brewery that really lovely.  Definitely will be back again when I visit Stockholm.

A gem of a place to have an interesting beer or two. When I was there, they had beers from microbreweries all over Europe and a one beer from their own brewery.

They have limited but very good food options. I tried the Italian inspired tigelle. Their version is small circles with sweet or savory ingredients that are slightly grilled like panini. The goat cheese and pistachio was especially great.

If you’re in the neighborhood, it’s a unique and rewarding visit.

What a great, cosy little bar! You can do laundry there while having a drink and a snack - tasty craft brews and the snacks look good too! Friendly service and affordable :) thank you! A great business especially with the laundry for travellers, as self-operated laundry facilities aren't really a thing in Sweden.

Fantastic authentic meal for our last day in Sweden!

Great meatball dish, would definitely order it again. 10/10
We had some absolutely delicious meatballs. The service was exceptional and the atmosphere was lovely!
Amazing food & service. Visited in June right before the restaurant closed for the summer break. The owner was extremely friendly. Highly recommend!

One waiter, full restaurant, and I don't believe he could be slower. Also, not very friendly. We literally waited over an hour for our main dish.

Small and okay. That would be my opinion. But the 5 stars are still to be understood.
Small cosy restaurant close to rådhuset tbana. food was fresh and tasted good.

name: Ulla Winbladh

googleReviews.text: It offers a charming and authentic Swedish dining experience. Located in a cozy, traditional setting, the restaurant serves classic dishes made with fresh, high-quality ingredients. The atmosphere is warm and inviting, perfect for a relaxed meal whether with friends or family. The staff are attentive and friendly, adding to the overall pleasant experience. It’s a great place to enjoy genuine Swedish flavors in a comfortable, historic ambiance—highly recommended for those wanting a taste of local cuisine in Stockholm.

Absolutely godly tranditional Swedish meatballs, I almost didn't want to eat them because I knew the meal will be closer to an end. Fantastic service, we managed to be there when it was relatively quiet and the atmosphere the place provided was magical. 10/10, worth every krona.

We were recommended by a local to try this place and we are so grateful that he'd shared this gem with us. This place isn't just a restaurant, it's an institution. I believe this restaurant has been operating for quite sometime, serving locals and tourists.
From the moment we walked in to when we left, the FOH team presented themselves as professionals. The food was simply amazing. Possibly the best toast skagen we had.
The location itself was accessible. After your meal, you can visit one of many attractions on Djurgarden. If we'd ever visited Stockholm again, this will be our first stop. Thank you for your hospitality.

Welcome to Wärdshuset Ulla Winbladh, a Stockholm legend! This isn't just a restaurant; it's a beautifully preserved piece of Swedish history nestled on royal Djurgården, dating back to the 1897 World Fair.

Walking in feels like stepping into a cozy, elegant countryside inn (Wärdshuset), even though you're in the middle of the capital.

The food is the definition of Swedish classics perfected: think the most decadent Toast Skagen with löjrom, flawlessly prepared Biff Rydberg, and meatballs that taste exactly like the ones your Swedish grandmother *should* have made.

It's refined comfort food, served in a setting so charming, you expect a royal carriage to pull up outside (which, given the location, might actually happen!). Come for the tradition, the crackling atmosphere, and the guaranteed best version of *husmanskost* (home cooking) you will ever experience.

🙏🏻🕯👑☘️🇸🇪🕊✝️🇻🇦⭐️
Lovely dinner, the meatballs were a tad dry on the inside, but the mash and the gravy were amazing. The starters were wonderful. Recommend the toast skagen

googleEditorialSummary: Traditional, homestyle cuisine & wine are served in this laid-back restaurant with a patio.

name: Under Kastanjen

googleReviews.text: First dinner in Stockholm and the meatballs and mussels were fantastic. Family owned and great, friendly service. The two sons of the owners were the sweetest waiters and clearly want to make sure their guests are taken care of. Thanks for a wonderful meal!
Nice place with indoor and outdoor seating. Meatballs were nice in a delicious creamy sauce. Soup was delicious and full of ingredients. Steak was acceptable but would not order again.

This place was like finding an oasis in the desert! There are plenty of great spots to eat in Old Town, but this was amazing from the quiet corner to the beautiful tree right outside the café. Our lunch was delicious with plenty of options as well as the desserts! Service was fast and all the works were very friendly and polite. If you are in the area, I would highly recommend!

While waiting for a walking tour, my daughter and I went in for delicious hot chocolate. My daughter had the Chili-fried chicken and feta salad with warm Asian dressing. The atmosphere was warm and friendly. It was great to enter a local establishment where all the locals were eating. This is a great place to eat if you’re in the neighborhood. You won’t be disappointed!

We had a delicious meal here. A lovely local restaurant with genuinely friendly, helpful and accommodating staff. House wine was excellent too. Highly recommend for a non typical touristy place not far from the old town square.

googleEditorialSummary: Casual bakery & cafe serving homey, traditional Swedish dishes with house-baked breads & local beer.

googleReviews.text: This is some experience. Far from fine dining but a lot of atmosphere and energy with a live DJ delivering the music during dinner. We had a great evening starting with food and ending with drinks. The food is simple but well made with good flavors and quality produce. As well as being a restaurant the place also transcends into a bar area and a shop selling some of the produce which is used in kitchen. Many ordered the oysters which were sold at very reasonable prices. Great evening.

Urban Deli Sveavägen has a modern, industrial-chic setting and the cool, easy Stockholm energy where you can settle in without thinking too hard. The space is bright and stylish with warm light and a relaxing bar. The food was fresh, satisfying and healthy — smoked salmon, fruit, pastries, chia pudding, good coffee! It’s the kind of place where you can linger and ease into the day.

Simple menu with good food and a nice vibe for after works. Ordered a steak here and it was great. However, the fries were the saltiest I’ve ever eaten 🥵

Like someone poured an entire sack of salt into the batch.

Their cute shop is amazing, filled with very deli food.
We tried their oyster concept on a Friday, but we shouldn’t have ordered that much oyster. Been a bit much for us. In rest all cool! 🆒

This is a really nice shop. Lots of organic foods and drinks in the shop. Staff were friendly and spoke good English. We didn’t dine in the restaurant as it was full, so went to the bagel counter instead. There were a few choices of bagel and we had smoked salmon and cream cheese. It was way too full and really sickly from the cream cheese. Really didn’t enjoy it. The restaurant itself looked nice but from my experience of the bagels it wasn’t good. I wouldn’t recommended the bagel counter.

A very nice bakery with tasty pastries and good coffee. The interior is tasteful, and the Christmas decorations are really nice.
I’ll definitely visit again and try more of the food they offer.
It’s a cozy place. We had a Semla, coffee and tea. Vattenverket is beautifully decorated. It was quite busy but that was fine.

A most visit place when visiting Stockholm. The lunch was absolutely lovely - we got a grilled club sandwich and a smoked salmon salad. We finished of with a kardemomme bulla and a carrot cake. Simply a amazing bakery place. The atmosphere was also super nice. We seemed to be purposely mistaken in English at the counter when ordering with a bit of a rude behavior from the guy, but it should not keep anyone away, maybe we were unlucky.

A nice and charming building beside Kottlasjön lake. The place is really beautiful. Foods are great and the people are nice. People come here with casually dressed up clothes.
But I am disappointed by the recent renovation, they have thrown away the classical decor and cozy relaxing furniture. Now it looks like an every other ordinary cafe in the city. I know it was overly crowded and had to improve the situation but for the name of efficiency it lost the charm.

A nice place by the water at Lidingö. Great for lunch or a fika. The location can be reached by walking or car. ( or boat) Classic sallads, sandwiches and soups. Bread, cinnamon rolls and much more. Both outdoor seating and indoors. The place is also great if you need to host a private event.

This is one of those places I just keep coming back to.
Sometimes for a cozy dinner, sometimes for drinks with friends, sometimes just because I need a familiar place that feels good.

There’s a nice mix of energy and calm , great music and atmosphere in the bar area  and a more relaxed, quiet side if you’re in that mood.

Food’s always tasty same with cocktails and the people working here are genuinely nice and welcoming.

Simply the heart of Stockholm 🩵 Five stars always!
See you soon as it always  a reason to return👍🏻
Nice atmosphere and good-quality coffee. However, the cappuccino’s appearance and design were quite disappointing!!

Absolutely amazing! Location, service, atmosphere, and food were all amazing!

The waitress was very knowledgeable and very helpful! The restaurant was very beautiful and had amazing ambiance!

We all ordered Swedish meatballs as we were recommended them! Absolute amazing choice! The best Swedish meatballs I ever had!

Cocktails and wine were amazing too!

If you are in Stockholm city center, I highly recommend your visit this restaurant. Booking in advance is recommend!
William is an excellent waiter, the food is always great. We love the steak minute

A French restaurant that ticks all the boxes. Favour, fresh and fabulous. Usual French fare and local dishes on the menu. Look out for the daily weekday specials at lower price. We ordered cod and minute steak. Staff are attentive to your needs. Reasonable prices. Good seating size at the first level. Heated indoors against the winter cold.

name: Vete-Katten

googleReviews.text:
The shop is beautiful and very comfortable to sit in. It’s a great place to enjoy coffee, have work meetings, work, or read a book. The atmosphere inside is nice.

The coffee is decent. As for the shop’s famous Princess Cake, it looks great but is a bit too sweet for my taste. However, if you’re curious to try it, it’s still worth a visit.

This was one of the best bakeries we went to in Stockholm—so good that we went twice! The princess cake was delicious, and so were the kanelbulle (cinnamon buns) and the other pastries we tried. If you are looking for a relaxed breakfast where you can try Swedish pastries in a nice atmosphere, this is the place for you.

A wonderful place for coffee or breakfast in Stockholm. Vete-Katten on Kungsgatan has a beautiful 1900s coffee house atmosphere that immediately makes you feel comfortable and relaxed.

The service was friendly and well organized. You order at the counter and then take your breakfast to the table, which works smoothly and efficiently.

A very pleasant experience overall – definitely a café worth visiting if you enjoy classic ambience and a calm start to the day.

This was probably my favorite bakery during my trip to Stockholm. Although I went prior to close the selection was great and I highly enjoyed the different flavors. They offer mini cakes of their larger versions if you want to try a little bit of everything.

I was told that one cannot visit Sweden without experiencing good fika, and that Vete-Katten was the place to go to try authentic Swedish fika.

So of course, this is where we had to go to, and given how busy this cafe was, particularly with the locals, and how many people continued to stream in during our visit, clearly a lot of people agree.

We got the most traditional desserts, the Princess cake and the Budapest, and I also got the open-faced shrimp toast, as well as coffee.

The food was amazing. The cakes are made with fresh cream, and I appreciated how the sweetness of the fresh cream and marzipan in the Princess cake contrasted with the tartness of the berry compote. But I adored the Budapest and the nuttiness of the hazelnuts amidst the fresh cream. The shrimp toast comprised a generous portion of fresh shrimp cocktail, a whole boiled egg and vegetables on bread. It was delicious as well.

Coffee was definitely one of the better ones we’ve had here as well.

Service-wise, you queue to order at counter and collect your food and coffee when ready. But it’s fast and efficient and I really can’t complain.

This is definitely a place I would recommend for the quintessential Swedish fika experience.

googleEditorialSummary: Genteel, 1920s-style cafe for self-serve lunches & pastries, snacks, coffee & afternoon tea.

googleReviews.text:
Nice Vietnam Restaurant with authentic food (for Swedish standard). We ordered Pho and fresh shrimp roll with dipping sauce both are very tasty and the waiter was very generous in giving extra cilantro and lime.
Just perfect food for freezing Stockholm night.
The food was so delicious! Never had such good Pho before. Staff is very kind, too! Will definitely come back when I'm in Stockholm again.
Really nice Vietnamese food! We tried the rice with prawn, Bun Bo Hue & My Quang. Satisfied with them all. Totally recommend.

Authentic Vietnamese food, variety of traditional food. I ordered no.16 Saigon rice noodle roll with crispy pork. The food tastes good and it’s big portions to me. Friendly staff, good service and cozy vibe, warm and comfortable feeling in rainy day.
Highly recommended.

I love the food photo in menu which is really helpful.
Normal price in Stockholm city centre.
Outdoor seating and basement seating.

This was the best pho we've had in entire Sweden. And they were really large portions as well. The prices were quite reasonable, 190 SEK (2026) per pho. The service was fantastic. Will definitely go here again.
Really nice lunch and very friendly service. Thanks.
Great food, wonderful staff, lovely atmosphere. Food prices that you would expect for Ekerö, but the quality of ingredients is fantastic.
Fabulous!
Delicious food

Varying quality.

FOOD
The place is probably great but not for vegetarians.
Two weeks ago I gave the place top marks for good vegetarian options and friendly staff.

COFFEE
Don't come here to drink good coffee.
It was not a nice sight to be served a coffee with a thick layer of porous foam. As if someone bought an espresso machine but never learned to use it.

STAFF
I happened to be sitting and eating when the staff and one of the customers were talking badly about a person for about 10 minutes. Nothing I want to listen to. It seemed to reinforce each other's attitudes about "the damnedness of everything" - and it was raining!!!

A quaint bar with a grand name. The decor was simple and warm. A good range of drinks but a limited menu.
Don't let that discourage you because the food was delicious.
Prices were reasonable and the food quality was worth every bit.
Staff are attentive and know their products and are able to make suggestions should you be in any doubt.
Incredible price worthy.  The service 100%. Friendly calm atmosphere.  The locals favourite place.

We mostly ate here because it was late and this was the closest place that was open. But we were pleasantly surprised at the good food and service.  We wanted to try some traditional swedish food so we had the meatballs but also tried a calzone and a meat dish. The meals all came with a salad bar which was an added bonus.  We were very glad we stopped in!
Great music, friendly service and good (if slightly pricey) beer.

Absolutely brilliant atmosphere loved the  music, drinks and food(and the horn!).  All excellent. The staff were incredibly friendly with a big shout out to the Irish-English guy behind the bar (Ian?) the lovely lady from Bergen on the door and the horn blower!  Just one star missing because the person who runs the establishment and one other waiting staff could perhaps be a little more friendly. 😊

name: Villa Godthem

googleReviews.text:
Villa Godthem: A Five-Star Culinary Gem! 🍽️🌳🌟

Villa Godthem is an absolute five-star jewel of Stockholm dining, perfectly blending history, charm, and exquisite Swedish cuisine! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Located beautifully on Djurgården, this isn't just a restaurant; it's a piece of living history nestled in a picturesque, green setting.

This charming villa, with its classic architectural style, offers a refined yet cozy atmosphere, making it a favorite for both special occasions and a lovely day out. Patrons consistently praise its focus on traditional Swedish dishes, with a particular highlight often being their incredible renditions of classics like cured salmon, herring, and, famously, their high-quality *plankstek* (plank steak).

The experience is elevated by the beautiful surroundings and the attentive service. Sitting on their veranda or in one of the richly decorated rooms, you feel transported to a simpler, more elegant time, all while enjoying modern culinary perfection. The combination of its beautiful location, traditional menu, and historic ambiance makes it a truly unique find.

For its commitment to classic Swedish gastronomy, its stunning location on Djurgården, and its warm, five-star atmosphere, Villa Godthem is a must-visit dining destination.

🫂🙏🏻👑✝️🇸🇪☘️🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿💚⭐️

Beautiful classic interior, great service, and fantastic food. The “plankstek” was the best I’ve had. The price may be on the higher side, but feels justified given the quality of the food, service and surroundings. A really enjoyable experience. I’ll definitely be back.

Came here to try julbord last December. One of the few places open over Christmas. Great place to try traditional foods like herring and traditional Christmas dishes.

Huge variety for herring and salmon. We couldn’t even try one of each; there were too many! There were separate sections for cold cuts and vegetables as well. Cheeses were not very interesting.

Hot foods were too salty though, so I couldn’t really enjoy them. If they could cut down the salt level, I think it’d be tastier.

Huge variety of sweets too. Cakes were ok but we enjoyed the fruit pastilles more.

Great service. They have coat check counters and the restaurant runs warm so dress in layers. I  was too warm in my sweater dress.

Very pretty and fancy restaurant. Good place to hang out with family or friends and take your time for the buffet. Overall, good place to try traditional Swedish food.

Four of us adults went for the Julbord. The spread was extensive, and absolutely delicious. Lots of options in the cold and warm food options, also in desserts. There was a vegan / vegetarian section too. My personal favourites were the kantarell omlette and the kantarell stew - SUMPTUOUS would be an understatement. I had all the sill varieties twice, they were THAT good! The staff (Pu and his team) were helpful and resourceful. They took good care of us, and gave us wonderful recommendations in both food and drinks. Along with the Julbord they also had options to be brought to the table, but we were too full to have them 😁
Would definitely go back for next year’s Julbord, as well as to try out their regular fare.

I cannot possibly say enough about how great this restaurant is. Every time we visit Stockholm, my fiancé and entire family and I go and have a meal here. Not only is the service exceptional (they really make you feel welcome and wanted there), the food is expertly cooked. My fiancé was absolutely astounded by how great the Plankstek was- he says he's already ready to go back to Stockholm just so he can have it again! Desserts are all amazing too, and they have a great wine list (really great champagne options). We'll be back soon!

googleEditorialSummary: Swedish gourmet dining in a stylish, 19th-century wooden building with a garden & river views.

googleReviews.text:
We had an amazing dinner at Ristorante Villa Romana in Vasastan! The atmosphere was inviting and family-friendly, which was perfect for us with our 10-month-old toddler in tow. We started with the Burrata, which was creamy and delicious. The Pasta Pomodoro was fresh and full of flavor, and the risotto was simply outstanding—rich and perfectly cooked.

What impressed us most was the fast and attentive service. The staff was friendly and accommodating, making our experience even more enjoyable. Overall, it was a delightful dining experience, and we can't wait to come back! Highly recommend to anyone looking for great Italian food!

The best food I have had in Sweden. Came here for my mother’s birthday celebration and was pleasantly surprised by the high quality food. Enjoyed everything we ordered and the tiramisu was just the cherry on top. The food is so good we might consider coming back to Sweden just for this restaurant.

What an amazing dinner!
We got a table on a Saturday without reservation (no wait at all!). The chairs inside are soo comfy! The staff is very friendly and kind! The food was amazing! Def can recommend the ravioli Della nonna - so tasty!
The restaurant has a great atmosphere - don’t miss out on this gem!
The food was good. But this is more an American-Italian restaurant, not an italian restaurant. Our waiter was very nice and friendly, but the other guy at the counter not so much.

I really liked this place! It has quite intimate, poshy atmosphere, while keeping it cute and cozy with the music playlist they have.

The staff was very nice and helpful, very friendly.

Food was well priced, every meal featured really good ingredients and quite a lot of combinations very unique. We tried Cotto letta, pizza with mortadella and burrito and pasta. We very very pleased with the food and had wonderful time there.

A good lunch place. A lot crowded during lunches coz of nearby offices. They have a daily food selection in veg, meat and fish. Lunch is 155Kr. Food was nice with bread and also coffee and desserts in the end. You could try it for lunch sometime if you are around
I came here randomly. I liked that place actually. Cozy and workers are nice. All they speak English. Very nice, thank you.

I came early,actually 15 min before official service hours but they did thier best to accommodate me, I had beef with coleslaw and herb potatoes,the place was clean and open,tea/coffe and cookies are complimentary with standard lunch meal of 135, it’s a luncheon restaurant that serves mostly office workers in the area

An unexpectedly high quality lunch service, more or less, business lunch service for a price of a normal lunch. The staff were so service minded and professional. Dessert table was a great plus. Strongly recommended!
Definitely a luxury working lunch place with everything slightly higher quality than a normal lunch place. what is also good is that the price is quite fair.
Its a subway station transit point between Akala and Hijulsta known as Blue line. The decoration and art of this station looks interesting.

1975 metro station in suburb of Stockholm.
Enjoy longest escalators of 66 meters and vertical rise of 33 meters.
Nice clean station

Sweden's longest escalator. Art wise this is a truly intressting subway station. It's widely decorated and not just in one or two places like a lot of other stations. If you want to go art hoping in the Stockholm subway you should definitely add Västra Skogen to your list.
Sweden Longest Escalator, Subway Station Transit Point Between Akalla and Hijulsta known as Blue Line. Its decoration is very nice.

name: Wedholms fisk

googleReviews.text:
A super amazing experience at one of the best Swedish restaurants.

The menu is rich with options. We went with the fish. The plates came neatly prepared and the fusion of the taste was super. They also have amazing desserts and drinks.

Staff are super friendly and nice

Stopped by on my way to the Nordic Museum after seeing good Google reviews. A male waiter/manager greeted me with a question along the lines of, “What do you want here?” I replied, “I want to eat!” He seemed surprised :))
After that, everything was perfect: a beautiful lady waiter served my table. I enjoyed my late business lunch, with excellent food, good service and a refined atmosphere.

Our visit to Wedholms Fisk was centered around their excellent fish and seafood offerings. The menu is thoughtfully organized by the type of fish, featuring standout options like sole, turbot, scallops, and char. We started our evening with cocktails, which were expertly crafted, and appreciated the extensive wine list available by the glass or bottle.

The food quality was outstanding, although we noticed that some dishes could have been served hotter. It seemed that a few items were not served immediately after being finished, causing them to cool down a bit more than preferred.

Service was friendly but a bit of a challenge. The restaurant was fully booked, and it appeared that there were too few staff members for the large dining room. This resulted in a hectic atmosphere where the servers had very little time for guest interaction. Our interactions were limited to essential information exchanges. Sitting close to the kitchen pass, we felt the hurried pace more acutely, though guests further away might have had a different experience.

The restaurant itself is housed in an old building with high ceilings and a classic decor, complete with white tablecloths. This elegant setting contrasted with the rushed service, creating a somewhat disjointed experience.

Overall, Wedholms Fisk offers high-quality seafood in a charming, classic environment. With some improvements in service efficiency, it could truly match the sassy-classy style of the house.

The staff was very friendly and the food was to die for. The seating was a wee bit cramped but luckily it didn't start to get crowded until the end of our meal. Also, the staff was very knowledgeable about gluten-free and all but one of the dishes was available without gluten. Highly recommend!

I had the fish of my life at this restaurant, prepared perfectly on a charcoal grill. The turbot was grilled to perfection, with just the right softness, making it a truly memorable dish. While we had some side dishes, the fish was the highlight—a beautifully prepared piece.

The restaurant boasts an impressive wine selection from around the world and a broad menu that caters to vegetarians, though the focus is naturally on seafood. Unfortunately, oysters were unavailable during our visit.

The restaurant is fully wheelchair accessible, and the staff is excellent, speaking perfect English—one even seemed like they might be from the UK. The atmosphere is vibrant, especially on crowded nights, making it a great place to enjoy a lively evening. I highly recommend trying this restaurant; the food is outstanding, and the experience is equally enjoyable.

googleEditorialSummary: Elegant restaurant, open since 1985, with Swedish art on the walls & an upscale seafood menu.

name: Weidao

googleReviews.text:
We didn't book but we had a table quickly
A big variety of Asian food - Chinese, japanese, Korea, Thai etc
Fast and good service with kind and polite waiters
Cosy restaurant and the staff were polite.  Food wise, there are some hits and misses.  Pad Thai, Crispy Chicken and Satay were good but the Ramen was a complete miss.

A really good spot for Thai and pan Asian dishes. The curries are full of flavor and the overall menu has a nice balance of spice and freshness. The coconut ice cream is a highlight, creamy and refreshing and a perfect finish to the meal. Friendly service and a relaxed atmosphere make it an easy place to enjoy a good dinner in Stockholm.
Taste good but a bit salty. We ordered Korean rice, curry shrimps and sichuan boil fish but all were not spicy enough.

A must-try for Indonesian tourists visiting Stockholm..!

Recommended menu: fried kwetiau (flat rice noodles) and beef ramen 👍👍👍

googleEditorialSummary: Relaxed eatery offering a homemade, locally sourced Asian menu & a take-out option.

googleReviews.text: I was searching for a place to have lunch after a conference and bumped into this lovely café. I had a very tasty vegetable stew with chickpeas in fair price. Friendly staff. The decoration is alternative but yet cozy, which stands out in the Stockholm scene which is often a bit generic.  Highly recommended,  will definitely go again!

This cafe has this quiet atmosphere you can get with nice interior, hushed music and no laptop policy.
But this pleasant first impression is easily ruined by dirty tables, burned coffee and personnel who will gossip about you while making this horrid coffee.

One of the coziest places I've found in Stockholm so far! 😍 Great ambience and atmosphere, fantastic food and good prices! Absolute recommendation! 🥰

Been there at 11 during the week, so it was super quiet, don't know how busy it might be at other times.

Så mysigt
Very unique coffee house that you really want to sitt and have a cozy homey feeling
Very cozy place for breakfast. Looks small but they could accommodate our large group of 10 people together on a Sunday morning.

Bohemian-styled and rustic-feeling fika spot with all the classics. They also had an array of lunch options with soups, salads, and sandwiches, but we only came for coffee.

It was rather busy, so might be hard to find a seat.
Cutely decorated with a very charming vibe; the perfect place for a delicious lunch and a long, cozy fika. And it’s dog friendly!❤️

Cozy little cafe. Located in a very quiet part of town. Lot of seating inside and outside. The pastries are freshly made and come warm out of the oven. Good coffees and vegan options available. Super friendly staff.

Very nice place.
Perfect for cup of coffee ( latte is very good here) during your visit to Stockholm city centre.
Interior design is absolutely fantastic

I recently visited Wilmer Kaffebar and was absolutely delighted by the experience! The interior is both adorable and chic, creating a cozy yet stylish atmosphere that invites you to relax and enjoy your time. The service was outstanding—everyone was friendly and went out of their way to accommodate our needs. As for the food, it was simply excellent. I ordered the yogurt breakfast and paired it with an iced latte, both of which were delicious and beautifully presented.

Such a unique atmosphere​! We had a great time, came for a drink and to watch a soccer game, and were pleasantly surprised with the service, the small bites and the underground ambiance. Quite authentic cellar rooms (some kind of hidden giving this place a magical touch), suitable for small or large parties. Chicken wings and loaded fries were really good, and so was the beer (local IPAs and Pilsners, in addition to the usuals) and the specialty Gin (Gunpowder with Brazilian Pineapple, can't find that anywhere but probably here and Ireland!). Nice pub with a great vibe, highly recommended!

My 1st time in Stockholm in 2018 I stumbled accross this pub, Im back in Stockholm again so had to visit

It hasnt changed, old rustic feeling inside.

Great bar and I'll be back during my stay
Great beer selection and a lovely outside seating area. Good staff. What more can you ask for! Average price for Sweden. Lovely mosaic tables too!
Nice cold beer !! Cosy atmosphere.  So many spots to sit !

My experience at Wirströms Pub in Stockholm was absolutely fantastic! The ambiance of the place is simply captivating, especially the underground chambers which exude a medieval charm that is both fascinating and beautiful. The decor creates a unique and almost surreal atmosphere that truly sets the mood for an unforgettable evening.

We had the pleasure of trying two delightful IPA beers, each bursting with flavor, perfectly complemented by a serving of crispy fries. It was a culinary delight that exceeded our expectations. And celebrating "fika" in such an alternative setting added an extra layer of enjoyment to the experience.

The staff at Wirströms Pub were incredibly friendly and welcoming, making us feel right at home from the moment we walked in. Their attentiveness and warmth truly enhanced our visit and left us with lasting memories.

I can't recommend it enough – thank you for a wonderful evening!

name: Woodstockholm

googleReviews.text: Got to have the Korea menu on its final day. I’ll be thinking about (and craving) the mushroom broth, marinated drug eggs, tea and bergamot ice cream, ssam, kimchijeon, and crispy tofu for a long time! The staff is so kind and lovely, the music amazing (and on vinyl!), the atmosphere relaxed and intimate, and the drinks equally as good as the food. Such a wonderful place in Stockholm!

Small and cozy place for hanh out and taste something new. I recommend for people who are looking for new experiences. I had some tapas and wine on the bar counter, and it was enjoyable for a 1-1,5 hr meeting. More than that on tall bar chairs would have been rather uncomfortable. The music and atmosphere and the guys working there were very friendly and nice too.

Very interesting eating experience. Right off, we were impressed with our dinner. We had the 10 yr anniversary dinner which  we are talking about, mixes and concoctions that came together really well. Definitely 100% recommend it.

An experience. We went during their Korean exhibition and had the tasting menu which was incredible. The entire night was special and I would highly recommend. A chance to do a Stockholm classic while branching outside of Swedish food. Must go.

This restaurant is brilliant. Changing food themed around a story or history. Each course is carefully crafted to reflect the theme. The servers tell the story behind each course and these are illustrated in the decor of the venue and through the vinyl playing.
They do cater for gluten free and lactose free, but you will need to check between each course.

It's a small and cosy space so be prepared to get chatting to your neighbours.
Staff are so friendly and attentive.
Chef (×2) are magicians.

googleEditorialSummary: Stylish place offering seasonal, locally sourced meals & wine, plus veggie options & a tasting menu.

googleReviews.text:
First of all, the food is very good, and the service is friendly and helpful.
Yes, it might not look like a cozy and inviting place where you'd want to sit for half a day drinking beer, but the food is excellent.

Really delicious fusion food. It was hard to choose from the menu cause everthing look amazing. We had the Nepalese wok and Bali goreng and they were splendid! The dessert was yummy and the staff was very friendly. Looking forward to go back!!😍
Good food, great service. The prices are quite standard for Stockholm (so a bit on the pricey aide), but the portions were decent.

Ordered pad Thai with shrimp
It was tasty but I got sick the morning after vomiting all day.
had to drink soup only for 3 days after

Whats annoying is that the food was tasty but i cant have it again due to obvious food safety issues

This place just opened up again after renovations and a rebrand. Previously, it didn't look very inviting, but it certainly does now. It's clean, modern, and sleek. I stopped by the other day to order some food for take-away. Service was very friendly and the menu has just the right size. The portions are fairly big and there are plenty of options for vegans and vegetarians. Everything I got tasted very good and the total bill was entirely acceptable. Final verdict: Successful revamp. I like the new look and the food. I'll certainly come here again.

The boba tea is good and definitely worth trying. Unfortunately, the egg waffle was disappointing. I gave it a second chance because I thought the first time might have just been bad luck, but it was the same - very brown with a burnt aftertaste and lacking the crisp texture you’d expect. There might be an issue with the waffle iron. I’d recommend the drinks, but I’d skip the waffles.

If you are coming from the states you will be disappointed with this location. It's not like the ones in the US. In this location cold drinks are poured in cups that are technically for hot drinks. They were sold out of all their main drinks. About 20 of them. Check my picture. How are they even in business. They won't have the ingredients needed for another month or so. I ordered my cold drink with less ice but the young female didn't follow my request. Added more ice to fill the cup instead of adding more drink. Also the drink tasted a bit water down. Big disappointment!

Yi Fang Fruit Tea in Stockholm is a great spot for fruit tea lovers! Their drinks are fresh, flavorful, and made with quality ingredients. We especially loved the Mango Sago—it was perfectly balanced, creamy, and refreshing. The overall experience was delightful, and it’s definitely a must-visit for anyone craving a tasty and authentic fruit tea.

Very tasty! I've tried the green plum green tea, and a coconut milk drink advertised on their counter. Both are super delicious, and very sweet as their default. Great service and their staff are helpful

We tried Brown Sugar Milk Tea and Matcha Latte, and we are satisfied! I admit they have the best boba (tapioca pearl) compare to other bubble tea shop in Stockholm, but you may consider ask for less sweet if you are not a big fan of sweet. The matcha latte is good with a good price, recommend for those who like bitter matcha rather than sweet matcha. The staff is helpful and knowledgeable if you ask for ingredients.

Everything we’ve had here has been absolutely delicious! We’ve tried various rolls, sushi, dumplings, and fried chicken – and everything has been really tasty. We order from this place often. Each roll is also larger than the standard size, which is a nice bonus!
I asked for a sallad instead of rice and this is how they serve it, it soaked up in the meat sauce or soup, so disappointing. I don’t recommend anyone to order from here.
Best rolls to my pov, simple and tasty! I also tried noodles, highly recommended 😋 2 rolls on the photo were for 275 sek: lax and spicy tuna (take away order)

The best sushi to take away . Miso soup is a free compliment .
Sushi team is very nice and place looks cozy 🌸 highly recommend - taste and atmosphere are on the high level
Very fresh and good sushi!

Cool bar. The owner Ylias was super friendly, recommend some food, which was fantastic,  especially the meet which very tender. He personally finished it off with fresh Thyme.  Also good music, friendly vibe.

Took my parents here not once, but twice when they came to visit on holiday from Canada. 🇨🇦 The atmosphere is almost impossible to find in Stockholm - with great service by Ylias and his staff, great food and music, and fun drinks. 🎆It’s become a regular place of mine for me and my bf 🤩🫶
A place where you feel welcome. Friendly staff, delicious food, and good drinks. We look forward to seeing you again.

So kind and great prices! We were looking for somewhere to eat quite late at night and everywhere was closed, except here. Even though we were the only customers, there was a great atmosphere and the servers were very very kind to us! Would definitely recommend 🙂‍↕️

Bifteki was absolute fire!!!! So much flavor. Atmosphere I put 2 stars only because I have an unusual sensitivity to loud noise. For normal ppl is fine

Tack!
Food is tasty, staff is friendly and always attentive. Highly recommend to try in Stockholm for Italian food and we used as AMEX dinning option

We had such a wonderful experience at Zink Grill! The atmosphere is cozy and relaxed, and the food is absolutely delicious — it truly felt like dining in Italy. Mr. Haitham, was excellent and welcomed us warmly. My husband and I ordered the Cacio e Pepe, Penne Arrabbiata, and Arancini, and everything was so flavorful. We especially loved the tiramisu — the perfect sweet ending to our meal. Highly recommend
We were waiting quite a long time to be served but food was relatively quick once we'd ordered. We both opted for Lasagne Alla Zink, which was delicious but a bit cold in the centre.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Fantastic Experience at Zink Grill

Zink Grill offers excellent food, warm service, and a great atmosphere. Every dish is flavorful and well‑prepared, and the staff make you feel truly welcomed. It’s the perfect spot for a relaxed meal or a special night out. Highly recommended.

I was a bit apprehensive upon reading some negative reviews prior to our visit but our experience was just perfect! Our server was really nice, very attentive & looks like someone who likes her job. We ordered the Surf n Turf & it was fantastic. We were 2 but this dish could be shared by 3 persons. Would recommend this place!

Quite expensive, and unfortunately rather bad food. All the dishes we had on the table - be it the pasta, a soup, etc - were unbelievably salty.

Great for having a pint, but don’t get a main. (maybe the burger is alright?)

Absolutely terrible experience. We waited 55 minutes for our food (3ppl), while there was only one other party waiting for food. The food was dry and obviously not made a la minute, but was prefab. Salty and sad in every way. When I asked the waiter for our food, he said he didn't know where it was and made no effort to find out. The second time I asked, he said the food had been ready for more than five minutes but he couldn't find our table so he just left it at the bar. He wasn't rude, he just didn't care at all. The place has a nice location, but unfortunately it cannot compensate for the bad food.
Portions are big enough to satisfy anyone. Salads buffé included and very nice. Nice and quiet place, in very nice surroundings

We had the fish sandwich and pear with cheese for starters. Pasta and fish for mains. I was shocked how delicious everything was, way above what I expected! Very calm cozy atmosphere and super friendly staff as well.
Good and well-prepared food, usually have lunch when we are nearby. Salad and bread as well as coffee/tea are included. Dog friendly
I always order Adana because I love how it taste esp the bulgur. Now they have pizza and we love also how it taste. Highly recommended.

Absolutely love this place. The ezme is unreal; so good I came back two days in a row just for it. It’s a side dish that comes with the platters and is cooked and prepared for four hours, which really shows in the flavor. First visit I had the adana platter, second visit the kofta platter, and both were excellent. The staff is very friendly and welcoming, which made the experience even better. Fresh, flavorful, and worth every visit.
It was used to be good but in recent times they have significantly reduced the quality of their food. Adana kebab comes with less meat and bread is not good anymore. Not visiting it again.

Assuming lunch time rush, but food took very long to get prepared, I spent around 20 minutes waiting for my take away box. The food itself was nice, but mostly bulgur, it’d be nice to more vegetables and other things. Fine option outside of lunch hours, quite large portions.
The food is delicious and the portions are very filling

Love this restaurant! Fabulous food, served in the perfect location in the centre of the harbour. The waiting staff were very friendly too. Our second visit here and we’ll definitely come back when we’re in Stockholm again.

Had a delicious dinner here with stunning views of the water and Norrmalm. We had a reservation and sat outside on the deck, right on the water, which made the experience extra special.

The staff were very friendly and welcoming.
The place was quite busy, which explained the slower service, but thanks to the lovely atmosphere and beautiful surroundings, the wait didn’t bother us at all.

We ordered seafood pasta and meatballs — both dishes were very tasty, though we found the portions a bit on the smaller side. The drinks were fantastic and complemented the meal perfectly.

Overall, Ångbåtsbryggan is a wonderful spot to unwind, enjoy delicious food and drinks, and soak in the seaside vibe.

Top place to eat by the water! Nice vibe, nice music taste.

Asked for a table by the water, delightful.
Food was yummy!
Service, top!

Music was a bit too loud in the end though.
Its not your cute cozy intimate dinner.
Area and restaurant feels slightly snobbish, jfyi.

Amazing spot right by the water! We didn’t have a reservation but still got a table and had a fantastic dinner. The meat dishes were incredibly tasty, the service was warm and efficient, and the whole atmosphere felt relaxed yet special. Would definitely come back!
The view is beautiful, definitely recommend going to eat there around sunset. The food is delicious and the servers are extremely attentive.
The chonki cookies are out of this world. Try all the flavors but especially the chocolate with sea salt, 100/10!!!!

Review based only on pastries to-go:

Very tasty American-style chunky cookies (only baked on weekends) and pastries. The lady at the counter was very helpful and friendly. Can warmly recommend if you're in the area.

I bought Princess Tårta and cardamom bun from here. I loved princesstårta, the green marzipan layer was so authentic, milky cream filled and tasted like heaven. I would definitely buy from here again and I would totally recommend this place. Apart from the food, the place was quite occupied which says how good they are. The staff was so kind, She even put a tiny ribbon to the take away which really did make me feel like a princess 😁. It's a cute place.

Awesome place to hang out... Nice coffee and breads.. Sweets and biscuits are available too..staff are very kind  and patient while taking orders... No rest room though... Very close to ICA junction.. Ambience is calm and pleasant...4 tables to sit with social distance followed.. Have a good time... Cheers
Great treats and service! Especially love the cinnamon buns, Mazariner and the wienerbröd!
Super

This is an ordinary good old place for lunch. It is clean, service is nice, food compared with price very good . If you want to have quick and affordable lunch and you dont care where is restaurant placed you can eat here since everything is good. I recommend this restaurant with 8.5/10
Om du letar efter en bukafylla som heter duga, så har du kommit rätt, var mätt i 24 timmar efter mitt besök, gott var det också!
Large portions, good variety, a little greasy, okay side dish. Always cake with coffee

Hey here we have a real lunch restaurant, but better than most in today's Stockholm because here you feel that the food is cooked with feeling. Really good dishes, a taste experience that no one expects to get in such a simple place. Here you will be very, very positively surprised.
You get value for money.
Absolutely love this place! Been a few times for breakfast but was very surprised by how good the dinner was too, highly recommend.

77kr for a Coca-Cola and a cinnamon roll! A normal can of Coca-Cola costed me 33kr! Outrageous prices!
Still nice food though.

The food was so yummy, we shared three plates and they were all great! They have a very nice wine list, which I unfortunately couldn't enjoy, but my company approved it. Great service and a cosy inner yard where we really enjoyed our evening!

After 3 visits over the span of a year, I agree with many of the other reviewers: great place, very cozy and housed in a somewhat unique setting. The only thing to complain about would be sound levels when crowded as the premises could do with some sound-dampening. Tip to owner: since you have high ceilings, simply hang some colorful cloth up there and it will sufficiently dampen the echo-effect of the glass and granite walls. If you are looking for a nice coffee shop in Årsta that also has food (try the daily soup) this is the place to go.
Best place to chill, work, have a drink. Great staff, good beers, nice atmosphere, nice music. Best spot in Årsta!
Love everything about älskade traditioner...the food, the vibe. The blueberry pie was delicious...and the affogato with chocolate ice cream is fantastic

Classic bageri that seems has got through many years and famous among the locals in Södermalm. It has plenty options of breads, tart, buns, etc. The semla is standard, but good, not dry with generous amount of creams and almond cream. The latte is good. A bit tired furniture tho, but decent service.

Very nice vegan / plant-based Princess cake & friendly service! Looking forward to trying other cakes! :D
Raspberry cake which is also vegan is also nice! :)~

Order this vegan cake for my wife's birthday and she loves it until I'm not vegan, the cake is 10/10 super good and the attention forgets the name of the boy, but he was very kind when he attended me and I recommend the cake and it was top.

Chocolate cake was way too sweet, left it untouched after just one bite. Gigantic amount of tea water for a tea bag for roibos, which is largely unnecessary and diffuses the taste. Unpleasant smell of an old apartment on the second floor.

It was tasty, and good portions. But I don't understand their chili ratings. Both me and my wife found it less spicy than expected when we got our food.

Still, it tasted really good and I would probably come back if I'm in the area (hopefully they have two displays for ordering food by then)

Their noodles are stretchy and lovely. Long as well not like many Swedish places where they cut them short so Swedish people don't need to slurp. Their specialty are clearly the Chinese dishes. Ramen is ok but there are better ramen places if you are ramen fan. They serve food very fast during lunch rush!good price compared to restaurants in the area.

My husband read a recommendation of this restaurant on Reddit and we loved it. I come here often and always take DanDan Mian. Amazing dish, big portion, warm and filling, especially when it's cold outside. Also very inexpensive.
Thank you Åsö noodles, one of my favourite places in Stockholm!

I ordered tonkotsu ramen and dandan mian vegan for take away. It was really well wrapped and identified so I could easily know which is part of what. The food was very tasty as my kids really enjoyed the ramen. Also the food was delivered to my place very fast and in a good temperature

A small take away focused restaurant with seated. The kitchen is open and you can see the chefs work while you wait.
The noodles were very good, but the rest of the ramen could've been better presented. The pork was good.
Ive also tested the gongbao chicken and the chicken was good, but the rice was dried and been on the plate for way too long.

This is the most chill and easy going place you can find in Stockholm. There’s so much diversity going on. People of any kind and a beautiful view on Hornstull if you like to sit down outside by your own and watch life happening. It’s just a place for everyone. Highly recommended if you miss how the world really is outside the Stockholm bubble.

I stopped by this bar sober and asked how much a pint would cost. The bartender replied with, “How much have you been drinking?” and refused to serve me.
I was actually more sober than many of the guests there, so the reaction felt unnecessary and unprofessional. A simple price answer would have been enough.
Not the best first impression, and I don’t plan on coming back.
Cheapest pint I’ve found in Stockholm, genuinely nice bar, nice drink selection, good music and friendly staff

Probably the best, if not the greatest bar in Hornstull. Super friendly staff.

Great price for beer before 8PM - Reasonable after.
Delicious food.
Cleaning frequently.

One of the cheapest bars in and around Liljeholmen... We usually go during weekends and it's worth it.. affordable and very good drinks and food.... Staff is very good and kind..I would strongly recommend... Have a nice time ... Cheers

Picked the nearby station at random and I came in for a coffee but also stayed for ramen and beer. Thus far, the best coffee I have had in Stockholm. The ramen was delicious. I had a fruited sour, brewed in-house, which was a bit on the sweet side for me. Very quaffable nonetheless. Couldn’t fault the staff or service they were impeccable. Well worth a visit.
Great place, awesome variety of beers, I will need to visit couple of times more to try most of them. The staff is friendly and helpful, the ramen I had was super tasty.
Very nice people in there and very good beers too! Next time we will try the food but a must visit if you love craft beer :)

Absolutely a flawless experience.
Knowledgeable staff that can guide you through everything from IPAs to Gin. You will have a great time. Howi in the kitchen made the most amazing ramen I've ever had ❤️

Those guys are great!! I had a very tasty pork belly ramen and some delicious local&crafty beers...they brew themselves some of the beers they have on tap and that's great: quality, freshness, professionalism!
(It's categorised as "nano brewery" on Untappd)
Have a beer and a talk with the guys was a very interesting experience, I am very satisfied about the place! To the next time...I'll come back!

Wanted to eat something light after the train ride and we ended up here. The same chain exists in Gothenburg and they always have good food with decent prices so it is worth trying in the capital. Meatballs were good and the snack plate was enough for 2 to entertain out stomachs before dinner.

An average and traditional Swedish bar with a low level of service. They serve beer in glasses with a brand belonging to a different type of beer.  I have not seen this in any other bar. You expect to get the beer served in beer glasses with the same beer's own brand. I had a strange feeling.

Food is ok
Service is good and lots of space to share good moments with friends around some drinks
Special positive point, they serves pear cider on the pump ! It’s very good

A cosy place to go to for an afterwork. However there's only one vegan option which is a pointed cabbage with some hummus, potato, carrots, vegetables and sauce. Some of the tables weren't clean. So a 3 for food and service, 5 for atmosphere and overall 4 stars.
Classic Swedish bar experience. Nice drinks, a few well achieved dishes and comfortable space.

This happened a year ago. We had beers with few friends at a quite weekday evening. After we finished drinks, around 10 minutes later the guy asked us to leave if we dont order anything else, telling we keep the table occupied meanwhile they had only 10-20% occupancy at the place.
Very nice place to take a drink at. Very competent staff! They can really help out to open your mind and make you taste beers you would never try. Close to the subway and food places. Great  place!
Good price, nice location, awesome food
One of the best places in my travel to Stockholm, I would totally go back, the food was amazing. I fell in love with SOS plate
The food was really good and the service was really good they could help with what beer I should take for the food
Not very fancy but pretty friendly "kvarterskrog". The food is definitely worth the price and beer is fresh.
It was good.
Super friendly staff. Fair prices and nice halloumi burger 😊
It's an excellent place to feel local vibes :)
Loved the owner (Ali) at Örby Bar & Kök.. Don't get me started on the food..simply scrumptious 😋
I have been both for a party when the whole restaurant was rented and we were served a 3 course meal as well as for Christmas. Both times the service and food was impeccable!
Wow! Heart warming !
Great food

Nice visit to Leo's playland! Went there with the family to enjoy a nice Christmas table, good food and the experience is reminiscent of the Finland ferry - FOR AGE RESTRICTIONS, The service was good though and Olivia was very nice!

Nous avons été parfaitement servi d’A à Z, nous avons été invité à un mariage, et ayant plusieurs intolérances gluten, lactose, viande, rouge et d’autres… tout a été parfaitement orchestré, de la part du staff, sans parler de l’organisation, ainsi que la fluidité de tous l’évènement..

Un grand bravo, nous recommandons fortement cet établissement pour tout type d’évènement.
